FIREGROUP AT A GLANCE
Founded in 2016 in Vietnam, FireGroup Technology is committed to building world-class SaaS products that make a global impact on e-commerce. From the outset, we envisioned a world where running an online business is easy, effective, and sustainable, and we have been bringing that vision to life for nearly a decade.
Our portfolio includes TrueProfit, Transcy, OneMobile, OneLoyalty, Zopi, Promer, Ali Reviews. Trusted by more than 450,000 merchants in over 175 countries and recognized by global leaders such as Shopify, Google, Meta, TikTok, and Amazon, FireGroup is proud to elevate Vietnamese innovation onto the world stage.
Why build your career with FireGroup
Make a Global Impact: Contribute to products trusted by merchants worldwide and help solve real challenges that transform e-commerce.
Build with an AI-first Mindset: Use AI as your daily co-pilot to make smarter decisions and accelerate problem-solving at scale.
Unleash Your Potential: Fast-track your growth with career mobility, diverse learning resources, and an agile environment that empowers bold thinkers.
In a Culture That Connects Us As a Whole
What truly defines us is not only our technology but also our people, guided by our seven core values of Courage, Creativity, Growth, Teamwork, Ownership, Trust, and Empathy. At FireGroup, work is more than a job; it is a legacy in the making. We move with speed to solve meaningful challenges, and every Firer is encouraged to dream boldly, lead with courage, and create impact that endures.
Discover how our values come to life in every team and product we build on our culture page.
Responsibilities
Maintaining IT Operations: Ensure the organization operates smoothly and efficiently by maintaining IT activities such as applications, email systems, wireless networks, hardware, software, cameras, and related tools.
User Support: Take primary responsibility for guiding and installing user devices, ensuring that company systems and equipment are used efficiently and conveniently. Handle and resolve issues related to devices, accounts, networks, and more.
System Infrastructure Management: Manage and support IT infrastructure, including network (Wi-Fi), physical servers.
Linux Administration: Utilize and administer Linux systems to ensure stability and performance across the organization's IT infrastructure.
Performing Hardware and Software Upgrades: Ensure that the company’s systems, software, and computer configurations are consistently upgraded.
DevOps Support: Collaborate with DevOps teams to facilitate smooth software development and deployment processes.
VPN Management: Set up, manage, and support VPN systems for company employees.
Sourcing and Working with Suppliers: Identify and engage with suppliers based on the company's pricing regulations & Coordinate with suppliers to find the most optimal solutions.
Service Level Agreements (SLAs): Be familiar with SLAs and ensure proper response times in handling IT requests and issues.
Participating in Help Desk Projects: Participate in Helpdesk team projects and ensure they are completed on time and meet specified requirements.
Qualifications
1-3 years Helpdesk technician experience.
Working knowledge of the following technologies: Google Apps, Office 365 for Mac and PC, Active Directory, software based telephony, Jira service desk, SSO, JAMF, and Airwatch.
Experience with Linux system administration and network infrastructure, including Wi-Fi management.
Highly motivated with a positive attitude and excellent customer service skills.
Familiarity with writing technical documentation.
Understands ticket process, workflow and queue management.
Ability to work independently and within a team environment.
Ability to prioritize and address multiple tasks in a dynamic and high-paced work environment.
Job Benefits
We believe that motivation & personality of the employees are the only shortcut to the promotion of the corporate and contributions to the society. We will try our best to create a corporate environment where all employees can realize their dreams and goals.
Featured Benefits Include
Have opportunity to work with global merchants and join the dynamic, young and friendly project team; stable career path;
Attractive salary based on skills and experience; 13th month salary & seniority bonus; Employee’s marriage, maternity bonus; Birthday voucher gift;
Annual salary review;
PTI Healthcare, annual health check;
Regular technical seminar & external/ internal training courses;
Providing free coffee, tea & snack;
Internal engagement events: Team-building; Town-hall, birthday gift voucher, mid-autumn, new year and kick-off parties, yearly company trip;
FireGroup Sports Clubs: Running, Football, Badminton, etc;
Laptop/ PC/ Monitor are provided.

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
I. Key Accountabilities:
The IT Manager is the accountable owner for the stable, secure, and continuous day-to-day operation of Mekong's IT systems, ensuring that approved IT solutions are delivered and run reliably to support daily business operations.
The IT Manager owns the key results of the IT function, including ensuring that all results delivered by
Senior IT Officer
are achieved as planned.
1. IT Infrastructure & Operations:
Lead full accountability for the operation of all IT systems, servers, networks, hardware, software, and applications across the organization (HCM & HN).
Oversee cloud and platform services (e.g., Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Notion, Trello, BI, etc.) and ensure their stable, secure, and reliable day-to-day operation.
Ensure system availability, performance, operational stability, and business continuity for both office-based and remote users.
Be accountable for incident management, root cause analysis, and timely resolution of system outages or major IT issues.
2. Cybersecurity & Risk Management:
Enforce cybersecurity policies, standards, and operational controls across all IT systems.
Lead the execution and effectiveness of endpoint protection, data backup, disaster recovery, and incident response.
Ensure backup and recovery processes are tested and effective to support business continuity.
Coordinate vulnerability assessments, penetration testing, and remediation actions with security partners and vendors.
3. User Support & Training:
Lead the quality and effectiveness of IT user support services, including helpdesk operations (in-house or outsourced).
Ensure timely resolution of IT incidents related to hardware, software, video conferencing, and remote access.
Ensure consistent IT onboarding and essential user training to enable effective system usage across the organization.
4. Vendor & Budget Management:
Manage operational relationships with IT service providers and software vendors.
Lead contract execution, SLA compliance, service performance, renewals, and cost control.
Be accountable for vendor delivery quality and alignment with agreed operational requirements.
Support budgeting, payment requests, and periodic vendor performance reviews.
5. Systems & Compliance:
Lead the operation and ongoing reliability of fund management–specific systems (e.g., CRM, data rooms, portfolio monitoring tools).
Ensure systems are operated in compliance with data privacy regulations and internal policies.
Act as the IT point of accountability in supporting internal and external audits from a technology and systems operation perspective.
6. Digital Enablement & Project Execution:
Execute and roll out approved digital, automation, and AI-related initiatives in alignment with company strategy defined by leadership.
Coordinate internal IT resources and vendors to deliver digital solutions effectively.
Ensure deployed solutions are operationally stable, secure, and adopted by users.
Monitor post-implementation effectiveness and support continuous improvement from an operational perspective.
7. Other Taks:
Handle administrative task related to your activities (contract with vendors, making payment request, etc)
Other tasks requested by Partners or Directors
II. Key Requirements:
Minimum 3–5 years of experience in an IT Manager or IT Head role, with full ownership of end‑to‑end IT operations, including systems, infrastructure, cloud environments, system uptime, and incident management.
Proven ability to work with C‑suite stakeholders (CEO/Director), with a thorough approach to understanding requirements, accurately capturing details, and proactively clarifying any unclear points before execution.
Demonstrated leadership and ownership, including managing IT staff and/or external vendors and taking accountability when issues arise.
Solid understanding of enterprise IT architecture and modern delivery practices (e.g. Agile) is a strong advantage.
Fluent English Communications.
Results‑oriented: Focuses on outcomes, takes ownership, and delivers commitments end to end
Question & Discovery mindset: Asks the right questions to thoroughly understand requirements and clarify expectations.
Solution‑driven: Converts issues and requirements into practical, effective solutions.

FINANCE ASSISTANT
At GETZ, we are seeking a
Finance Assistant
who is responsible for keeping track of an organization's finances and supporting the Financial Manager in daily operation tasks.
Key Responsibilities
Singapore financial tasks:
Monitor and reconcile accounts receivable and payable to ensure accuracy and timely processing
Execute monthly fee collection and follow up to ensure prompt payments
Handle general financial and administrative duties to support smooth operations
Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in the accounting system
Prepare and submit Goods and Services Tax (GST) filings and ensure compliance with local regulatory requirements
Vietnamese financial tasks:
Oversee and manage monthly accounts payable processes with accuracy and timeliness
Maintain up-to-date and accurate financial records in the accounting system
Prepare and submit tax filings including Value-Added Tax (VAT), Corporate Income Tax (CIT), and Personal Income Tax (PIT) in compliance with local laws
Organize and compile required documentation for annual financial audits
Generate periodic financial reports as needed for internal and external stakeholders
Provide ad-hoc support to the Back Office team as required
Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance
Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in accounting or finance (preferably in a general accountant or bookkeeping role)
Strong knowledge of Vietnamese accounting principles and regulations
Familiarity with international accounting standards (Singapore accounting standards is a plus)
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)
Highly organized with a problem-solving mindset and keen attention to detail
Strong communication skills in English (written and verbal)
Ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently in a fast-paced environment
Preferred Qualifications
Proficiency in Google Sheets
Experience with MISA and Xero accounting software is an advantage
Personal Attributes
Mature, detail-oriented, and highly responsible
Results-driven with a customer-focused approach
Proactive, adaptable, and able to work independently
SALARY & BONUS
Highly competitive salary
Salary review: up to 2 times/year
OUTSTANDING BENEFIT PROGRAMS
Premium Healthcare Package for Staff and Family Members
Diverse Holidays & Special Events Bonuses & incentives
Family Financial Support - Education for up to 2 kids
Lunch Allowance
Professional Training and Development Budget
Global Exposure and Traveling Opportunities:
○ Sponsored Trip to Singapore to broaden your horizon and training opportunities
○ Annual company-wide Overseas Rest & Relax Trip
Bi-Annual Recognition: Salary Reviews and Appreciation
WORKING TIME
From
Monday - Friday | 8:00 - 17:30
(1h30 lunch break), flexible to work from home every Friday
WORK LOCATION
8th floor, Vietnam Post Building, 271 Nguyen Van Linh, Thanh Khe Ward, Danang, Vietnam
CONTACT

job_title: Ho Chi Minh Cabin Crew Opportunities (Dubai Based, Relocation Provided)
location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
Job Purpose
A personality that shines, the ability to adapt to any situation and make people feel at ease. These are a few of the qualities we’re looking for in our cabin crew.
As the face of Emirates, you’ll be the person customers turn to for help and direction when they fly with us, so you need to be friendly, observant and able to provide the right support.
Being a member of the cabin crew is so much more than a service role - safety is our highest priority. You’ll need to lead confidently and take control when it comes to managing aircraft services, security, and safety procedures. This comes from the world-class learning experience our crew receive at our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai.
Qualifications & Experience
Here are some other things we look for in our cabin crew:
You’ve had more than a year’s experience in hospitality/customer service
You have a positive attitude and the natural ability to provide excellent service in a team environment, dealing with people from many cultures
Your minimum qualification is high school graduate (Grade 12)
You need to be fluent in written and spoken English
You’re at least 160cm tall and can reach 212 cm while standing on tiptoes, to enable you to reach emergency equipment on all aircraft types
No visible tattoos while you’re in Emirates cabin crew uniform (without covering them with bandages or cosmetics)
As Emirates cabin crew, you’ll be based in Dubai and will need to meet the UAE's employment visa requirements
Aside from the requirements of the role, you should be determined to always perform to the highest standards, focus on being solution oriented, and be able to manage a demanding work schedule. You should have the ability to deliver an authentic experience to our customers. You’ll be culturally aware and reflect the Emirates personality - professional, empathetic, progressive, visionary and cosmopolitan.
Before clicking the Apply button, please keep the following
documents
ready to submit with your application:
Recent CV in English
Recent photo
Salary & Benefits
Your pay is made up of three components:
a fixed basic salary,
an hourly pay for operated flights and
an overseas meal allowance.
Basic salary = AED 4,980 / month,
Flying Pay = AED 69.60 / hour based on avg. 80-100 hours / month,
Average Total Pay = AED 11,244 / month (~USD 3,100, EUR 2,600 or GBP 2,280)
* These are approximate numbers for Grade II (Economy Class).
Meal allowances for night stops are credited to the salary in arrears the following month.
Hotel accommodation as well as transport to and from the airport is provided by the company.

location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
General Purpose:
The IT Support Engineer provides Tier 2/3 technical support and serves as a key escalation resource for service desk issues. This role is responsible for diagnosing and resolving moderately complex technical problems across endpoints, collaboration platforms, identity systems, and core infrastructure.
In addition to reactive support, this position plays an active role in system maintenance, security enforcement, automation efforts, documentation, and process optimization. The ideal candidate is highly customer-focused, technically proficient, and capable of working independently while collaborating closely with senior infrastructure engineers.
Position Summary, Responsibilities and Expectations:
• Troubleshoot and resolve complex hardware, software, network, and cloud-related issues
• Manage incidents, service requests, and problem records in ITSM tools (Jira Service Management)
• Perform root cause analysis and contribute to long-term problem resolution
• Meet defined SLAs and KPIs while maintaining high customer satisfaction
• Develop and maintain technical knowledge base documentation
Endpoint & Device Management
• Deploy, configure, and support Windows and macOS endpoints
• Administer endpoint management platforms (Microsoft Intune, Autopilot, JAMF, SCCM or similar)
• Support device compliance policies, patching, encryption, and endpoint security tools
• Manage hardware lifecycle, asset inventory, and imaging processes
Microsoft 365 & Identity Administration
• Administer Microsoft 365 services (Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive)
• Manage user provisioning and deprovisioning processes
• Configure and troubleshoot Azure AD / Entra ID, MFA, conditional access, and group policies
• Support enterprise collaboration and SaaS platforms
Infrastructure & Systems Support
• Support network connectivity issues (DNS, DHCP, VPN, wireless, routing/switching fundamentals)
• Assist with VMware vSphere administration and virtual machine management
• Provide support for Windows server environments and basic Linux systems
• Assist with backup verification and disaster recovery procedures
Security & Compliance
• Enforce endpoint security standards and patch management processes
• Support vulnerability remediation efforts
• Participate in security incident response activities
• Maintain least-privilege access and identity governance best practices
Continuous Improvement
• Identify recurring issues and recommend process or technical improvements
• Assist in automation initiatives (PowerShell scripting or similar)
• Participate in on-call rotation as required
• Contribute to service metrics reporting and operational reviews
Essential Skills and Experience:
• 3–5 years of hands-on IT support experience in a corporate environment
• Proven experience operating in a Tier 2 or escalation support role
• Strong troubleshooting skills across Windows and macOS platforms
• Experience administering Microsoft 365 and Azure AD / Entra ID
• Experience with endpoint management solutions (Intune, JAMF, etc.)
• Working knowledge of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN)
• Experience with ITSM/service desk platforms
• Strong understanding of endpoint security and patch management practices
• Excellent and fluent English communication and customer service skills
Preferred Qualifications:
• Experience with VMware vSphere or similar virtualization platforms
• Experience supporting Windows Server and/or Linux systems
• Experience with Palo Alto Networks firewalls
• ITIL Foundation certification or working knowledge of ITIL framework
• Basic scripting/automation experience (PowerShell preferred)
• Experience supporting hybrid or cloud-first environments

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
SUMMARY
Join Aperia Solutions, a leader in SaaS solutions for the Payments and Compliance industries. Aperia is a Texas-based fintech and managed consultancy firm that creates custom SaaS applications and other software-based solutions for the payments, banking, and processing industry. Founded in 1999, Aperia offers business intelligence, risk management, compliance, and customer intelligence platforms. With offices in Dallas, Washington DC, and Vietnam, Aperia is a fast-paced, global organization that strives to improve efficiency in compliance, risk, and customer service operations. Aperia’s clients include banks, processors, payment facilitators, merchant service providers, independent sales organizations, and government entities. A career at Aperia promises a great challenge, culture, and opportunities to forge your own path.
JOB DESCRIPTION
At Aperia, we rely on a dynamic team of IT. We’re seeking a highly motivated and hands-on experienced IT Manager who is ready to work with new technologies and to implement comprehensive IT processes in a forward-thinking organization that’s always pushing boundaries. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of the IT team, provide leading and managing IT activities for supporting Aperia’s products. The ideal candidate has a strong background in team leadership, performance management, on-prem and Cloud transformation experience.
CORE RESPONSIBILITIES
Oversee all technology operations (e.g. DevOps, CI/CD, systems administration, network administration, desktop support) and evaluate them according to established goals.
Maintain IT infrastructure including operating systems, Office365, email systems, security and development tools, applications, servers, desktop, laptops, software, hardware, Azure services and Internet connectivity
Track and maintain hardware and software inventory
Oversee all cloud services required for FedRAMP High compliance
Research and evaluate emerging technologies related to Cloud services, and DevOps
Evaluate current and future technology capabilities and make recommendations to advance products.
Recommend efficient and cost-effective infrastructure equipment, infrastructure as a service (IAAS), software, and software as a service (SAAS).
Inspect and monitor use of infrastructure equipment, cloud services, and software to ensure functionality and efficiency.
Manage IT initiatives by business priority and be able to clearly communicate statuses to management.
Collaborate with security, database, development teams and other professionals to provide superior service levels to the company.
FUNCTIONAL RESPONSIBILITIES
Analyze business requirements as a whole and all departments to determine technology needs
Analyze infrastructure and cloud services need to support a suite of enterprise Software as a Service products
Analyse technologies, processes, and vendors continually to find areas for improvement
Ensure IT infrastructure and software services achieve SLAs
Maintain, monitor and proactive care IT services to keep business continuity and disaster recovery
Communicate relentlessly with team, manager, leadership, and sponsors to ensure transparency.
Effectively work on multiple concurrent projects and with multiple competing priorities.
Conduct training for employees to use software/hardware, to troubleshoot issues and provide technical support when needed
REQUIRED SKILLS
Technical
5+ of experience in IT management
Azure cloud infrastructure (VDI, DevBox, AD Connect, networking)
Infrastructure as code, platform engineering (terraform, bicep, configuration management)
On-premises infrastructure (Windows Server, VMware, networking)
Cisco ASA/Firepower configuration
PCI DSS or similar compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc)
Patch management and change control
Backup and disaster recovery
Leadership & Coordination
IT team management (local and remote coordination)
Cross-functional collaboration with DevOps and project teams
Vendor management
Communication with US-based leadership
Adaptability and flexibility
Resilience
Operational Skills
Helpdesk and support services oversight
Documentation and knowledge management
Process improvement and automation
THINGS THAT WILL SEPARATE YOU FROM THE REST
Experience in working with global teams to lead IT initiatives.
EDUCATION
BSc/BA, preferred in Information Technology, System
ELIGIBILITY REQUIREMENTS
Must be willing to submit to a background investigation and drug test as part of the selection process.
JOB TYPE
Full-Time

Monday to Friday

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Location:
HCMC, Vietnam
About Us
TGM Research is one of the fastest growing and most innovative market research companies, offering valuable insights to businesses across various industries. We are committed to delivering high-quality market research solutions to our clients by connecting them with the right participants through our online panels.
Job Description
To support our global growth, our market research company is seeking an
IT Support Specialist
to keep our technology running smoothly for both our Global Team (online) and Vietnam Team (onsite). This role will focus on providing fast and reliable technical support, maintaining system performance, and implementing best practices in a dynamic, collaborative environment.
As an
IT Support Specialist
at TGM Research reporting to the Chief Experience Officer, you will have the opportunity to apply your technical expertise in a real-world business environment and gain valuable hands-on experience with a variety of systems, applications, and network tools. You will collaborate closely with colleagues across departments to troubleshoot issues, maintain IT infrastructure, and support the integration of technology into our business processes. Role Overview
The job holder is responsible for managing and delivering technology services through internal teams and third-party suppliers, overseeing IT software/hardware procurement, ensuring data privacy, information security, and disaster recovery plans, and managing the local technology budget.
The role also includes prioritizing and managing IT project requirements, supporting business teams IT needs, implementing group-level IT security and infrastructure changes, and maintaining business continuity plans. Collaboration with global teams and service providers is essential.
Key Accountabilities
Technology management:
Accountable for the delivery and management of all technology services through PVA’s technology team and via 3rd party regional suppliers and partners
Manage the IT software/hardware assets procurement process and respective vendor communications
Be the Data Privacy Officer (DPO) ensure compliance with Vietnam’s Personal Data Protection Law, develop and implement data privacy policies, oversee data processing and cross-border transfers, conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments, manage data breach response and reporting, and act as the primary liaison with regulatory authorities.
Oversight and ensure high-quality standards related to the management of Information risk and security whilst maintaining high system and information integrity and IT disaster recovery plans
Creation and ongoing management of the local technology budget including validation of any group recharges
IT Project Requirements Management
Prioritization and management of project initiatives and the creation of realistic timetables for the evaluation, development, and deployment of all technology solutions
Design and manage the data interaction between different systems of group and LBUs.
Support, implement and manage the IT requirements from other business teams, e.g. finance, compliance and investment
Group IT Project Requirements Management
Support and implement the IT requirements about IT security, infrastructure, architecture change from group levels
Maintain close working relationships with all teams across the global business including third party service providers
Business Continuity Management
Oversight and ensure that effective IT Disaster Recovery plan is produced, reviewed, amended and updated
Maintain and update Business Continuity Plan and Incident Management Plan according to Group requirement
Lead BCP arrangement and report to Group on regular basis
Qualifications & Requirements
Other tasks assigned by the manager.
Experience working with in-house and outsource technology service providers
Experience working with a multi-cultural multi-regional team
At least 3 years of experience in personal data processing, cybersecurity, or data security
Demonstrated experience with stakeholder management and negotiation skills is required to work with business and technology stakeholders.
Flexible and adaptable in a dynamic environment where priorities shift as we manage across multiple projects and hard deadlines.
Demonstrated ability to adapt to new technologies and learn quickly.
Proven IT management experience in foreign asset management company
Good written and verbal communication in English
Team player and yet able to work independently when required
Eastspring is an equal opportunity employer.
We provide equality of opportunity of benefits for all who apply and who perform work for our organisation irrespective of sex, race, age, ethnic origin, educational, social and cultural background, marital status, pregnancy and maternity, religion or belief, disability or part-time / fixed-term work, or any other status protected by applicable law. job_title: General Manager, Customer Service (Technical Director level)
location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Job Purpose:
Ricoh Vietnam is seeking a senior and strategic
General Manager – Customer Services
to lead the end‑to‑end customer service function nationwide.
This role is fully accountable for customer experience, service operations excellence, digital transformation, and service profitability, ensuring alignment with Ricoh Vietnam’s business strategy and Ricoh APAC service governance.
The position plays a critical role in positioning Customer Service as a value‑creating, customer‑centric, and financially sustainable function.
Duties and Responsibilities:
1. Customer Service Strategy & Leadership
•        Define and execute Customer Service strategy aligned with RVN (Ricoh Vietnam) and Ricoh APAC direction
•        Translate strategy into annual plans, KPIs, and improvement roadmaps
•        Represent Customer Service at SMT and regional governance forums
•        Ensure compliance with Ricoh standards, policies, and regulations
2. Customer Experience & Satisfaction
•        Own and drive CSAT, NPS, and complaint management performance
•        Establish strong escalation and recovery mechanisms for key customers
•        Establish VOC governance and use service insights to drive continuous improvement in customer experience
•        Build long-term, trusted partnerships with strategic customers and strategic partners
3. After-sales & Service Operations Excellence
•        Set strategic direction and governance for nationwide aftersales service operations
•        Hold accountability for overall service performance, stability, and scalability across regions
•        Establish service standards, SLAs, and performance expectations for Field Service and Service Operations
•        Review and steer outcomes on core KPIs (First time fix, response time, resolution time, uptime, productivity)
•        Act as executive escalation owner for critical customers and systemic service risks
4. Service Planning, Supply & Inventory Management
•        Provide strategic oversight of service planning, workforce capacity, and dispatch models
•        Ensure service resources are aligned to business demand, growth, and cost efficiency
•        Govern service supply chain performance including meter management, consumables, spare parts, and warehouses
•        Drive optimization of inventory and working capital (e.g., aging, turns) to improve service readiness through clear policies and controls
•        Align service supply strategy with Finance and SCM to support profitability objectives
5. Quality Control & Continuous Improvement
•        Establish service quality standards and monitoring frameworks
•        Drive continuous improvement initiatives (process, capability, tools)
•        Reduce rework, repeat calls, and operational inefficiencies
•        Promote data-driven service management and decision-making
6. Digital Transformation & Automation
•        Define and sponsor the Customer Service digital transformation roadmap
•        Ensure adoption of digital platforms enabling omni‑channel support, remote service, and data visibility
•        Drive use of analytics, automation, and AI to improve service efficiency and customer experience
•        Act as executive sponsor for regional and local service system initiatives
•        Ensure digital investments deliver measurable impact on cost, productivity, and service quality
7. Financial & P&L Accountability
•        Full P&L ownership of Customer Service
•        Grow service revenue (contracts, consumables, value-added services)
•        Control cost of serving, warranty cost, inventory, and operating expenses
•        Improve service margin, productivity, and profitability
8. People Leadership & Capability Development
•        Lead, coach, and develop service managers and teams nationwide
•        Build strong technical capability, certification, and training frameworks
•        Implement performance management, succession planning, and career paths
•        Drive engagement, accountability, and a customer-centric culture
9. Cross-functional & Regional Collaboration
•        Work closely with Sales, Marketing, and other back-office departments
•        Ensure service readiness and alignment with sales commitments
•        Align local operations with Ricoh APAC service governance and best practices
Requirements
Education & Experience
•        Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, IT, Business, or related fields
•        Minimum 10 years’ experience in Customer Service / Aftersales operations
•        Minimum 5 years’ experience in senior leadership and P&L ownership
•        Experience in office equipment/printing and/or digital services (IT services) is strongly preferred
•        Experience working with regional / global governance is an advantage
Skills & Competencies
•        Strong leadership, execution, and change management capability
•        Customer‑centric and data‑driven mindset
•        Proven ability to drive operational excellence and profitability
•        Strong analytical, problem‑solving, and decision‑making skills
•        Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
•        Fluent English (spoken and written)
Benefits
•       Senior leadership role with end‑to‑end ownership of Customer Service
•       Direct impact on customer experience, digital transformation, and profitability
•       Work in a regional, international environment with Ricoh APAC exposure
•       Competitive salary package with performance‑based incentives
•       Comprehensive insurance and healthcare benefits
•       13th‑month salary, annual performance review, and bonus
•       Hybrid working model combining office‑based and remote working to support flexibility and performance

Job Description

Professional Qualification - Microsoft Certified/CCNA is a plus

Competent at documenting standard operating procedures and knowledge articles
Ability to cover after-office hours and weekend support if there are any infrastructure issues or activities

Passionate in IT technology and wants to make a difference with technology solutions
Good interpersonal and communication skills to interact effectively at all levels
Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills

Số lượng: 1 người
Kinh nghiệm: 1 - 2 năm
Bằng cấp: Trung cấp trở lên
Cấp bậc: Nhân viên
Nơi làm việc: Đồng Nai

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Vị trí IT Help Desk đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc hỗ trợ kỹ thuật cho người dùng cuối, bảo đảm hệ thống thông tin của tổ chức hoạt động ổn định và hiệu quả. Cụ thể, người giữ vị trí này sẽ chịu trách nhiệm giải quyết các vấn đề kỹ thuật, từ đơn giản đến phức tạp, qua điện thoại hoặc trực tiếp. Họ cũng sẽ cung cấp hướng dẫn và tư vấn cho người dùng về cách sử dụng các ứng dụng và phần mềm hiệu quả. Bên cạnh đó, IT Help Desk còn theo dõi và ghi chép các sự cố kỹ thuật để phân tích và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống thông tin.
Xác định, chẩn đoán, giải quyết vấn đề của người sử dụng máy tính cá nhân, phần mềm máy tính và phần cứng, mạng, internet, e-mail, dial-in, các vấn đề truy cập mạng; và các vấn đề máy in, photo copy, điện thoại, camera…
Cung cấp hỗ trợ cài đặt, cấu hình cho người dùng các phần cứng máy tính để bàn, phần mềm, và thiết bị ngoại vi.
Vận hành và duy trì hệ thống server, mạng LAN, WAN, camera…
Sửa chữa đúng hạn các thiết bị hoặc bảo hành, bảo trì từ nhà cung cấp bên thứ ba theo thỏa thuận hợp đồng.
Chịu trách nhiệm bảo trì, sửa chữa các thiết bị máy tính, mạng toàn công ty. Thực hiện sửa chữa phần cứng máy tính, các thiết bị máy tính PC và các thiết bị ngoại vi không được thỏa thuận bảo dưỡng của bên thứ ba nhà cung cấp.
Giúp cài đặt mạng nội bộ, hệ thống cáp và các thiết bị như card mạng, hub và switch.
Hỗ trợ, hướng dẫn người dùng xử lý các vấn đề liên quan đến IT. Phối hợp với các kỹ thuật viên khác trong việc tạo ra tài liệu liệu hướng dẫn cho người dùng cuối câu hỏi thường gặp (FAQs).
Kiểm kê, quản lý tài sản cố định & Các công việc khác theo yêu cầu của cấp trên.
Yêu Cầu Công Việc
Có kinh nghiệm ít nhất 1 năm, tốt nghiệp trung cấp, cao đẳng công nghệ thông tin trở lên
Có kiến thức windows server, hệ thống camera, Database
Có kiến thức chuyên môn cơ bản về các hệ thống máy chủ, các hệ điều hành
Có kiến thức về hệ thống mạng LAN/WAN, cấu hình các thiết bị mạng
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập hoặc làm việc theo nhóm tốt, luôn chủ động trong công việc, có tinh thần trách nhiệm và tính kỷ luật cao
Có thể đọc - hiểu & làm báo cáo bằng Tiếng anh

job_title: Data Center Technician - Da Nang - On-site
location: Đà Nang, Da Nang City, Vietnam
job_description:
Reboot Monkey is a global leader in IT solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your IT operations. We provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. Our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. We’re seeking skilled Freelance Data Center Technicians to join our growing team. If you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you.
Job Overview:
As a Freelance Data Center Technician,
you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence.
Key Responsibilities:
Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.
Monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability.
Configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including Cisco and Juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards.
Manage and troubleshoot both Linux and Windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date.
Document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance, providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations.
Implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security.
Collaborate with remote IT teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation.
What We Offer:
Flexibility: Work around your existing freelance or permanent job. You choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment.
Professional Environment: Join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of IT.
Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts.
Growth Opportunities: Work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field.
Data center or IT infrastructure experience
Server hardware and networking knowledge
Reliable and professional with strong communication
Proximity to local data center facilities
Flexible schedule for on-call/emergency work

job_description:
Ready to kick-start your career in fintech with GoTymeX?
🚀
Join our
GoTymeX Internship Program 2026
— where your growth is our priority.
At GoTymeX, we're at the forefront of building and operating multi-country digital banks. Our mission is to revolutionize the financial services industry through technology — creating seamless and secure financial solutions that change the way people interact with money.
We believe that
great people build great products
, and that starts with investing in the next generation of talent.
We're looking for a passionate
Data Analyst
Intern
to play a key role in shaping the future of banking products and services through cutting-edge technologies.
Requirements
What will you contribute? (Responsibility)
Must-have:
Pursuing or recently completed/graduated with a Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field (Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, Engineering, or related)
Curious, open to feedback, and eager to learn complex domains (payments, accounts, risk)
Disciplined and detail-oriented, keeping the bigger-picture system in mind
English proficiency — written and spoken (team operates in English). Clear communicator; collaborative and respectful teammate
Critical thinker — questions assumptions, spots inconsistencies, and asks "does this actually make sense?" before presenting results
Analytically minded — breaks complex problems into smaller parts and lets data guide conclusions over gut feel
Go-getter — takes initiative, raises their hand when they spot a gap, and follows through without being chased
Strong SQL — joins, window functions, CTEs, and aggregations
Strong Python for data analysis (pandas, numpy, matplotlib/seaborn, scikit-learn)
Foundational understanding of statistics and ML concepts (regression, classification, clustering)
Nice to have:
Familiarity with cloud services (AWS — S3, Glue, Athena, or similar)
Exposure to a lakehouse or data platform (Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery)
Experience with a BI tool (Power BI, Tableau, Metabase, Looker)
Familiarity with git and version control
Prior internship, capstone project, or Kaggle experience involving real datasets
Interest in FinTech, digital banking, or financial data
Having a portfolio of personal projects is a plus
Benefits
Why GoTymeX?
🌏
Global Impact
- Be part of a team reshaping financial access across multiple countries
💡
Bold & Ambitious
- We tackle real problems at scale and give you the space to think big
🌱
Growth-First
- Your learning is built into how we work, not an afterthought
🤝
People-Centered
- You'll be supported by mentors who want to see you succeed
⚡
Move Fast, Build Well
- Work with modern tech and agile teams that move with purpose
and many other cool benefits:
Allowance: 6,000,000 VND per month (gross)
Meal allowance: 730,000 VND per month
Free motorbike parking
Insurance: Social insurance as required by Vietnamese labor law, plus premium healthcare for you and your family - no seniority requirement.
Annual leave: 15 days of paid leave per year (pro-rated), supporting a healthy work-life balance
Training programs: Keep learning and growing with access to training and development programs
Many cool company and team activities: You are invited to many activities - all-hands, happy-hour, sports, clubs, and after-work events that build connections beyond the office
GoTyme is on a mission to
reimagine banking through a beautiful and empowering experience
— and we exist to do one thing above all else:
unleash human potential.
As a multi-country digital banking group built for emerging markets, we design and operate next-generation financial platforms that make banking
delightfully simple
,
radically transparent
, and
surprisingly human
— for millions of people across the world.
At the heart of this is
GoTymeX
— our technology engine. We are the team of engineers, designers, and problem solvers who build and run the platforms that power our banks at scale. From a single market to many, we deliver replicable, world-class solutions customized to the unique needs of each community we serve.
We believe that
great technology changes how people bank
— and that the people who build it deserve an environment where they can do the best work of their lives. At GoTymeX, you won't just write code or ship features. You'll be part of a bold, international team solving real problems at real scale, backed by leaders who invest in your growth and give you the autonomy to make meaningful decisions.
We build things that matter. We work with the best. And we're just getting started.

Location: Ho Chi Minh
Expired date: 31/03/2026
Team: Engineering
About Urbox
UrBox is Vietnam’s leading digital gifting & loyalty platform that enables businesses to integrate their reward & loyalty programs with an ever-growing network of more than 350 brands & 20,000 accepted online and offline stores in Vietnam.
UrBox has the widest network of clients in loyalty in Vietnam and provides loyalty & reward solutions to many big organizations in the aviation, banking, FMCG, Insurance, Real Estate industries and more.
Key Responsibilities
IT Helpdesk Leader
is responsible for leading the IT Helpdesk team, ensuring the company’s IT systems operate smoothly and securely. The role involves managing support operations, overseeing IT infrastructure, coordinating internal IT services, and supporting business operations, including Google Workspace administration.
Lead and manage the IT Helpdesk team, assign tasks, and monitor performance.
Receive, prioritize, track, and ensure timely resolution of technical support requests from departments.
Troubleshoot and provide advanced support for hardware (computers, printers, scanners) and network (LAN/WAN) issues.
Oversee installation, configuration, and upgrade of software and systems.
Ensure effective use, operation, and availability of IT equipment across the company.
Plan and perform periodic maintenance of IT systems and devices.
Manage, administer, and optimize Google Workspace services.
Supervise IT onboarding (equipment preparation, account setup, user guidance) and offboarding (equipment and account recovery) processes.
Coordinate IT equipment procurement, inventory management, vendor support, and repair activities.
Develop and improve IT support processes, documentation, and internal guidelines.
Report IT operations, issues, and improvement plans to management; collaborate with stakeholders to enhance IT systems.
Requirements
Graduated from College/University in Information Technology.
Computer Networks, System Administration, Computer Science, or equivalent.
Able to read technical English documents (TOEIC 500+ or equivalent).
Minimum 3-5 years of experience in IT Helpdesk or IT Support.
At least 1 year of experience in a team lead, senior, or equivalent role is preferred.
Strong knowledge of computer hardware and peripherals (printers, scanners, etc.).
Proficient in Windows OS (client and basic server knowledge).
Solid understanding of network devices (Router, Switch).
Ability to lead, coach, and support team members.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and coordination skills.
Proactive mindset, high sense of responsibility, and good time management.
Preferably holds CCNA, MCSA, or equivalent certifications.
Linux OS knowledge is a plus.

job_title: Data Center Technician - Da Nang - On-site
location: Đà Nang, Da Nang City, Vietnam
job_description:
Reboot Monkey is a global leader in IT solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your IT operations. We provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. Our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. We’re seeking skilled Freelance Data Center Technicians to join our growing team. If you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you.
Job Overview:
As a Freelance Data Center Technician,
you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence.
Key Responsibilities:
Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.
Monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability.
Configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including Cisco and Juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards.
Manage and troubleshoot both Linux and Windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date.
Document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance, providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations.
Implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security.
Collaborate with remote IT teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation.
What We Offer:
Flexibility: Work around your existing freelance or permanent job. You choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment.
Professional Environment: Join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of IT.
Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts.
Growth Opportunities: Work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field.
Education:
Associate or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field is preferred but not required.
Experience:
3+ years of experience in data center operations, with a strong focus on independent or freelance projects.
Technical Skills:
Extensive hands-on experience with Cisco and Juniper networking devices.
Strong proficiency in managing and troubleshooting Windows and Linux-based systems.
Solid understanding of networking principles (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLANs).
Experience with virtualization technologies such as VMware or Hyper-V is a plus.
Certifications:
Valid certifications like Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS, or CompTIA Linux+ are highly desirable.
General Requirements:
Ability to travel to various data center locations on short notice.
Flexibility to work outside regular hours, including nights and weekends if required.
Must have access to necessary tools and equipment to perform data center tasks.
Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and remotely.
Excellent communication skills for collaboration with remote teams.

job_description:
Summary
Join Aperia Solutions, a leader in SaaS solutions for the Payments and Compliance industries. Aperia is a Texas-based fintech and managed consultancy firm that creates custom SaaS applications and other software-based solutions for the payments, banking, and processing industry. Founded in 1999, Aperia offers business intelligence, risk management, compliance, and customer intelligence platforms. With offices in Dallas, Washington DC, and Vietnam, Aperia is a fast-paced, global organization that strives to improve efficiency in compliance, risk, and customer service operations. Aperia’s clients include banks, processors, payment facilitators, merchant service providers, independent sales organizations, and government entities. A career at Aperia promises a great challenge, culture, and opportunities to forge your own path.
Job Description
At Aperia, we rely on a dynamic team of IT. We’re seeking
a (Senior/Middle) System Administrator
who is ready to work with new technologies and architectures in a forward-thinking organization that’s always pushing boundaries. This person will have mainly System/Infrastructure responsible. The ideal candidate is also able to cover Network/Security areas and Help Desk tasks (when required).
Core Responsibilities
Troubleshoot incident report, updating information and restoring/delivering service request IT service(s) within Operation Level Agreements / Service Level Agreement.
Analyze, collaborate and resolve the root causes in problem task.
Create, implement and document in authorized change. Also attending CAB’s meetings when required.
Overview and update CMDB is accurate and up to date.
Evaluate, present and discuss with line manager on Objective and Key Results (OKRs)/KPI method monthly and quarterly.
Work on flexible shift patterns (on called duty or onsite) to deliver 247 IT Managed services, with Customer service mindset, when required.
Functional Responsibilities
Comply and contribute to IT policies, standards, SOP and guidelines.
Act as a team player with other internal departments/teams, on technical views, to offer and convince requester to follow best practice designing and continue improvement solutions.
Self-study and propose valuable training courses (soft and hard skill) and technology trending to manager.
Volunteer to conduct internal training and working with sharing knowledge spirit.
Compliance with Conversation, Feedback and Recognitions (CFRs) method to build up company’s culture.
Communicate and network with 3rd partner’s experts in escalated situations.
Deliver acceptance into service into operational state.
Assist and contribute on-going projects if required.
Technical Skills
Good command of spoken and written English
Int'l certified or hand-on >= 3 years’ experience providing administrative and technical support to enterprise level clients
Cloud technologies, in at least TWO of the below areas
Private:
VMWare: ESXi, vSphere, vMotion, HA, DRS, FT, SRM…
Microsoft Hyper-V: OS, SCCM…
Other platforms.
Public:
Int’l provider: Azure, AWS, IBM, Google, Salesforce, Fujitsu…
Local provider: CMC, Viettel, FPT, VNPT…
Enterprise level support environments, in at least FOUR of the below areas
Application/System Services:
AD, DNS, DHCP, file sharing, print, web and email.
Unified Communications & Collaboration Sys.: PBX, conference and message services.
Office 365 or other online services.
OS series: Windows Server, Unix & Linux server.
Physical devices:
Server Device (non-blade/blade): IBM, Dell, HP, Cisco or other servers with console technologies, such as: IMM, iDRAC, iLO…
End user device: PC, office equipment, mobility device…
Network
LAN: wired (access switch), wireless (access point) …
WAN: connection (FTTH, leased line), router, VPN, Load Balancer…
Security
Total Visibility: ACS, CCTV, RADIUS, monitoring, Proxy…
Complete Control: firewall, WAF, antispam, WSUS patching, McAfee, Symantec, TrendMicro, BitLocker, SafeGuard, MFA…
Things that will separate you from the
rest.
Experience in leading team.
ITIL qualification or awareness of the ITIL processes and ticket systems (ServiceNOW, Atlassian, TOPdesk, ZenDesk…).
Experience in a multi-client solutions provider with or without legacy systems.
Education or Certifications
BSc/BA, preferred in Information Technology, System
Job Type
Full-Time
Work Location (Hybrid)
The Six8 Building, 24-26 Phan Dinh Giot Street, Ward 2, Tan Binh District, HCMC
Benefits
Health insurance
Dental insurance
Life insurance
Paid time off
Parental leave
Childcare assistance
Education reimbursement
This job description is not intended to be all-inclusive. An employee may also perform other reasonable related business duties as assigned by their immediate supervisor or management. Principals only.

job_description:
Job Description
Vị trí: Kỹ sư IT
Mức lương: 700-1000 USD
Địa điểm: Bắc Giang
Mô Tả Công Việc
Duy trì và quản lý hệ thống mạng CNTT của công ty.
Quản lý máy chủ và các thiết bị CNTT khác, bao gồm bảo trì hệ thống, sao lưu, nâng cấp và thiết lập ứng dụng mới.
Cấu hình thiết bị mạng, hệ điều hành, cơ sở dữ liệu và máy chủ của công ty.
Đảm bảo an toàn hệ thống bằng cách quản lý phần mềm diệt vi-rút, nâng cấp hệ điều hành và thực hiện các biện pháp bảo mật.
Tối ưu hóa tài nguyên để đáp ứng hiệu quả các yêu cầu kinh doanh.
Hướng dẫn và đào tạo người dùng về phần cứng và phần mềm.
Đề xuất cải tiến chương trình và quy trình để đơn giản hóa hoặc nâng cao hiệu suất hoạt động.
Phát triển ứng dụng (Java hoặc C#) theo yêu cầu của người dùng.
Quản lý và duy trì cơ sở dữ liệu.
Yêu Cầu
Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành liên quan.
Hơn 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực CNTT, đặc biệt trong bộ phận hỗ trợ CNTT, ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm tại công ty đa quốc gia.
Thành thạo tiếng Trung giao tiếp.
Am hiểu về MS Windows Server 2008, AD, DNS, DHCP, IIS, FTP, VPN, Exchange Server, SQL, Firewall, Router.
Có kinh nghiệm quản lý hệ thống thông tin (IS) và có khả năng cung cấp giải pháp tổng thể.
Thành thạo các kỹ thuật bảo mật mạng và có thể triển khai giải pháp mạng toàn diện.
Có kinh nghiệm thiết lập, cấu hình, sao lưu và khôi phục SQL Server.
Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm phát triển Java hoặc C#.
Sẵn sàng làm việc theo ca nếu có yêu cầu.
Chế Độ Công Việc
Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2- Thứ 6 (8:00 AM 5:00 PM)
13 tháng lương+ thưởng theo doanh thu
BHXH đóng full lương, 12 ngày nghỉ phép/ năm
Required Skills
SQL Server FTP Windows Server C# Windows Java SQL

Overview:
IT Infrastructure & System Operation
refers to the management, maintenance, and optimization of an organization's IT environment. This includes the hardware, software, networks, and services that support the organization's operations. Effective IT infrastructure and system operations ensure that all IT resources are reliable, available, and secure, supporting business processes and goals.
Key Components:
IT Infrastructure:
Hardware:
Servers, storage devices, network devices, and other physical components.
Software:
Operating systems, databases, enterprise applications, and middleware.
Networks:
LAN, WAN, VPN, firewalls, routers, switches, and internet connectivity.
Data Centers and Cloud Services:
On-premises data centers and cloud-based services (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS).
System Operations:
Monitoring and Management:
Continuous monitoring of system performance, availability, and security.
Maintenance:
Regular updates, patches, and repairs to hardware and software components.
Backup and Recovery:
Ensuring data is regularly backed up and can be recovered in case of a failure.
Security:
Implementing and maintaining security measures to protect against threats and vulnerabilities.
User Support:
Providing technical support to users and ensuring they have access to necessary resources.
Key Responsibilities:
Planning and Design:
Design and implement IT infrastructure to meet business needs.
Plan capacity and scalability to accommodate growth.
Ensure integration and interoperability of various systems.
Implementation and Deployment:
Deploy hardware and software components.
Configure network settings and security protocols.
Implement cloud solutions and migrate services as needed.
Monitoring and Optimization:
Use monitoring tools to track system performance and identify issues.
Optimize system configurations for better performance and efficiency.
Conduct regular audits and assessments to ensure compliance and security.
Security and Compliance:
Implement security measures such as firewalls, encryption, and access controls.
Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA).
Perform regular security assessments and penetration testing.
Disaster Recovery and Business Continuity:
Develop and maintain disaster recovery plans.
Conduct regular backup and recovery drills.
Ensure critical systems can be restored quickly in case of an outage.
User Support and Training:
Provide technical support and troubleshooting for end-users.
Develop user guides and training materials.
Conduct training sessions to enhance user competence with IT systems.
Best Practices:
Adopt ITIL Framework:
Use the IT Infrastructure Library (ITIL) framework to manage IT services effectively.
Implement Automation:
Use automation tools for routine tasks to reduce errors and increase efficiency.
Regular Updates and Patches:
Keep systems updated to protect against vulnerabilities.
Documentation:
Maintain thorough documentation of IT infrastructure and procedures.
Proactive Monitoring:
Implement proactive monitoring to detect and resolve issues before they impact users.
Tools and Technologies:
Monitoring Tools:
Nagios, Zabbix, SolarWinds, Prometheus.
Configuration Management:
Ansible, Puppet, Chef.
Cloud Services:
AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform.
Security Tools:
Firewalls, antivirus software, SIEM systems (e.g., Splunk, LogRhythm).
Backup Solutions:
Veeam, Acronis, Commvault.
Qualifications:
Bachelor's degree in information technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
5+ years of experience in IT infrastructure and System operations
Proven experience with network administration, system administration, and IT security.
Strong knowledge of cloud computing, virtualization, and storage solutions.
Experience with Azure, AD, DHCP, DNS, MS 365, SharePoint.
Experience with ITIL or other IT service management frameworks.
Have experience with Linux (Centos, Ubuntu, Debian, …).
Knowledge in system as Server, Storage or Hybrid Infrastructure as VMware, Hyper-V, HCI, OpenStack... and Cloud solutions is an advantage
Hard-working and willing to learn, self-study ability
Ability with Network/Security consulting, deployment, troubleshooting.
Have good understanding: Network model, TCP/IP model, IP & VoIP, IPsec VPN, SD Wan, planning IP address, VLAN, wireless system, security system
Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.
Ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize tasks effectively.

About The Role
Are you curious about how technology keeps multiple digital banks running smoothly? We're looking for a motivated ITSM Engineer Intern to join GoTyme's IT team. Whether you're a fresh graduate or exploring a new career path in tech, this is your chance to build real skills in IT Service Management using the Atlassian Ecosystem — from day one.
What You'll Do
Help configure and improve ITSM workflows in Jira Service Management and Confluence
Support the team in managing incident, problem, change, and service requests
Assist in building and maintaining the IT knowledge base and service catalog
Collaborate with engineers and operations teams to document and streamline processes
Learn and explore new features of the Atlassian platform under mentorship
Explore how AI tools (like virtual agents and smart triage) are being used to make ITSM faster and smarter — and help us apply them
YOUR GROWTH PATH
ITSM isn't just a role — it's a career with real staying power. The skills you build here travel with you. Jira Service Management is used by over 300,000 organisations worldwide. ITIL, the global standard for IT service management, is recognised in 180+ countries. Whether you end up in fintech, enterprise tech, consulting, or beyond — what you learn here opens doors.
Your certification roadmap starts on day one:
ITIL 4 Foundation — the universal entry credential for IT careers (exam fee covered)
Atlassian Certified: Jira Service Management — proof of hands-on platform expertise (exam fee covered)
From there: ITIL Specialist, Strategic Leader, and beyond — a clear path to senior, architect, and management roles
You'll leave this internship with a real project portfolio, recognised certifications, and a professional identity in one of the most in-demand fields in tech.
Requirements
WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Must-have:
Curiosity & eagerness to learn
Basic IT knowledge
Good communication skills
Problem-solving mindset
Comfortable with English
Nice-to-have:
Familiar with Jira or Confluence
Exposure to ITIL concepts
Any IT-related major
Experience in support / helpdesk
Curiosity about AI tools — whether you've used ChatGPT to solve a problem, automated something with a simple script, or just find yourself reading about how AI is changing the way we work
Benefits
Why GoTymeX?
🌏
Global Impact
- Be part of a team reshaping financial access across multiple countries
💡
Bold & Ambitious
- We tackle real problems at scale and give you the space to think big
🌱
Growth-First
- Your learning is built into how we work, not an afterthought
🤝
People-Centered
- You'll be supported by mentors who want to see you succeed
⚡
Move Fast, Build Well
- Work with modern tech and agile teams that move with purpose
and many other cool benefits:
Allowance: 6,000,000 VND per month (gross)
Meal allowance: 730,000 VND per month
Free motorbike parking
Insurance: Social insurance as required by Vietnamese labor law, plus premium healthcare for you and your family - no seniority requirement.
Annual leave: 15 days of paid leave per year (pro-rated), supporting a healthy work-life balance
Training programs: Keep learning and growing with access to training and development programs
Many cool company and team activities: You are invited to many activities - all-hands, happy-hour, sports, clubs, and after-work events that build connections beyond the office

job_description:
The
Admin Officer
role ensures smooth daily office operations and a productive, well-supported working environment for all employees. The role partners closely with HR, Finance, ITSM and other functions to deliver consistent, timely and budget-aligned administrative services.
The role involves hands-on ownership of office operations and day-to-day employee experience. Key responsibilities include travel and accommodation arrangements, office payments, supplies and services, internal events, and on-/off-boarding logistics, while managing relationships with internal stakeholders and external vendors.
Job Responsibilities
Travel & accommodation coordination
Coordinate end-to-end business and training travel, including ticket booking, itinerary preparation, internal approvals and last-minute changes
Arrange accommodation for visiting or relocating employees, including options review, booking confirmation, check-in/check-out coordination and cost tracking per policy
Office finance & budget support
Manage office payments and reconcile vendor invoices with AP team
Track team event spends and support budget planning
Office operations & facilities management
Manage office supplies, pantry items and welcome-kit inventory
Coordinate outsourced office services and liaise with building management on facilities matters (access cards, parking...)
Maintain office hygiene standards by coordinating cleaning, restocking pantry consumables and ensuring timely waste collection
Conduct routine office checks (meeting rooms, working areas, pantry...), log issues and coordinate with IT/building/vendors until closure
Employee experience, events & people logistics
Plan and deliver regular office activities and company events
Support employee onboarding and offboarding logistics
Provide day-to-day administrative support and respond to employee requests
Vendor, stakeholder & documentation management
Build and maintain relationships with key vendors and partners to ensure service quality
Maintain administrative records, trackers and shared documentation
Requirements
Must-have
:
College or bachelor's degree in business administration, Economics, HR or related fields
At least 2 years of experience in an Admin or Office Executive role
Good working knowledge of Microsoft Office and Excel
Experience working with vendors and external service providers
Responsible, proactive and service-minded
Strong organizational skills and attention to details
Working-level English (business emails and basic conversation)
Nice-to-have
:
Experience in a multinational company or a fast-growing startup
Experience supporting internal events
Familiarity with Confluence, Jira and Slack
Exposure to budget tracking and payment reconciliation
Soft skills
:
Strong customer-service mindset
Empathy, active listening and a friendly, helpful attitude in every interaction
Communication and stakeholder coordination
Time management and multi-tasking
Negotiation and vendor management
Discretion and confidentiality
Benefits
Meal and parking allowance are covered by the company
Full benefits and salary rank during probation
Insurances as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family without seniority compulsory
Performance bonus up to 2 months
13th month salary pro-rata
15-day annual leave+ 3-day sick leave + 1 birthday leave + 1 Christmas leave
SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development
Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture
Overseas travel opportunities for training and working related
Internal Hackathons and company's events (team building, coffee run, blue card...)
Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri

job_description:
SCG Vietnam – Build the Future with Us
Driving Vietnam’s Growth with Innovation and Excellence
For over a century, SCG has led industrial innovation across ASEAN, shaping the future of construction, materials science, packaging, and sustainability. Vietnam, one of the region’s fastest-growing economies, is central to SCG’s long-term vision. With a strong presence in multiple industries, we are committed to delivering high-quality solutions, developing local talent, and investing in sustainable growth.
Our operations in Vietnam cover key business sectors:
SCG Cement-Building Materials
– Providing innovative and durable construction solutions to support Vietnam’s rapid urbanization and infrastructure expansion.
SCG Chemicals
– Advancing polymer and chemical solutions for industrial applications while driving environmental responsibility.
SCG Packaging
– Delivering sustainable packaging solutions to meet the needs of Vietnam’s growing consumer and manufacturing sectors.
SCG International
– Enhancing Vietnam’s trade networks through industrial sourcing, supply chain solutions, and cross-border partnerships.
Vietnam’s rapid economic transformation presents exceptional opportunities for skilled professionals. SCG is looking for high-potential individuals to be part of this journey, driving progress and shaping industries.
Why SCG? A Workplace Designed for Growth
Career Development Without Limits
SCG is more than a workplace—it is a gateway to a
regional and global career.
Employees gain exposure to
cross-border projects, cutting-edge innovations, and international business networks.
Accelerated Professional Growth
SCG actively invests in
leadership training, mentorship programs, and career mobility.
High-performing employees are fast-tracked into key positions, ensuring that growth is based on
capability, not tenure.
Innovation & Sustainability at the Core
SCG is at the forefront of
smart manufacturing, digital transformation, renewable energy, and circular economy initiatives.
Employees contribute to projects that
drive long-term impact
on industries and communities.
A Collaborative & Inclusive Work Environment
SCG Vietnam fosters a workplace where diverse perspectives and
team-driven success
lead to
continuous improvement and innovation.
Employees are empowered to share ideas, take initiative, and work alongside leading industry professionals.
Competitive Compensation & Long-Term Stability
SCG offers:
Market-competitive salary packages and performance-based rewards.
Career mobility across SCG’s operations in Vietnam, Thailand, and other ASEAN countries.
Continuous learning opportunities, upskilling programs, and industry-leading mentorship.
Find Your Place at SCG Vietnam
SCG is hiring across multiple disciplines, including:
Engineering & Manufacturing
– Mechanical, Chemical, Electrical, and Industrial Engineering.
Business & Commercial
– Supply Chain, Procurement, Trade, and Business Strategy.
Digital & Technology
– AI, Cybersecurity, Cloud Computing, Data Science, and Software Development.
Branding & Marketing
– Consumer Insights, Digital Marketing, and Product Innovation.
Finance & Risk Management
– Accounting, Investment, Internal Audit.
Sustainability & Renewable Energy

And many more!
Not sure where you fit?
Apply anyway—SCG values skills, ambition, and problem-solving capabilities over rigid qualifications.
Build Your Career with SCG Vietnam
Vietnam’s industries are evolving rapidly, and SCG is shaping that transformation. If you want to work on projects that drive real-world impact, foster sustainability, and push the boundaries of innovation, this is your opportunity.
Apply today and take the next step toward an exciting career with SCG.

Job Summary:
The IT Application Admin II will be responsible for the administration, maintenance, and support of various business applications and IT Infrastructure services within Jabil Vietnam. Strong communication skills are essential for collaborating with internal and external stakeholders.
Job Responsibilities:
Application Operations & Infrastructure Support: Maintain and support enterprise applications and their integration across server and network infrastructure, ensuring performance, uptime, and SLA adherence.
Incident & Problem Management: Troubleshoot application, database, and network-related issues; perform root-cause analysis; implement preventive measures and documentation. Coordinate deployments, patches, and configuration changes following change-control processes.
Data & Reporting Enablement: Build and maintain reports using SQL databases and Power BI (usage, cost, SLA, capacity dashboards); automate data pipelines and ensure data accuracy. Identify opportunities for application optimization and automation to improve efficiency and user experience.
Communication & Governance: Deliver clear presentations, status updates contribute to governance and process standardization. Provide training and guidance to IT and business stakeholders on application functionalities and best practices.
Capacity management, routine system health checks, performance monitoring, and preventative maintenance tasks to ensure application stability and availability.
Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for IT infrastructure and application configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting guides.
Lead IT projects related to IT infrastructure and application implementation, integration.
Job Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or related field; Proven experience in application administration supporting enterprise-level applications (e.g., ERP, MES, PLM).
ITSM Practices: Experience with ITIL processes—incident, problem, change, and configuration management; familiarity with ticketing tools (e.g., ServiceNow, Jira).
Automation & Scripting: Ability to automate routine tasks using PowerShell/Python; experience with ETL/data quality checks for reporting.
Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder engagement skills; ability to translate technical topics for non-technical audiences.
Mindset & Ownership: Detail-oriented, process-driven, and proactive; able to operate independently at escalation point, prioritize effectively in a global, multi-site environment

Các thiết bị mạng (Firewall, Switch, SAN, NAS, Wifi, kết nối Internet, VPN…)

Có nhiều cơ hội học hỏi phát triển chuyên môn, kỹ thuật, kỹ năng quản lý dự án, AI, … và nhiều kiến thức khác.

Chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định của pháp luật.
Cơ hội thăng tiến cao theo định hướng phát triển CNTT của tập đoàn theo hướng hiện đại, chuyên nghiệp.

Job Summary:
The IT Supervisor at Jabil, Inc. will lead and manage a team of IT professionals, ensuring the efficient and reliable operation of IT systems and infrastructure to support business objectives. This role involves overseeing day-to-day IT support, project implementation, and maintaining high standards of service delivery.
Job Responsibilities:
Supervise and mentor a team of IT technicians and specialists, including performance management, training, and scheduling.
Oversee the deployment, maintenance, and troubleshooting of hardware, software, and network systems across Jabil facilities.
Manage IT service desk operations, ensuring timely resolution of technical issues and user support requests.
Participate in the planning, execution, and completion of IT projects, including system upgrades, migrations, and new technology implementations.
Ensure compliance with Jabil's IT policies, procedures, and security standards.
Monitor system performance and proactively identify areas for improvement and optimization.
Collaborate with other departments to understand IT needs and provide effective technological solutions.
Manage IT inventory, procurement, and asset tracking.
Prepare and present reports on IT performance, project status, and resource utilization.
Stay current with industry trends and emerging technologies to recommend innovative solutions.
Job Qualifications:**
Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
5+ years of experience in IT support or systems administration, with at least 2 years in a supervisory or leadership role.
Proficiency in Mandarin speaking skills would be preferred.
Maintain, support and develop enterprise applications.
Proven experience with Windows Server environments, Active Directory, network infrastructure (routers, switches, firewalls), and virtualization technologies.
Strong understanding of IT security principles and best practices.
Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and organizational skills.
Effective communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to lead and motivate a team.
Ability to manage multiple priorities and projects simultaneously in a fast-paced manufacturing environment.
Relevant IT certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, Microsoft Certified Professional) are a plus.
, BE AWARE OF FRAUD: When applying for a job at Jabil you will be contacted via correspondence through our official job portal with a jabil.com e-mail address; direct phone call from a member of the Jabil team; or direct e-mail with a jabil.com e-mail address. Jabil does not request payments for interviews or at any other point during the hiring process. Jabil will not ask for your personal identifying information such as a social security number, birth certificate, financial institution, driver’s license number or passport information over the phone or via e-mail. If you believe you are a victim of identity theft, contact your local police department. Any scam job listings should be reported to whatever website it was posted in.
