job_description:
About Rize
Rize (rize.farm) is a leading agritech startup focused on transforming rice cultivation across Asia through sustainable solutions. As one of the most environmentally impactful agricultural activities, rice farming requires urgent innovation—and Rize is at the forefront of this change.
Established through a joint venture backed by Temasek, Wavemaker Impact, Breakthrough Energy Ventures, and GenZero, Rize leverages advanced technology to collect critical agricultural data. This enables farmers to adopt more sustainable practices, improve yields, reduce costs, enhance climate resilience, and gain better access to financing.
Currently operating in Indonesia and Vietnam, Rize is expanding its regional footprint while unlocking green financing solutions to support farmers in transitioning to sustainable rice production. The company has also received recognition from major global media outlets such as Bloomberg, Business Insider, and DealStreetAsia.
What We’re Building
We are developing a comprehensive platform to support field operations teams in managing daily activities, capturing cultivation data across millions of hectares of rice fields, optimizing agri-input supply chains, and coordinating third-party services throughout the farming lifecycle.
Role Objective
We are seeking a Growth Manager to lead the development, testing, and scaling of new business initiatives within Rize’s agritech ecosystem.
This role goes beyond traditional marketing or business development—it focuses on business innovation, experimentation, and execution. You will turn ideas into scalable, revenue-generating solutions by identifying opportunities, validating concepts through MVPs and pilots, and iterating based on real-world insights and data.
Key Responsibilities
1. Growth Strategy & Business Design
Identify market opportunities and unmet needs across the rice value chain and broader agriculture sector
Develop new business ideas, value propositions, and testable growth hypotheses
Design customer journeys, pricing strategies, product packaging, and business models
2. MVP Development & Market Testing
Lead the end-to-end execution of MVPs, pilot programs, and market experiments
Work cross-functionally with product, operations, marketing, partnerships, and finance teams
Establish testing frameworks, define KPIs, and iterate quickly based on data and feedback
Engage directly with farmers, cooperatives, distributors, and partners to validate adoption and willingness to pay
3. Go-to-Market & Commercial Execution
Develop and implement go-to-market strategies tailored to different customer segments, regions, and seasonal cycles
Design and test promotional programs such as incentives, loyalty schemes, referral campaigns, and bundled offerings
Collaborate with field and sales teams to execute trade marketing and on-ground activations
Translate product and sustainability benefits into clear sales messaging and enablement tools
Monitor and optimize performance using KPIs such as conversion, CAC, retention, and ROI
4. Scaling & Performance Optimization
Assess pilot outcomes to determine whether to scale, refine, or pivot initiatives
Build financial models and business cases to evaluate scalability and profitability
Identify cross-sell and upsell opportunities across inputs, financing, and partner services
Contribute to long-term growth strategy aligned with Rize’s sustainability mission
5. Partnerships & Channel Development
Collaborate with cooperatives, distributors, financial institutions, and ecosystem partners
Co-develop joint campaigns, incentive programs, and activation strategies
Create partner onboarding frameworks and sales enablement materials
6. Cross-functional Collaboration
Work closely with internal teams to ensure alignment between strategy and execution
Present insights, learnings, and recommendations clearly to leadership and stakeholders
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Economics, or a related field (MBA is a plus)
5–7 years of experience in marketing, business development, strategy, or operations, preferably in
Agriculture, Agritech
, or sustainability sectors
Proven track record in launching and validating new business ideas, MVPs, or innovation initiatives
Experience working in startups or fast-paced, high-growth environments
Strong analytical skills, including financial modeling and data-driven decision-making
Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities
Fluency in both English and Vietnamese

Job Description
xspera is not a start-up firm, but we act like one. xspera , a globally operating management consultancy, seek to increase corporate performance through digital transformation. XINGATE 3.0, xspera ’s digital enterprise platform developed on Microsoft’s technology and collaboration stacks, deliver powerful intra,
inter, and cross-departmental solutions for immediate results at affordable costs.
xspera is seeking talented
Business Analyst
to expose line of business (LOB) application data, extendable forms and powerful workflows for current and future customers, then extend the current capabilities of our XINGATE 3.0 modules, focusing on organizational functions, including completed employee lifecycle management (HR), Purchasing, Finance Solutions, Production, Engineering, Project Management, Supply Chain, and much more.
With our international team, we change the way companies collaborate and communicate. You are a big part of that change. Together with the XINGATE stakeholders and the product development team, you work directly on a tangible end-product. You will report directly to the K2 Development Team Lead with technical direction provided by the Solution Architect.
Primary Objectives
Setting priorities based on customer value, business value, continuous improvements, technology improvements and/or removing team impediments (continuous trade off).
Enable our Scrum teams to deliver their sprint commitment by maintaining a product backlog and preparing user stories.
Communicate sprint results, sprint plans and the roadmap to the team and stakeholders.
Align, collaborate and communicate with stakeholders to ensure successful releases.
Encourages and enables the team to achieve sprint goals and commitments and to deliver a “Potentially Shippable Product” each sprint.
Key Responsibilities
Document the testing procedures and carry out the final test before releasing to end users
Write training documents and provide technical assistance in training, mentoring, and coaching professional and technical staff
Experience and manage their business challenges/ requirements/ objectives;
Act as the bridge between client and offshore to clarify requirement with development team (developers, QC, UI designer) both business and system analysis view as well as the bridge among internal team
Work with QC to verify that all requirements of the system are fulfilled by the implementation in the traceability manner among requirements, CR and implementation
Support UAT, verify bugs/issues with client and manage them together with product backlog
Owning ongoing digital product iteration and support to ensure services are evolving to meet customer needs and providing a reliable and satisfactory experience
Do other tasks being assigned.
Develop custom solutions to meet client specific needs using K2 blackpearl and K2 Appit for SharePoint, including integration with client’s legacy LOBs systems by using Smart Objects
Requirements
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Sciences, Banking and Finance or related fields
Certificate of Scrum Product Owner (CSPO) or the willingness to invest time and effort to get certified
English certificate is at least Toeic 700 or the same certificate relevant Experience and skill
3+ years of experiences in Systems Development and Business Analysis
3+ years of international experience with managing and overseeing multiple IT projects simultaneously, preferably as Senior Business Analyst
Having level conceptual, analytical and problem-solving skills
Having management, presentation and communication skills
Ability to adapt to changes, take up multiple roles based on project demands and ensure the best results
MS Solution Expert MSCE in Productivity (Communications/ Messaging/ SharePoint)
Experience in Agile methods (Scrum, XP, Kanban, BADM)
Be open to receiving objective criticism and improving upon it
Creative ideas for the problem-solving mindset
Ability to work in a fast-paced & dynamic environment with short deadlines, interruptions & multiple tasks/projects occurring at once
Detail-oriented, organized & capable of prioritizing workload to complete multiple tasks & meet aggressive deadlines
KPI and project management knowledge
English, Vietnamese is a must and German is a plus
Eager to learn new things
Why Work @ xspera
Above market salary compensation, including 13-month pay
Quarterly and yearly performance bonus compensation
Annual performance reviews
Personal development, training, and creative freedom
Ability to participate in customer projects in EU, US & Asia
Work in a global team with highly skilled and motivated people
Spectacular company trips.
About Xspera
As a management consulting company founded in 2012, xspera focus on the business goals of our customers. We deliver solutions which help customers achieve their business goals faster. Our enterprise portal, XINGATE, adapts quickly to our client’s corporate structures reducing their process costs in many areas by as much as 30% -60% through greater transparency, digitization, and process automation. Join xspera today and be part of the digital world of tomorrow!

About The Job
We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Senior System Integrator to join our team! In this role, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining system integration solutions, including hardware, virtualization, backup, and networking. If you have a strong technical background and a proactive, solution-driven mindset, we’d love to hear from you.
RESPONSIBILITIES
Participate in designing, and implementing hardware solutions, Backup, virtualization, and system monitoring products.
Implement system monitor solutions (IBM, HP, Zabbix …)
Install and configure hardware: Server, Blade Chassis, Storage, Appliance, SAN Switch (HP, IBM, Dell, Brocade, …)
Install and configure Network, Firewall (Fortigate, Sophos), and Switch (Cisco, Aruba, Dell).
Install and configure Linux operating systems (Redhat, Centos, SuSe, Oracle Linux and applications on the server system according to each project.
Implement virtualization and HCI solutions (VMware, OpenStack, Hyper-V, Oracle, Nutanix ..)

Candidates with experience in Solutions, Backups, Virtualization, Servers, and Storage are preferred.
Possess the ability to conduct research and design technical training materials.

Competitive salary with performance-based incentives and project-related bonuses.
Comprehensive benefits package, including a 13th-month salary, business performance bonuses, and recognition for outstanding employee achievements (e.g., exceptional project outcomes, Employee of the Year, Top 50 FPT Telecom, Top 100 FPT, etc.).

Clear career advancement opportunities leading to managerial positions.
A wide range of cultural activities, including team-building events, sports, and union activities such as International Women's Day and Men's Day.

job_description:
Welcome to BOS Semiconductors, where innovation meets mobility. With a vision of "Leading mobility innovation with system semiconductors", we specialize in autonomous driving SoCs, Mega MCUs, and Gateway SoCs for the automotive industry. BOS Semiconductors Vietnam, established in 2022, focuses on hardware and software development for automotive SoCs, with a rapidly growing team. Join us in shaping the future of automotive technology!
Organization & Role Overview
The IT/DevOps team is responsible for the company-wide IT architecture, providing optimized infrastructure ranging from simulation environments for semiconductor R&D to hardware verification networks. In a Linux network-segregated environment, we manage distributed tasks using job scheduling solutions such as Slurm, and build/operate CI/CD pipelines centered on GitLab and GitHub.
This position, as a
DevOps Engineer
in the IT/DevOps team, is responsible for building and automating infrastructure to support efficient development and operation of semiconductor design and verification projects.
Key Responsibilities
Design and implement CI pipelines based on GitLab/GitHub
Build and operate workflow automation systems (Django + Jenkins-based semiconductor design automation environment)
Develop tools and scripts for development/verification (Python-based automation tools)
Build system monitoring services and operate dashboards (logging pipeline implementation, custom exporter development using Prometheus + Grafana in Python/Go)
Operate SLURM-based custom job scheduler for HPC environments and develop dashboards (using Python, Django, Kafka)
What We’re Looking For
Strong collaboration skills, sense of ownership, and structured problem-solving ability
Ability to analyze root causes (RCA) and proactively resolve issues
Hands-on experience with CI/CD environments (Jenkins, GitLab, GitHub, etc.)
Experience developing API servers using Python-based Django and Django REST Framework
Experience operating monitoring systems such as Prometheus and Grafana
Experience managing SLURM or HPC (High Performance Computing) environments
3–7 years of relevant experience
Preferred Qualifications
Understanding of semiconductor design/verification environments
Experience with complex workflow automation
Practical experience applying AI/LLM technologies
Proficiency with AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot, etc.)
Experience operating internal services (e.g., dashboards, tools)
Experience integrating multiple systems/services and strong troubleshooting skills
What We’re Offering
Competitive salary + 13th month bonus
Retention bonus (2 months salary)
Meals provided (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner), Private Health Insurance, Hybrid work model
We care about your well-being and personal growth with Fun English classes, Happy Beer Parties, Football Club, and more!
Be part of a cutting-edge R&D center focused on automotive SoCs.
If you’re passionate about creating new technology and making an impact in the automotive industry, we’d love to hear from you! Please kindly be noted that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Job Description
DXC Technology (NYSE: DXC) is a leading enterprise technology and innovation partner delivering software, services, and solutions to global enterprises and public sector organizations — helping them harness AI to drive outcomes at a time of exponential change with speed. With deep expertise in Managed Infrastructure Services, Application Modernization, and Industry-Specific Software Solutions, DXC modernizes, secures, and operates some of the world’s most complex technology estates. Learn more on dxc.com
DXC Vietnam
has been recognized as one of the "
Best Companies to Work for in Asia 2025
" by HR Asia Magazine, highlighting its exceptional HR practices and 31-year legacy in the country. The company also earned the special "
Most Caring Company Award
" in 2025 for prioritizing employee well-being and fostering a supportive, inclusive workplace culture.
An exciting
IT Business Analyst
opening has been available for those who are interested in this career path.
The Associate Business Analyst's primary objective is to understand clients’ needs by capturing the domain expertise that the client has and translating into succinct documents in order to serve as the inputs for software development team.
Responsibilities
Study existing information processing systems to evaluate effectiveness and promote enhancements in systems to improve production or workflow as required.
Analyze and document business requirements in details by using UML Diagrams, Use Cases, Functional Specifications and communicate them clearly to Stakeholders and Software Development Team.
Maintain all Requirement Artifacts during the Software Development Lifecycle.
Verify all requested requirements are included in the product, and the product does not implement the features not required;
Be a communication bridge between Client and Software Development Team, between internal Development Team.
Directly report to PM and/or client.
Requirements
To be successful candidate for this role, you have:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or Business related field.
3-year experience or less in Business Analysis role in a customer facing role.
Good knowledge of software development process, especially software requirement analysis.
Ability to compose and manage business requirement artifacts accurately for each phase of the Software Development Lifecycle.
Good command of English communication (oral and written).
Good communication skills with demonstrated ability to communicate effectively with both a technical audience and business users.
Good at presentation, time management and client relation skills.
Good interpersonal and collaboration skills, strong team working ability.
Ability to travel to client’s site when necessary.

job_description:
OPSWAT, a global leader in IT, OT, and ICS critical infrastructure cybersecurity, delivers an end-to-end platform that gives public and private sector organizations and enterprises the critical advantage needed to protect their complex networks, secure their devices, and ensure compliance. Over the last 20 years our commitment to innovative technology has earned the trust of more than 1,700 organizations, governments, and institutions globally, solidifying our role in protecting the world’s critical infrastructure and securing our way of life.
The Position
MetaDefender Industrial Firewall
by OPSWAT is a purpose-built security solution designed to protect OT and ICS environments. It provides deep packet inspection for industrial protocols, AI-driven policy generation, and high-performance, low-latency protection to ensure both security and operational continuity.
We are looking for a Junior
QA Engineer
to support the quality assurance of OPSWAT’s cybersecurity products. In this role, you will work closely with experienced team members and be involved in different stages of the software development lifecycle, with opportunities to learn both manual and automation testing.
What You Will Be Doing
Execute manual test cases and support automated testing activities
Review product requirements and clarify test scenarios with the team
Write and maintain basic test cases and test documentation
Perform different types of testing, including: functional testing, integration testing, API testing (basic level), regression testing and usability testing
Support automation tasks using Python (with guidance from senior team members)
Identify, document, and track bugs clearly
Assist in reproducing issues and supporting troubleshooting when needed
What We Need From You
0–2 years of experience in software testing or a strong interest in QA
Basic understanding of software testing concepts and QA processes
Familiarity with Linux environment and web application testing
Basic programming knowledge in Python or willingness to learn automation
Basic understanding of networking concepts (e.g., Routing, Switching, VPN is a plus)
Willingness to learn, attention to detail, and a proactive attitude
Familiarity with using AI tools to improve productivity
Good written English communication skills
It Would Be Nice If You Had
Familiarity with tools such as JIRA, Git, or CI/CD tools like TeamCity
Exposure to test automation or scripting
Basic knowledge or interest in cybersecurity or networking
Ability to communicate in English (verbal)

Company Profile
They are an international technology company with an established presence in Vietnam. They provide customized digital solutions for medium and large enterprises, focusing on business process automation, software development, and FinTech services. Certifications in ERP systems or solution consulting are advantageous (nice-to-have)

Proven experience supporting sales cycles through solution positioning and client engagement
Experience working with ERP systems; exposure to Odoo is preferred

Strong ability to design high-level system solutions and architecture
Proficiency in delivering product demos and presentations to business stakeholders
Ability to translate business requirements into functional solutions
Familiarity with proposal documentation (SOWs, quotations, RFP responses)

Client-focused, with a strong emphasis on solution quality and relevance
Collaborative across commercial and technical teams

gbc engineers is an international structural and civil engineering consultancy headquartered in Germany, with a strong and expanding presence in Vietnam and Southeast Asia. We specialize in structural design, BIM modeling, and project management for industrial, commercial, and residential developments across Europe. Combining German engineering precision with digital innovation and international collaboration, we deliver sustainable, high-quality design solutions for the built environment.
Position
: IT Team Leader
Location
: Ho Chi Minh City
Department
: IT
Employment Type
: Full-time
1. What You’ll Do
Manage and monitor all installed systems and IT infrastructure, including Windows and Linux servers and environments.
Install, configure, test, and maintain operating systems, application software, and system management tools to ensure optimal performance.
Proactively maintain system availability, data integrity, and operational reliability across all platforms.
Implement and manage security, backup, and redundancy strategies to safeguard company data and systems.
Develop and maintain custom scripts to automate processes and improve operational efficiency.
Provide 2nd and 3rd level technical support, troubleshooting system and network issues effectively.
Collaborate with vendors, IT partners, and internal teams to resolve complex technical challenges.
Monitor and optimize network performance, storage, and virtualization systems (e.g., VMware).
Maintain and document IT configurations, updates, and procedures to support continuous improvement.
Perform additional tasks and projects assigned by the Group IT Manager.
2. What We’re Looking For
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
At least 8 years of experience as a System Administrator, Network Administrator, or in a similar technical role.
Professional certifications such as MCSA, MCSE, CCNA, CCNP, or LPI are a strong advantage.
Technical Expertise
Solid hands-on experience with Windows and Linux operating systems (installation, configuration, and administration).
Knowledge of network infrastructure (LAN/WAN), patch management, and system security.
Proficiency in managing Office 365, email servers, antivirus software, backup systems, and printers.
Experience with virtualization platforms (e.g., VMware) and data backup/recovery solutions.
Strong scripting and automation skills to enhance system performance and reliability.
Soft Skills
Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).
Strong problem-solving, troubleshooting, and analytical abilities.
High level of responsibility, organization, and time management.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a global environment.
Adaptable, proactive, and eager to learn new technologies and best practices.
3. Why You’ll Love Working Here
A chance to work in a dynamic international company connecting Germany and Vietnam.
Collaboration with multinational teams on digital transformation and global IT initiatives.
Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.
Exposure to advanced IT systems, cybersecurity standards, and modern infrastructure.
A supportive, innovative, and multicultural environment that values creativity and efficiency.
Professional growth opportunities in IT systems architecture, cloud management, and cybersecurity.
Interested Candidates
Please apply directly or send your CV to ta@gbc-engineers.com with the subject line: Application – IT Team Leader – gbc engineers

Wanted:
Colonist QA Engineer
Working Hours:
We work asynchronously and value outcomes over hours
Location:
Fully Remote
Compensation:
$1,500 – $3,000 USD/month (based on experience and location)
About Colonist
We're building the biggest digital board game platform on the internet. Last year, our players spent 3,037 years playing 60 million games on our Settlers of Catan alternative. We're a fully remote, asynchronous team spread across multiple continents, focused on crafting extremely polished digital board games that people truly love.
About The Role
You'll own product quality for a game played by millions, and you'll do it by shipping fixes, not just filing tickets. Most QA roles stop at "I found the problem." This one doesn't. Your job is to make sure the product experience feels right across web, mobile, and Discord, catching what's broken, what's confusing, and what shouldn't have shipped the way it did.
You Will
Fix quality issues directly in the codebase
Drive fixes for larger issues end-to-end
Run weekly QA sessions on dev and staging builds on a fixed release cycle, with post-release production checks
Test PRs in a fast pace - happy path, edge cases, cross-platform - and approve or request changes with clear reasoning
Monitor Discord bug channels, validate player reports, and convert confirmed issues into structured tickets
Catch things that aren't bugs but are wrong: bad UX, illogical behavior, things that shouldn't have shipped the way they did
Ensure every significant change is tested across web, mobile, and Discord
Find gaps in the QA process proactively - propose fixes, introduce tools, document and roll out improvements without waiting to be asked
You Are
Experienced with full-cycle QA: test planning, execution, reporting, and follow-through
Sharp on detail and strong on judgment, you know when something is a bug and when it's a product problem
Comfortable in the codebase, enough to open a PR for smaller fixes yourself without blocking on engineering
Comfortable across platforms: web, mobile, Discord, and tools like GitHub, Linear, and BrowserStack
A clear async communicator: your bug reports are structured, your feedback is direct, and nothing gets lost
AI-fluent: you actively use AI tools to work faster and smarter
Self-directed: you find problems, figure out solutions, and ship without hand-holding
Responsive: you treat broken production like a fire
Bonus Points
You've done QA on multiplayer or real-time games
You have automation skills (Selenium, Playwright, Cypress) or want to grow into automation
You play Colonist or board games in general
Our Values at Colonist
We strongly adhere to these values in our team; if these resonate, then you'll love working here!
Dependability
We're self-driven players who deliver without needing supervision. When we commit to something, we make it happen.
Ownership
We take full responsibility and go beyond our roles to improve Colonist. Each of us acts like we own the company, because through our stock options, we do.
Clear Communication
In our remote environment, written communication is key. We're direct, structured, and always keep our team in the loop.
Efficient Execution
We move fast and focus on impact. Instead of getting stuck on perfect solutions, we find practical ways forward and get things done.
Continuous Learning
We're curious problem solvers who love a challenge. We constantly seek new ideas, embrace feedback, and aren't afraid to change our minds when we're wrong.
Why Colonist
Your work ships to 3,6M+ yearly active players
Async culture; deep work, no performative meetings
Unlimited vacation, yearly team offsite, full work equipment
Budget to experiment with any AI tool you want
Stock options: you'll own a piece of what you're building
Access to all company metrics and internal discussions

xceptional verbal and written skills in the target language

environments.
Tools

is a strategic engineering company helping businesses turn bold ideas into high-impact solutions-faster. Founded in 2009 as a U.S.-based services company, we’ve grown into a global organization with locations in the US, Vietnam, Mexico and Poland. KMS is trusted globally for the quality of our engineering and consulting services. We bring deep expertise in product development and quality assurance, Data & AI-native engineering, and delivery excellence to every engagement. Our mission is to help customers build what’s next—accelerating innovation, crafting brilliant solutions, and creating real-world impact. At KMS, we believe sustainable growth is built on the success of our clients and employees, and in making a lasting contribution to our communities.
More about KMS Technology:

Job Description
Perform all testing activities to improve product quality, work closely with the team (developers, business analysis, customer service, operation, etc.) to deliver the product success.
Shows creativity and initiative to improve product test coverage and effectiveness.
Address the test needs in a methodical, detail-oriented manner with the help of robust analytical skills and problem-solving capacity.
Involve initiatives for supporting the product growth like competitor research, customer troubleshooting, etc.
Mentor and coach junior QA engineers to improve their testing skills.
Participate in sprint planning and work closely with the Scrum team to analyze requirements and provide necessary QA/test recommendations.
Collaborate closely with clients, ensure effective communication, and proactively resolve issues arising during testing.
Qualifications
General requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Upper-intermediate level of English proficiency, with strong communication skills
4+ years of hands-on experience in software testing.
Experience in mentoring, coaching, and sharing best practices with other team members.
Proven ability to work independently while also leading testing activities within the team.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a focus on quality.
Good communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
Open, proactive, and willing to continuously learn and adapt.
Familiar with the Agile development methodologies.
Excellent collaboration skills with a proven ability to work seamlessly with both customers and team members.
Technical requirements:
Experience in software testing for web-based applications.
Solid testing experiences (test strategy, test approach, test plan, test techniques included black box, risk-based, exploratory, Non-UI testing, etc.)
Strong understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and software testing life cycle (STLC).
Methodical and detail-oriented, with solid analytical skills and problem-solving ability.
Strong dedication to quality and a positive, collaborative attitude and approach to testing.
Nice to have:
Experience in creating and running automated tests using testing frameworks like Katalon/ Selenium/ Robotium/ UiAutomator/ XCTest/ XCUiTest, etc.
Hand-on experience in using test tools like TestNG/ Mocha/ Jasmine/ Nightwatch, etc.
Proficient daily use of AI coding tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) across the full SDLC
Able to decompose complex tasks, provide effective context, and apply chain-of-thought and multi-step prompting workflows
Experience with agentic workflows and AI-driven development frameworks
Hands-on experience integrating AI tools with other systems via MCP (Model Context Protocol) or equivalent
Awareness of emerging AI tools and willingness to evaluate and adopt new capabilities
Additional Information
Perks You'll Enjoy
Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam
Building large-scale & global software products
Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
Diverse careers opportunities with Software Services, Software Product Development, IT Solutions & Consulting
Attractive Salary and Benefits
Performance appraisal every year and performance bonus
Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in North American (U.S, Canada), Europe, Asia.
Flexible working time
Various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills
Premium healthcare insurance for you and your loved ones
Company trip, big annual year-end party every year, team building, etc.
Fitness & sport activities: football, tennis, table-tennis, badminton, yoga, swimming…
Joining community development activities: 1% Pledge, charity every quarter, blood donation, public seminars, career orientation talks,…
Free in-house entertainment facilities (foosball, ping pong, gym…), coffee, and snack (instant noodles, cookies, candies…)
And much more, join us and let yourself explore other fantastic things!

job_description:
CEVA Logistics
provides global supply chain solutions to connect people, products and providers all around the world. Present in 170 countries and with more than 110,000 employees spread over 1,500 sites, we are well on our way to achieving our vision: to be a Top 5 global 3PL.
We believe that our employees are the key to our success. We want to engage and empower our diverse, global team to co-create value with our customers through our solutions in contract logistics and air, ocean, ground, and finished vehicle transport. That is why CEVA Logistics offers a dynamic and exceptional work environment that fosters personal growth, innovation, and continuous improvement.
CESA Vietnam was founded in 2018; CESA started as a development center in Vietnam,then now became a technology company of CEVA Logistic, specializing in Microsoft .Net technologies (ASP.Net MVC, API, Azure,...), ESB platform (Webmethods, Java...) and delivers projects using Agile methodology.
Working with us, you’ll have the opportunity to develop your skills and career in an exciting workplace in touch with an international and innovative environment.
DARE TO GROW! Join CESA Vietnam / CEVA Logistics, and you will be part of a team that values imagination, encourages boldness and exemplarity, and is committed to excellence in everything we do. Join us in our mission to shape the future of global logistics as we become a global leader in the logistics industry. As we continue growing at a fast pace, will you “Dare to Grow” with us?
About the role
We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Manual QC Engineer to join our Quality Assurance team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in manual testing and a keen eye for detail, ensuring our software products meet the highest standards of quality.
Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and execute manual test cases for various software applications.
Identify, document, and track software defects using bug-tracking systems.
Collaborate with developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to understand requirements and design comprehensive test plans.
Perform regression testing to ensure new features and bug fixes do not adversely affect existing functionality.
Review and analyze system specifications and user stories.
Conduct exploratory testing to identify potential issues that automated tests might miss.
Communicate test results and provide detailed reports on software quality.
Participate in Agile/Scrum meetings and contribute to continuous improvement of the QA process.
Qualifications
Essential
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Proven experience as a Manual Tester or similar role.
Strong understanding of software development lifecycle and QA methodologies.
Proficiency in English, with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Experience with bug tracking and test management tools (Azure DevOps).
Familiarity with various types of testing (e.g., functional, regression, usability).
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Detail-oriented with a focus on delivering high-quality work.
Desirable
Knowledge of SQL and ability to write basic queries.
Experience with testing web and mobile applications.
Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
Basic understanding of automation testing tools and frameworks is a plus.
Language
Pre/Intermediate level of English communication (written and spoken)
Soft skills
Have good
logical and critical thinking
Reliable and comfortable to collaborate in team
Strong learning capabilities both for technical and functional aspects
Salary package: up to $600
Office location:
Etown 2, 364 Cong Hoa St., Tan Binh Ward, HCMC, Vietnam
Benefits
Being a pioneer in contributing to team development with a long-term vision
High-ownership working environment: You will take full responsibility and control of your missions contributing to the team's success in a daily collaboration with Paris teams
Continuous skill improvement with new technologies, challenging projects, on-the-job coaching, knowledge exchange with technical experts, and training programs (locally and in Paris)
Annual performance review: recognize your efforts and identify development/ improvement needs
Be secure in your mind with employee care: private healthcare insurance package, medical check-ups, allowance support...
Great-place-to-work activities (company trips, sport clubs...): enhance teamwork spirit and facilitate your work-life balance
Opportunity to participate in global events (Hackathon, Seminar, Innovation Factory...)

job_description:
Về CyStack
CyStack là công ty an ninh mạng hàng đầu tại Việt Nam, được biết đến với khả năng nghiên cứu chuyên sâu cũng như phát triển các sản phẩm và dịch vụ toàn diện, tập trung vào bảo vệ dữ liệu và bảo mật hệ thống. Các giải pháp của CyStack được tin dùng bởi hơn
200 khách hàng doanh nghiệp
thuộc nhiều lĩnh vực, quy mô khác nhau và hơn
50,000 người dùng trên toàn thế giới
.
Đội ngũ chuyên gia của chúng tôi không chỉ là những nhà nghiên cứu xuất sắc mà còn là diễn giả tại các sự kiện an ninh mạng hàng đầu, cũng như các bug hunter dày dạn kinh nghiệm, được vinh danh trong
Hall of Fame
của các tập đoàn công nghệ lớn nhờ phát hiện những lỗ hổng nghiêm trọng.
Vị trí tuyển dụng
Tại CyStack, chúng tôi không chỉ bán các giải pháp bảo mật mà còn giúp doanh nghiệp
giải quyết các vấn đề thực tế
.
Với vai trò
Account Manager (IT Security Project)
, bạn sẽ là người thúc đẩy tăng trưởng doanh thu bằng cách kết nối với khách hàng, thấu hiểu nhu cầu bảo mật của họ và mang đến các giải pháp phù hợp.
Bạn sẽ phối hợp chặt chẽ với đội ngũ marketing và kỹ thuật để giúp doanh nghiệp triển khai hiệu quả các sản phẩm
SaaS
và các
dịch vụ
về
bảo vệ dữ liệu & hệ thống
như phần mềm quản lý thiết bị, nền tảng báo rò rỉ dữ liệu, kiểm thử xâm nhập (Pentest), quản lý lỗ hổng, bảo mật blockchain...
Mô tả công việc
Khai thác khách hàng tiềm năng từ marketing và phát triển thêm cơ hội mới cho các sản phẩm SaaS - dịch vụ an ninh mạng của CyStack:
Tìm hiểu nhu cầu, thách thức an ninh và hiện trạng hệ thống của khách hàng.
Giới thiệu, tư vấn và đề xuất giải pháp phù hợp thông qua thuyết trình, demo, hoặc showcase.
Hỗ trợ triển khai Proof of Concept (PoC) khi cần thiết.
Đàm phán và chốt hợp đồng, hoàn tất thủ tục hợp tác.
Phối hợp với đội kỹ thuật để đảm bảo quy trình triển khai dịch vụ hiệu quả, đáp ứng đúng kỳ vọng khách hàng.
Thúc đẩy tăng trưởng doanh thu thông qua hoạt động upsell và cross-sell các sản phẩm và dịch vụ khác của CyStack.
Xây dựng và duy trì quan hệ khách hàng dài hạn:
Hỗ trợ khách hàng tối đa hóa giá trị sử dụng sản phẩm/dịch vụ của CyStack.
Phối hợp cùng marketing xây dựng case study, chia sẻ câu chuyện thành công của khách hàng để lan tỏa giá trị của CyStack trong cộng đồng doanh nghiệp.
Theo dõi, phân tích và tối ưu hiệu quả kinh doanh:
Quản lý và cập nhật tiến độ bán hàng trên hệ thống CRM.
Nghiên cứu thị trường, cập nhật xu hướng và hoạt động của đối thủ.
Mở rộng mạng lưới và tìm kiếm cơ hội mới qua các mối quan hệ, giới thiệu hoặc đối tác trong các ngành mục tiêu.
Bạn sẽ phù hợp với vị trí này nếu bạn
Có kinh nghiệm kinh doanh hoặc phát triển thị trường trong lĩnh vực công nghệ, tư vấn, hoặc an ninh mạng đặc biệt là với đối tượng khách hàng doanh nghiệp.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp và thuyết trình tốt, có khả năng diễn giải giải pháp kỹ thuật phức tạp cho cả đối tượng kỹ thuật và phi kỹ thuật.
Thành thạo tiếng Anh (IELTS 6.0 hoặc tương đương là một lợi thế).
Từng làm việc trong lĩnh vực công nghệ hoặc an ninh mạng là một lợi thế; nếu không có kinh nghiệm này, bạn cần có tư duy nhanh nhạy và ham học hỏi.
Tư duy phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề tốt.
Tỉ mỉ, có tính tổ chức cao, và chủ động hoàn thành công việc mà không cần quản lý sát sao.
Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành Kinh doanh, Marketing, Tài chính, CNTT hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
Có tinh thần tìm tòi và sẵn sàng phát triển trong môi trường phát triển nhanh, nhiều thử thách.
Quyền lợi
Thu nhập cạnh tranh, bao gồm lương tháng 13, hoa hồng theo hợp đồng, và thưởng theo KPI.
Cơ hội phát triển sự nghiệp trong công ty công nghệ đang tăng trưởng mạnh mẽ, thuộc ngành an ninh mạng đầy tiềm năng, làm việc cùng các đồng nghiệp giàu kinh nghiệm và đam mê.
Môi trường làm việc cởi mở, sáng tạo với cơ hội kết nối và hợp tác với nhiều công ty công nghệ khác.
Phúc lợi hấp dẫn, bao gồm bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp, du lịch hàng năm, và nhiều chế độ đãi ngộ khác.
Cách ứng tuyển
Chúng tôi duyệt hồ sơ liên tục, ứng viên đủ điều kiện có thể được liên hệ ngay mà không cần chờ đến hạn chót. Vì vậy, hãy nộp đơn sớm để không bỏ lỡ cơ hội!
Vui lòng gửi CV/Resume về
hr@cystack.net
với tiêu đề email
[Job Application]
Sales Executive
- Họ và tên của bạn.
CV/Resume (Tiếng Anh hoặc Tiếng Việt) nên bao gồm:
Họ và tên

Portfolio hoặc các dự án liên quan (nếu có)
Thời gian làm việc
: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Thứ Hai đến thứ Sáu, một Thứ Bảy một tháng.
Địa chỉ làm việc:
Tòa nhà Tân Hồng Hà, 317 Trường Chinh, Phương Liệt, Hà Nội.

Job Description
Primary Duties & Responsibilities
Responsible for tasked with delivering high-quality hybrid remote and on-site IT support to end users throughout Vietnam’s manufacturing facilities (VSIPs sites). The primary working location is VSIP 3, travelling to VSIP 1 when needed. The primary objective of this role is to ensure IT operations remain stable and efficient, facilitating prompt resolution of incidents so that production and office activities experience minimal disruption. The IT Site Support, Senior Engineer serves as the main IT contact at the site level, collaborating closely with Network & System teams as well as the global Helpdesk IT team to uphold consistent IT service standards.
Implementation and support of computing and network services
Project management & coordination
Service delivery & Infrastructure security & integrity
Education & Experience
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or related specializations.
5+ years of experience in IT Support / IT Site Support.
Solid experience supporting manufacturing environments.
Experience supporting multiple sites is a strong advantage.
Skills
Strong hands-on knowledge of:
Windows OS, MS 365
PC hardware, printers, peripherals
Basic networking troubleshooting
Familiar with ITSM / Helpdesk tools
Demonstrated project planning, project management, documentation, problem-solving and work prioritization skills.
Excellent customer service skills including telephone techniques, listening skills, sense of urgency and enthusiasm.
Excellent interpersonal and communication skills; ability to communicate effectively with end-users and management.
Good command of spoken and written Vietnamese and English.
Must be both team-oriented and self-motivated.
Familiarity with administration and support of voice communications.
Culturally sensitive – values diversity, able to understand and cooperate with other team members from different cultures
Willing to travel, internationally and domestically.
Working Conditions
Works in standard office/manufacturing environment.
Safety Requirements
All employees are required to follow the site EHS procedures and Coherent Corp. Corporate EHS standards.
Quality And Environmental Responsibilities
Depending on location, this position may be responsible for the execution and maintenance of the ISO 9000, 9001, 14001 and/or other applicable standards that may apply to the relevant roles and responsibilities within the Quality Management System and Environmental Management System.
Culture Commitment
Ensure adherence to company’s values (ICARE) in all aspects of your position at Coherent Corp.:
I
ntegrity – Create an Environment of Trust
C
ollaboration – Innovate Through the Sharing of Ideas
A
ccountability – Own the Process and the Outcome
R
espect – Recognize the Value in Everyone
E
nthusiasm – Find a Sense of Purpose in Work
Coherent Corp. is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected Veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law.
About Us
Coherent is a global leader in lasers, engineered materials and networking components. We are a vertically integrated manufacturing company that develops innovative products for diversified applications in the industrial, optical communications, military, life sciences, semiconductor equipment, and consumer markets. Coherent provides a comprehensive career development platform within an environment that challenges employees to perform at their best, while rewarding excellence and hard-work through a competitive compensation program. It's an exciting opportunity to work for a company that offers stability, longevity and growth. Come Join Us!
Note to recruiters and employment agencies:
We will not pay for unsolicited resumes from recruiters and employment agencies unless we have a signed agreement and have required assistance, in writing, for a specific opening.

location: Củ Chi, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Company Description
Netcompany was founded in 2000 with the headquarters in Copenhagen, Denmark. Today, we are an international company with more than 9000 employees working from over 10 locations. We serve a wide array of customers in their digital transformation journeys in public and private sectors across Europe.
Our Projects come from Europe
You will get the chance to work on different programming languages and technologies as this will vary from project to project. A large part of our projects uses technologies like AngularJS, gulp, Sass, React and node.js on Java and .NET. Besides that, we work with SharePoint, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Salesforce, Microsoft SQL-server, Sitecore, Oracle and Weblogic to name just a few.
We are looking for ambitious candidates to join us on a permanent basis to drive forward our delivery capability and deliver the optimum solutions to our clients in Europe. You will join our strong and dedicated team based in Ho Chi Minh City, where you will have the opportunity to work with some of the most skilled IT consultants in Vietnam and our technically skilled employees in Europe.
Why you should join us
International professional working environment
Opportunities to join training courses in Europe
Clear career path with strong academy system. In Netcompany we focus on improving your skills with our career development program and model, which are essential to make sure that all our Developers keep improving continuously. Once you join us, you are automatically enrolled in our Netcompany Academy and mentoring program, where we focus on different areas ranging from developing technical skills to more personal skills

Job Title: Data Scientist
Job Type: Contractor
Location: Remote
Job Summary
Join our customer team as a Data Scientist and play a pivotal role in transforming data into actionable insights that drive business growth. You will leverage your expertise in statistics, mathematics, and programming to tackle challenging data problems, ensuring clean, robust, and insightful analyses. This is an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic, expert-driven environment that values clear communication and innovative thinking.
Key Responsibilities
Collect, clean, and preprocess diverse data sets to ensure integrity and readiness for analysis.
Develop, validate, and implement statistical models to extract actionable insights from complex data.
Conduct exploratory data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and opportunities for business improvement.
Present findings and recommendations through compelling data visualizations and reports, tailored for technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Collaborate closely with team members to design and execute end-to-end data projects, from ideation to delivery.
Continuously improve analytical methodologies and automation processes to enhance data workflows.
Communicate effectively in both written and verbal formats, ensuring clarity and impact of data-driven recommendations.
Required Skills And Qualifications
Expertise in statistics, mathematics, and data analysis techniques.
Proven experience in collecting, handling, and cleaning large, complex data sets.
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, R, or similar for data manipulation and modeling.
Strong data modeling skills with experience in building and validating predictive models.
Advanced ability to visualize data using tools like Tableau, Power BI, or related libraries.
Meticulous attention to detail and commitment to data quality at every stage.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity and precision.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience working in a remote, cross-functional, or customer-focused team environment.
Background in developing and deploying machine learning solutions in production settings.

job_description:
About the Role
Masan Group is undertaking a large-scale ERP upgrade program across our ecosystem of subsidiaries (Masan Consumer, WinCommerce, Masan MEATLife, Phuc Long, Masan High-Tech Materials, and others). The program spans both SAP and Oracle environments and will modernize the backbone systems that run our consumer, retail, manufacturing, and resources businesses.
Sitting within the Group PMO and reporting to the Group PMO Lead, you will lead this transformation end-to-end — from planning and vendor governance through deployment, cutover, and hypercare across multiple business units.
You'll be part of a young, high-energy PMO team that moves fast, works hands-on, and partners closely with subsidiary leadership.
What You'll Do
Program leadership
Own the end-to-end delivery of the ERP upgrade program across multiple Masan subsidiaries running SAP and Oracle platforms
Build and manage the integrated project plan, critical path, milestones, dependencies, and resource allocation across workstreams (Finance, SCM, Manufacturing, Retail, HR, etc.)
Run steering committees and drive decision-making on scope, timeline, and budget trade-offs
Stakeholder & subsidiary alignment
Partner with leadership across subsidiaries to align business requirements, harmonize processes where possible, and manage localization needs
Bridge business and IT — translate business priorities into technical roadmaps and vice versa
Manage change impact across thousands of end users in finance, supply chain, retail operations, and manufacturing
Vendor & delivery governance
Manage SAP/Oracle implementation partners and system integrators — contracts, SOWs, deliverables, quality gates, and commercial governance
Drive accountability across internal teams, external consultants, and offshore delivery centers
Oversee technical workstreams: data migration, integrations, custom developments, infrastructure, security, and testing
Risk, quality & cutover
Identify and mitigate risks across technical, operational, financial, and organizational dimensions
Govern UAT, cutover planning, go-live readiness assessments, and hypercare
Ensure compliance with internal controls, audit, and data governance standards
What We're Looking For
Must-have
6–10 years in IT project management, with at least 1-2 full-cycle ERP implementations or major upgrades delivered as PM (SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC, Oracle EBS, or Oracle Fusion/Cloud ERP)
Hands-on experience leading multi-entity ERP rollouts in large enterprises (retail, FMCG, manufacturing, or conglomerate environments preferred)
Strong command of ERP delivery methodologies (SAP Activate, Oracle OUM, Agile/Waterfall hybrid) and core modules (FI/CO, MM, SD, PP, or Oracle equivalents)
Demonstrated ability to manage budgets at scale, vendor commercials, and complex SOWs
Strong stakeholder management — comfortable presenting to and challenging senior leaders across business and IT
Strong English communication (working language with global vendors and consultants)
Nice-to-have
PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent certification
Experience with both SAP and Oracle ecosystems
Background in retail, FMCG, or manufacturing ERP landscapes
Exposure to integrations with POS, WMS, MES, CRM, or HCM platforms
Experience managing offshore/nearshore delivery teams
Working style we value
Hands-on and pragmatic — you build the plan, track the details, and unblock the team yourself rather than only delegating
Energetic and collaborative — you thrive in a fast-paced PMO environment alongside peers who move quickly
Comfortable with ambiguity across multiple subsidiaries with different cultures and priorities
Bias for action and ownership — you drive outcomes, not status reports

Documentation & Reporting: Update technical documentation and FAQs; provide periodic reports on ticket resolution status and recurring incidents to improve service quality.
Compliance & Security: Ensure adherence to IT security policies and information security standards; report any potential security risks immediately.
User Training: Guide employees on IT policies and self-service tools; notify staff regarding scheduled system maintenance.

Willingness to work in shifts, including weekends or holidays as required (rotating shift, 40 hours/week).

Excellent communication and problem-solving skills; ability to work both independently and as part of a team.
English B1 - Oral and written comprehension required
Attitude: Responsible, proactive, and possessing strong professional ethics.

Mô tả công việc:
SYSTEM IT (Hệ thống phòng máy)
Quy hoạch sơ đồ nguyên lý, đấu nối hệ thống máy chủ, lưu trữ dữ liệu. Cài đặt, cấu hình, đảm bảo yêu cầu đề ra đối với nội dung công việc tương ứng.
Quản trị và vận hành toàn bộ hệ thống máy chủ, lưu trữ dữ liệu đảm bảo toàn bộ hệ thống vận hành ổn định.
SECURITY IT (Bảo mật mạng)
Quy hoạch sơ đồ nguyên lý đấu nối hệ thống firewall đảm bảo đáp ứng được yêu cầu đề ra đối với nội dung công việc tương ứng.
Xây dựng và cài đặt các chính sách, các giải pháp về an toàn bảo mật thông tin cho toàn bộ hệ thống mạng đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động an toàn và bảo mật.
NETWORK IT (Truyền dẫn)
Quy hoạch sơ đồ nguyên lý đấu nối hệ thống mạng IT và OT (mạng công nghiệp) toàn KLH, đảm bảo hệ thống đáp ứng được yêu cầu đề ra đối với nội dung công việc tương ứng.
Xây dựng các chính sách cho các phân vùng mạng, đảm bảo các phân vùng mạng có chính sách riêng, hoạt động ổn định và an toàn.
Giám sát và theo dõi tình trạng sử dụng mạng của các Bộ phận trong KLH đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định.
SOFWARE (Hệ thống phần mềm)
Đầu mối triển khai/ triển khai các phần mềm ứng dụng trong KLH đáp ứng được yêu cầu đề ra đối với nội dung công việc tương ứng hoặc theo chủ trương chung của Tập đoàn.
Quản trị và vận hành các hệ thống phần mềm đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định và an toàn

Xây dựng định biên CCDC công nghệ thông tin của các Bp/Nm trong KLH.
Xây dựng danh mục vật tư dự phòng, vật tư tiêu hao thường xuyên công nghệ thông tin trong KLH.
Kiểm soát công tác đề nghị mua, tồn kho vật tư dự phòng, vật tư tiêu hao thường xuyên của các Bp/Nm trong KLH, đảm bảo đủ về số lượng, đúng về chất lượng.

Job Purpose:
Ricoh is looking for a Technical Solution Implementation Consultant to join our Technical Consulting Team. This is a role where you become the bridge between technology and real business problems.
You’ll work directly with enterprise clients, turning complex requirements into smart, automated, and scalable solutions using Ricoh’s ECM/DMS and Workflow Automation platforms. Instead of being stuck fixing bugs or writing repetitive code, you’ll design how systems actually work in real operations — just like a junior solution architect.
If you’re aiming for a career in Solution Architecture, Digital Transformation, or Process Automation, this role gives you the hands-on project exposure and multi-system experience to get there faster.
Duties and Responsibilities:
1.     System Deployment & Configuration
•     Responsible for the installation, environment setup, and in-depth configuration of ECM/DMS/No-Code Platform components, ensuring strict adherence to the Technical Design Document.
2.     Workflow Automation Development
•     Utilize the solution’s Workflow Designer tool to realize and implement business process flows.
•     Optimize processing logic to ensure smooth, accurate, and efficient system operation.
3.     Integration & Scripting
•     Perform integration of the ECM/DMS/No-Code Platform with third-party systems (ERP, CRM, etc.) via REST API, .Net API, and Webhooks.
•     Write utility scripts (C#/.NET or JavaScript) for data processing or feature extension as required.
4.     Quality Assurance & Technical Support
•     Collaborate with the Business Analyst (BA) to conduct Unit Tests and System Tests before handover.
•     Troubleshoot and thoroughly resolve technical issues during the implementation phase (UAT) and live operations (Go-live).
5.     Research & Development (R&D)
•     Continuously update knowledge on new platform features (Cloud & On-Premises) to propose better and more optimal technical solutions for projects.
Requirements
Education
•     Bachelor's/associate’s degree in Information Technology, Management Information Systems, or Electronics and Telecommunications.
Experience
•     1-2 years of experience in software or system implementation (Well-structured
Freshers
with strong logical thinking and a solid technical foundation are welcome).
Technical Stack
•     Databases:
Solid knowledge of
SQL Server
or
MySQL
(Ability to write basic queries and stored procedures).
•     Infrastructure:
Basic understanding of
Cloud Platforms
(MS Azure, GCP, AWS…),
Windows Server
and
IIS
is a plus.
•     Programming:
Strong algorithmic thinking. Preference for candidates with foundational knowledge in
.NET (C#)
or
JavaScript/JSON
(for API calls and data handling).
Soft Skills & Mindset
•     Problem-solving:
Ability to independently analyze and resolve technical issues.
•     Mindset:
Careful, meticulous, process-compliant, and highly responsible for the delivered product.
•     Language:
Good English reading and comprehension skills for technical documentation (Good verbal communication is a significant advantage).
Benefits
•       Work in an international, dynamic and friendly environment.
•       Attractive salary, performance bonus allowance package.
•       Insurance as Vietnam’s labor code & extra accident/medical insurance.
•       13th-month salary, annual salary review.
•       Benefit in kind, company trip.
•       Opportunities:
o   Professional Development: Receive systematic On-the-job training on the DocuWare platform and leading Low-code/No-code technologies.
o   Career Advancement: Clear career path to become a Senior Technical Consultant or Solution Architect for high performers.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English (mandatory)

Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build trust and long-term partnerships
Passion for the tech industry, SaaS products, and business growth

Welcome to the job description page. Let’s explore this opportunity together!
At Acclime, we seek for people who care about delivering honest, professional and quality advice to our extended business community. We
value
diversity, inclusion, and trust, and we search for extraordinary individuals who are excited about working in an international corporate service practice. If you are aligned with our core values and our goals to deliver the best value for our business community in Vietnam, then you are in the right place. We look forward to meeting you!
Our organisational
culture
is at the core of what we do. Our values define our identity, and our staff are part of the journey towards growth, development and success together with our clients and partners. We know companies with a strong culture and identity thrive the most in the long run, which is why our culture is a priority.
Now, let’s dive right into the job summary and explore the essentials of this exciting role.
Challenge yourself. Job summary.
In this exciting and challenging role, you will work in our Marketing & Business Development Team, located in our Ho Chi Minh City office as
Business Development Manager
. Reporting to and working closely with the Partner, the Business Development Manager covers 3 key areas within Acclime:
Drive Strategic Growth:
You will develop and execute strategies to acquire new business, focusing on understanding the unique challenges of potential clients. You'll partner with our internal experts to advise clients on their long-term strategic needs and deliver tailored solutions that provide lasting value. This isn't just about selling; it's about becoming a trusted advisor.
Cultivate Client Partnerships:
You'll be the primary point of contact for our key clients, ensuring a seamless and high-quality experience from start to finish. This includes reviewing and approving proposals and engagement letters, meeting with clients to understand their evolving needs, and ensuring a smooth handover to our operational teams. You will own the client relationship, ensuring their satisfaction and our continued success.
Build a Powerful Network:
You'll actively engage with business communities both in Vietnam and internationally, building and nurturing key relationships. By participating in ongoing networking activities, you will expand our influence, uncover new opportunities, and position the company as a leader in the industry.
What you will do. A day in the life.
Let’s explore some of the
key responsibilities
of the position. On a given day, you will:
Drive new business growth:
Develop and execute sales strategies to generate new business, with a focus on acquiring small-to-medium enterprises (SMEs) and large-scale clients.
Meet and exceed sales goals:
Achieve ambitious business development and sales targets.
Build a strong client base:
Manage and expand a portfolio of client accounts, ensuring a high level of satisfaction and retention.
Lead market initiatives:
Develop and implement innovative online and offline marketing and business development campaigns, including cross-sell and up-sell strategies.
Analyze and strategize:
Review team sales performance and recommend strategies to boost overall results.
Expand your network:
Actively participate in community and networking events to identify and create new business opportunities.
Cultivate partnerships:
Build and maintain a network of strong referral partners.
Become a solution expert:
Master our core solution portfolio to effectively present our value to clients.
Be a brand ambassador:
Represent the company with professionalism, ensuring exceptional client satisfaction.
Travel as needed:
Travel within and outside of Vietnam for key business opportunities.
Essential requirements and skills
.
Your path to success
.
You have learned what a day in the life would be at Acclime. Now, let’s cover what you need to be successful in your new opportunity. These are some of the qualifications and requirements which will help you succeed, alongside your acquired abilities:
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration/ Accounting/ Finance/Marketing or a related discipline and other known industry qualifications and certifications would be an advantage.
Have access to a network of potential clients in Vietnam;
Experience with foreign working culture;
Minimum of 5 years
of corporate working experience with similar responsibilities;
Able to demonstrate a track record in sales target achievement;
Manage and deliver a high level of client satisfaction (‘customer service’) into all client accounts;
Excellent communication skills are a must, as well as a keen attention to detail.
Basic knowledge of office applications such as Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Power Point) and Windows.
Advanced level in English communication. Moderate to high Chinese language skills are an advantage.
Open for Vietnamese and foreign individuals.
Thrive
.
Your tailored benefits and rewards
.
At Acclime, people are a paramount element in delivering excellent services to our clients. That is why we invest in the development of staff, maintain regular training both technical updates and soft skills, and produce HR favourable policies to attract and retain talents working for us. Every one of us is trained, equipped, motivated and working to high standards. Let’s explore local employee’s benefits and rewards:

Hybrid work model

Full support and coaching to fast track the development of your career and realise your potential.

Awards and recognition programs for your achievements and success.

Take the challenge and join our team
.
We are Acclime Vietnam.
Collaboration is one of the key values which enables our staff to deliver outstanding services. In our modern workspace, we enable collaboration with break-out areas and meeting rooms situated in the centre of the workplace, accessible by everyone but still private enough for practical discussions. Innovation is at the core of what we do, and innovative thinking and new technologies are what make Acclime different.
We are proud of being one of the most reputable and trustworthy names in the corporate services sector in Vietnam and have been being reliable partner of our clients in their success journey. With more than 140 staff working across 3 key cities: Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City and Danang, Acclime Vietnam has been assisting foreign invested and locally owned companies to enter, expand, operate, and succeed in Vietnam, while maintaining the highest level of professional standards through proactive compliance, reporting assistance and advice

job_description:
About Us:
Romulus Digital is a dynamic company serving regional clients, including those in Singapore. We connect local talent with global opportunities, specializing in delivering innovative solutions and resource augmentation to help our clients reach their business objectives. We are currently looking for a skilled Business Development Executive to join our team and play a key role in our ongoing success
Job Summary:
The Business Development Executive will be responsible for actively identifying, developing, and converting new business opportunities. This role focuses on lead hunting, market expansion, and client acquisition, rather than administrative or support tasks.
You will work closely with internal stakeholders to build a strong sales pipeline, engage potential clients, and contribute directly to the company’s revenue growth in Vietnam and regional markets.
Key Responsibilities:
Lead Generation & Market Development
Proactively research, identify, and hunt potential leads through various channels (LinkedIn, referrals, market research, networking, cold outreach, etc.).
Qualify inbound and outbound leads to identify high-potential business opportunities.
Build and maintain a healthy sales pipeline, tracking leads and opportunities through CRM tools.
Identify new market segments, industries, and client profiles aligned with the company’s offerings.
Client Engagement & Business Development
Initiate and manage first-level client engagement, including outreach emails, calls, meetings, and follow-ups.
Understand client needs and propose suitable solutions in collaboration with internal teams.
Support proposal preparation, pricing discussions, and commercial negotiations where required.
Maintain and nurture relationships with prospects and existing clients to drive repeat or upsell opportunities.
Research, Reporting & Coordination
Conduct ongoing market and competitor research to support business development strategies.
Prepare reports, presentations, and pipeline updates for management review.
Coordinate with marketing, delivery, and recruitment teams to ensure aligned execution of business development initiatives.
Provide insights and recommendations to continuously improve lead generation and conversion processes.
Qualifications & Experience
2–3 years of hands-on experience in Business Development, Sales, or Client Acquisition, with a strong focus on lead hunting.
Proven ability to generate and qualify leads independently, not just support senior BD roles.
Experience in B2B environments (IT services, consulting, staffing, SaaS, or related industries is a strong advantage).
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with professional working proficiency in English.
Familiarity with CRM tools and sales tracking processes.
Ability to work independently, manage multiple leads, and prioritize effectively.
Proactive, target-driven mindset with strong ownership of outcomes.
What We Offer
Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
Clear career progression path in Business Development / Sales / Account Management.
Opportunity to work with local and international clients.
Exposure to regional markets and cross-functional collaboration.
A dynamic, collaborative, and growth-oriented working environment in Ho Chi Minh City.

Job Summary:
The IT Application Admin II will be responsible for the administration, maintenance, and support of various business applications and IT Infrastructure services within Jabil Vietnam. Strong communication skills are essential for collaborating with internal and external stakeholders.
Job Responsibilities:
Application Operations & Infrastructure Support: Maintain and support enterprise applications and their integration across server and network infrastructure, ensuring performance, uptime, and SLA adherence.
Incident & Problem Management: Troubleshoot application, database, and network-related issues; perform root-cause analysis; implement preventive measures and documentation. Coordinate deployments, patches, and configuration changes following change-control processes.
Data & Reporting Enablement: Build and maintain reports using SQL databases and Power BI (usage, cost, SLA, capacity dashboards); automate data pipelines and ensure data accuracy. Identify opportunities for application optimization and automation to improve efficiency and user experience.
Communication & Governance: Deliver clear presentations, status updates contribute to governance and process standardization. Provide training and guidance to IT and business stakeholders on application functionalities and best practices.
Capacity management, routine system health checks, performance monitoring, and preventative maintenance tasks to ensure application stability and availability.
Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for IT infrastructure and application configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting guides.
Lead IT projects related to IT infrastructure and application implementation, integration.
Job Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or related field; Proven experience in application administration supporting enterprise-level applications (e.g., ERP, MES, PLM).
ITSM Practices: Experience with ITIL processes—incident, problem, change, and configuration management; familiarity with ticketing tools (e.g., ServiceNow, Jira).
Automation & Scripting: Ability to automate routine tasks using PowerShell/Python; experience with ETL/data quality checks for reporting.
Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder engagement skills; ability to translate technical topics for non-technical audiences.
Mindset & Ownership: Detail-oriented, process-driven, and proactive; able to operate independently at escalation point, prioritize effectively in a global, multi-site environment.
Able to work in 08h shift (03 shifts/day, 06 working days/week, 08 working hours/shift).
, BE AWARE OF FRAUD: When applying for a job at Jabil you will be contacted via correspondence through our official job portal with a jabil.com e-mail address; direct phone call from a member of the Jabil team; or direct e-mail with a jabil.com e-mail address. Jabil does not request payments for interviews or at any other point during the hiring process. Jabil will not ask for your personal identifying information such as a social security number, birth certificate, financial institution, driver’s license number or passport information over the phone or via e-mail. If you believe you are a victim of identity theft, contact your local police department. Any scam job listings should be reported to whatever website it was posted in.

job_description:
About the Company
Our story might surprise you. We’re the world’s largest restaurant company—encompassing KFC, Pizza Hut, Taco Bell and Habit Burger & Grill —but there’s a lot more going on behind the scenes than just frying chicken, baking pizzas, and serving up tacos. We put this delicious food in the hands of customers through apps, websites, kiosks, POS, and other digital dining experiences.
About the Role
We are looking for a skilled
AI Support Specialist
(MLE Focus) to join our 24/7 operations team, focusing on maintaining and optimizing machine learning pipelines, infrastructure, and deployments. This role involves troubleshooting model deployment issues, ensuring system scalability, and working closely with MLEs to resolve infrastructure-related challenges.
Responsibilities
Operational Support:
Monitor machine learning pipelines, APIs, and deployment environments for errors and performance degradation.
Troubleshoot issues related to model inference, deployment failures, or infrastructure bottlenecks.
Perform root cause analysis for system incidents, documenting findings and implementing preventive measures.
Support CI/CD workflows for model updates and pipeline changes.
Incident Management:
Act as the first responder for MLE-related incidents detected via monitoring tools or reported by users.
Escalate unresolved issues to MLEs or engineering teams and follow through to resolution.
Track incident metrics (e.g., mean time to resolution) and provide insights for operational improvement.
Collaboration:
Partner with MLEs to support the deployment of new models and infrastructure changes.
Collaborate with Data Scientists and AI Engineers to ensure seamless handoffs and alignment on system requirements.
Continuous Improvement:
Contribute to the development of operational playbooks for model deployments and infrastructure support.
Identify opportunities to automate repetitive tasks, such as scaling model endpoints or managing resource utilization.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
1-2 years of experience in MLE, DevOps, or AI system operations roles.
Strong knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and container orchestration tools (e.g., Kubernetes, Docker).
Familiarity with MLOps tools and frameworks (e.g., MLflow, Kubeflow, SageMaker).
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation).
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced, 24/7 support environment.
Preferred Skills
Experience with monitoring and alerting tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog).
Knowledge of scripting and automation with Python or Bash.
Understanding of ML model lifecycle management and production best practices.
Pay range and compensation package
100% salary during the probation period.
18 days of annual leave per year.
Five “Recharge Days” – extra days in addition to company holidays.
One day of paid leave for your birthday.
Half-day Fridays.
Full salary insurance.
13th-month bonus.
Advanced health insurance (Generali).
Regular team and engagement activities.
LinkedIn learning and training courses, based on company policy.
MacBook and monitors.
Working location: Waseco building, 10 Pho Quang, Tan Son Hoa ward, Ho Chi Minh city
This position is available exclusively to candidates located in Vietnam. Relocation support is not provided, and applicants must be currently residing in Vietnam to be considered.

job_description:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Đề xuất, tham gia triển khai, quản lý hệ thống, vận hành và hỗ trợ cho các bộ phận trong việc sử dụng các ứng dụng công nghệ thông tin ERP, MES, Supply Chain, các giải pháp số hóa, văn phòng điện tử ở mảng Kế hoạch, Mua hàng, nhà máy (Kho vận, Sản xuất, Chất lượng, R&D, Bảo trì)
Tham gia nghiên cứu và đề xuất sáng kiến IT trong nghiệp vụ vận hành, tham gia triển khai, chuyển giao đến các Bộ phận cùng sở hữu và sử dụng hiệu quả.
Duy trì mỗi liên kết chặt chẽ với phòng ban phụ trách (Khách hàng) để chủ động nắm bắt được yêu cầu và để chủ trong việc lên kế hoạch thực thi đáp ứng nhu cầu của "Khách hàng"
Phân công nhiệm vụ cho các thành viên trong nhóm triển khai dự án, trong vận hành hàng ngày và khi có sự cố phát sinh. Theo dõi, trực tiếp xử lý khi cần và chịu trách nhiệm về mặt tiến độ, kết quả công việc.
Chịu trách nhiệm quản lý và phát triển năng lực đội ngũ IT trực thuộc quản lý theo sơ đồ tổ chức.
Thực hiện và hổ trợ các dự án khác khi được giao.
YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC
Tối thiểu (5) năm kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu về ERP ở các phân hệ Kế hoạch, Mua hàng, nhà máy (Kho vận, Sản xuất, Chất lượng, R&D, Bảo trì).
Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Quản trị kinh doanh hoặc các ngành có liên quan.
Có kinh nghiệm triển khai các giải pháp số hóa, phát triển, vận hành các hệ thống công nghệ về ERP, Supply chain, MES, Eoffice.
Hiểu biết sâu rộng về nghiệp vụ vận hành thực tế và việc ứng dụng CNTT vào vận hành thực tế Sản xuất, chuỗi Cung ứng.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp, truyền đạt ý tưởng rõ ràng, phối hợp tốt với các bộ phận chức năng.
Kỹ năng quản lý đội ngũ, quản lý thời gian và giải quyết vấn đề.
