job_description:
Contexte et environnement
What types of contacts are associated with the position?
All employees in MS Vietnam or Internal: Lubricant sales, CA, HR
Regional and global teams at TotalEnergies: APME, Lub BU, LPG, HSE..
Distributors, customers
Contractors & Suppliers
Does the position operate in a specific market (regulated, competitive, etc.)?
Total transforms to TotalEnergies as a board of Energy company.
The ambition is end of year 2030, we complete the roadmap to build B2C up to contribute 50% to TotalEnergies volume, by value for quality reason to believe and competitive product range.
In both B2B and B2C, TEMV’s ambition to grow lubricants as a core business, in addition to it is new product portfolios and new business to fit into the GLOBAL Zero Carbon Roadmap.
Activités
Our Company reflects the diversity of our employees. At TotalEnergies, the wide variety of talents drives our competitiveness, our ability to innovate, and our attractiveness. Therefore, we welcome differences in age, disability, gender reassignment, pregnancy/maternity, race, religion, beliefs, sex, sexual orientation, and family/parental status.
We believe Diversity makes us better.
Key Activities:
Technical
Online Technical Support: Provides product recommendations to enquiries from ASM/KAM, DSR/DLEs and customers.
Product developments: Carry out TotalEnergies and competitors trial test, testimonials with current products, new products
Technical support:
Lubrication survey to implement TotalEnergies Lubricants, Lubrication Audits to identify improvements to induce savings maintenance cost through promoting specialties ranges
Resolves technical problems regarding product or equipment performance in order to protect the company against unfounded litigation
Consults and plans with ASM/KAM on implementation of Effective Technical Services for nominated TotalEnergies accounts, identifies and implements profit improvement opportunities with customers.
Works with frontline sales colleagues to develop automotive customers and identifies customer needs through investigation analysis, communicates proactively with technical staff in target accounts to promote early adoption of TotalEnergies lubricants and programs.
Carry out joint and solo visits to new and existing key customers providing technical proposals/assistance ( lub-chart, technical service package…) to generate sales opportunities and secures product upgrade opportunities.
Providing on field training of product application knowledge to ASM/KAMDSRs/DLEs and reviews ASM/KAMDSRs/DLEs customer interaction regularly to ensure quality of offering.
Management of technical standards and materials:
Establishment, translation and revision of technical standards materials (Technical data sheet, raw material specification…) and provide needed technical assistance on important commercial projects.
Documents results of technical programs/recommendations to quantify savings and/or cost avoidance for Effective Technical Services customers and/or provide success stories
Others: Fulfill other tasks and/or assignments requested by the line managers whom the employee directly/indirectly reports to, and/or tasks requested by the Board of Management.
HSSE Tasks:
Participate in fire drills and be familiar with evacuation routes and assembly points.
Ensure proper housekeeping by keeping walkways and emergency exits clear of obstructions.
Report and document any workplace hazards, near-misses, or incidents to the appropriate personnel or HSSE coordinator.
Attend basic first aid training if requested by the Company.
Safely store and use electrical equipment and promptly report any faulty or damaged devices.
Stay informed about emergency contacts and procedures for medical or safety incidents within the office.
Profil du candidat
What is the required qualification level for the position?
University graduate in Mechanical or Engineering (Automotive, Mechanical, or Chemical fields preferred).
Minimum 3 years of relevant field experience in lubricant applications, technical service, or maintenance of automotive equipment. Strong understanding of equipment operations, lubrication systems, and technical programs.
What are the technical skills required?
In-depth knowledge of automotive lubricants (engine oil, gear oil, ATF, coolant, brake fluid).
Ability to interpret OEM specifications (API, ACEA, ILSAC, JASO).
Familiar with lubricant testing methods and standards (ASTM, ISO).
Skilled in troubleshooting engine and gearbox lubrication issues. Proficient in technical presentations, product demonstrations, and field trials with customers or distributors.
Experience with technical documentation, failure analysis, and oil sampling diagnostics.
Knowledge of maintenance planning systems and equipment reliability improvement.
What are the soft skills required?
Strong communication and presentation skills (for internal training and customer seminars).
Analytical thinking and problem-solving mindset.
Customer-oriented attitude with ability to translate technical issues into practical solutions.
Collaboration with sales and marketing teams.
Coaching ability to support distributors.
Adaptability and readiness to travel frequently to customer sites.
Which specific knowledges are required for the position?
Deep understanding of automotive engine technology, lubrication principles, and additive chemistry basics.
Knowledge of market applications: passenger car, commercial vehicles, fleets, workshops.
Familiarity with competitor products, OEM recommendations, and local market regulations.
Understanding of B2B/B2C technical service programs (e.g., workshop audits, oil recommendation tools, training modules).
What language skills are required?
Fluency in both Vietnamese and English
Able to prepare technical reports, conduct bilingual presentations, and communicate with regional or global teams.
What is the required level of experience for the position?
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in automotive lubricant application, technical service, or equipment maintenance.
Prior experience in multinational lubricant companies or automotive OEM/aftermarket preferred.
Proven track record of solving field problems, conducting product trials, and delivering customer technical support.
Informations supplémentaires
TotalEnergies valorise la diversité, promeut le développement individuel et offre des opportunités d'emploi égales à tous les candidats.

job_title: Senior Sales Executive – IT & Cybersecurity Solutions & Services
job_description:
Overview
We’re looking for a dynamic, target-driven Sales Professional to help grow our cybersecurity solutions & services portfolio. The ideal candidate understands solution-based selling and has experience engaging with enterprise clients to position and deliver IT/cybersecurity solutions & services. This is not a cold-calling role — it’s about building meaningful conversations, understanding client pain points, and driving opportunities from pitch to closure.
Key Responsibilities
● Identify, qualify, and pursue new business opportunities in IT/cybersecurity solutions (e.g., Firewalls: Fortinet, Palo Alto; EDR/XDR; IAM; WAF) and services (e.g., VAPT; MSSP with 24/7 SOC; SIEM; Managed EDR/WAF).
● Collaborate with delivery, pre-sales, and technical teams to build customized solutions & services that address client requirements.
● Develop and execute account strategies, sales plans, and lead generation activities to achieve quarterly and annual targets.
● Maintain a deep understanding of the company's service offerings and translate technical capabilities into business value for clients.
● Prepare proposals, RFP responses, and presentations in collaboration with the pre-sales team.
● Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with CXO-level decision-makers.
● Track pipeline, forecasts, and customer insights in the CRM system.
● Represent the organization at industry events, webinars, and customer meetings.
Required Skills & Experience
● 4+ years in B2B/SMB/enterprise IT or cybersecurity sales.
● Strong understanding of cybersecurity solutions (Firewalls: Fortinet, Palo Alto; EDR/XDR; IAM; WAF) and services (VAPT; MSSP/24/7 SOC; SIEM; Managed EDR/WAF).
● Proven record of consistently meeting/exceeding quotas.
● Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.
● Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams across delivery, pre-sales, and marketing.
Preferred Qualifications
● Bachelor's/Master's in Business Administration, IT, or related field.
● Sales experience targeting BFSI, Telecom, or SMB/Enterprise clients in Vietnam/SEA.
● Network of 50+ contacts in BFSI/Telecom/SMB/Enterprise, with proven closes on IT/cybersecurity deals (e.g., via past referrals/revenue).
● Proficiency in Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar CRM tools.

Wati is the world's leading WhatsApp-first conversational growth platform, empowering businesses to build deep er customer relationships and accelerate revenue growth. Trusted and loved by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati has established itself as the premier choice for businesses leveraging WhatsApp and other messaging channels to connect with customers on their platform of choice.In a world where real-time interactions drive growth, Wati's story is all about business growth through conversations.
At Wati, we believe that every conversation matters, whether it's engaging a first-time prospect, nurturing a qualified lead, or deepening relationships with loyal clients. We transform these conversations into opportunities for building relationships, and strong relationships lead to increased revenue.
Our Platform
The AI-native platform simplifies complex business operations by bringing all customer interactions under one intelligent roof. Designed for scalability and ease of use, our solution delivers a measurable ROI while adapting to businesses of all sizes, from emerging startups to established enterprises.
Our Backing & Partnerships
Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premier-tier Partner of Meta, Google, and WhatsApp, we maintain the highest standards of integration and platform excellence.
About The Role
We are looking for a Software Engineer II (Backend) to join our growing engineering team in Vietnam. In this role, you will work on building, maintaining, and improving backend services and APIs that power Wati's SaaS platform.
You will work closely with senior engineers, product managers, and frontend teams while gaining hands-on experience with scalable systems and real-world production workloads.
Key Responsibilities
Develop, test, and maintain backend services and APIs that power WATI's SaaS platform and WhatsApp Business solutions
Work closely with frontend, mobile, and product teams to deliver new features and improvements efficiently
Write clean and maintainable code, and contribute to system design discussions and code reviews
Participate in code reviews and learn system design fundamentals from senior engineers
Assist in debugging, troubleshooting, and improving performance of backend components
Contribute to improving development workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment processes
Continuously learn new technologies and apply them to improve system reliability and scalability
Requirements
Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
4-6 years of experience in backend development
Required: Experience with backend development using Golang or C# .NET
Basic understanding of databases (SQL or NoSQL) and RESTful APIs
Basic understanding of version control (Git)
Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) is a plus
Nice to have
Experience with MongoDB or PostgreSQL
Basic knowledge of JavaScript or TypeScript
Strong problem-solving skills, willingness to learn, and a collaborative mindset
Comfortable reading and writing technical documentation in English
Why join us?
Be part of a diverse, globally distributed team
Enjoy a collaborative, transparent, and empowering culture
Competitive compensation and flexible working arrangements
Work at the forefront of AI and SaaS innovation and make real impact

job_description:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Quản lý và vận hành hiệu quả các dịch vụ CNTT cung cấp cho khách hàng
theo chuẩn ITIL và SLA cam kết
. Đảm bảo chất lượng dịch vụ ổn định, liên tục và không ngừng nâng cao trải nghiệm khách hàng thông qua việc tối ưu quy trình, quản lý sự cố, yêu cầu và đội ngũ nhân sự liên quan.
1. Hỗ trợ trong giai đoạn thương thảo/ trước hợp đồng:
Phối hợp với đối tác và các bộ phận liên quan thống nhất Kế hoạch triển khai tổng quan và Phạm vi công việc / Dự toán triển khai tổng quan (nếu cần thiết).
Quản lý việc thực thi tất cả các điều khoản trong Hợp đồng Dịch vụ (Service Contract) và Thỏa thuận Mức độ Dịch vụ (SLA).
2. Khởi động và thiết lập dịch vụ:
Định nghĩa các thông tin khởi tạo dịch vụ gồm mục tiêu của dịch vụ, các yêu cầu thực hiện dịch vụ, Ban dự án và vai trò các thành viên, bên liên quan; kế hoạch tổng hợp và truyền thông trong dịch vụ.
Kế hoạch tổng quan (nếu có):
Thiết lập danh mục các công việc cần thực hiện trong dịch vụ (SoW).
Xác định các thông tin các bên liên quan trong dịch vụ để lên kế hoạch quản trị.
Xác định quy trình/biểu mẫu áp dụng cho dịch vụ.
Nhận định rủi ro và có phương án dự phòng.
3. Lập kế hoạch & thiết kế dịch vụ:
Phối hợp với đối tác, bộ phận liên quan để hoàn thành lấy yêu cầu dịch vụ chi tiết, tiến độ, xác định phạm vi công việc.
Xử lý các sự cố và vấn đề phát sinh kịp thời.
Lập kế hoạch triển khai dịch vụ (Thành viên, Plan-Tracking, Service category, Device category, Communication plan…).
Lập dự toán chi tiết về nguồn lực và các chi phí liên quan.
4.Triển khai và kiểm soát dịch vụ:
Phân công, thực hiện, giám sát và quản lý triển khai dịch vụ theo kế hoạch (SoW, timeline, chi phí và chất lượng dịch vụ ….).
Dẫn dắt và theo dõi các hoạt động triển khai dịch vụ để đạt được các mục tiêu của dịch vụ.
Quản lý các quy trình dịch vụ (Request/Incident/Change) trong tiến trình triển khai dịch vụ để đảm bảo SLA.
Quản lý các bên liên quan, các kết quả đầu ra để đảm bảo mục tiêu và kết quả dịch vụ.
Giải đáp các thắc mắc và khiếu nại của khách hàng, cung cấp dịch vụ khách hàng chất lượng cao để giải quyết các vấn đề và duy trì sự hài lòng của khách hàng.
Xây dựng và duy trì mối quan hệ đối tác tốt với khách hàng, hiểu rõ nhu cầu và mong đợi của họ.
Tổ chức và chủ trì các cuộc họp đánh giá dịch vụ định kỳ (Service Review Meetings - SRM) với khách hàng.
Tiếp nhận, quản lý và theo dõi các yêu cầu mới (Request for Change - RFC), yêu cầu dịch vụ từ khách hàng.
Thực hiện Bàn giao/ Nghiệm thu theo từng giai đoạn của dịch vụ.
Theo dõi thanh toán, xuất hóa đơn, thu tiền theo quy định của các hợp đồng (hợp đồng mua, hợp đồng bán). Quản lý ngân sách dịch vụ, kiểm soát chi phí.
Phối hợp với các bên liên quan trong việc Lập báo cáo tài chính, thu hồi công nợ liên quan đến các hợp đồng/ dịch vụ quản trị.
5. Kết thúc dịch vụ:
Thực hiện các thủ tục nghiệm thu/ thanh lý và quyết toán Hợp đồng dịch vụ.
Theo dõi và đánh giá kết quả, tiến trình thực hiện dịch vụ.
Tham gia công tác đánh giá nhà thầu thi công, tư vấn giám sát, nhà thầu cung cấp vật tư thiết bị.
Kiểm tra/ giám sát các kết quả công việc của thành viên trong nhóm để đảm bảo tiến độ hợp đồng/ dịch vụ.
Xây dựng và trình bày các báo cáo dịch vụ định kỳ (Service Performance Reports) cho khách hàng và quản lý nội bộ.
Quản lý tài liệu dịch vụ (Service Documentation).
Đảm bảo tuân thủ việc thực hiện các quy trình, quy định quản lý chất lượng của bộ phận và công ty.
Liên tục cải tiến quy trình và có sáng kiến nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.
Tham gia các chương trình đào tạo nội bộ, các chương trình đào tạo bên ngoài theo yêu cầu để nâng cao kỹ năng, năng lực làm việc cũng như chuyên môn liên quan.
YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC
Tốt nghiệp ĐH trở lên với các chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan.
2-3 năm kinh nghiệm
trong quản lý dịch vụ CNTT (IT Service Management), quản lý vận hành CNTT hoặc Managed Service Provider (MSP) hoặc doanh nghiệp có mô hình Managed Service.
Trực tiếp quản lý hợp đồng dịch vụ và SLA với khách hàng.
Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ , kiến thức về quản trị dự án, kiến thức về
ITIL Foundation (v.3 hoặc v.4).
Ưu tiên hiểu biết về các lĩnh vực CNTT cốt lõi (hạ tầng mạng, hệ thống, bảo mật, điện toán đám mây, ứng dụng, helpdesk).
Có ứng dụng các quy trình trong ITIL (incident, change, ...). Kinh nghiệm quản lý SLA.
Hiểu biết về phương pháp quản lý dự án, rủi ro, quản lý thay đổi (Agile, Waterfall, PMP) là lợi thế.
Thành thạo các công cụ quản lý dịch vụ (Jira Service Management...) công cụ giám sát, Microsoft Office (đặc biệt Excel, PowerPoint).
Đọc hiểu các tài liệu kỹ thuật bằng tiếng Anh, viết và giao tiếp tốt.
THU NHẬP
Lương thỏa thuận theo năng lực và vị trí công việc.
Package 15 thasngg lương/năm
Gói phúc lợi tiền mặt 9 triệu/năm vào các dịp Lễ, Tết, Sinh nhật Tập đoàn...
Xét tăng lương theo năng lực và kết quả công việc định kỳ 1 lần/năm. Hoặc tăng lương đột xuất theo hiệu quả công việc.
CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÃI NGỘ
Đóng BHXH đầy đủ và BH sức khỏe CMC Care ngay khi ký Hợp đồng chính thức.
Nghỉ phép: 12 ngày/ năm + 1 ngày nghỉ hưởng lương vào dịp sinh nhật bản thân.
Được tham gia các chương trình đào tạo chuyên môn, nghiệp vụ từ cơ bản đến nâng cao. Tài trợ 100% chi phí tham gia các khóa học, thi chứng chỉ CNTT Quốc tế.
Được trang bị laptop/thiết bị công nghệ trong quá trình làm việc.
Môi trường trẻ, năng động và chuyên nghiệp.
Tham gia Team building và các hoạt động văn hóa đa dạng.
Được vinh danh các giải thưởng năm của Tập đoàn CMC, CMC TS và khen thưởng trên các thành tích xuất sắc (dự án, kinh doanh, quản trị).
Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 - Thứ 6 (8h15 - 17h30).

job_description:
WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON
Main challenge
You’ll help build a high-quality computer vision dataset at scale (:1,000 real-world objects) that powers reliable object recognition.
The challenge is ensuring data consistency and quality across diverse real-world conditions like lighting changes, occlusion, motion blur, and reflections.
What it means on a daily basis
Organize, clean, and structure large image/video datasets (naming, metadata, removing duplicates, filtering low-quality samples)
Annotate data accurately and follow labeling standards to ensure consistency at scale
Track dataset progress, coverage, and versioning (logs, changelogs, dataset updates)
Perform quality checks and continuously improve dataset reliability through structured QA
Work closely with AI engineers to refine data based on model performance and edge cases
Who you would be working with
AI, Data, and programmer teams contributing to dataset quality and workflows
Cross-functional teams, depending on project needs
WHAT YOU NEED TO SUCCEED
Basic understanding of computer vision tasks (classification, detection, segmentation)
Familiarity with handling large datasets (images/videos) and maintaining structured documentation
Attention to detail in data annotation and quality control
Basic Python knowledge (for simple scripts, validation, or formatting tasks)
Understanding of real-world data challenges (lighting, occlusion, motion blur, etc.)
WHO YOU ARE
Highly detail-oriented and patient, with the ability to maintain accuracy in repetitive tasks
Organized and methodical in managing data and documentation
Proactive in identifying data issues and suggesting improvements
Comfortable working both independently and in a collaborative environment
Curious about AI, computer vision, and how models improve through data
Your recruitment journey
(1) Screening call
(2) Test
(3) Interview
(4) Offer
WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU
Internship allowance from VND 6,000,000 gross/month (based on candidates' competencies and committed working days).
1 day of paid annual leave per month, Christmas leave, Birthday leave, CSR leave, paid sick leave.
Various training packages, including internal training and e-learning platforms (iLearn, Udemy, O'Reilly,...).
Opportunities to collaborate and train with Gameloft worldwide experts and develop yourselves.
A range of well-being events and policies to support employees physically, mentally, and emotionally.
The opportunity to become an official employee of Gameloft.
Life at Gameloft
A collaborative workplace environment, with over 15+ nationalities, where hundreds of world-renowned game titles were born.
An open-space office, a canteen, a billiard table, a ping-pong table, and a foosball table.
A gaming room equipped with mutiple devices (PS, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, arcade machine,...).
A capable and encouraging team of professionals focused on creating compelling video games.
A global company where you can meet great people around the world.
A fun place to work in the heart of the city.
How to proceed
Ready to level up your career? Apply now and help us create the next great game!
Please note:
To ensure a fair and compliant recruitment process under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), please submit your application through the official job posting, preferably via Gameloft website, Gameloft or Gameloft Vietnam LinkedIn pages, or SmartRecruiters. Applications sent via email or LinkedIn messages will not be considered.
Due to the high volume of applications, only candidates whose profiles most closely match the role needs will be contacted by our recruiters. We sincerely appreciate your understanding and interest.

About the Company
We are SCC – Specialist Computer Centres – Europe’s leading provider of IT services and solutions.
About the Role
An opportunity has arisen for an experienced Business Analyst / Functional Consultant to join an exciting and challenging Dynamics 365 Project Operations implementation and optimisation programme. The Dynamics 365 Project Operations Functional Consultant will play a pivotal role in a business transformation initiative, implementing and enhancing Microsoft Dynamics 365 Project Operations and Power Platform solutions for SCC. The role focuses on improving project delivery, resource management, financial control, and operational visibility across the project lifecycle. The successful candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, project managers, finance teams, and IT delivery teams to ensure the solution meets business needs and maximises value. This role also offers exposure to the wider Microsoft ecosystem, including Power Platform, Azure, and integrations with Finance and Supply Chain systems.
Responsibilities
Collaborate with business stakeholders (Project Management, PMO, Finance, Operations) to understand project operation requirements and translate them into scalable functional designs.
Analyse and document end-to-end project lifecycle processes including project planning, resource management, time & expense, project costing, billing, and revenue recognition.
Create clear functional design documents aligned with business objectives and Dynamics 365 Project Operations best practices.
Lead and participate in the implementation and configuration of Dynamics 365 Project Operations modules.
Provide functional guidance and clarification to technical teams during development, integration, and testing phases.
Support data migration, system integration, UAT, and deployment activities.
Maintain awareness of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Project Operations roadmap, features, and updates.
Evaluate new features and enhancements to assess suitability and value for SCC.
Work with security and compliance teams to design appropriate roles, permissions, and controls within Project Operations.
Support change management activities including training, knowledge transfer, and user adoption.
Act as a functional point of contact for post-go-live support, continuous improvement, and optimisation initiatives.
Identify opportunities to streamline project operations, improve reporting, and increase operational efficiency through system enhancements.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Business, or a related field is preferred.
Required Skills
2–3+ years’ experience as a Business Analyst or Functional Consultant, preferably on ERP or Dynamics 365 implementations.
Strong understanding of project-based business processes, including:
Project planning and execution
Resource and capacity management
Time & expense management
Project costing, budgeting, and billing
Financial tracking and reporting
Hands-on experience or strong knowledge of Dynamics 365 Project Operations (or similar project/PSA systems).
Experience eliciting and documenting business and system requirements from stakeholders, product owners, and end users.
Strong documentation skills including process flows, functional specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
Excellent communication skills with proven English writing and speaking ability.
Competent use of Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and Visio.
Experience working in Agile, hybrid, or waterfall delivery models.
Familiarity with Azure DevOps, JIRA, or equivalent tools for requirement and backlog management.
Strong analytical, detail-oriented, and problem-solving mindset.
Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
Well-organised with strong time-management and prioritisation skills.
Positive, proactive, and adaptable attitude with a strong willingness to learn.
Report Line
Report to Business Analyst Lead / Functional Consultant Lead and Head of IT Transformers.
Equal Opportunity Statement
We are committed to diversity and inclusivity.

Welfare
Attractive remuneration with competitive income and 6 months/year salaries/ efficient production and business.
A welfare package of $2000 per year including Tet bonus, holiday bonus and resort.
Being a colleague of a team of leading technology experts in fields such as: DPI, BigData, Machine Learning, AI, Data Mining, Speech Recognition, Virtual Assistant…
Improve capacity through intensive training courses, study support and professional certification exams.
Consider raising the minimum salary once a year. Access to attractive promotion opportunities.
12 days holiday, 12 vacation days and 3 annual vacation days.
Always enjoy to the fullest full benefits of social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance and statutory leave and sick leave after signing the labor contract
Join the comprehensive health care MIC insurance package.
Relax, spark creativity with Happy Time every day, modern workspace.
Enjoy a delicious lunch, selected by nutritionists.
Working in key projects of the Group with large system scale.
Experience the multiculturalism when working with Viettel's personnel in more than 10 countries.
Job Descriptions
Surveying, taking requirements, agreeing on scope from customers, consulting solutions for products
Analysis of requirements from business to operations for products
p>
Design business solution documents, design documents (Mockup) for project team
Review and evaluate products before handing over to customers

Graduated from University, majoring in Information Technology, Telematics, Informatics, or equivalent.
Having at least 2 years of experience in software development and solutions (acceptable). also include your work experience while you're undergrad).
TOEIC 550/990.
Love Specific needs
Have basic IT knowledge and skills: Software architecture, system analysis and design, databases
Having an idea Good thinking in system analysis, logic, reasoning, and critical thinking
Good communication and communication skills

Love Football (Soccer)? Love Business? Stranger Soccer is rolling out to key cities globally, and we're seeking a License Owner / Operator to launch and operate the Stranger Soccer brand in Ho Chi Minh City.
This isn't your regular management role — it's truly built for someone who wants to run, grow, and own their own venture,
while helping make football more accessible in their city. Best suited for entrepreneurial individuals who love football and enjoy seeing tangible results from their work.
⚽
About the Role
As License Owner/Operator, you will be responsible for establishing and growing Stranger Soccer in Ho Chi Minh City. You will oversee daily operations while building a strong, engaged football community.
This opportunity goes beyond typical employment — it is ideal for someone who enjoys hands-on ownership, is driven by performance, and wants to make a real impact in their city.
💼
What You'll Do
Launch and grow Stranger Soccer operations in Ho Chi Minh City
Secure and manage partnerships with football venues
Recruit, train, and manage game hosts and part-time staff
Drive player acquisition through creative marketing and community engagement
Ensure a high-quality, consistent game experience that keeps players coming back
Continuously improve and scale operations
You'll be supported by our headquarters team in Singapore, including:
Technology platform (app, payments, automation)
Proven operating model
Ongoing operational and marketing guidance
🎯

Passionate about football with strong local insight
Entrepreneurial mindset with a bias for action
Comfortable taking ownership and driving measurable results
Experience in operations, events, community building, or similar areas
Strong communication and people leadership skills
💡
What Makes This Opportunity Unique
Full ownership and autonomy over local operations
Direct impact on growth and success in your city
Performance-driven structure with strong upside potential
Opportunity to build and lead a local team
🌍

Stranger Soccer makes playing football as easy as going for a jog. Through our mobile app, players can browse games, book slots, and play anytime.
Born in Singapore, Stranger Soccer is now open in 10+ cities around the world, with over 100,000 games run. We continue to grow and are accepting applications from license partners who want to bring Stranger Soccer to their city.

: Hồ Chí Minh | Hanoi
Who We Are
Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963. Today, we help clients with total transformation-inspiring complex change, enabling organizations to grow, building competitive advantage, and driving bottom-line impact.
To succeed, organizations must blend digital and human capabilities. Our diverse, global teams bring deep industry and functional expertise and a range of perspectives to spark change. BCG delivers solutions through leading-edge management consulting along with technology and design, corporate and digital ventures—and business purpose. We work in a uniquely collaborative model across the firm and throughout all levels of the client organization, generating results that allow our clients to thrive.
What You'll Do
Like our full-time staff, you’ll work alongside some of the world’s top minds on cases that reshape business, government, and society. Consulting work is varied and rigorous, much of it performed at our client sites. Projects can vary in length, size, and location, depending on the client’s challenge. You’ll collaborate on challenging projects with team members from many backgrounds and disciplines, increasing your understanding of complex business problems from diverse perspectives and developing new skills and experience to help you in the future, be that at BCG or beyond.
BCG offers a comprehensive benefits program, including medical, dental and vision coverage, telemedicine services, life, accident and disability insurance, parental leave and family planning benefits, caregiving resources, mental health offerings, a generous retirement program, financial guidance, paid time off, and more.
What You'll Bring
Penultimate year students and graduated students with less than 6 months experience are welcome to apply
Outstanding academic performance and strong record of extracurricular activit
Strong research/analysis experience and abilities, including excellent Excel skills
Able to work creatively and analytically
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

Location
Etown Central Building, 11 Doan Van Bo Street, Xom Chieu Ward, HCMC
Salary
Up to 55M VND Gross/month
Contract
Until December 31, 2026
Global enterprise network underpins collaboration, manufacturing, R&D and customer operations across offices, data centers and the cloud. As a Network Engineer based in Ho Chi Minh City, you will be the primary owner of the Vietnam office network and a key contributor to global network infrastructure. You’ll design, implement and support secure, reliable connectivity for our local site while partnering closely with the global Infrastructure & Network team to drive standards, automation and continuous improvement. Your work will directly impact the productivity of hundreds of employees in Vietnam, the stability of R&D and QA environments, and the reliability of connectivity back to global services.
Role Description
● Own the day‑to‑day operation of the Vietnam office network (LAN/WLAN/WAN), including switches, routers, firewalls, VPNs and internet circuits.
● Monitor and maintain site connectivity to corporate and cloud environments (MPLS/VPN/IPsec/SD‑WAN), working with global network engineers to implement changes and troubleshoot incidents.
● Plan and execute capacity and performance improvements (e.g., internet bandwidth upgrades, Wi‑Fi redesigns, QoS tuning) to support growing AI workloads, R&D traffic and hybrid work.
● Implement and maintain network security controls in alignment with corporate standards (segmentation, firewall policies, VPN profiles, routing policies, RA Guard / IPv6 controls, NAC where applicable).
● Support and evolve IPv4/IPv6 network designs in the Vietnam office (dual‑stack, VLANs, addressing plans, DHCP/DHCPv6, SLAAC, prefix delegation) in partnership with engineering teams.
● Provide L3 escalation for network‑related incidents impacting the Vietnam site (office, labs, manufacturing, meeting rooms), including on‑site hands when needed.
● Create and maintain accurate documentation: network diagrams, IP/VLAN plans, circuit inventories, change records and standard operating procedures.
● Partner with IT Support, Endpoint Engineering, SRE, Manufacturing and InfoSec to design reliable solutions for new labs, QA setups, Zoom Rooms, and office technology projects (e.g., Neat bars, new circuits).
● Participate in change management, including planning, peer review and execution of network changes during approved windows.
● Work flexible hours across time zones, including off‑hours network infrastructure work (maintenance, deployments, cutovers) and occasional night or early‑morning syncs with US‑based teams when required by projects or incidents.
● Coordinate with local ISPs and vendors (e.g., order new circuits, handle outages, schedule maintenance, manage SLAs and escalations).
● Contribute to global network initiatives (standardization, automation, monitoring improvements, incident postmortems) as a member of the wider Infrastructure & Network team.
Qualifications
● 3–5+ years of hands‑on experience in network engineering or similar role supporting enterprise networks (office, campus or branch).
● Strong knowledge of TCP/IP, routing and switching (VLANs, STP, OSPF/BGP, VRRP/HSRP, QoS concepts).
● Practical experience with enterprise firewalls and VPNs (e.g., Palo Alto, Cisco, or similar), including site‑to‑site tunnels and remote access.
● Experience operating enterprise Wi‑Fi (e.g., Cisco, Aruba, Meraki, Ubiquiti or similar): SSID design, RF basics, authentication, troubleshooting.
● Working knowledge of IPv6 concepts and configuration (addressing, DHCPv6/SLAAC, prefix delegation, ICMPv6) or strong willingness to learn and adopt IPv6 at scale.
● Familiarity with network monitoring and logging tools (e.g., SNMP, NetFlow/sFlow, syslog, cloud monitoring) and using data to drive incident response and capacity decisions.
● Ability to troubleshoot complex issues end‑to‑end, collaborating across teams (Endpoint, SRE, Security, Vendors) and communicating clearly with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
● Comfort working in a global environment (remote teams, different time zones) and able to communicate fluently in English with US-based and other global teams.
● Strong ownership mindset, bias for action, and ability to work independently on‑site in the Vietnam office when needed (including occasional off‑hours change windows).

General Information:
As an AI Engineer, you will be responsible for building, deploying, and maintaining production-ready AI systems. Your role is to bridge the gap between experimental models and real-world applications. You will focus on the engineering challenges of AI–integrating Large Language Models (LLMs), optimizing cloud infrastructure, and ensuring that our AI services are scalable, reliable, and high-performing.
Core Responsibilities:
End-to-End Development:
Contribute to AI-related projects from requirements gathering to delivery for internal and external stakeholders.
Productionization:
Transform experimental scripts and prototypes into robust, production-grade microservices and APIs.
Generative AI & LLMs:
Implement and optimize LLM-based solutions (e.g., RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, prompt engineering) to solve complex business tasks.
Cloud Infrastructure:
Deploy and manage AI workloads on cloud platforms, utilizing managed services for scaling and monitoring.
System Integration:
Collaborate with Backend and DevOps teams to integrate AI components into the broader software ecosystem.
Performance Optimization:
Monitor and optimize model latency, throughput, and cost-efficiency in production environments.
Technical Exploration
: Conduct research and exploration to expand technical knowledge, sharpen problem-solving skills, and stay current with cutting-edge technologies.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
Education:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, AI Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Data Science, or a related field.
Engineering Excellence:
Strong proficiency in
Python
and/or
C++
, with a deep understanding of software design patterns, APIs (FastAPI/Flask), and asynchronous programming.
LLM Stack:
Proven experience building and deploying applications using LLM frameworks and a deep understanding of vector databases for efficient data retrieval.
Core Competencies:
Ability to Learn:
Rapidly adapting to the fast-evolving AI landscape (e.g., new LLM architectures or deployment tools).
Critical Thinking:
Evaluating the trade-offs between different engineering approaches (e.g., Build vs. Buy, Local vs. API-based models).
Attitude:
Proactive ownership of the "production" state; you care as much about uptime as you do about model accuracy.
Evaluation Skills:
Ability to develop benchmarks for evaluating AI system performance in real-world scenarios.
Communication:
Strong communication skills with the ability to work in a collaborative environment. Working proficiency in English is required for daily tasks.
Preferred Qualifications:
Holding a Master or PhD degree.
IELTS 6.0 / TOEIC 700 equivalent or higher.
Contribution to open-source projects or a portfolio demonstrating diverse DS/AI interests.
Experience Level Guidelines
Junior:
1–3 years; focus on API development, basic cloud deployment, and learning the LLM ecosystem.
Middle:
3–5 years; focus on building end-to-end AI products, optimizing cloud costs, and implementing RAG/LLM pipelines.

Job Summary
The Head of Route to Market (RTM) defines and leads the end-to-end RTM strategy, governance, and transformation agenda to drive sustainable topline growth, optimize cost-to-serve, and enhance the productivity of commercial and distribution resources.
The role partners cross-functionally to shape and implement future-ready RTM models, eb2b by combining deep understanding of end-to-end commercial operations with strong business case development.
Through continuous performance diagnostics and external benchmarking, the role drives data-led evolution of RTM models, integrating emerging technologies into scalable and pragmatic solutions that create competitive advantage in Commercial & Sales.
Key Responsibilities
1.Define and Lead RTM Strategy & Transformation
• Own the end-to-end RTM strategy to enable topline growth, ensure optimal coverage, improve productivity of commercial and distribution resources as well all cost-to-serve efficiency across all channels
• Continuously lead the team to analyze market dynamics, competitor RTM models, and internal performance (RTM, X-Ray of Distributors and Wholesalers, ND, CTS, Discounts, Customer Service Policies, etc.) to identify structural opportunities
• Define and drive next-generation RTM models, including distributor, wholesaler, and digital/eB2B ecosystems
• Lead cross-functional alignment with Commercial & Sales, RGM, Supply Chain, Logistics, and Digital to ensure RTM strategies are holistic and executable
• Act as the thought partner to Sales Leadership, shaping RTM direction and embedding it into planning activities
2. Establish RTM governance, performance management & standards
• Define and institutionalize RTM KPIs and governance frameworks (e.g., service compliance, distributor effectiveness, CTS, ND, productivity, eRTM coverage)
• Lead RTM performance diagnostics and reporting for company’s data-driven decision making and propose recommendations to drive commercial prioritization and resource allocation, including but not limited to:
o Distributor financial & operational health
o Wholesaler engagement effectiveness
o Sales force productivity and route efficiency
o ND tracking
o CTS reporting (usage tracking and training where required)
• Lead strategy development and deployment of Distributor Management & Wholesaler engagement, ensuring alignment with Swire Coca-Cola standards and evaluate its effectiveness
3. Drive innovation, pilots & future-ready RTM models
• Identify and translate emerging industry trends and best practices (from bottlers, FMCG, and relevant industries) into RTM opportunities
• Manage and guide RTM pilots and transformation initiatives, including:
o Defining hypotheses, success metrics, and business cases
o Securing investment and cross-functional resources
o Reviewing pilot outcomes and scaling successful models
• Lead the evolution of new selling and delivery models (e.g., B2B platforms, automation, AI-enabled tools, digital ordering, inventory solutions)
• Ensure strong partnership with Digital Enablers/ Commercial Execution Excellence team to embed technology into RTM as a competitive advantage
• Drive change management and adoption of new RTM models in collaboration with Commercial Execution Excellence team
4. Design and lead eb2b
• Define the strategic direction for eb2b, and collaborate and support the implementation of B2B platforms and integration with key eb2b partners together with Digital Enablers/ Commercial Execution Excellence team
• Works with internal and external stakeholders to ensure smooth operations and revenue growth for our eb2b, expanding our reach and delivering high sustainability eb2b solutions
• Ensure reliability, adoption, and commercial impact of digital RTM solutions in collaboration with Digital Enablers/ Commercial Execution Excellence team.
Requirements
University/Bachelor’s Degree
More than 5 years of experience in commercial, RTM or logistics operations roles.
Core Competencies
Key to this role will be the ability to combine functional expertise with a strong entrepreneurial spirit, a relentless focus on results and a great ability to create cross-functional integration with a very high sense of flexibility and understand cultural differences. It will require a healthy balance of understanding our business, leading cross-functional teams effectively and thinking out-of-the-box to ensure we continue to challenge the status quo while maximizing our return on investment.
He/she should be capable of establishing collaborative working relationships, deal with change management and process improvement and of developing sustainable regional teams that can continue the local development without him being present.
Specific Competencies

• Route planning/Route management
• Network analysis

• Wholesaler engagement strategy
• eRTM – Digital trends
• IT basics
• Operations/logistics basic processes
• Project Management

Building and maintaining relationships, communicating effectively, Influences the System, drives innovative business improvements, develops & inspires others, builds vision and strategy, ethics and integrity.

The ideal candidate will drive the execution of structural test plans on baseboards/systems with cross functional teams, which includes production support, failure and yield analysis, and optimize quality/production efficiency. The candidate will be responsible for the fixture/program deployment of structural test plan from NPI to MP with timely issue resolution and escalation. You will work closely with the Asia team, tester vendors, fixture houses and CMs to enable the process.
What you will be doing:
Manage production issues related to fixture/program with timely resolution
Optimize the structural test plan based on the ICT/FCT yield analysis to find SMT, PCB, and component issues earlier.
Work with CM, tester vendors and fixture houses by providing detailed DFM and guidance to meet ICT requirements.
Provide support for production bring-up and debugging.
Define and provide procedure/document and technical support if needed.
What you need to see:
Master degree (or equivalent experience) in Electrical, Mechanical, Materials, or other related fields.
2+ years' experience in ICT programming, fixture design/manufacturing, and factory testing areas
Experience in ICT development capability, HW design understanding, board debug capabilities. and structured test understanding.
Good knowledge of board manufacturing flow, PCB/fixture design, proven program management capability, experience and results.
Hands-on experience with lab tools (oscilloscopes, multimeters, TDR, BERT)
Excellent communication, quantitative, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.
Must be a strong team player, supporting & analytical skill, and good working habits.
Self-starter who can accomplish assigned tasks with minimal supervision.

Who We Are
Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce, plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state-of-the-art in-house Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven, growth-focused services, enabled by the industry's strongest team, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities.
We are growing rapidly, and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA, we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.
The team you will be part of
Our Tech Team powers our digital capabilities by designing and building the platforms and tools behind our eCommerce services. In this project, you'll help build the martech applications that support marketing operations across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok, and other major channels. You'll turn marketing workflows, optimization needs, and client pain points into clear product requirements for Engineering.
As a IT Business Analyst, you will
Work with the Product Manager/Owner, business stakeholders, conduct competitor research to understand business needs and ecommerce marketing workflows (e.g., ad campaign setup & adjustments, ad budget allocation, ecommerce platform rules & limitations, reporting)
Analyze, clarify, and document requirements
Translate workflows into clear user stories, diagrams, and specifications
Partner closely with Engineering during requirement development and verify outcomes after release
Support UAT planning, script writing, and testing scenarios that reflect feature usage
Create and maintain simple and user-friendly documentation (PRDs, FAQs, onboarding materials)
Work with designers to create design files and refine user flows
Collaborate across multiple domains including ecommerce, marketing operations, strategy, automation logic, and data workflows
Requirements
What we are looking for - the ideal profile
At least 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst in an outsourcing, SaaS, product company, or similar relevant environment
Highly responsive to feedback and able to iterate quickly based on stakeholder input
Comfortable working across multiple modules or projects simultaneously
Able to produce well-structured documentation and clear requirement specifications
Able to maintain clear and consistent communication with stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle
Able to identify unclear or conflicting requirements and raise them for clarification to support effective prioritization and delivery
Strong ownership mindset, positive attitude, and growth mindset
English proficiency preferred for documentation and cross-country communication
Motivated to grow into a Mid/Senior BA or Product Owner role within the next two years
Benefits
In return, you will be getting
We are building 'the operating system for digital commerce in South East Asia' covering all key platforms, working with leading international brands, with a breadth and depth of functionalities (Middleware, OMS, Inventory mgmt, Store Ops, CX, MarTech, Data & Analytics) that few in the industry can match
You get the chance to work on exciting SaaS projects and sophisticated features and functionalities that will make a big impact in the industry, on a top-notch scalable infrastructure
Our Tech team has been around since 2017, so you will join a well-oiled and stable "machine" (= rockstar expert team), where processes are well established and enterprise-grade. But at the same time, our organisation is non-hierarchical, entrepreneurial and collaborative, and working on cool stuff, so you get the best of both worlds
Tech is a strategic pillar for intrepid, so you will feel the love and recognition for your work, and will partner closely with business stakeholders, who as internal users of the tech will provide the real-world feedback and inputs which help to take our tech stack to the next level
We also offer
Best of Both Worlds
We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.
Culture that Brings Out the Best
At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.
Grow Without Limits
Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.
Rewarding You Right
We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That's why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.
Note: We will not be accepting any unsolicited resumes or CVs from headhunting or recruitment agencies at this point. Any CVs or profiles shared with us will not be entertained, and in the event of dispute, Intrepid will not be liable for any material compensation to third parties

job_title: Freelance Supply Chain Consultant - AI Trainer
job_description:
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems.
Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
About The Role
As a Procurement & Supply Chain Expert on this project, you will design realistic disruption scenarios based on your hands-on experience, define expected outcomes and mitigation strategies, and evaluate AI-generated recommendations for accuracy, completeness, and business relevance.
What This Opportunity Involves
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may:
Designing realistic supply chain disruption scenarios (e.g. supplier delays, quantity changes, logistics issues, quality failures) grounded in real-world manufacturing and procurement contexts
Defining expected outcomes and appropriate mitigation strategies for each scenario
Evaluating AI-generated responses and recommendations against real-world business logic
Assessing outputs for accuracy, completeness, and relevance within ERP environments (particularly Microsoft Dynamics 365, Coupa, Jaggaer, Ariba (SAP))
Contributing to structured data creation and validation tasks following defined guidelines and frameworks
What we look for
Minimum 4 years of hands-on experience in procurement, supply chain, or purchasing, ideally in a manufacturing environment
Strong working knowledge of procurement workflows: purchase orders, vendor management, inventory, and production planning
Hands-on experience with ERP systems such as SAP, Oracle, or Microsoft Dynamics 365
Proven ability to design and reason through supply chain disruption scenarios and mitigation approaches
Solid understanding of disruption types: delays, shortages, quality issues, and logistics challenges
Knowledge of Incoterms and transportation/logistics management
Familiarity with BOM structures and production planning processes
Experience with supplier performance metrics (OTIF, lead times, quality scores)
Analytical mindset with the ability to assess AI outputs against real-world business logic
Experience with data validation, structured data entry, or annotation tasks
Clear written communication in English
How It Works
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10-20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active.
Compensation
On this project, contributors can earn up to
$50 per hour equivalent
, depending on their level and pace of contribution.
Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

job_description:
About Us
We solve our client's most difficult business challenges through technology. Our company partners with the most ambitious companies around the world creating long-term impact with the work we do. If you want to grow together, work on challenging products and enjoy using the best tools and practices, Nimble is the right place for you!
About The Role
We're looking for a Technical Lead who builds alongside their team - not one who manages from a distance. You'll own technical direction for your team, shape architecture decisions, and help less experienced engineers grow, all while staying close to the code.
This is a leadership role, but the best person for it still thinks like a builder. You'll work across Nimble client projects spanning a wide range of industries and complexity, and be expected to operate with full ownership end-to-end.
What you'll do
Lead a team of engineers across one or more client projects, setting the technical direction and maintaining quality standards
Define front-end and back-end architecture, make technology decisions, and own the outcome
Work closely with the Product Manager to keep delivery on track and contribute to technical discussions with clients when needed
Write and review code - this is a hands-on role; you're expected to contribute, not just direct
Use AI tools as a core part of how you work and help your team do the same
Mentor and grow engineers in your team through code reviews, pairing, and knowledge sharing
Set and execute technical strategy aligned with project and business objectives
Contribute to internal processes and initiatives - our handbook has been written by the whole team
What We Are Looking For
Technical
Solid professional web development experience with a strong background in software architecture - we care more about what you've built and led than how many years you've been doing it
Deep experience with scaling web platforms, handling high traffic, and maintaining uptime
Solid understanding of cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and modern DevOps practices
Comfortable across the stack - frontend and backend - and able to adapt to the language and framework the project needs
Experience with AI coding tools and a clear point of view on how to integrate them into engineering workflows
Leadership
Proven track record of leading engineering teams and growing engineers in a high-growth or consultancy environment
Experience setting and executing technical strategy aligned with business objectives
Strong decision-making with a bias for action - you commit, you move, you course-correct
Business awareness
Prior experience in a software consultancy or product-led company
Ability to communicate clearly across technical and non-technical stakeholders, including clients
Why Join Us?
Innovation at Scale: Be a part of an innovative project that will reshape the customer experience landscape.
Dynamic Environment: Work in a vibrant, energetic office filled with creative minds
Growth Opportunities: Continuous learning and development opportunities to advance your career.
Be Part of Something: Potential to earn equity for all early employees.
Why You’ll Love Working Here
You’ll feel proud of every product we ship. We care deeply about quality, design, and doing things right—our name stands for excellence.
You’ll be surrounded by high performers. We’re a tight-knit, ambitious team that pushes each other to grow and thrive.
We're built differently. We’ve been profitable and bootstrapped since day one—no VC pressures, just smart, sustainable growth.
We take pride in craftsmanship. Whether it's code, design, or delivery, we hold ourselves to a high bar—because the little things shape the big picture.
Growth is part of the job. Through regular one-on-ones, structured feedback, and a clear levelling framework, we support every team member’s growth—not just in technical skills, but in communication, collaboration, and leadership.
AI allowance, your way. Each year, you'll get a dedicated budget to explore AI tools, platforms, and learning resources that boost your productivity and skills. Dive into Pluralsight, PragPub, e-books, and more—wherever your curiosity takes you.
We’ve got your back. From day one, you’ll get private medical insurance, social welfare coverage, and a company care fund.
We invest in your future. We match your monthly Provident Fund contributions to help you build long-term security.
We support your move. If you're joining us from abroad, we’ll take care of your visa, work permit, and provide a relocation package to help you settle in smoothly.
Flexibility that fits. We support a hybrid workstyle, giving you the freedom to find the right rhythm between home and office life.
Work with the right tools. We’ll set you up with a MacBook and a large external monitor so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
A workspace that works for you. Our modern office in the heart of Bangkok (Interchange 21) is steps away from BTS Asoke and MRT Sukhumvit.
Stay fueled. Our kitchen is always stocked with drinks and snacks.
Take the time you need. Enjoy 25 days of paid leave a year (including public holidays), plus a sabbatical month every 3 years.
Celebrate your journey. From anniversary gifts to yearly company outings and spontaneous team activities, we make time for fun and appreciation.
...and more perks to make work feel better.
If you are a passionate Technical Lead looking to make a significant impact in a growing compound start-up, we would love to hear from you.
We keep our recruitment process practical and straightforward.
To learn more about how we work, check our handbook named Compass, Github organization, and Medium account.
Want to see what we have built? Check our Dribbble and Behance accounts.
Want to keep in touch with us? Follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
Nimble is an equal opportunity employer.

The position
We’re the team behind projects like BI tool Holistics, database diagram tool dbdiagram.io, and open-source project dbml.org. We’re looking for another software engineer to help us build more awesome tools for data teams and developers.
This is a full-time position based in Ho Chi Minh City with flexible, hybrid WFH/WFO setup.
‍
Our application’s architecture
To get a taste of how working with us is like, here are some insights into how our application has been built so far.
The Holistics app works by allowing data analysts to connect to their data warehouses and develop reusable “data models”. This allows non-technical users to use a friendly drag-and-drop interface to explore the data and build dashboards, without the need to bother their technical colleagues.
On the backend side, Holistics is built using Ruby on Rails as the main web framework. Unlike standard Rails project structure, we
modularize the code base into local gems and
engines
to improve maintainability and extensibility, following modular monolith pattern. This also follows the pattern of "functional core, imperative shell" with the
gems being mostly functional/stateless
code and
engines handle the imperative/stateful
part of the app.
By using Sorbet to add static typing on top of Ruby, we ensure that most of our Ruby code has
annotated type signature
. This not only reduces a whole swath of common bugs that plagues Ruby codebases but also significantly improves developer productivity through IDE/editor integrations.
We use PostgreSQL for our main production database due to its reliability and rich feature-set. We have built a custom job queue system on top of Postgres, which are then executed using Sidekiq on top of Redis.
Vue.js 3.0 with TypeScript is our framework of choice for front-end development. To deal with displaying huge amount of data, we build sophisticated, custom Vue components that lazily render the data. Since many complex computation are done on the front-end, we also use Web workers to decouple those computation from the main rendering thread. This enables smoother user experience while also decouples computation from rendering logic.
‍
What You’ll Work On Here
Here are some interesting engineering projects that have been going on inside Holistics
Create a new query language that compiles to SQL
Build front-end component that can render hundreds of thousand of data points
Build custom, interactive visualization components on top of open source technology
Create a domain specific language as part of a semantic layer to represent analytics logic
Build a text-based database for analytics metadata on top of Git
Build a web-based IDE for data analysts to explore and develop analytics logic
Design and build a natural language interface for business users to explore data and view dashboards
‍
The way we work
We follow Spotify squad model. Our team is split into 4 squads, each (5-7 members) consists of engineers, product managers & designers working closely together.
How We Work On a New Feature
Product & Design Team spends time research the problem, talk to customers and prepare Product Discovery Doc (PDD) and Product Requirement Doc (PRD).
Engineering Team then performs a Technical Research. When we have a fairly good picture of the complexity and impact, we’ll start with the implementation.
We
avoid being a
feature factory
. We’re aware more features do not equal better product.
We
do not compromise product and code quality
for artificial deadline. We refactor and think about code optimization regularly. We understand the good and bad of technical debt and use them to our advantages.
We employ
“pair programming” practices
regularly where two team members work on a task together in one workstation. This brings a great deal of benefits, among which are faster knowledge transfer, reduced bus factor, better team cohesion and improved code quality.
We have a
strong writing culture
: Almost everything is communicated through written documents. Just as our developers write reusable codes, we write evergreen notes.
We maintain a
problem-solving culture
. Everyone is strongly encouraged to have rigorous understanding of a problem, separating Problem Space vs Solution Space as well as using Eigenquestions to find the most important dimensions of a problem. Solutions are deliberated over with trade-offs explicitly listed in discussion documentation. Watch this talk about problem-solving for engineers that our cofounder gave (in Vietnamese)
Our Culture Stimulates Continuous Learning
We let team members rotate every 3-6 months. This allows them to try new things and learn different aspects of the business.
We have a weekly TED talk program where team members present topics they are interested in.
Engineering Team organizes weekly technical talks as well as monthly technical workshops.
Product Team has regular AMA events with external product experts
‍
What We Look For In You
Here’s our idea of a good team member fit:
You should have a strong foundation in Computer Science with good problem-solving ability.
Experience with our technology stack not required: While it’s a bonus, it’s not a requirement for you to be familiar with our current technical stack. We expect you to be able to pick up these quickly on the job.
You should be someone with a continuous learning & growth mindset. You find yourself excited to learn something new as part of the work every week.
Communications: Given we have a strong writing culture, you should be comfortable with communicating your ideas in English written forms.
Genuine interest in the space: We’d love to work with people who are genuinely interested in the product and the space we’re in, someone who cares about the end-product beyond just writing the code that makes it work.
‍
Interview Process
Round 1: Pair-coding interview
Round 2: Technical Interview (Optional)
Round 3: Culture & Behavior Interview ‍

company_name: BIDV (Bank for Investment and Development of Vietnam)
job_description:
Company Description
BIDV (Bank for Investment and Development of Vietnam) is a leading financial institution with a long-standing history of supporting key economic sectors and investment projects across Vietnam. With a dedicated team of over 26,000 well-trained professionals, BIDV offers reliable and comprehensive financial solutions to its widespread client base. The bank operates through an extensive network of 200 branches, 1,000 transaction offices, and thousands of ATMs and POS facilities across 63 provinces and cities in Vietnam. Additionally, BIDV has an established presence in international markets, including Laos, Russia, and Cambodia, offering services across banking, insurance, and financial investment. BIDV continues its commitment to economic progress and social security through strategic partnerships and ventures with trusted global partners.
Role Description
Develop and manage Cloud policies and standards:
Participate in developing, revising, and enhancing regulations, policies, standards, and guidelines for Cloud management, deployment, and usage at BIDV.
Ensure Cloud policies and regulations are aligned with IT strategy, digital transformation direction, and applicable legal requirements.
Contribute to building and updating technical standards and Cloud management processes across the BIDV system.
Appraise and advise on Cloud project implementation:
Review, provide input, and evaluate investment plans and Cloud service procurement proposals for medium-complexity projects, ensuring compliance with BIDV regulations.
Advise and guide business units in implementing Cloud projects, including defining technical standards, designing infrastructure, and resolving technical issues during implementation.
Collaborate with Architecture, Information Security, and Infrastructure teams to ensure alignment and integration between Cloud solutions and the overall IT architecture.
Research, development, and training on Cloud:
Research emerging Cloud technologies and trends; produce assessment reports and propose applicable use cases within BIDV’s banking operations.
Propose, pilot, and implement enhancements to Cloud management tools to optimize performance, cost, security, and lifecycle governance.
Participate in developing training materials and delivering internal training on Cloud knowledge and application skills for BIDV’s technology workforce.
Qualifications
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in Information Technology, including at least 2–3 years of hands-on expertise in Cloud-related roles such as Cloud Engineer, Cloud Solution Architect, System Engineer (Cloud), or equivalent.
Proven experience in implementing, managing, or optimizing infrastructure and applications on Cloud platforms (Public/Private/Hybrid) from major providers such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform, VMware, OpenStack, etc.
Preferred candidates have experience in Cloud migration projects, Landing Zone design, Cloud-native application development, or establishing Cloud governance and security frameworks within financial institutions or banks.
Skills:
Strong proficiency in deploying and managing Cloud infrastructure and applications, with the ability to analyze, evaluate, and propose optimal solutions in terms of cost, security, and performance.
Capability to develop policies, standards, and guidelines for Cloud management, ensuring alignment with enterprise IT architecture and BIDV’s digital transformation strategy.
Strong analytical, synthesis, and technical writing skills, with the ability to produce clear, logical, and persuasive reports and assessment documents; capable of working independently and collaborating effectively within teams.
Certifications:
Preferred professional certifications: One of the following Cloud architecture certifications at Professional/Expert level from major providers:
AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
Google Cloud Certified – Professional Cloud Architect
Cloud security certifications (Associate/Professional), such as AWS Certified Security, Azure Security Technologies, Google Cloud Security Engineer.
Additional certifications such as TOGAF Foundation, ITIL Foundation, or DevSecOps / Microservices Architecture are a plus.

job_description:
CONTENT MARKETING & VIDEO EDITOR
(AI-Proficient)
Position:
Content Marketing Executive + Video Editor
Focus:
Multi-platform content for Octokit & Marvy
Reporting to:
Growth Lead (if applicable) / Founder
Salary:
9,000,000 VNĐ/month (Gross) — Negotiable based on experience
Location:
Ho Chi Minh City (Full-time)
Level:
Mid-level (1–3 years of experience)
The Role
We are looking for a
"full-stack" Content Creator
—someone who writes sharp copy, edits video at speed, and lives and breathes AI tools to x10 their productivity. You will be the "digital face" of Octokit and Marvy across social media, responsible for everything from long-form articles and short-form clips to case studies, tutorials, and memes. Whatever it takes to move the needle.
About Us
Marvy Group:
A creative tech agency specializing in AR/VR, gamification, and AI-powered experiences for top-tier brands (Shinhan Finance, Heineken, Amanotes, KFC,...).
Octokit:
Our strategic SaaS product for 2026. Think "CapCut for games"—a no-code platform that empowers marketers, creators, and teachers to build interactive games without touching a single line of code.
Key Responsibilities
1. Copywriting & Content Strategy (40%)
Multi-channel writing:
Craft engaging posts for Octokit & Marvy’s blogs, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Dev.to, Medium, and Reddit.
Content Calendar Management:
Turn briefs and raw ideas into polished pieces; maintain a consistent posting cadence across all platforms.
Case Studies & Tutorials:
Document Marvy’s client success stories and create step-by-step guides/game demo scripts for Octokit.
SEO Optimization:
Keyword research and on-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, heading structures, and internal linking).
2. Video Editing & Motion Graphics (40%)
Short-form Specialist:
Produce high-retention clips for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and LinkedIn (Vertical/Horizontal/Square).
Product Showcases:
Create Octokit feature demos, game trailers, and step-by-step video tutorials.
Agency Portfolios:
Edit compelling case study videos showcasing Marvy’s past campaigns.
Light Motion Graphics:
Create animated text, lower thirds, and logo reveals using CapCut, Canva, or After Effects.
3. AI-Assisted Production (20%)
Text AI:
Leverage Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini for brainstorming, drafting, and summarizing.
Visual AI:
Use Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion for thumbnails, illustrations, and mockups.
Video AI:
Utilize Runway, Kling, Veo, or HeyGen for B-roll, AI avatars, and transitions.
Audio AI:
Use ElevenLabs or Suno for voice-overs and background scores.
Workflow Engineering:
Build prompt libraries and templates to streamline production for the whole team.
4. Distribution & Analytics
Native formatting for every platform.
Track views, engagement, and CTR; provide weekly actionable insights.
Propose new content directions based on emerging trends and data.
Requirements
1–3 years
of experience in Content, Social Media, or Video Editing.
Strong Writing Skills (Vietnamese):
Concise, rhythmic, and personality-driven—no fluff.
English Proficiency:
Solid reading comprehension; ability to draft basic-to-intermediate English content (assisted by AI).
Video Toolkit:
Proficiency in at least two: CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects.
AI Mastery:
Fluent in at least 3 AI tools (Text + Image + Video)—must be able to demonstrate previous AI-generated work.
Portfolio:
Links to blogs, TikTok/Reels, or published case studies are mandatory.
Creative "Eye":
A strong sense of aesthetics—you know the difference between "premium" and "cheap" design.
Mindset:
Proactive, fast learner, and ready to experiment with new tools every single week.
Bonus Points
Basic design skills (Figma, Canva, Photoshop).
Experience in SaaS, Gaming, or Creator Tools.
A deep interest in gaming, storytelling, and Vietnamese internet culture (memes, films, trends).
Experience growing your own personal brand/channel (YouTube, TikTok, Blog).
Perks & Benefits
Starting salary: 9M Gross; performance-based reviews every 6 months.
Fully paid subscriptions for all premium AI and editing tools.
Direct mentorship in AI workflows, growth content, and storytelling.
Work on "real-world" tech products—build a powerhouse CV with industry-leading case studies.
Standard benefits (Insurance, Tet bonus, 12 days annual leave).
A vibrant Creative Tech environment (AR/VR, Gamification, AI).
Hiring Process
Application:
Submit CV + Portfolio (3–5 writing samples + 2–3 videos + 1 AI-assisted project).
Short Test:
Write 1 blog post + edit 1 30-second clip for Octokit.
Interview.
Offer.
We aim to respond to all applicants within 7 working days.
