Job Summary
TH School Teacher Job Description
TH School is seeking a passionate, dynamic, and qualified International School Teacher to join our diverse educational team. The ideal candidate will bring a global perspective, engage students with innovative teaching strategies, and foster an inclusive, student-centred learning environment. The candidate will also play a pivotal role cultivating curiosity, critical and creative thinking, and cultural awareness among our students, preparing them to thrive in a global society.
Reports to:
Principal
Duties And Responsibilities
Planning
Design and document units of study and pacing guides that are aligned with curricular aims and objectives and learning frameworks.
Plan engaging and purposeful lessons that are aligned with the curriculum (e.g. units of study, aims and objectives, and pacing guides).
Incorporate strategies in planning that meets the diverse learning needs of students.
Identify and use resources and applications to enrich learning.
Plan collaboratively with team and/or department members.
Instruction
Use high impact research based instructional strategies (e.g. inquiry, timely and actionable feedback, etc.) to engage students in optimal learning.
Deliver quality instruction that is purposeful and differentiated in order to meet the diverse learning needs of a multilingual student population
Uses a variety of technology tools to support instruction, integrating student technology skill development with content learning.
Provide academic assistance to students as needed, offering guidance in their subject or general study skills.
Assessment
Design formative and summative assessments to collect evidence of student learning and understanding.
Monitor and assess student progress, providing timely feedback to students and parents.
Encourage students to reflect critically on their learning with the aim of continuous improvement.
Maintain accurate student records and provide regular reports on individual student progress and performance- Effort/Contributions and Achievement.
Identify and use culturally responsive resources and applications to enrich learning.
Learning Environment
Creates a learning environment that is attractive, comfortable, safe, and welcoming.
Uses resources, routines, and procedures to foster a purposeful, engaging student centred learning environment.
Maintain high expectations for student behaviour and implement effective classroom management strategies.
Create a safe and inclusive learning environment where students feel valued and respected.
Professionalism
Build positive relationships with students, offering mentorship, pastoral care, and support as they balance academic and personal responsibilities.
Collaborate with colleagues to share, reflect and improve on classroom practice
Participate in departmental/grade level meetings, professional learning, and school events.
Coach a sport and/or lead an after school extra-curricular activity throughout the academic year.
Supervise academic support (afternoon and/or evening) ensuring a quiet, focused, and productive environment for students (Boarding)
Comply with the TH School Professional Teaching Standards.
Other
Performs other duties and responsibilities consistent with those normally associated with the position of a teacher.
Qualifications/Background
Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree
2+ years of experience of full time teaching at a progressive and/or international school community.
Current international qualification / certification in teaching area.
Experience with [IB, IPC, Cambridge, or specific curriculum framework] is highly desirable.
Skills And Competencies
Strong understanding of global education trends and best practices.
Ability to adapt teaching methods to meet diverse learning needs.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Strong organisational and time-management skills.
Proficiency in technology integration in the classroom.
Attributes
Passion for teaching and commitment to lifelong learning.
Cultural sensitivity and a collaborative spirit.
Ability to inspire and motivate students from various backgrounds.
Flexible and comfortable with ambiguity.
Terms of Employment
Highly competitive salary and benefits package. Work calendar, contract terms, salary, and benefits shall be equivalent to a certificated faculty position.
Performance Evaluation
The Principal will evaluate the job performance of the Teacher annually in accordance with TH School Board of Directors Policy.
If you are interested in this position, please send a CV and scanned teaching qualification via email: jobs@thschool.edu.vn

job_description:
About Us
Vast.ai’s cloud powers AI projects and businesses all over the world. We are democratizing and decentralizing AI computing—reshaping our future for the benefit of humanity. Our mission is to organize, optimize, and orient the world's computation.
We value elegance, ownership, integrity, and continuous learning. You’ll have the opportunity to dive into state-of-the-art AI systems while collaborating with a globally distributed team.
About the Role
This is an L2 technical support role, focused on escalated infrastructure issues that go beyond frontline triage. You'll be the engineering resource our L1 support team leans on when tickets get complex — Diagnose and resolve issues across the full stack: hardware/BIOS/firmware, networking, Ubuntu, Docker, NVIDIA CUDA/GPU, and virtualization (KVM)
You'll handle higher-complexity issues, own escalation resolution end-to-end, contribute to internal documentation and runbooks, and collaborate directly with the engineering team and host support team on recurring or systemic issues.
Strong technical depth is the primary requirement. You should be comfortable working autonomously across Ubuntu environments, diagnosing container and GPU issues, and communicating findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Vast.ai users or hosts strongly preferred.
Key Responsibilities
Handle escalated L2 support tickets from the L1 team — GPU workload failures, container issues, networking problems, account infrastructure, and host-side configuration
Diagnose and resolve issues across , Docker, NVIDIA CUDA/GPU drivers, and virtualization environments (KVM)
Troubleshoot network-layer issues: VLAN, DNS, DHCP, VPN, NAT, firewall rules, and connectivity failures on host machines
Investigate performance issues — GPU utilization, container resource constraints, thermal throttling, driver conflicts, disk I/O bottlenecks
Write and maintain internal runbooks, escalation guides, and knowledge base articles to reduce repeat escalations
Collaborate with the engineering team and host support team to flag and document systemic or recurring platform issues
Assist clients and hosts working with AI frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch) and GPU-accelerated workloads
Build and maintain internal diagnostic and automation tools using AI-assisted development (Claude Code or similar)
Provide occasional coverage for L1 overflow during peak periods or incidents
You Are
Fluent in Linux — you navigate systems, read logs, and solve problems from the command line without hesitation
Methodical and thorough. You gather data, dig into root causes, and don't settle for surface-level fixes.
A self-starter who can manage a queue of complex tickets with minimal supervision
Adaptable to flexible hours including occasional weekend coverage
A clear written communicator — able to explain technical findings to clients and write useful internal documentation
Genuinely curious about AI infrastructure, GPU computing, and distributed systems
Must-haves
Solid Linux SysOps experience — Ubuntu Server, RHEL/CentOS, Debian; comfortable with systems, networking, storage, and permissions
Proficiency with Docker — container debugging, Docker Compose, image management, cgroup resource limits, Docker storage/filesystem management
Experience with virtualization — Proxmox VE, VMware, or similar hypervisors; provisioning and troubleshooting VMs
Networking fundamentals — VLAN, DNS, DHCP, NAT, VPN , firewall rules, and general L2/L3 troubleshooting
Scripting in Python and Bash for automation and diagnostic tooling
Proficiency with AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or similar) — you actively use AI to write scripts, build diagnostic tooling, and work faster
Prior experience in a technical support, sysadmin, or infrastructure operations role
Strong English written communication — clear, professional, and technically precise
Nice-to-haves
Hands-on experience with NVIDIA GPU drivers, CUDA, and GPU workload troubleshooting
Familiarity with AI/ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch) and running GPU-accelerated containers
Monitoring and observability experience (Prometheus, Grafana)
Relevant certifications: RHCSA, CompTIA Linux+, or similar
Knowledge of the Vast.ai platform as a client or host
Benefits
Competitive salary · 100% salary during probation
Performance Bonus
Annual leave as per Vietnamese regulations
Health insurance
Reimbursement for approved work expenses
Fast-growing, ambitious startup environment with growth into senior or leadership tracks

job_description:
About The Job
This position is on-site at our office in
Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
About Optisigns
OptiSigns is the leading digital signage company in North America, with over 30,500 customers in 121 countries. Our cloud-based platform helps organizations manage screens and content across retail, hospitality, education, and corporate environments. We are a fast-growing, customer-obsessed team building simple, scalable, and reliable products.
THE ROLE
We're not looking for someone to just handle tickets. We're looking for someone who truly cares about the customer experience and gets frustrated when things aren't working as well as they should. You'll own the hard cases, the ones that need judgment, not just a script. You'll notice patterns, fix things before they become problems, and help the people around you get better. This is a senior role and we expect you to act like one.
YOUR MISSIONS
01 Handle The Cases That Need Real Experience
Escalations, edge cases, customers who've already been through multiple agents and are losing patience. You dig into the details, coordinate with the right internal teams when needed, and own the case until it's fully resolved.
02 Keep your own work at a high standard
You consistently hit strong CSAT scores, keep response times tight, and write responses that are clear enough that the customer doesn't need to write back asking for clarification. You track your own open cases and make sure nothing slips through.
03 Help teammates work through difficult cases
When junior agents come to you with a case they're unsure about, you help them reason through it: what's the actual issue, what has and hasn't been tried, what would a good resolution look like. You build their judgment, not just unblock the ticket.
04 Stay close to the product and surface insights
You're seeing more customer interactions than almost anyone in the company. When a pattern shows up, a recurring bug, a confusing feature, or a gap in documentation, you capture it clearly and make sure it reaches the right people. That means you also need to know the product well enough to tell the difference between a customer misunderstanding and an actual product problem. You keep up with changes, troubleshoot confidently, and update your own knowledge without waiting to be trained.
Requirements
Required Qualifications:
5+ years in a customer-facing role at a SaaS or tech company, with experience handling complex or escalated cases from start to finish
Proficient in written and spoken English. You write clearly and professionally, and can de-escalate a difficult situation without making it worse
Comfortable working in a shift-based setup that covers US business hours. Prior experience supporting North American or global customers is a plus.
Reliable and self-managed. You prioritize well, follow through on open cases, and don't need to be reminded to close the loop with a customer
Benefits
Compensation & Benefits
13th month bonus
Healthcare insurance package and 24/24 Personal accident insurance
Yearly outing
English training programs
Free drinks and snacks. Free parking. Free sports clubs
Growth & Environment
Opportunities for overseas training and travel
Work directly with global teams in the US and Vietnam
Exposure to product, engineering, and business decisions

This ecosystem integrates multiple applications and services to provide holistic user protection, including features for scam warnings, anti-harassment (anti-spam calls/messages), and securing user accounts and personal information.

– Proficiency in SQL and the ability to work with analysis/BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, or equivalent).

– Skills in synthesizing, presenting, and communicating insights clearly and simply.
– Critical thinking, proactively proposing and consulting solutions based on data.
– Ability to collaborate effectively with both technical and business teams.

Job Summary
The Workplace Operations Manager at SCCVN is responsible for leading nationwide office administration and facility management, ensuring a high-performing, safe, and welcoming work environment. This role strategically blends operational oversight - including vendor governance, procurement, and facility lifecycle management - with a people-first approach to HR operations and employee experience. By leveraging a strong engineering capability and a strong service mindset, this position ensures seamless workplace functioning, compliance with corporate standards, and the successful delivery of engagement initiatives that drive the company’s culture forward.
Key Responsibilities
Office Operations & Administration
• Direct daily office operations to maintain the highest standards of hygiene, landscaping, facilities, and operational safety.
• Ensure efficient and cost-effective procurement and inventory management of all office assets.
• Act as the Single Point of Contact (SPOC) to directly resolve feedback/complaints regarding office operations and services.
Facilities & Vendor Management
• Lead as the primary liaison for integrated facility management and office movements, ensuring all transitions and partnerships aligned with corporate standards and budget.
• Oversee total facility lifecycle management, from routine maintenance to large-scale workplace capital improvements.
• Manage building legal records, ensure the accuracy of payment documents, contracts, and monitor and conduct Service Level Agreement (SLA) inspections/acceptance of the vendor’s service quality.
Workplace Management & HR Administration
• Maintain standards for cleanliness, safety, and employee well-being.
• Enforce workplace governance, including health & safety standards and internal compliance protocols.
• Oversee seamless onboarding/offboarding, long service awards, transportation, travel management, etc.
• Oversee the fulfillment and logistics of company products and gifts for internal consumption, corporate events, special occasions, ensuring fair allocation, inventory control and compliance.
• End-to-end responsibility in planning and managing administrative related budgets, expense tracking, and payment processing, etc.
Employee Experience
• Partner with cross-functional teams to implement logistics for culture and DEIB initiatives, support company events, workplace celebrations, employee well-being programs etc. to enhance workplace experience and engagement
• Contribute to building a positive, safe, and inclusive work environment
Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Facilities Management, or a related discipline
• Professional Certifications (Preferred): Facility Management (IFMA), or Project Management (PMP) is a plus.
• Minimum of 5+ years of experience in corporate administration, property management, technical operations, or building operations management within large-scale organizations, Grade-A office buildings, or luxury hotels.
• Proven track record in a managerial or lead role, overseeing nationwide office operations or large-scale workplace projects.
• Demonstrated experience in vendor governance, managing third-party service providers, and ensuring corporate compliance.
• Strong hands-on experience managing site operations and technical systems is required.
• English: Good written and oral proficiency (Professional/Business level).
• Local Language (Vietnamese): Native or bilingual proficiency, with the ability to communicate effectively with stakeholders and vendors.
• Act Like an Owner (Own It): Decisiveness in task control, highly proactive, and takes ultimate responsibility for outcomes. This position will lead with a Service Mindset, setting a premium standard for hospitality and internal support that makes SCCVN truly a “Great Place To Work”.
• Collaboration: Build strong, trust-based relationships across departments. Possess advanced interpersonal and negotiation skills, essential for managing vendors, contractors, and internal stakeholders to achieve mutually beneficial outcomes.
• Innovation: Actively seek out and implement new ways to streamline administrative workflows. Leverage analytical thinking to discover more efficient processes and technological solutions to optimize the workplace experience.
• Solid understanding of budget management and legal regulations pertaining to office building and operations.

job_description:
Job Description
MiTek® is a global provider of building solutions for the residential and commercial construction industries. Utilizing software, services, engineered products, and automated manufacturing equipment, MiTek partners with clients to accelerate their genius and deliver breakthroughs in building.
With a rich 60-year history and a network of 6,500 team members worldwide, MiTek pairs local expertise with global capabilities. As a Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-A, NYSE: BRK-B) company since 2001, MiTek has a record of continuous growth and innovation.
Learn more at www.mii.com.
A Brief Overview
Trưởng nhóm dịch vụ Hành chính kỹ thuật chịu trách nhiệm quản lý nhóm theo chỉ định; huấn luyện và hướng dẫn các trợ lý nhằm đảm bảo cho nhóm có thể hỗ trợ các công việc hành chính trong quá trình thực hiện và báo cáo công việc cho khách hàng, đồng thời thực hiện các báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình hoạt động cho cấp quản lý trực tiếp.
Các nhiệm vụ bao gồm quản lý nhóm để tương tác với các khách hàng và các thành viên thuộc khối Vận hành được chỉ định; thu thập dữ liệu, lịch trình và tiến độ thực hiện công việc để nhập vào cơ sở dữ liệu, bảo đảm tính chính xác và kịp thời theo yêu cầu khách hàng; và công việc khác tùy theo dự án.
Đóng vai trò kết nối giữa khách hàng và bộ phận dịch vụ kỹ thuật, vị trí này cần thể hiện được hình ảnh chuyên nghiệp của Công ty thông qua tương tác trực tiếp và trực tuyến.
The Technical Administration services Supervisor manages the assigned team of technical admin assistant; train and guide the Technical Admin Assistants in supporting administrative work in the production process and reporting to customers as well as report periodically to the direct management.
Tasks include manage team in interaction with assigned customers and the Operations team members; collect and update to customers in time of production data, schedules, and progress to input information to the database, ensuring accuracy and timeliness as requested by customers; and other work depending on the project.
Functioning as a liaison between Customers and the Service Team, it is essential for this role to project a professional company image through in-person and online interaction.
Responsibilities
What You Will Do:
Làm việc với các bộ phận nội bộ liên quan cũng như các thành viên nhóm hoặc/và làm việc với khách hàng được giao về các yêu cầu liên quan thông tin quy trình liên quan đến công việc
Lập kế hoạch, giám sát và kết hợp các thủ tục và hệ thống hành chính kỹ thuật để đưa ra các phương án hợp lý để thực hiện theo các quy trình đã thống nhất. Đảm bảo luồng thông tin và báo cáo thông suốt và đầy đủ để tạo thuận lợi cho hoạt động kinh doanh của MiTek và khách hàng
Giải quyết các vấn đề, khiếu nại hoặc thắc mắc của khách hàng một cách hiệu quả trong phạm vi trách nhiệm công việc
Góp ý sửa đổi báo cáo, quy trình theo các yêu cầu thay đổi của khách hàng với sự đồng thuận của các bộ phận thuộc khối Vận hành và các bộ phận chức năng liên quan
Hỗ trợ cho việc phát triển mối quan hệ với khách hàng mới và đảm bảo phân bổ nguồn lực phù hợp khi cần để tối đa hóa việc phát triển kinh doanh cho thành công bền vững lâu dài của MiTek
Huấn luyện, cố vấn và hỗ trợ cho thành viên trong nhóm để cùng xây dựng môi trường làm việc thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp và hiệu suất cao cho đội ngũ Hành chính kỹ thuậ
Thực hiện đánh giá hiệu suất công việc cho các thành viên trong nhóm, trao đổi về các mục tiêu nhóm rõ ràng và dẫn dắt nhân viên đạt được các mục tiêu đó
Phối hợp sắp xếp và truyền đạt các chương trình đào tạo cho các thành viên trong nhóm
Thực hiện các báo cáo/ phân tích theo yêu cầu quản lý
Tiếp tục đóng góp cho sự phát triển của MiTek bằng cách hỗ trợ khách hàng và đảm bảo cung cấp dịch vụ cao cấp nhất cho tất cả khách hàng
Tham gia các dự án hoặc hoạt động cải tiến liên tục của bộ phận và của công ty với vai trò dẫn dắt
Phát triển kỹ năng tiếng Anh vì đó là một phần của việc cung cấp dịch vụ khách hàng tốt
Các nhiệm vụ khác theo sự phân công
Work with internal relevant stakeholders as well as team members and/or work with assigned customers on production information process requirements
Plan, oversee and coordinate procedures and technical administrative systems and come up with ways to align with streamline processes. Ensuring a smooth and complete flow of information and production reports to facilitate the business of MiTek and customers
Resolve issues, customers complaints and concerns effectively within the responsibility
Provide feedback to modify reports and processes according to customer's changing requirements with the agreement with the Operations and related functional departments
Support in developing relationships with new customers and ensure that appropriate resources are allocated as needed to maximize business development for MiTek's long-term sustainable success
Train, mentor, and support Team Members to achieve an integrated, staff-oriented, high-performance culture for the Technical Administration team
Conduct performance appraisal for team members, clearly communicate the team’s objectives and lead the team to achieves those goals
Coordinate and communicate educational programs to team members
Prepare reports / analyses as management requirement
Continue to grow the MiTek by supporting customers and ensuring the highest service for all customers
Participate in the company's ongoing improvement projects or activities with the leading role
Develop English skills as it's part of providing good customer service
Other reasonable assigned duties
Qualifications
Tốt nghiệp Đại học hoặc Cao đẳng
Tối thiểu 2 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực liên quan
Trình độ tiếng Anh (CEFR) B1 hoặc tương đương
Thành thạo vi tính văn phòng
Có khả năng học các phần mềm mới
Kỹ năng quản lý, lập kế hoạch, triển khai công việc
Khả năng quản lý và phân tích dữ liệu cơ bản
Có khả năng xây dựng mối quan hệ tương hỗ với đồng nghiệp và các phòng ban
Hiểu được tính chất dịch vụ khách hàng nội bộ cũng như khách hàng bên ngoài của công ty.
University or College degree
At least 2-year experience in related fields
English level (CEFR) B1 or equivalent
Proficiency in office computing skills
Ability to learn new software programs
Management skills, planning skills, work deployment skills
Ability to manage and analyze data simply
Able to build a reciprocal relationship with colleagues and departments
Understanding the philosophy of internal customer service as well as external customers of the company.

🤖
AI Automation Specialist
(Full-Time · 100% Remote · Independent Contractor)
✨ Your mission:
You sit at the intersection of three circles: Business, Logic, and Technology. You're not purely a business analyst who only talks, not purely a system architect who only draws, and not purely a developer who always needs a translator. You are all three - and that's exactly what makes this role unique.
Your job: understand what the business needs, design the system that solves it, and build it yourself using no-code, low-code, and AI-assisted development tools.
🌍 Work from anywhere. Meetings happen in Europe/Asia time zones.
🏢 Company: AweSM Sales & Marketing (Singapore-based remote company)
🌍 About AweSM
AweSM is an agency that helps coaches, experts, and consultants scale their online businesses through automated webinar funnels that sell programs on autopilot.
We’re growing and need systems that multiply our team’s output without losing the personal touch our clients love.
💡 Our purpose: To transform the lives of our clients - and help them transform the lives of
their
clients.
You’ll love working here if you live by our values:
❤️ Customer-oriented: we deliver AweSM results for our clients – with love
⚡ One-step ahead: we show the way; we take risks to help clients see what’s possible
🌱 Growth-mindset: we always challenge ourselves to be better
💬 Open & honest: we say the truth; we are willing to share both our brilliance and our vulnerabilities
Why This Role Exists
We don't need a pure developer. We don't need a pure business analyst. We don't need a pure system architect. We need one person who does all three:
Speaks Business - Understands the agency model, client delivery, marketing funnels, and what drives revenue. Can sit in a strategy meeting and immediately see where systems can help.
Thinks in Systems - Takes a messy, manual process and redesigns it as a clean, automated, scalable workflow. Sees how tools connect, where data flows, and what breaks at scale.
Builds with No-Code/Low-Code & AI - Doesn't wait for a developer. Uses Zapier, Make.com, Notion, GoHighLevel, Slack APIs, and AI tools (Claude, GPT-4, vibe coding) to build and ship solutions fast.
This role works across both internal operations and client-facing projects.
💥
What You'll Be Doing
🔍 Understand the Business
Sit with leadership and client-facing teams to understand how the agency works — from sales to onboarding to delivery to renewal
Identify pain points, bottlenecks, and manual processes that slow the team down
Translate business problems into clear, structured system requirements
Speak the language of coaches, consultants, and experts when building systems for them
🗺 Design the System
Map out processes visually - flowcharts, system diagrams, data flow maps
Architect solutions connecting: Slack ↔ Notion ↔ GoHighLevel ↔ Google Workspace ↔ WebinarFuel ↔ Fireflies
Design for scale - every system should handle 30+ concurrent client projects
Build for edge cases, error handling, and graceful recovery
Create reusable templates and blueprints cloneable for each new client in under an hour
🔨 Build It Yourself
Use Zapier, Make.com, Notion API, Airtable, Slack apps, GoHighLevel — no waiting for a dev team
Leverage Claude, GPT-4, Cursor, and vibe coding to build and iterate fast
Build AI-powered automations for content generation, client communication, and data analysis
Connect tools via APIs, webhooks, and native integrations
Own the full lifecycle — from prototype to production
Main Responsibilities
⚙ Internal Systems
Automated client onboarding: one trigger sets up Slack channels, Notion workspaces, GHL sub-accounts, welcome emails, and project tracking
Automated reporting: client status updates, campaign performance summaries, and dashboards without manual input
Smart communication routing with SLA tracking
Internal productivity tools: unified dashboards, one-click triggers, automated task assignments
Automated quality checks before anything reaches clients
🤝 Client-Facing Systems
Build customized automation workflows for client accounts
Set up and optimize funnels, webinar systems, and marketing sequences in GoHighLevel
Build AI-powered content pipelines tailored to each client's brand and audience
Create client-facing dashboards for real-time campaign visibility
Build scalable master systems — reducing new client setup from days to hours
🤖 AI Strategy & Tooling
Define where AI delivers the highest ROI and build the infrastructure to support it
Evaluate and recommend new AI tools — only when they deliver measurable value
Build prompt libraries, workflow templates, and standardized AI processes
Train team members on AI tools through workshops and hands-on support
📄 Documentation
Document every system with clear SOPs — no single points of failure
Create visual system maps of all platform connections
Maintain a living knowledge base of all tools, integrations, and processes
Requirements
✅ Business Analysis
You understand revenue models, client lifecycles, and operational workflows
You can interview stakeholders and translate vague problems into actionable plans
You're comfortable in strategy meetings and spot automation opportunities immediately
✅ Systems Architecture
You think in systems, not tasks — you see the whole workflow, not just the broken step
You design for modularity, scalability, and maintainability
You consider edge cases and failure modes — your systems alert the right people when something breaks
✅ No-Code / Low-Code Development
Proficiency in Zapier, Make.com, or similar automation platforms
Experience with Notion API, Airtable, Slack apps, GoHighLevel, or equivalent
Comfortable with AI-assisted development: vibe coding with Claude, GPT-4, Cursor
You prototype fast, ship working solutions, and improve from real-world feedback
You can read AI-generated code, understand it, and fix bugs — no fear of a code editor
✅ Product & Marketing Understanding
You understand digital marketing funnels, webinar systems, and client journeys end-to-end
You know how agencies plan, build, deliver, measure, and optimize campaigns
You understand the coaching/consulting industry — what success looks like for these businesses
Bonus: hands-on agency experience or scaling service-based operations
Practical Details
💻 100% remote - Wi-Fi & laptop is all you need
🌏 Europe/Asia working hours
📋 Report to the Operations Manager
📄 Independent contractor, invoicing our Singapore company monthly
⚙ We run on EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) -
and we
mean it!
🎥
How to Apply
Send to 📧
recruitment@awesm.com Subject: "AI & Digital Transformation Specialist – [Your Name]"
Please include:
Your CV / LinkedIn profile
A portfolio or case study of 2–3 systems you've designed and built (show thinking process + result)
A short video (max 5 min) - why are YOU the person at the intersection of Business, Systems, and Technology?
We're looking for the person who connects the dots - not just one of them.

looking for your next career move? Do you have a background in

who still does hands-on development to contribute to the development and execution of an innovative mobile banking solution in Asia. This will include the development of in-country and cross-border solutions across all facets of a mobile banking operation, including customer experience and design, developing and implementing new products and services, process engineering, and other functional deliverables. Experience managing and leading a development team

job_description:
Herond (thuộc BlockBase) – công ty phát triển phần mềm với quy mô ~100 nhân sự, đang tìm kiếm một bạn phụ trách Hành chính & Quản lý tài sản. Vị trí này chịu trách nhiệm đảm bảo việc sử dụng, theo dõi và vận hành hiệu quả toàn bộ tài sản công ty (thiết bị IT, phần mềm, tài sản văn phòng), đồng thời phối hợp với các phòng ban để duy trì môi trường làm việc ổn định.
Role and responsibilities
Quản lý hành chính – văn phòng (Offline)
Theo dõi, quản lý cơ sở vật chất và trang thiết bị văn phòng, toà nhà.
Giám sát tình trạng sử dụng tài sản, chủ động đề xuất sửa chữa/thay thế khi cần.
Phối hợp với các bộ phận để đảm bảo môi trường làm việc tiện nghi, hiệu quả.
Quản lý tài sản
Lập và cập nhật danh mục tài sản, thiết bị toàn công ty.
Theo dõi việc cấp phát, bàn giao và thu hồi tài sản.
Thực hiện kiểm kê định kỳ theo quy định.
Quản lý sửa chữa – bảo trì
Theo dõi kế hoạch bảo trì, sửa chữa thiết bị và cơ sở vật chất.
Làm việc với các đơn vị kỹ thuật để xử lý sự cố liên quan đến điện, nước, mạng, nội thất văn phòng.
Phối hợp với đối tác liên quan về các vấn đề vận hành, quy định và vệ sinh đối với khách thuê.
Education and experience
Tốt nghiệp Đại Học, Cao Đẳng các chuyên ngành liên quan
Tối thiểu 2 -3 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Hành chính, Quản lý tài sản hoặc tương đương.
Có kinh nghiệm quản lý tài sản, thiết bị văn phòng/IT là một lợi thế.
Kỹ năng tổ chức, theo dõi và quản lý công việc tốt, cẩn thận và có trách nhiệm.
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập và phối hợp với nhiều phòng ban.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp, làm việc với nhà cung cấp và xử lý vấn đề tốt.
Sử dụng tốt các công cụ văn phòng (Google Workspace, Excel…).
Chủ động, linh hoạt và có tinh thần cải tiến quy trình.
CHỈ TUYỂN NAM
Benefits
Lương: 12 - 16M Gross
Thưởng tháng 13, chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định của pháp luật, bảo hiểm cá nhân Bảo Việt.
Thời gian làm việc: Chỉ 7.5 tiếng và không chấm công, được WFH thứ 4 mỗi tuần
Văn phòng hiện đại, trang bị Macbook/Laptop cá nhân, cơm trưa văn phòng, pantry ăn vặt thả ga, bánh, trà, coffee.
Các hoạt động team building, du lịch công ty, YEP...
Môi trường startup năng động: Sáng tạo, trẻ trung, không giới hạn cơ hội phát triển, văn hóa làm việc cởi mở, và đặc biệt không chấm công.
Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng: Phát triển chuyên sâu trong lĩnh vực Blockchain, Crypto, AI.

job_description:
CHI TIẾT CÔNG VIỆC
Sử dụng các kênh như internet, các mối quan hệ cá nhân để tìm kiếm, phát triển và tiếp cận khách hàng tiềm năng là các doanh nghiệp lớn trong và ngoài nước (B2B).
Nghiên cứu thị trường, thu thập và xây dựng dữ liệu khách hàng tiềm năng.
Tư vấn, giải thích cho khách hàng về các dịch vụ Viễn thông mà công ty đang cung cấp như:
Dịch vụ thuê máy chủ chuyên dụng, share hosting, tủ Rack.
Dịch vụ IP Fixed-phone, Hotline 1800 -1900,
Dịch vụ đám mây: public cloud (bộ nhớ S3, BaaS, DRaaS, Cloud Camera, CDN), private cloud, hydrid cloud, các cloud solution từ đối tác (VMWare, Openstack, AWS, Alibaba, Microsoft)
Dịch vụ internet: dịch vụ kết nối (Internet Leased Line, MPLS, IPLC, IEPL), Voice, SMS & Collaboration (VOIP – Hotline – Messaging Services, Oncall, PBX, OnMeeting, Vidyo, Cloud CX)
Các dịch vụ khác như mạng, giải pháp bảo mật, an ninh mạng,…
Đàm phán, thương lượng, thuyết phục khách hàng sử dụng dịch vụ và ký kết hợp đồng.
Phối hợp với các phòng ban để theo dõi và hỗ trợ quá trình triển khai dịch vụ cho khách hàng sau khi ký kết hợp đồng.
Chăm sóc khách hàng sau bán, tiếp tục khai thác và mở rộng mối quan hệ với khách hàng.
YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC
Trình độ học vấn: tốt nghiệp các trường Cao đẳng/ Đại học chuyên ngành Kinh tế, Tài chính, CNTT, Điện tử viễn thông và các chuyên ngành liên quan.
Có kinh nghiệm bán cho khối Enterprise, SME, BFSI và khối Chính Phủ.
Có kinh nghiệm bán giải pháp công nghệ thông tin (phần mềm/ phần cứng), viễn thông, điện toán đám mây, lữu trữ dữ liệu.
Có kinh nghiệm trong việc chủ động phát triển mối quan hệ với khách hàng trong một tài khoản đồng thời mở rộng hiểu biết của họ về hoạt động kinh doanh của khách hàng.
Có khả năng thuyết trình, đàm phán, thương lượng
Có khả năng chủ động tìm kiếm khách hàng bằng nhiều hình thức khác nhau.
Kinh nghiệm trong việc xác định, phát triển, đàm phán và chốt các giao dịch công nghệ.
Kinh nghiệm định vị và bán công nghệ cho khách hàng mới và phân khúc thị trường mới.
Khả năng tự xây dựng và triển khai kế hoạch bán hàng cá nhân.
Có khả năng giao tiếp bằng Tiếng Anh là điểm cộng
QUYỀN LỢI
THU NHẬP
Lương tháng bao gồm lương cứng (thỏa thuận theo năng lực và vị trí công tác) và lương hoa hồng (không giới hạn)

job_title: Head of Technology - Technical Manager (Founding Team / AI-Native E-commerce)
job_description:
🚀 About The Project
We are building a highly ambitious, zero-to-one product that will fundamentally redefine the digital commerce landscape.
We are moving past traditional SaaS, rigid templates, and drag-and-drop builders. Instead, we are engineering a deep, AI-native generative engine capable of dynamic system creation. Think of it as "software that builds complex software and infrastructure."
This is not a simple wrapper around the OpenAI API. We are solving hard technical problems at the intersection of LLMs, complex state management, and code/system generation. To achieve this, we need a Head of Technology—a visionary hacker, a deep AI expert, and a hardcore builder who wants to pioneer a new paradigm in how digital businesses are built and operated.
💻 The "Vibe Code" Culture
We believe in "Vibe Coding". You aren't just a manager who sits in meetings and draws architecture diagrams. You are a builder who achieves flow state. You use Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and LLMs to write code at lightning speed. You care about not only elegant abstractions, but also more about shipping magic to users.
🔥 What You Will Do (The Mission)
1. Zero-to-One Architecture: Design and build the core prompt-to-code engine from scratch. You will define how natural language translates into e-commerce components (React, Next.js, Tailwind) and backend logic.
2. Deep AI Integration: Build complex AI pipelines using state-of-the-art LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models). Implement RAG, Agentic workflows, and fine-tuning to make the code-generation highly accurate for e-commerce use cases.
3. Generative UI Development: Create the infrastructure that allows the AI to render dynamic, interactive e-commerce shopping experiences in real-time.
4. Hands-on Coding: Spend at least 60-70% of your time in the IDE. You will write the most complex parts of the system.
5. Product Visionary: Partner with the Business Director, CEO to shape the product roadmap. Translate wild product ideas into technical realities.
6. Build the Dream Team: Recruit, mentor, and lead a lean, elite team of AI engineers and full-stack developers.
🧠 What You Bring to the Table (Requirements)
The Hard Skills:
_ Extensive AI/LLM Experience: Deep understanding of Generative AI. You have built applications using OpenAI APIs, LangChain, LlamaIndex, or built custom AI agents. You understand how to constrain LLMs to output valid, production-ready code (JSON, ASTs, React components).
_ Modern Web Stack: Expert-level knowledge of modern frontend and backend frameworks (e.g., TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, TailwindCSS).
_ E-commerce Domain Knowledge: You understand the anatomy of an e-commerce platform (Product Catalogs, Carts, Checkout flows, Shopify/WooCommerce APIs, Stripe integrations).
_ Code Generation Expertise: Familiarity with AST (Abstract Syntax Trees), compilers, or how platforms like Lovable, Vercel v0, or Cursor work under the hood is a massive plus.
2. The Profile & Vibe:
_ 8+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 2+ years leading technical teams and a strong recent focus on GenAI.
_ Startup DNA: You thrive in chaos. You prefer shipping fast and iterating over endless planning.
_ Hands-on Leader: You are a "Player-Coach." You refuse to let your coding skills rust.
_ High Agency: You don't wait for tasks. You figure out what needs to be done and you do it.

The Toloka Annotators connects individuals with Generative AI projects from leading tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the full potential of AI by involving real people from around the world in the development process.
About The Role
Do you wash dishes every day? Vacuum the rug? Walk the dog? Fold laundry?
What if you could get paid just for recording it? We are looking for people to help train the next generation of AI by capturing high-quality, "point-of-view" video of everyday household tasks.

Requirements
Equipment: Own or use a smartphone or alternative camera device capable of 30 FPS or greater and 1080p resolution or greater
Capture Method: Mount the device at forehead or eye-level for an egocentric perspective, maintaining a downward angle to maximize hand visibility
Software: Utilize the designated "D&A" application for all data capture and upload
Quality Control: Ensure all video footage is clear, stable, well-lit, at least 15 seconds long, and accurately depicts useful, intentional tasks without unnecessary pauses or contrived movements

Earn while you do your household chores: Up to $5 per hour equivalent depending on the project

About the Role
Corjl is looking for a talented Frontend Designer/Developer to join our product team. This is a critical role that bridges design thinking and engineering execution — someone who can look at any part of our application and immediately identify what can be improved, then turn that vision into a pixel-perfect, production-ready interface.
The ideal candidate is a designer who learned to code — someone with an exceptional eye for detail, deep UI/UX instincts, and enough frontend engineering skill to bring their ideas to life. You will own the look, feel, and usability of Corjl across our entire product suite, starting with a comprehensive audit and cleanup of our end-user experience.
Design for all surface areas: responsive web, iOS, and Android, with a deep understanding of platform-specific usability patterns.
Collaborate closely with engineers to ensure designs are practical to implement and testable.
Define UI-related test cases and acceptance criteria alongside QA and engineering.
Design graceful handling of loading states, error states, empty states, and edge cases across all features.
Identify appropriate touchpoints for analytics, logging, and monitoring without overinstrumenting the UI.
Create and maintain design documentation, component guidelines, and contribution standards.
Your skills and experience
Must Have
Proven ability to design intuitive, user-friendly interfaces with a strong portfolio demonstrating UI/UX excellence.
Expert-level CSS skills; deep knowledge of layout, animation, responsive design, and cross-browser compatibility.
Solid experience building production applications with React and/or Vue, with clean, maintainable component architecture.
Mobile-first design mindset with experience designing for responsive web and native mobile (iOS & Android).
Ability to create or significantly refine a design system for consistency and scalability across a product.
Experience designing for edge cases, failure states, and real-world usage scenarios.

Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal.

Experience working within agile/scrum engineering workflows.
Background in product design for SaaS or e-commerce platforms.

Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.
In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.
When you join us, you will have:
Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.
Your Impact
As a Product Manager, you will lead digital product development and transformation initiatives, turning strategic visions into impactful solutions while managing agile teams and client collaborations.
This role provides opportunities to solve complex challenges, work with global experts, and grow as a leader in product innovation and technology.
In this role, you will lead the development and transformation of digital products. You’ll shape product visions, define strategies, and guide agile teams to execute on client goals. Your work will include solving diverse challenges, such as process reinvention at financial institutions, big data analytics for retail, and consumer-facing app development. Acting as a bridge between business strategy, clients, and vendors, you’ll translate abstract ideas into actionable plans while ensuring efficiency and collaboration.
Your work will solve critical business problems and drive innovation. By leveraging your product management expertise, you’ll create impactful solutions, developing agile deliverables such as wireframes, user stories, and KPIs. Collaborating with McKinsey’s global network of experts, you’ll bring cutting-edge insights to every project, helping clients achieve their strategic vision and create transformative digital solutions.
You will join McKinsey Digital, based in Ho Chi Minh City, as part of a global team helping clients transform their businesses through digital technology. This team combines McKinsey’s expertise in strategy, design, and technology to tackle complex challenges across industries. You’ll work on projects ranging from IT modernization and agile transformations to cloud, cybersecurity, and digital product development, delivering innovative solutions that drive meaningful impact.
This role offers unparalleled opportunities for growth and leadership. You’ll gain exposure to diverse challenges across industries and geographies, accelerating your expertise in business and technology. As a product leader, you’ll coach teams, build client capabilities, and inspire others to achieve their full potential. Your contributions will empower clients to deliver lasting impact and create positive, enduring change in their industries.
Your Qualifications and Skills

Strong product instinct to build great product vision, product roadmap and competitive analysis

Excellent knowledge on tracking and analytics setup. Excellent analytical skills and data driven approach to constantly analyze user feedback and analytics report
Proficient with drawing storyboards, creating wireframes, creating/ ‘grooming’ product backlogs, writing user stories and developing acceptance criteria
Excellent project management skills; ability to plan 2-3 steps ahead of the team and surface hidden risks 2-3 levels deep within the team. Exceptional time management to meet your responsibilities in a complex and largely autonomous work environment.
Ability to work under pressure and manage client expectations; ability to work at an abstract level and continuously pivot to arrive at the highest impact answer for the client.

Company Description
SmartDev is an AI-powered software development company headquartered in Vietnam, part of the Verysell Group. We help global businesses deliver faster and build smarter — combining AI-driven development practices with deep expertise across
fintech, healthcare, retail, and enterprise technology
. Our team of engineers, architects, and AI specialists works across the full stack: from custom software and cloud solutions to generative AI, MLOps, and intelligent automation. At SmartDev, we believe that great architecture and AI-first thinking are a competitive advantage — and we build our teams accordingly.
The company is at a pivotal point in our journey: transitioning from a pure IT outsourcing provider to an
AI-enabled solutions partner
.
We have over 100 talented employees working both on-site and remote/hybrid at locations:
Hanoi: Zodiac building, 19 Duy Tan Street, Dich Vong Hau ward, Cau Giay District, Hanoi
Danang: 81 Quang Trung, Hai Chau 1 ward, Hai Chau District, Danang
Job Description
As Senior Delivery Manager, you will own the end-to-end delivery of a portfolio of fixed-price (FP) engagements — ensuring projects are delivered on scope, on time, and on budget while maintaining the highest standards of client satisfaction. You will serve as the critical bridge between the senior management team, engineering organisation, and PMO — translating business strategy into executable delivery plans and ensuring seamless alignment across all three. Beyond project execution, you will play a key role in transforming how we deliver: driving AI adoption across the SDLC, and streamlining operational processes. This is a high-impact, high-visibility role that combines operational excellence with forward-thinking leadership.
Lead resource planning, allocation, and utilization optimization across the delivery portfolio - ensuring the right people are on the right projects at the right time, and that bench time is minimized and billability targets are met.
Drive operational efficiency by identifying bottlenecks in the SDLC and leading AI adoption initiatives to accelerate delivery (code generation, automated QA, AI-assisted planning).
Build and continuously improve delivery frameworks, processes, and governance standards across the organisation.
Serve as the primary strategic point of contact for C-level client stakeholders — managing expectations, escalations, and long-term relationship development.
Collaborate with Sales and Pre-sales to scope new FP engagements, assess risk, and define delivery models.
Lead, mentor, and grow a team of Project Managers and Delivery Leads.
Define and track portfolio-level KPIs: on-time delivery rate, margin, utilization, client NPS.
Proactively identify delivery risks across the portfolio and implement mitigation strategies before they escalate.
Champion a culture of continuous improvement, accountability, and client-centricity across delivery teams.
What Success Looks Like:
30 days: You have a full picture of the active project portfolio — risks, health, margins, resource allocation, and key client relationships. You have met every C-level client stakeholder and established your cadence with internal delivery leads.
90 days: You have identified the top 3 operational bottlenecks in the SDLC and launched at least one AI adoption initiative with measurable impact. Resource utilization rate is tracked and optimized. Portfolio on-time delivery rate is trending upward.
12 months: You have built a scalable delivery operating model adopted across all teams. Portfolio margin has improved by 10–15%, utilization targets are consistently met, and at least two AI-driven delivery improvements are in production. You are a trusted strategic partner to your clients and a key contributor to SmartDev's growth.
Qualifications
Must-Have:
10+ years of experience in software development and delivery, with at least 5+ years in a senior leadership role
Proven experience managing large, distributed teams of 50+ members in an IT outsourcing environment
Proven experience managing fixed-price contracts — scope management, change control, margin protection
Strong background in project and program management, delivery governance, and PMO operations
Experience working with international clients across EU, US, and APAC markets
Hands-on experience with resource planning, capacity management, and utilization optimization across multi-project portfolios
Business mindset with solid financial acumen — P&L ownership, margin management, budget forecasting, and utilization targets
Strong strategic thinking — able to connect day-to-day delivery decisions to business outcomes and long-term account growth
Demonstrated experience engaging and influencing C-level stakeholders on the client side
Track record of building and optimising delivery operations — processes, tooling, escalation frameworks, reporting
Hands-on experience with AI adoption in software delivery (AI-assisted development, automated testing, intelligent planning tools)
Fluent English — written and spoken, from daily team communication to executive-level presentations
Deep understanding of SDLC methodologies — Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, Kanban, and hybrid delivery models
Nice to Have:
PMP, PMI-ACP, SAFe, or equivalent delivery certification
Background in software engineering or technical architecture — able to credibly engage on technical trade-offs
Domain experience in one or more of: Financial Services (banking, payments, lending), Healthcare & Pharma (EHR, HL7/FHIR, compliance), or Retail & Logistics (e-commerce, supply chain, last-mile delivery)
Familiarity with AI development tooling — Claude (Anthropic), AI-powered QA platforms
Familiarity with Japanese business culture and experience working with Japanese clients is a strong plus
Experience setting up or scaling a Delivery Management Office (DMO) or PMO
Additional Information
Benefits
International working environment with AI-driven strategic direction.
20 days of annual leave – Hybrid working mode.
Premium healthcare package with PVI and comprehensive annual health check-ups
Competitive salary & 13th salary bonus
Lunch allowance to fuel your productivity.
Engaging company culture with fun activities
Global collaboration – Work with both Vietnamese and international colleagues.

Role Overview:
The VRF Technical Support Engineer is responsible for supporting design, technical consultation, and resolving issues related to VRF air conditioning system design during the project phase, coordinating with the sales department to provide optimal solutions for customers, in order to facilitate project implementation and increase project success rate.
Job Responsibilities
Perform cooling load calculation, propose and select appropriate systems.
Select equipment models, design piping systems.
Implement and produce construction drawings using CAD/Revit.
Coordinate with the sales department to prepare proposal documents and participate in bidding.
Collaborate with relevant departments to carry out general company tasks.
Job Requirements
Preference given to candidates with a university degree or higher in the field of HVAC.
At least 5 years of experience in a technical/sales position at the following brands (or their agents/distributors): Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Panasonic, Samsung, LG Electronics, Toshiba Carrier, Hitachi, etc.
Good understanding of the HVAC market; priority given to candidates who already have a local customer network.
Priority given to candidates with good English/Chinese communication skills.
Honest, agile, responsible, able to work under pressure.
Proficient in Microsoft Office software (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).

Free lunch provided at the office.
Full social insurance contribution; annual leave accumulated until the first quarter of the following year.
Work in a dynamic, professional, and friendly environment with many promotion opportunities.

Other Information
Working hours: Monday to Saturday morning (8:30 AM – 5:30 PM), 1.5-hour lunch break.

job_description:
I. GIỚI THIỆU
Tại Thành Vinh Holdings, vị trí Content Creator giữ vai trò then chốt trong việc tạo ra nội dung hướng đến chuyển đổi và doanh thu. Đây là vị trí trực tiếp tham gia xây dựng ý tưởng, sản xuất và triển khai các nội dung bán hàng trên đa nền tảng, nhằm thúc đẩy hành vi mua, gia tăng tỷ lệ chuyển đổi và hiệu quả kinh doanh.
Content Creator không chỉ sáng tạo nội dung hấp dẫn, mà còn dựa trên dữ liệu, insight khách hàng và mục tiêu marketing để tối ưu hiệu suất cho các chiến dịch Performance Marketing và Thương mại điện tử.
II. MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC:
Nghiên cứu sản phẩm, insight khách hàng và xu hướng thị trường để xây dựng ý tưởng nội dung bán hàng.
Lên ý tưởng, kịch bản và trực tiếp tham gia sản xuất video bán hàng và video chạy quảng cáo (Facebook, TikTok, Google...). cho các sản phẩm mỹ phẩm của công ty.
Sáng tạo nội dung video ngắn (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) review, demo sản phẩm, hướng dẫn sử dụng, video khuyến mãi/dịp lễ, trước – sau khi dùng,... thu hút và thuyết phục khách hàng mua hàng.
Quay chụp, chỉnh sửa hoặc dựng video bán hàng đảm bảo truyền tải rõ ràng thông điệp bán hàng và đúng định hướng thương hiệu.
Lựa chọn và làm việc với mẫu/KOL/KOC/.... phù hợp để sáng tạo các nội dung bán hàng, hỗ trợ quá trình booking (check kịch bản, check nội dung và thành phẩm video)
Đề xuất và thực hiện các chương trình bán hàng hấp dẫn cho các dịp lễ, khuyến mãi...
Theo dõi hiệu quả video qua các chỉ số (view, tỷ lệ tương tác, chi phí hiển thị, tỷ lệ nhấp chuột, tỉ lệ chuyển đổi, doanh số sản phẩm) và đề xuất cải thiện.
Cập nhật và áp dụng các xu hướng video mới, kỹ thuật quay dựng sáng tạo nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả chiến dịch.
III. CHÍNH SÁCH ĐÃI NGỘ
Mức lương: 10.000.000 - 18.000.000 VNĐ (bao gồm Lương cứng + KPI + Doanh số).
Thưởng: Thưởng Quý, năm: Theo hiệu quả hoạt động của Dự Án tham gia.
Chế độ tăng lương: xem xét mỗi năm 1-2 lần (tùy thuộc vào thành tích của nhân sự).
Các chính sách khác:
Được tham gia nhiều dự án trên các thị trường USA, Nam Mỹ, Châu Âu,...
Môi trường làm việc năng động, thân thiện, trẻ trung, thỏa sức sáng tạo và nhiều cơ hội phát triển.
Đóng BHXH, BHYT theo quy định của nhà nước, thưởng lễ tết và các quyền lợi khác theo chính sách của công ty.
Được tài trợ chi phí tham gia các hoạt động thể dục thể thao, sự kiện truyền thống của công ty, các ngày lễ lớn/nhỏ hướng về các giá trị tinh thần khác như hướng về gia đình, kết nối tập thể......
Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 - Thứ 7 (08h00-11h30 và 13h30-17h00).
IV. LỢI THẾ KHI LÀM VIỆC TẠI THÀNH VINH HOLDINGS
Sản phẩm chuẩn pháp lý, thương hiệu đã được bảo hộ quốc tế (Trademark).
Thực chiến liên tục: Được triển khai nội dung gắn liền với kết quả kinh doanh, không lý thuyết suông.
Môi trường teamwork chuyên nghiệp: Phối hợp chặt chẽ với các team Ads, Design, SEO, giúp triển khai ý tưởng hiệu quả.
Thoải mái sáng tạo: Được khuyến khích thử nghiệm nội dung mới, tự do đề xuất ý tưởng mang dấu ấn cá nhân.
Đa dạng lĩnh vực: Làm nội dung cho nhiều ngành hàng khác nhau, rèn luyện khả năng thích nghi và phát triển tư duy đa chiều.
Lộ trình phát triển rõ ràng: Có cơ hội thăng tiến lên Content Lead, Project Manager,... với chính sách đào tạo bài bản.
V. YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC
Kỹ năng:
Biết quay, dựng video cơ bản (CapCut, Canva, Premiere, v.v.).
Có khả năng viết tiêu đề, lời thoại và kịch bản bán hàng hấp dẫn.
Biết sử dụng Canva, Photoshop hoặc các công cụ chỉnh sửa hình ảnh/video là một điểm cộng.
Tư duy sáng tạo, bắt trend nhanh, có trách nhiệm và chủ động trong công việc.
Kinh nghiệm:
Có ít nhất 6 tháng kinh nghiệm tạo video bán hàng hoặc làm video quảng cáo (ưu tiên lĩnh vực mỹ phẩm hoặc thương mại điện tử).
Bằng cấp:
Tốt nghiệp các trường Cao Đẳng, Đại học trở lên.
Yêu cầu khác:
Độ tuổi: 22 - 30 tuổi
Kiến thức:
Nắm vững kiến thức cơ bản về Content Marketing, các loại hình nội dung và cách thức xây dựng nội dung hiệu quả.
Am hiểu xu hướng video ngắn và hành vi người dùng trên TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube.
Thái độ:
Phù hợp với giá trị cốt lõi của công ty: Vui vẻ, nhanh nhẹn - chủ động, linh hoạt và luôn đặt lợi ích chung lên trên. Cực kỳ nghiêm túc khi tuân thủ các quy định về làm việc online cũng như offline.
Tư duy cầu tiến và ham học hỏi. Mong muốn bứt phá bản thân.
VI. THÔNG TIN LIÊN HỆ:
Địa chỉ: 222 Nguyễn Hữu Thọ, Phường Hòa Cường Bắc, Q. Hải Châu, TP Đà Nẵng.
Holtline: 0796651519 (Phòng HCNS)
Vui lòng gửi CV và thư xin việc về địa chỉ email: tuyendung@tvhs.asia
Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ với những ứng viên phù hợp để tiến hành bước tiếp theo trong quá trình tuyển dụng.

Purpose:
Deliver complex software projects for banks and securities firms by running project delivery end-to-end, coordinating multi-vendor integrations, negotiating vendor terms on behalf of clients, and managing subcontractor execution to ensure scope, timelines, quality, and client value.
Key responsibilities
Own delivery of assigned projects: scope control, schedule, budget, quality, and risk.
Lead integration work with multiple external vendors (core banking, market data, payment gateways, cloud providers).
Represent client interests when negotiating with vendors (pricing, SLAs, funding programs such as AWS).
Manage subcontractors: selection, onboarding, performance monitoring, and invoices.
Run regular client governance (status, escalations, acceptance criteria, UAT).
Produce and maintain project artefacts: plans, RAID logs, integration specs, cutover plans.
Ensure compliance with client security and regulatory requirements relevant to banking/securities.
Coach and coordinate cross-functional engineering teams and BAs.
Must-have experience & skills
5+ years project management in IT;
at least 2 projects
delivered for banks or securities firms.
Proven experience managing multi-vendor integrations (APIs, batch feeds, middleware).
Strong vendor negotiation experience (cloud providers, data vendors, third-party SI).
Excellent stakeholder management — able to interact confidently with bank CTOs/PMOs.
Experience managing subcontractors and remote teams.
Structured communicator: clear project documentation and status reporting.
Professional English (reading/speaking) for vendor/partner discussions.
Familiar with Agile and Waterfall; able to pick the right approach for the client.
Nice-to-have
Certifications: PMP, Prince2, or Certified ScrumMaster.
Background in securities market data, FIX protocol, or core banking systems.
Prior experience with AWS commercial programs and cloud migration projects.
Behavioral competencies
Client-first mindset and commercial judgement.
Decisive under ambiguity; strong at prioritization and escalation.
Negotiation-oriented, pragmatic, and detail-oriented.
Deliverables / KPIs (first 6 months)
Successful handover and steady delivery on 1 large integration project (on time & within agreed defects).
Vendor negotiations that reduce client costs or secure support (documented).
<5% scope creep due to missed requirements on PM’s watch.
Positive client satisfaction (CSAT) ≥ target.

job_description:
Join Axon and be a Force for Good.
At Axon, we’re on a mission to Protect Life. We’re explorers, pursuing society’s most critical safety and justice issues with our ecosystem of devices and cloud software. Like our products, we work better together. We connect with candor and care, seeking out diverse perspectives from our customers, communities and each other.
Life at Axon is fast-paced, challenging and meaningful. Here, you’ll take ownership and drive real change. Constantly grow as you work hard for a mission that matters at a company where you matter.
Your Impact
You are a Junior Software Engineer looking to take your career and technical skills to the next level. Your passion is learning new technical areas and coming up with innovative solutions for customer problems. You are looking for an opportunity to grow rapidly and take on high impact work alongside your team.
At Axon, you will develop high quality mission critical software in a collaborative environment while leveraging modern frameworks, tools, and AI-assisted development workflows. You will operate in an AI-first engineering environment where intelligent tooling, code generation, and data-driven decision making are embedded into daily development practices.
You will use your passion, experience, and analytical skills to help bring new solutions to public safety and leave a positive impact on the world.
What You’ll Do
Work Location
This role is based out of our Ho Chi Minh City office and follows a hybrid schedule: onsite Tuesday through Friday and remote on Mondays, unless an approved accommodation applies. We place a high value on in-person collaboration and building a strong in-office culture.
Reports to:
Software Engineering Manager
Participate in code reviews and architecture design meetings, incorporating AI-assisted insights and tooling
Own and drive end-to-end features with Product and Design, leveraging AI tools to accelerate development and improve quality
Ensure that your code hits a high bar for quality and performance, including validating AI-generated code outputs
Work in an AI-first environment where developer productivity is augmented through copilots, automation, and intelligent systems
Work together with like-minded people who are passionate about our mission
Work with the latest open source technologies and AI-enabled development platforms
Have mentorship from experienced engineers on both traditional and AI-assisted software engineering practices
What You Bring
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or Engineering, OR 2+ years of relevant experience, OR coding boot camp
Professional software development internship
Experience in at least one managed language such as Java, Scala, Go, C# or similar
Familiarity with or interest in AI-assisted development tools, code generation, and automation workflows
You follow the latest in software engineering, including emerging AI-driven development practices
You love delighting end users and solving novel challenges in a rapidly evolving technical landscape
Benefits That Benefit You
Medical and Dental Insurance
Vision Insurance
Robust Paid Time Off policy
Bonuses
Lunch allowance
Cell phone stipend
Free LinkedIn Learning account or similar learning platforms
Access to 24/7 online emotional and mental support
Gym membership
Free motorbike parking
Stocked fridges and pantries — free coffee, cold beverages, snacks
Annual company outing trip
Monthly team social activities
Don’t meet every single requirement? That's ok. At Axon, we Aim Far. We think big with a long-term view because we want to reinvent the world to be a safer, better place. We are also committed to building diverse teams that reflect the communities we serve.
Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they check every box in the job description. If you’re excited about this role and our mission to Protect Life but your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification listed here, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.
Important Notes
The above job description is not intended as, nor should it be construed as, exhaustive of all duties, responsibilities, skills, efforts, or working conditions associated with this job. The job description may change or be supplemented at any time in accordance with business needs and conditions.
Some roles may also require legal eligibility to work in a firearms environment.
We collect personal information from applicants to evaluate candidates for employment. You may request access, deletion, or exercise other CCPA rights at
axongreenhousesupport@axon.com
or via our Axon Privacy Web Form. For more information, please see the Your California Privacy Rights section of our Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice.
Axon’s mission is to Protect Life and is committed to the well-being and safety of its employees as well as Axon’s impact on the environment. All Axon employees must be aware of and committed to the appropriate environmental, health, and safety regulations, policies, and procedures. Axon employees are empowered to report safety concerns as they arise and activities potentially impacting the environment.
We are an equal opportunity employer that promotes justice, advances equity, values diversity and fosters inclusion. We’re committed to hiring the best talent — regardless of race, creed, color, ancestry, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship status, marital status, disability, gender identity, genetic information, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances — and empowering all of our employees so they can do their best work. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please email recruitingops@axon.com.  Please note that this email address is for accommodation purposes only. Axon will not respond to inquiries for other purposes.
Phishing alert: Axon will never ask you to pay for any part of the hiring process, including training, equipment, or background checks. We do not make job offers via text message, WhatsApp, or instant messaging platforms without a formal interview process. All legitimate job openings are listed on our official careers page at https://www.axon.com/careers. If you receive a suspicious offer or outreach from an email address that is not
@axon.com
, or if you are asked for sensitive personal information (bank details, Social Security Number) prematurely, please ignore the message and report it to recruitingops@axon.com.

is a leading cyber security firm, dedicated to protecting digital infrastructures worldwide while conducting in depth research and analysis for security solutions.

, VCS offers a comprehensive range of cutting-edge cyber security solutions, protecting governments, financial institutions, large corporations and SMEs against sophisticated cyber threats in the digital age.

This position is business and market-driven, acting as a bridge between customers, business, and technology, guiding product development towards market needs and commercial success.
Responsibilities
Manage the entire product lifecycle: market research → strategy → development → deployment → improvement
Analyze the market, trends, and competitors; propose strategies and solutions for WAAP/Anti-DDoS products
Worke directly with enterprise clients to gather requirements and pain points, transform them into product requirements
Build a Product Vision, Roadmap, defining features and development roadmap
Collaborate with Engineering, Sales, Presales, and Marketing to ensure the product aligns with market and technical standards
Monitor development progress and quality; create sales materials, demos, and bidding processes.

≥ 3 years of experience as a Product Manager/Product Owner or equivalent
Experience with B2B and B2C products, working directly with enterprise and mass customers
Business-oriented mindset, understanding of pricing, positioning, and ability to provide market insights
Proficient in microservices, cloud, on-prem, and hybrid architectures; ability to propose comprehensive solutions
Skills in presentation, negotiation, and decision-making; conducting surveys and collecting Voice of Customer data
Implementing survey programs to collect customer feedback (pain points, expectations) for continuous product improvement
Preferred: Experience in Cyber Security, Telco/ISP, Cloud/Infrastructure/Platform, especially with WAAP and/or Anti-DDoS.

Competitive annual total income package
Annual salary review in March.
Awards recognizing performance and timely outstanding contributions
100% sponsorship for in-depth international professional certification based on position (in case of unsuccessful attempt, don’t worry, VCS will support 50% of the exam fee), special bonuses for employees achieving international professional certifications
Continuous investment in the latest and most up-to-date learning materials in the field of Information Security from leading global vendors and institutes

Job Description
xspera, a global management consulting company, seek to increase corporate performance through digital transformation. XINGATE, xspera’s proprietary platform developed on Microsoft’s technology and collaboration stacks, deliver powerful intra-and-inter departmental and cross-departmental solutions with low cost and immediate results.
xspera is seeking a talented Solution Architect (Product) to help develop and expand our platforms and continually grow our engineering team also.
@xspera, we expect our Solution Architect to be
a Dreamer, view the world not as a one size fits all, but all clients are unique. It is essential that every component within XINGATE is built with modularity and flexibility in mind. With flexibility, must also come with minimal customization to go to market for each customer deployment. Finally, a desire for building a Minimum Viable Products (MVP),
a Believer, a belief in the company vision and a belief in the team that will take us there. A show of your confidence and drive of the vision will fester into the team like wildfire and bring amazing results. In addition to your own drive for success, successfully push team members past their comfort zones to build an amazing toolset of products, and,
a Builder, spread time affectively between building a solid product but also a solid team. Develop strong development processes with continuous integration and continuous deployment, and solid DevOps definition. Identify needed resources, hire and continually train team to be better day by day.
Into the details, your expected skills and experiences should include
At least a Master’s degree in an IT related field; PhD in IT related field is preferred.
Must have 10+ years’ experience in Software Development.
Must have 2+ years of experience with building large-scale enterprise architecture solutions, with considerations in
Data security concerns
Integration of external platforms
Application performance
Software scalability planning, and,
information management best practices
Must have proficiency in Microsoft application development languages and frameworks (C#, ASP.NET MVC, WCF, Web API, Entity Framework, MS SQL).
Must have knowledge of Microsoft Server Collaboration Platforms, specifically SharePoint Server (2010-2016) and SharePoint Online, Skype for Business (Lync), and Exchange.
Understanding of Microsoft Frameworks of BizTalk and SQL Business Intelligence (2014-2016).
Understanding of Web Application development technologies such as AngularJS 2, Bootstrap 3, React JS and incorporation of 3rd party libraries such as Telerik.
MCSE SharePoint and/or Microsoft Certified IT Professional (MCITP) is highly desired.
Must have excellent communication skills, both written and verbal. English certificate (at least TOEIC 700 or the same certificate relevant), Vietnamese is a must and German is a plus.
Why Work @ xspera
Work on the latest Microsoft collaboration technology stacks
Strong Work-Life balance
Above market salary compensation, including 13-month pay
Quarterly and yearly performance bonus compensation
Annual performance reviews
Powerful laptop
Premium Health Insurance
Personal development, training, and creative freedom
Ability to participate in customer projects in EU, US & HK
Work in a global team with highly skilled and motivated people
Spectacular company trips
Amazing office location in the center of Ho Chi Minh City (District 3)
About Xspera
As a management consulting company founded in 2012, xspera focus is on the business goals of our customers. We deliver solutions which help customers achieve their business goals faster. Our enterprise portal, XINGATE, adapts quickly to our client’s corporate structures reducing their process costs in many areas by as much as 30% -60% through greater transparency, digitization, and process automation. Join xspera today and join the digital transition movement today!

As a Solution Architect in FPT Digital’s Consulting Team, you will be the key technology expert responsible for designing and advising on digital technology solutions for clients undergoing digital transformation. You will work closely with strategy and business consultants, clients, and technology partners to ensure the proposed solutions are feasible, effective, and aligned with the client’s business goals. This role requires direct engagement with international clients, including onsite assignment in USA or in Europe.
Key Responsibilities
Act as the technology lead in consulting projects, responsible for analyzing, designing, and architecting IT systems aligned with digital transformation strategies.
Design and propose IT infrastructure, operations, networking, cybersecurity, cloud/on-premise platforms, and other digital technology foundations that match the client’s digital vision.
Participate in client workshops, technical deep-dives, and solution presentations—both remotely and onsite at client locations in the US or Europe as required.
Collaborate with business consultants and clients to gather requirements, assess current-state architecture, identify technology gaps, and propose optimized solutions.
Evaluate and justify technology recommendations based on cost-benefit analysis, implementation feasibility, and organizational impact.
Preparing solution proposals, presenting to clients and stakeholders, and contributing to consulting documents.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Engineering, Computer Science, Mathematics, or related fields.
Minimum 7 years of experience in the IT industry, with at least 2 years in a Solution Architect or technology consulting role.
Solid knowledge of enterprise IT architecture, including cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), IT service management, cybersecurity, system integration, ERP, and data platforms.
Certifications such as TOGAF, AWS Certified Solution Architect, or equivalent are a strong advantage.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Self-driven, adaptable, and able to work in a fast-paced and high-pressure environment.
Willingness and ability to travel abroad for onsite client work (short-term or extended engagements, primarily in the US or Europe).
Location:
Ha Noi & Ho Chi Minh City
