job_description:
About the role:
We are looking for a
Scrum Master
who is responsible for
facilitating Agile/Scrum practices and ensuring the team works efficiently to deliver high-quality products
. This role acts as a
servant leader
, coaching the team on Scrum principles, promoting continuous improvement, and fostering a collaborative and self-organizing environment.
You'll work closely with the
Product Owner and development team
to manage the backlog, run Scrum ceremonies, remove obstacles, and ensure sprint goals are achieved. The Scrum Master also helps build a
positive team culture
, resolves conflicts, and drives Agile maturity across the organization.
Requirements
- Be responsible for promoting and supporting Scrum by helping everyone understand Scrum theory, practices, principles, and values.
- Ensure that the Scrum process works well and properly.
- Coach the team on how to use Scrum practices and values to delight customers.
- Work closely with the developers and Product Owner to ensure an Agile culture is established in your team.
- Coach the Scrum team in self-organization.
- Identify gaps in the Agile process or skills to improve on, to make the team work better.
- Collaborate closely with the Product Owner to manage the product backlog.
- Facilitate Scrum events and other meetings as needed, e.g., product backlog refinement, sprint planning, daily Scrum, sprint review, and sprint retrospective.
- Facilitate getting the work done without coercion, assigning, or dictating the work.
- Facilitate discussion, decision-making, and conflict resolution.
- Remove impediments or guide the team to remove impediments.
- Provide all support to the team using a servant leadership style whenever possible.
- Help the Scrum team achieve higher levels of Scrum maturity.
- Build a trusting and safe environment where problems can be raised without fear of blame, retribution, or being judged.
- Help build a productive environment where team members “own” the product and enjoy working on it.
- Help the Scrum team achieve the Sprint Goal for every sprint.
- Help the Scrum team deliver the Increment with the Definition of Done.
- Motivate and encourage the Scrum team to improve continuously.
- Pay attention to the motivation of team members every day and improve their motivation if there are any low-motivated members.
- Work with other Scrum Masters to increase the effectiveness of applying Scrum in the organization.
Who We Are Looking For:
- Experience in playing the Scrum Master role for a software development team that was diligently applying Scrum principles, practices, and theory.
- Excellent knowledge of Scrum techniques and artifacts.
-
Highly proficient in spoken and written English skills
.
- Working technical knowledge of the software development process – design, development, test, and deployment.
- Strong communication, collaboration, leadership, conflict resolution, and time management skills.
- Applicable knowledge of the technologies used by the team.
- Analytical skills to be able to solve problems and remove impediments.
- Strong interpersonal skills, including mentoring, coaching, collaborating, and team building.
Advantages
Certified Scrum Master is a plus
Benefit
- 5 working days per week (Monday to Friday) with flexible working hours.
- 2 days of remote WFH (Work From Home) per week.
- Lunch and monthly gasoline allowance.
- Health, Social, and Unemployment Insurance (based on full contractual salary, in accordance with the Labor Code), PVI Health Insurance, and an annual health checkup.
- 13th-month salary, performance bonus, and annual salary review.
- 12 days of annual leave plus an additional 2 days of company leave, along with national holiday leaves.
- Company trips, sponsored team-building activities, monthly Happy Hour, Sports Clubs (Soccer, Badminton, Pingpong, Yoga), and other enjoyable events.
- A culture of continuous learning with free courses in specialized skills, soft skills, and English.
- Technical-certificate fee sponsorship.

Vai trò này tập trung vào việc thấu hiểu sâu sắc các thách thức nghiệp vụ để tư vấn, định hình và thúc đẩy các giải pháp công nghệ/AI phù hợp, đảm bảo mọi sáng kiến kỹ thuật đều mang lại giá trị tăng trưởng trực tiếp cho tổ chức.
2. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH
Đối tác Chiến lược (Strategic Partnering): Làm việc trực tiếp với lãnh đạo các phòng ban (Creator Management, Commerce, Marketing...) để thấu hiểu mục tiêu kinh doanh. Chuyển hóa các nhu cầu kinh doanh phức tạp thành các bài toán công nghệ có tính thực thi cao.
Tư vấn Giải pháp & Lộ trình (Tech Roadmap Consulting): Chủ động đề xuất các giải pháp công nghệ (bao gồm Automation, AI, Data Solutions) giúp tối ưu hóa quy trình vận hành. Tham gia xây dựng và ưu tiên danh mục dự án (Portfolio Management) dựa trên chỉ số ROI và mức độ ảnh hưởng chiến lược.
Thực thi các giải pháp quick-win: Có thể chủ động triển khai các giải pháp AI&Automation để xử lý những tác vụ nhỏ, lặp đi lặp lại, mang lại hiệu quả tức thì cho BU
Quản trị Kỳ vọng & Kết nối: Đảm bảo sự đồng bộ về ưu tiên và nguồn lực giữa Tech team và Business. Giải quyết các rào cản về giao tiếp kỹ thuật, đảm bảo các bên liên quan (Stakeholders) luôn nắm bắt được tiến độ và giá trị của dự án.
Đánh giá & Tối ưu Hiệu quả: Theo dõi sát sao mức độ thích nghi và hiệu quả thực tế của các sản phẩm công nghệ sau khi triển khai. Đề xuất cải tiến dựa trên dữ liệu thực tế và phản hồi từ người dùng nội bộ/khách hàng.
3. YÊU CẦU NĂNG LỰC
Tư duy Kinh doanh (Business Acumen): Khả năng đọc hiểu các chỉ số kinh doanh, nhạy bén với các mô hình vận hành trong ngành Truyền thông - Giải trí & Mạng xã hội.
Am hiểu Công cụ Automation: Thành thạo ít nhất một nền tảng điều phối workflow (ưu tiên n8n, Anycross hoặc Make.com)
Kỹ năng Phiên dịch Công nghệ (Tech-to-Business Translation): Khả năng đơn giản hóa các khái niệm kỹ thuật phức tạp thành ngôn ngữ kinh doanh dễ hiểu và ngược lại. Có kiến thức nền tảng tốt về hệ sinh thái AI, Data và quy trình phát triển sản phẩm (SDLC).
Giao tiếp & Thuyết phục (Influencing Skills): Kỹ năng đàm phán và xây dựng mối quan hệ xuất sắc. Có khả năng thuyết phục các Stakeholders về các thay đổi mang tính hệ thống hoặc ứng dụng công nghệ mới.
Kinh nghiệm: Có từ 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên trong các vai trò Business Partner, Product Management, hoặc Management Consulting tại các công ty Technology/Platform quy mô lớn.
4. QUYỀN LỢI
Thu nhập: lương cứng thoả thuận theo năng lực
Lương tháng 13, thưởng performance
Thưởng theo chính sách của công ty bao gồm thưởng dịp lễ, Tết, sự kiện của công ty
Môi trường làm việc thoải mái, năng động, thân thiện, cơ hội thăng tiến cao.
12 ngày phép + ngày nghỉ sinh nhật, số ngày phép sẽ tăng theo internal level và thâm niên làm việc
Được hưởng đầy đủ các chế độ phúc lợi như BHXH, BHYT, tham gia Công đoàn
Hưởng các chế độ về: sinh nhật, cưới hỏi, ốm đau, thai sản.

No. of position: 4
Training duration
: 10 weeks
We are looking for a JavaScript Intern who will be trained ServiceNow, a global cloud platform, to join our team. This is a great opportunity to gain industry experience and potentially a full time / permanent position if successful.
The role will involve shadowing, and the successful candidate will benefit from tutorials and mentoring from the development team.
Our expectation from you:
IT Students with the below skillsets would be qualified for our training program:
Demonstrated initiative, curiosity, and eagerness to learn through coursework or projects.
Strong collaboration and teamwork skills.
Capacity for independent research and problem-solving.
Logical, analytical, and creative approach to challenges.
Strong ability to self-study and explore new technologies.
Foundational knowledge of JavaScript.
Knowledge of ES6+ syntax and functional programming concepts.
Proficiency with Promises, Async/Await, and handling API calls.
Familiarity with Angular and Bootstrap (preferred but not required).
Basic understanding of Web Services and REST APIs (preferred but not required).
Ability to document code, processes, and technical requirements clearly and concisely.
Effective communication skills in English.
What we train you in:
You will participate in our ServiceNow training program, and during the course you will be trained about:
Understanding the ServiceNow platform as a cloud-based software development environment widely used for IT Service Management (ITSM)
Understanding ITIL principles and how they apply with ServiceNow processes.
Training on the framework (CSDM) that links IT services to the underlying technical infrastructure.
Configuring and managing platform settings to support organizational needs as a administrator
Best practices for clean code, data quality, and system scalability.
Writing and optimizing scripts to extend platform functionality.
Learn how to design and build automation workflows within ServiceNow to streamline repetitive processes, reduce manual effort, and improve efficiency across business operations.
Learning how to connect ServiceNow with external applications and services.
Learning to design and build scalable services that connect business functions such as HR, IT, and Finance.
Exploring how AI is applied within ServiceNow to streamline workflows and predict outcomes.
What you will achieve:
Be able to learn the practical modern technologies which are famous in the market
Besides technologies, you will also have a chance to learn and work in the UK and multi-national working environment.
After 10 weeks training, you will have an opportunity to become our staff if you achieve great performance.
Monthly training allowance: 4.000.000 VND
Does it sound interesting? Send to us your information, what you did and done and we will be happy to share the vision and the goal with you. SCC will be recruiting for a number of interns in Ho Chi Minh City for our operation. If you have some or all of the requirements listed above. Do not waste your time to wait, catch for our exciting opportunities.

job_description:
A leading global provider of industrial solutions is seeking a Country Director to spearhead its Vietnam subsidiary in Ho Chi Minh City. As Country Director, you will be entrusted with full strategic and operational responsibility, guiding a dedicated local team while collaborating closely with global headquarters. The organisation values mutual respect, openness, and partnership, providing an environment where your leadership can truly make a difference. You will enjoy significant autonomy to tailor strategies that reflect Vietnamese market realities and customer needs, all while benefiting from the support and resources of a stable, growing multinational. If you are passionate about building trust, developing people, and fostering sustainable business growth in a supportive culture, this is your chance to leave a lasting impact.
What you'll do:
As Country Director based in Ho Chi Minh City, you will play an instrumental role in steering the Vietnam sales subsidiary through its next stage of development. Your day-to-day responsibilities will centre around providing visionary guidance while ensuring operational excellence across all facets of the business. You will collaborate closely with colleagues at headquarters to align local strategies with global ambitions but retain the flexibility to adapt these plans for maximum relevance in Vietnam's unique market context. Success in this role means not only achieving ambitious sales targets but also nurturing a high-performing team culture rooted in respect and shared purpose. By building enduring relationships with customers and partners-and by championing continuous improvement-you will help secure sustainable growth for years to come.
Provide overall strategic direction and operational leadership, ensuring alignment with global objectives while adapting to local market dynamics.
Assume full responsibility for commercial performance, organisational processes, personnel management, and operational excellence with a clear focus on driving sales growth and expanding market presence.
Develop and execute comprehensive sales and market strategies tailored to the Vietnamese B2B landscape in close collaboration with headquarters.
Manage full profit and loss accountability by prioritising revenue growth, healthy margins, and sustainable business development across all activities.
Lead, coach, and nurture the local management team as well as employees at all levels to foster professional growth and collective achievement.
Strengthen relationships with key customers, partners, distributors, and stakeholders by ensuring consistent engagement and proximity to the market.
Drive continuous improvement initiatives that enhance organisational stability while maintaining continuity in operations.
Promote a respectful, cooperative company culture that balances performance orientation with empathy and inclusivity.
Represent the organisation as a trusted figurehead towards customers, partners, authorities, and other external parties in Vietnam.
What you bring:
To excel as Country Director in this prominent international group's Vietnam operation, you will bring substantial experience managing complex organisations within industrial or technical sectors-ideally those driven by B2B sales. Your background should demonstrate not only strong academic credentials but also hands-on expertise navigating the intricacies of the Vietnamese marketplace. You are adept at inspiring teams through empathetic coaching while balancing commercial imperatives with cultural sensitivity. Your interpersonal abilities allow you to connect authentically across diverse groups-whether engaging frontline staff or liaising with senior executives abroad. Fluency in English is essential given regular interaction with global colleagues; additional command of Vietnamese will further strengthen your effectiveness locally. Above all else, your integrity, reliability, and commitment to nurturing long-term relationships set you apart as an ideal fit for this influential leadership role.
Academic degree or equivalent qualification in business administration, engineering or a related discipline is highly desirable for this senior leadership role.
Demonstrated experience leading a sales-driven organisation or business unit within an industrial or technical sector is essential for understanding complex B2B environments.
Comprehensive knowledge of the Vietnamese market including B2B sales structures, customer decision-making processes, and relationship-building best practices is required.
Proven ability to develop and motivate teams in a manner that combines performance orientation with respect for individual contributions is vital.
Strategic thinking skills paired with a practical mindset focused on customer needs are necessary for effective execution of both short- and long-term goals.
High level of intercultural sensitivity along with the capacity to bridge local perspectives with international standards is important for success in this cross-cultural setting.
Exceptional communication skills enabling you to build trust at every organisational level are expected from candidates applying for this position.
Business-fluent English is mandatory; proficiency in Vietnamese language is highly valued as it enhances stakeholder engagement.
What sets this company apart:
This organisation stands out as a globally respected thanks to its unwavering dedication to innovation, quality assurance, and customer partnership. With decades of stable growth behind, it offers both security and opportunity for those who join its ranks. Employees benefit from an inclusive workplace culture built on mutual respect where open communication is encouraged at every level. As part of this team-oriented environment you'll have access not only to cutting-edge resources but also mentorship from knowledgeable colleagues around the globe-all united by shared values of trustworthiness and collaboration. If you're looking for an employer that prizes integrity just as much as results-and that empowers leaders like you to make real change-this could be your perfect next step.
What's next:
If you are ready to take your career in agriculture leadership further this is your chance to make a meaningful difference at one of Vietnam's most respected organisations-apply now!
Due to the high volume of applications we are experiencing, our team will only be in touch with you if your application is shortlisted.

Job Description
WHAT YOU’LL DO​​
As an Accountant, you are responsible for keeping the books correct and updated according to H&M group rules and local regulations. ​
You will:​
Carry out accounting transaction such as monthly and yearly cut, various reconciliation, stock bookings and intercompany transactions, routines for fixed assets bookings and depreciation calculations​
E-invoice issuance and e-invoice-related matters​
Initiate and carry out general ledger bookings ​
Report to Accounting manager when necessary ​
Work accordance VAT & Corporate Tax & Withholding Tax rule ​
Cash Management​
WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH​​
As an Accountant, you’ll work closely with Accounting Managers and external auditors, authorities. ​
This is a full-time position, and this role will be reporting to the Accounting Manager. ​
WHO YOU ARE​​
We are looking for people with...​
An accounting background and a minimum of 3 years’ relevant experience​
Strong problem‑solving, analytical, and numeracy skills​
Strong PC proficiency, including SAP, advanced Excel, and Power BI​
And people who are...​
Eager to learn and continuously develop their skills​
Collaborative, with a strong team‑oriented mindset​
Clear and effective communicators​
Able to work to tight deadlines and manage priorities effectively​
WHO WE ARE​​
H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​​
We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
​WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE ​​
At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our colleagues attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​​
All our colleagues receive a global employee discount, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET, Afound. In addition to our global employee discount, all our colleagues are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.​​
In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.​ ​
JOIN US​​
Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​​
Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​​
If you feel that your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application in English as soon as possible, but no later than 13 May 2026. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through career page.​
*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​

VinSOC is the core cybersecurity unit of Vingroup, responsible for securing one of the largest digital ecosystems in Vietnam.
We are looking for a highly driven
Senior PMO
to lead cross-functional security programs, manage strategic initiatives, and ensure effective execution across multiple technology and cybersecurity projects.
This role is ideal for candidates who enjoy working in fast-paced environments, managing complex stakeholders, and driving impactful programs from planning to delivery.
Key Responsibilities
Manage and coordinate multiple cybersecurity and technology projects across business units within the group.
Build project governance frameworks, PMO standards, reporting cadence, and execution discipline.
Track project timelines, milestones, risks, dependencies, budgets, and resource planning.
Prioritize incoming initiatives based on business impact, risk level, urgency, and team capacity.
Work closely with Security, Engineering, Product, Infrastructure, and Business stakeholders to ensure alignment.
Drive delivery of strategic cybersecurity and technology programs across multiple domains, ensuring alignment, execution quality, and timely delivery.
Support internal AI product development programs related to cybersecurity automation.
Prepare executive reports, dashboards, and steering committee updates for leadership teams.
Identify blockers proactively and drive resolution to keep projects on track.
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business, Engineering, or related fields.
5+ years of experience in PMO / Project Management / Program Management within technology environments.
Proven experience managing multiple complex projects simultaneously.
Strong understanding of project management methodologies (Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, Hybrid).
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
Strong analytical thinking, planning, prioritization, and problem-solving ability.
Experience using project management tools such as Jira, Confluence, Microsoft Project, or similar.
Comfortable working with senior leadership and cross-functional teams.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience in cybersecurity is big plus
PMP / PMI-ACP / Scrum Master / Prince2 certifications are a plus.
Experience in large-scale enterprise transformation programs.
Exposure to AI / Data / SaaS product development programs.
Why Join Us
Opportunity to work on high-impact security transformation programs across a major ecosystem.
Exposure to large-scale enterprise technology modernization.
Join cutting-edge AI for Security product initiatives.
Work with top engineering and security talent in Vietnam.
Competitive compensation and strong career growth opportunities.

A bit about H&H Group
Health & Happiness (H&H) Group is a publicly traded company, with established market positions in more than 16 countries in Asia-Pacific, Europe, North America and Oceania with over 2,700 team members working across the globe. Our vision is focused on premium nutrition and lifetime wellness, backed by science. We have 3 business segments – Baby, Adult and Pet Nutrition and Care – supporting whole-family health and happiness across 7 international brands.
On our journey to making a positive difference across the world, you will work with passionate people in an innovative and collaborative organization as we inspire wellness through #PurposeLedCareers!
We are passionate about our customers and community and are looking for similar-minded talent to join us! As an equal opportunity employer, we care deeply about creating an inclusive workplace where our team members feel valued, respected, and empowered.
Your role within the team
As the key person to manage the digital commerce agenda for the Vietnam local market, with a strong focus on driving online sales growth across ecommerce platforms and social commerce channels. This role is responsible for developing and executing strategies to achieve commercial targets, strengthen brand presence, and accelerate conversion through platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and KOLs.
Reporting to: Digital Commerce Manager, SEA (based in Singapore)
Key Responsibilities
Own and manage the digital commerce business for Vietnam, delivering revenue, profit, and market share growth across key ecommerce and social commerce platforms.
Develop and implement commercial strategies for flagship stores on Shopee, Lazada, and other ecommerce marketplaces, focusing on assortment, pricing, campaign planning, and conversion optimization.
Lead social commerce initiatives including brand livestreams, affiliate livestreams, influencer and affiliate video content, and affiliate community engagement programs to drive awareness and sales.
Collaborate closely with platform partners and enablers to secure visibility opportunities, joint business plans, and co-marketing support.
Plan and execute major online sales campaigns (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Brand Day) and ensure timely execution of promotional activities.
Analyze performance data and consumer insights to continuously optimize sales, conversion rates, and return on investment.
Work cross-functionally with marketing, trade, supply chain, and regional teams to align brand messaging, inventory planning, and activation strategies.
Stay informed of digital and social commerce trends, identifying new tools, platforms, and opportunities to enhance brand performance and competitiveness.
Required Skills and Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field; specialization in digital commerce is preferred.
Minimum 5 years of experience in ecommerce and/or digital sales, preferably within consumer goods, beauty, or health supplements industries.
Proven track record of managing and growing sales performance on platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and KOLs.
Strong understanding of social commerce, affiliate marketing, and influencer-driven sales conversion.
Analytical and data-driven with strong commercial acumen.
Adaptable, proactive, and results-oriented in a fast-changing digital environment.
Excellent communication skills in both Vietnamese and English is essential
H&H Group believes in the benefits of a diverse and inclusive workplace and aims to reflect the varied cultures within which we exist. We are committed to providing a working environment that is free from discrimination and harassment, creating a safe and inclusive environment for all.
We encourage applications from people of all ages, nationalities, religions, racial and gender identities, sexual orientations, abilities and cultures, and our hiring decisions will be based on business needs, position requirements, and the qualifications and experience of individuals. If you require support or assistance during the application process, please notify us at the time of application and we will be sure to enable reasonable adjustments where suitable.
If you have what it takes, please apply via the online portal and we will be in touch soon. We move quickly and may fill the role prior to the application close date, so we suggest you get in touch today!
Salary and benefits will be competitive and commensurate with experience. All personal data collected is for recruitment purposes only.

job_title: Event & Operations Coordinator (Remote- based in Vietnam)
job_description:
Visit.org
is looking for a passionate and ambitious
Event & Operations Coordinator,
located in Vietnam, to join our team remotely in a dual capacity spanning both event coordination and Shopify order fulfillment support. The Event & Operations Coordinator is a hybrid role combining event coordination and Shopify order fulfillment support. This person will manage event booking requests and daily communications with corporate, nonprofit, and internal stakeholders to ensure seamless event planning and execution, while also partnering with the logistics team to keep fulfillment operations running smoothly and orders processed accurately and on time. The ideal candidate brings an entrepreneurial mindset, strong attention to detail, and the energy to build and improve processes in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment.
Please note: This is a temporary 3-month contract and may lead to a long-term role based in Vietnam, up to 40 hours per week. The working hours are 12 pm - 9 am GMT+7 (with adjustment based on team meetings).
What Motivates Us
There is room for everyone! We empower each other to innovate and create processes that use technology to generate meaningful, lasting change. We enjoy the challenge of finding solutions to problems that are not a way around it but through it. We're driven by the opportunity to help enterprises and their employees around the world to contribute to their communities.
When You Join the Team
You'll join a movement from the ground floor and a team of purpose-driven people with a strong sense of responsibility, ownership, and pride that we're building this thing together.
You'll combine passion, purpose, and a paycheck—Visit.org team members get out of bed every day knowing their work is meaningful and has a tangible impact on individuals and communities around the world

Visit.org helps companies discover & book thousands of carefully curated social impact team experiences, led by and benefiting local nonprofits. With its proprietary library of team-based experiences across 90+ countries, Visit.org provides HR, CSR, and Meetings & Events leaders highly scalable, culturally appropriate content for purpose-driven employee and client engagement. Some of our customers include Colgate, Paramount, Visa, HubSpot, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, and more.
Responsibilities:
Facilitate all event booking requests from corporate partners and the account management team
Manage daily communications with nonprofit organizations to confirm booking details

Collaborate in several aspects of event production, such as event hosts, calendar management, booking confirmations, and scheduling logistics

Maintain a feedback loop with cross-functional teams to provide insight and share suggestions on where improvements can be made.
Identify risks and come up with innovative solutions to ensure events are successful and completed as scheduled
Provide immediate support for our clients and team on the ground

Monitor and process incoming Shopify orders, ensuring accurate fulfillment handoffs to our fulfillment center and timely resolution of any discrepancies or delays
Identify and flag order fulfillment issues, shipping errors, inventory mismatches, and returns using internal reporting workflows to drive quick resolution
Serve as a liaison between internal teams and the fulfillment partner, tracking order statuses and communicating updates to stakeholders as needed
Requirements
Experience coordinating and managing communications of multiple projects at once
Extremely organized and prides themselves on their attention to detail
1-2 years of experience in event management, preferably with large-scale events.
Experience with Shopify or other e-commerce platforms is a plus
Proficiency in English and a second language is a plus
Background in customer success or in a client-facing role
Demonstrate a strong desire for growth or learning and keep up to date on industry and management trends
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Experience working in a fast-paced startup environment.
Passion for our mission and the desire to make an impact in the world through technology
Please note: This is a temporary 3-month contract and may lead to a long-term role based in Vietnam, up to 40 hours per week. The working hours are 12 pm - 9 am GMT+7 (with adjustment based on team meetings).

job_description:
Job Description – Facility Technician
Mô tả công việc – Nhân viên Kỹ thuật Cơ sở Hạ Tầng
Key Responsibilities /
Nhiệm vụ chính:
Conduct regular inspections of facilities, equipment, and building systems.
Thực hiện kiểm tra định kỳ cơ sở vật chất, thiết bị và các hệ thống kỹ thuật trong tòa nhà.
Perform basic maintenance and repair work for electrical systems, lighting, plumbing, HVAC,
doors, locks, ceilings, floors, walls, and other facility items.
Thực hiện bảo trì và sửa chữa cơ bản đối với hệ thống điện, chiếu sáng, nước, HVAC/điều hòa, cửa, khóa, trần, sàn, tường và các hạng mục cơ sở vật chất khác.
Receive, prioritize, and handle maintenance requests from internal departments.
Tiếp nhận, sắp xếp mức độ ưu tiên và xử lý các yêu cầu sửa chữa từ các phòng ban nội bộ.
Carry out preventive maintenance to minimize breakdowns and ensure smooth facility operations.
Thực hiện bảo trì phòng ngừa nhằm hạn chế sự cố và đảm bảo hoạt động vận hành ổn định.
Support installation, relocation, and setup of office equipment, furniture, workstations, or event areas when required.
Hỗ trợ lắp đặt, di dời và bố trí thiết bị văn phòng, bàn ghế, khu vực làm việc hoặc khu vực sự kiện khi có yêu cầu.
Comply with company policies, occupational safety standards, fire safety regulations, and internal operating procedures.
Tuân thủ quy định công ty, tiêu chuẩn an toàn lao động, quy định phòng cháy chữa cháy và quy trình vận hành nội bộ.
Report facility issues, safety risks, equipment damage, or items requiring replacement or improvement to the supervisor.
Báo cáo kịp thời cho cấp quản lý các sự cố cơ sở vật chất, nguy cơ mất an toàn, hư hỏng thiết bị hoặc các hạng mục cần thay thế/cải thiện.
2. Job Requirements /
Yêu cầu công việc:
College, vocational, or technical degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Refrigeration, Construction, Building Services, or related fields.
Tốt nghiệp Trung cấp/Cao đẳng chuyên ngành Điện, Cơ khí, Điện lạnh, Xây dựng, Kỹ thuật tòa nhà hoặc các ngành liên quan.
At least 2 years of experience as a Facility Technician, Maintenance Technician, Building Technician, or in a similar technical maintenance role.
Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Facility Technician, Maintenance Technician, Building Technician hoặc vị trí kỹ thuật bảo trì tương đương.
Basic knowledge of electrical systems,fire-fighting plumbing, HVAC/air-conditioning, nitrogen, building maintenance, and office equipment…
Có kiến thức cơ bản về hệ thống điện,PCCC, nước, HVAC/điều hòa, Nitor bảo trì tòa nhà và thiết bị văn phòng…
Ability to use hand tools, maintenance tools, and basic measuring/testing equipment.
Biết sử dụng dụng cụ cầm tay, dụng cụ bảo trì và các thiết bị đo kiểm cơ bản.
Able to read and follow technical manuals, maintenance checklists, and work instructions.
Có khả năng đọc hiểu và thực hiện theo tài liệu kỹ thuật, checklist bảo trì và hướng dẫn công việc.
Careful, proactive, responsible, and able to respond quickly to technical issues.
Cẩn thận, chủ động, có trách nhiệm và phản ứng nhanh khi phát sinh sự cố kỹ thuật.
3.Required Skills /
Kỹ năng cần có:
Troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
Kỹ năng kiểm tra, chẩn đoán và xử lý sự cố.
Basic repair and maintenance skills.
Kỹ năng sửa chữa và bảo trì cơ bản.
Time management and task prioritization skills.
Kỹ năng quản lý thời gian và sắp xếp ưu tiên công việc.
Reporting and documentation skills.
Kỹ năng ghi nhận, báo cáo và lưu trữ thông tin công việc.

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
About Us
Reforged Labs (YC W22) is building the AI-powered creative intelligence platform for mobile marketers and user acquisition teams. Backed by Y Combinator and DCM, our flagship product, Boa, analyzes ad creative performance across the market and helps teams understand what’s working, why it’s working, and what to create next. By integrating MMP data, market intelligence, and proprietary AI agents, Boa predicts and suggests ad creatives with higher hit rates.
In our latest case study with Supercell, 80% of Boa’s ads outperformed Supercell’s own control ads. Teams using Boa ideate, produce, and iterate on ad creatives 2–3x faster while improving ROAS. Our team brings backgrounds from Google, Microsoft, and Harvard.
Our team is building AI agents that transform creative strategy for major global game studios. Our systems handle multimodal understanding across text, image, and video, and deliver in production what traditional teams would prototype in a year. We are a small, senior team operating at the frontier of agentic AI.
The Opportunity
We are looking for a software engineer who can own significant parts of our AI systems end-to-end. You will work directly with product and enterprise customers to scope, build, and ship, not hand off tickets. This means writing production code, making architectural decisions within your domain, and taking full responsibility for the quality and reliability of what you ship.
The scope of your responsibilities will reflect your experience. Engineers with more years take on system-wide architecture decisions, lead technical design for major product areas, and raise the quality bar across the team. Engineers earlier in their careers focus on deep delivery within a domain and build toward that broader ownership over time. All engineers are expected to be comfortable across the full stack, backend in Go and frontend in Next.js, and to work fluently with AI-assisted development tooling.
Core Responsibilities
Design and build production AI agents, agentic workflows, and the backend systems that support them
Own features end-to-end: from technical scoping and architecture through deployment and monitoring
Integrate and extend multimodal pipelines working across text, image, and video
Contribute to and improve shared internal agentic frameworks and infrastructure
Participate in design reviews; contribute to architectural decisions within your scope
Write well-tested, maintainable code and hold the same standard in peer reviews
Collaborate directly with product managers and enterprise customers to iterate on pilots
At senior and staff levels: lead cross-functional technical design, define direction for major product areas, and mentor engineers across the team
Your Skills And Experience
3+ years of professional software engineering experience in a production environment
Strong foundations in computer science: data structures, algorithms, and system design
Proven ability to deliver production software end-to-end with minimal supervision
Proficiency in Go or Python
Clear written and verbal communication in English
Comfort operating in fast-moving environments with ambiguous or shifting requirements
Nice to Have
Hands-on experience building with LLMs, agentic frameworks, or multimodal models in production
Familiarity with orchestration tooling such as LangChain or Google ADK
Experience at a startup or in a founding engineer capacity
Background in full-stack development spanning
Go backends and React/Next.js frontends

là đơn vị hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực an ninh mạng, chuyên bảo vệ hạ tầng số trên phạm vi toàn cầu thông qua nghiên cứu chuyên sâu và phân tích các giải pháp bảo mật. Với

location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
Company
Qualcomm Vietnam Company Limited, Hanoi Branch Office
Job Area
Sales, Business Development & Marketing Group, Sales, Business Development & Marketing Group > Business Development
Qualcomm Overview
Qualcomm is a company of inventors that unlocked 5G ushering in an age of rapid acceleration in connectivity and new possibilities that will transform industries, create jobs, and enrich lives. But this is just the beginning. It takes inventive minds with diverse skills, backgrounds, and cultures to transform 5Gs potential into world-changing technologies and products. This is the Invention Age - and this is where you come in.
General Summary
The role of this Senior Director (or above) in sales shall be in Developing, Managing, and growing Qualcomm business scale in the SEA region. His/Her role will be to be a true leader in energizing the entire Team in the region to adopt an earnest, hungry and curious attitude to businesses. Building and keeping relationship to new, existing as well as emerging Customers will be key.
This Person must have the highest level of energy and sense of urgency to continuously explore and reach out to potentials as well as being able to make fast and fruitful decision on what to deep dive into, and what to leave at the wayside.
The ability to maintain and keep growing the Team capability to close deals, find new ones, bridging the close relationships with the other Qualcomm regions, as well as with QC various BUs, HQ and all Colleagues will be critical asset.
Responsibilities
Responsible for managing and growing Qualcomm businesses in Vietnam (Priority), Indonesia, Australia and New Zealand via direct, indirect as well as other means (such as Solution as a service)
Responsible to manage and influence Existing, New as well as emerging Customers fitting into all criteria of growth engines for the region (Direct, indirect, services etc..) so that these Customers will adopt Qualcomm solutions and achieve design wins and long term growth objectives with the said Customers. Priority Countries will be as per the regional strategy intents and articulations
Be a key influencer and Actor to bring awareness of the regional business initiatives, wins, looses and other shareable ideas to the other regions. And in doing so – assist in the globalization of the solutions and products coming from this region to the world. In short, this Person must play a key role in the growth of our Customers (Direct, indirect and so on)
This Leader must play a key role in motivating, uniting the various and diverse Teams in the region and beyond such that committed results are well executed in Teams but at the same time, not shy from making tough decision, sometimes could be of minority view BUT the ability to stand up on it will be key
Work within the matrix organization that are usually the case in the region and the corporation but turn it into an advantage
OWN Customer relationship and Internal key Leaders relationship
Skills/Experience
The Person will have had extensive, demonstratable experience in developing relationships at large, complex organizations regionally and globally. Particular traits in working in developing countries with expressed achievements will be key.
Knowledge and existing relationship with Key players in the SEA region will be of added advantage. As we will need a person that can hit the road running. Again reference to the key Markets of major interest : Vietnam – by all means the most crucial, followed by Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand the Philippines etc…
Demonstratable business achievements in the form of commercial achievements, market share gains, design wins are important yardsticks. The Person must be able to demonstrate expressed example of taking an idea and turning it into a business success, in a region that are peppered with diversity, uncertainties and nascent development.
These business gains will be expressed in term of revenue goals, design wins achieved, market share progress and organization demonstratable strengths and earnest.
12+ years of sales, product management or business development of complex technology products in compute businesses with knowledge of global dynamics of ODMs, OEMs and certification
Strategic account management and sales expertise, the ability to manage change and the desire to operate effectively across organizations and customers. Especially in the SEA region. Added advantage if Vietnam is a key locale of the Candidate
Experience in gaining design wins with complex Customers
Deep knowledge and experience in building complex financial models that create win-win situations for Qualcomm and our customers
Ability to fathom and be able to pitch Qualcomm level of technical wares will be key. We are not looking for an Einstein, but we need someone who can arculate what Einstein stands for and be able to get tractions, interest and respects with the Customers will be key
Proficient and detailed understanding of supply chain, product development and marketing of ICT type products will be important
Experience in negotiating and managing MDF, NRE and component pricing with large consumer electronic OEMs
Ability to communicate, educate and evangelize both internally and externally
Good communication and interpersonal skills. Advantage will be in Vietnamese and of course English.
Creative problem solving with strong analytical skills
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelor's degree and 15+ years of sales, business development, product development or related work experience.
Preferred Qualifications
Master’s degree in business or technology preferred
20+ years in product marketing, sales, or product management in the ICT industry
5+ years in a leadership role
In addition to experience, the successful candidate will have demonstrated competencies in the following areas:
Technical leadership:
Leverages technical, professional, and domain-specific knowledge in software product management to achieve strategic and multi-faceted results, attract talent, translate complexity and to captivate stakeholders. This includes providing significant contributions to company and industry knowledge.
Building Collaborative Relationships:
Serves as a role model for building connections across the company. Facilitates the creation of lasting partnerships that foster collaboration and strategic initiatives.
Team
Leadership
. Identifies, develops, and retains talented individuals; grows current and future leaders; creates an inclusive environment that ensures all individuals reach their highest potential, thereby allowing Qualcomm to meet future challenges.
Communication:
Inspires trust through transparency. Expertly adapts style to audience and situations to maximize understanding and impact. Communicates technical concepts simplistically.
Creativity & Innovation
: Inspires a creative culture that anticipates change, proactively considers the customer’s perspective, and constantly reinvents itself as it seeks out new ideas, products, and processes.
Decision Making:
Ability to focus on the key drivers of a decision and think through the down-stream consequences of various options. Considers enterprise-wide implications, strategic alignment, and the broader marketplace when making decisions. Decisions have significant financial impact, influence customer strategy, are always aligned with Qualcomm's Code of Business Conduct, and expand or change the broader strategic plan.
Results Orientation.
Builds commitment and enthusiasm to meet deadlines and achieve regional goals within the Company’s complex business operations. Inspires a culture of exceptional performance and ethical behavior to ensure that strategic focus areas are executed and deliver significant results for the Company.
Strategic
Leadership:
Navigates high levels of complexity to develop strategies that reflect an enterprise-wide perspective while driving competitive advantage and producing value; takes calculated risk to impact potential return.
Applicants
: Qualcomm is an equal opportunity employer. If you are an individual with a disability and need an accommodation during the application/hiring process, rest assured that Qualcomm is committed to providing an accessible process. You may e-mail myhr.support@qualcomm.com or call Qualcomm's toll-free number found
here
. Upon request, Qualcomm will provide reasonable accommodations to support individuals with disabilities to be able participate in the hiring process. Qualcomm is also committed to making our workplace accessible for individuals with disabilities.
Qualcomm expects its employees to abide by all applicable policies and procedures, including but not limited to security and other requirements regarding protection of Company confidential information and other confidential and/or proprietary information, to the extent those requirements are permissible under applicable law.
To all Staffing and Recruiting Agencies:
Our Careers Site is only for individuals seeking a job at Qualcomm. Staffing and recruiting agencies and individuals being represented by an agency are not authorized to use this site or to submit profiles, applications or resumes, and any such submissions will be considered unsolicited. Qualcomm does not accept unsolicited resumes or applications from agencies. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Qualcomm employees or any other company location. Qualcomm is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes/applications.
If you would like more information about this role, please contact Qualcomm Careers.

Job Overview
We are seeking a highly skilled
Mobile Architect
to lead the design and development of our mobile application strategy and solutions. The Mobile Architect will work closely with cross-functional teams to build scalable, efficient, innovative mobile applications that deliver a seamless user experience. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in mobile technologies, coupled with the ability to create and execute a vision for mobile architecture.
Key Responsibilities
:
Architect and Design Mobile Solutions: Lead the technical design and architecture for mobile applications (iOS, Android), ensuring high performance, scalability, and security
Technology Leadership: Provide technical leadership in mobile technologies, frameworks, and best practices, ensuring the team stays updated on the latest advancements
Collaborate with Stakeholders: Work closely with product management, UI/UX designers, backend engineers, and other stakeholders to translate business requirements into robust mobile solutions
Code Reviews and Mentoring: Conduct code reviews and guide mobile development teams to ensure high-quality code and adherence to best practices
Cross-Platform Development: Evaluate and implement tools and frameworks like React Native, Flutter, or Xamarin for cross-platform development when necessary
Performance and Security Optimization: Ensure mobile applications meet performance benchmarks and security standards
DevOps and CI/CD: Design and manage the CI/CD pipeline for mobile apps, including deployment automation, monitoring, and scaling solutions
Problem Solving and Debugging: Investigate and resolve complex technical issues and bugs related to mobile application functionality
Documentation: Create and maintain technical documentation, including architecture designs, API documentation, and development standards
Requirements
Education
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
Experience
Demonstrated expertise as a Mobile Architect with a minimum of three years of experience
Proven experience as a Senior Mobile Developer with at least 10 years of experience in mobile app development
Strong hands-on experience in developing mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms using native (Swift, Objective-C, Kotlin, Java) and hybrid (KMP, React Native, Flutter) technologies
Demonstrated experience in leading teams or projects involving complex mobile architectures
Technical Skills
Expertise in mobile development frameworks (KMP, React Native, Flutter, etc.)
Having experience in KMP( Kotlin Multiplatform) development is a big plus
Familiarity with backend development technologies (E.g. APIs and databases, RESTful, GraphQL) is a big plus.
Experience with continuous integration and continuous delivery/continuous deployment
Experience with Modularization and code artifact management.
Strong understanding of cloud services (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Lazada Cloud) and mobile-specific tools like Firebase
Familiarity with Agile methodologies and DevOps practices
Experience with RASP solution for Mobile protection
Soft Skills
Strong problem-solving abilities and a proactive approach to addressing issues
Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
Leadership skills and the ability to mentor developers
Demonstrated proficiency in communication and teamwork capabilities
Proven problem-solving and analytical skills
Strong commitment to acquiring new practices and technologies
Exceptional interpersonal skills, encompassing facilitation and negotiation
Comprehensive understanding and experience with Agile methodology
Experience in collaborating across multiple technical domains, with the capacity to conduct in-depth analysis as necessary to ensure the implementation of appropriate solutions
Ability to effectively translate technical concepts for business stakeholders
Experience in managing and leading a development team
Benefits
Meal and parking allowance are covered by the company
Full benefits and salary rank during probation
Insurances as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family without seniority compulsory
Performance bonus up to 2 months
13th month salary pro-rata
15-day annual leave+ 3-day sick leave + 1 birthday leave + 1 Christmas leave
SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development
Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture
Overseas travel opportunities for training and working related
Internal Hackathons and company's events (team building, coffee run, blue card...)
Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri

Kiến trúc & Phát triển: Thiết kế và xây dựng các thành phần React có khả năng tái sử dụng cao; chuyển đổi các thiết kế UI/UX phức tạp thành mã chất lượng cao.

Kỹ năng CSS nâng cao: SCSS/SASS, Styled Components hoặc Tailwind CSS.
Thành thạo lập trình bất đồng bộ (Async/Await) và xử lý dữ liệu thời gian thực qua Web-Sockets.
Kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ quản lý mã nguồn (GitLab/GitHub) và quy trình CI/CD.
Kiến thức vững chắc về cấu trúc dữ liệu, thuật toán và các mẫu thiết kế giao diện người dùng (Frontend Design Patterns).
Hiểu môi trường Linux (Ubuntu) hoặc macOS để phát triển phần mềm.
Ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm chuyên môn về ReactJS và hệ sinh thái của nó.
Thành thạo TypeScript (bắt buộc) và JavaScript hiện đại (ES6+).
Kinh nghiệm về tối ưu hóa SEO và khả năng truy cập web (WCAG).

Kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực y tế hoặc bệnh viện là một lợi thế.

location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
We are currently inviting
Process Engineers
to join our growing manufacturing team in our newly established facility in
Vĩnh Lộc 2 Industrial Zone Park, Mỹ Yên, Tây Ninh (Formerly Bến Lức, Long An)
.
Shuttle bus is provided from HCM to the factory.
At TLT, we are at the forefront of delivering exceptional manufacturing solutions that fuel sustainable growth in the high-tech sector. Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with cutting-edge automation and robotics, enabling us to turn even the most intricate concepts into fully realized electronic and plastic products.
We foster a winning culture that empowers every team member to succeed and thrive. Together, we're engineers and manufacturers of solutions that have a real impact. By lifting each other to new heights, we create a collaborative environment where innovation flourishes.
At TLT, we believe in investing in our people. Here, you'll have the opportunity to enhance your skills, deepen your knowledge of our products, and experience personal and professional growth like never before.
In this role, you will:
Analyze process OEE and ensure it meets the required targets.
Lead the validation and deployment of manufacturing processes for new product introductions and design modifications
Drive improvements in process capability and scalability to support higher production output without compromising on quality performance
Collect and analyze process data to support data-driven decision-making and implement corrective actions.
Lead the adoption of new process technologies and drive continuous improvement initiatives: reduce cycle times and optimize manufacturing processes.
Collaborate closely with product engineers, maintenance engineers, and shift managers to improve operational efficiency.
Provide support for manufacturing processes
Develop and maintain work instructions. Train production staff on process changes and best practices
Requirements
3-5 years of experience in process engineering field
Experience with SMT (Surface Mount Technology), THT (Through-Hole Technology), or other electronic manufacturing and mechanical assembly processes.
Familiarity with SPC tools, MSA, capability calculations
Ability to interpret technical drawings, schematics, and BOMs.
Knowledge of Lean Manufacturing and Six Sigma methodologies.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills - ability to identify root causes and implement effective, data-driven solutions.
Effective communication skills- proven ability to work effectively in a multidisciplinary environment, including engineering, production, and quality teams.
Adaptability and flexibility - comfortable working in a dynamic production environment with frequent changes and priorities.
Proactive mindset - take initiative to identify improvement opportunities and drive continuous development.
Language proficiency: Vietnamese - required, good command of English (written and spoken)
Benefits
100% salary during probation
Full salary-based social insurance (BHXH)
Daily lunch allowance provided
Attractive 13th‑month salary
Company laptop and necessary work equipment
Shuttle bus for employees between HCMC and the factory
Long‑term career development opportunities in the electronics manufacturing industry
Engaging, supportive, and dynamic international working environment
A performance‑driven culture that values curiosity, ownership, and meaningful results
Salary:
We appreciate everyone's efforts and experiences, so we offer an attractive salary matching your skillset and field expertise.
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our recruitment colleague Anne Le via tuyendung@tlt-electronics.com.

job_description:
Giới thiệu FiinGroup và bộ phận Business Information
Được thành lập từ năm 2008, FiinGroup tự hào là đơn vị dẫn đầu trong mảng cung cấp dịch vụ thông tin tài chính, thông tin doanh nghiệp, thông tin thị trường và xếp hạng tín nghiệm thông qua các sản phẩm công nghệ. Chúng tôi tự hào là một doanh nghiệp FDI với các đối tác chiến lược nổi tiếng toàn cầu bao gồm Nikkei (công ty mẹ của Financial Times), QUICK, Ngân hàng Phát triển Châu Á (ADB) và gần đây nhất là S&P Global Ratings – Hãng Xếp hạng Tín nhiệm số một thế giới. Đồng hành cùng FiinGroup đồng nghĩa bạn được làm việc trong môi trường năng động, trẻ trung, chuyên nghiệp và luôn thay đổi không ngừng để tạo ra những chuẩn mực mới trong ngành.
Business Information là bộ phận cung cấp thông các thông tin, dữ liệu có tính tin cậy cao được chuẩn hóa, cũng như những phân tích chuyên sâu mang tính địa phương qua nền tảng dịch vụ theo mô hình thuê bao với phí cố định và phí dịch vụ theo mức độ sử dụng thực tế; và các dịch vụ phân tích theo yêu cầu.
Mô Tả Công Việc
Tiếp nhận và phân tích yêu cầu từ các bên liên quan.
Thực hiện phân tích hệ thống (“as-is”, “to-be”, gap analysis) để đảm bảo tính toàn vẹn của hệ thống và dữ liệu.
Chuyển thể các yêu cầu nghiệp vụ sang các yêu cầu chức năng (functional requirements), phi chức năng (non-functional requirements), và yêu cầu hệ thống (technical requirements), để bao gồm các quy trình nghiệp vụ (business processes), các biểu đồ luồng hoạt động (workflow diagrams), các tình huống sử dụng (use cases) cùng với các yêu cầu về trải nghiệm người dùng (user experience), truy cập hệ thống (system accsess), bảo mật, tính lưu động, tích hợp dữ liệu (data integration), tích hợp giao diện (UI integration), dữ liệu đầu vào và báo cáo.
Đảm bảo rằng các yêu cầu được ghi chép đầy đủ, rõ ràng, và chính xác.
Đề xuất các giải pháp tối ưu cho các yêu cầu nghiệp vụ.
Hỗ trợ việc thiết kế mô hình dữ liệu, wireframe, và prototype.
Xây dựng và quản lý các tài liệu yêu cầu, tài liệu thiết kế và huớng dẫn sử dụng.
Làm cầu nối giữa các bên liên quan và đội phát triển.
Đảm bảo các yêu cầu và mục tiêu của sản phẩm được hiểu rõ và thống nhất giữa các bên.
Tham gia vào việc kiểm thử sản phẩm để đảm bảo sản phẩm đáp ứng đúng yêu cầu đã đề ra.
Đánh giá các kết quả phát triển sản phẩm và phản hồi về chất lượng sản phẩm.
Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ khác theo sự chỉ đạo của quản lý.
Yêu Cầu
Tốt nghiệp đại học trở lên trong các ngành Kinh tế, Tài chính, Công Nghệ Thông Tin.
Có kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Business Analyst là một lợi thế, ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực phát triển sản phẩm.
Hiểu biết về quy trình phát triển phần mềm và các phương pháp Agile, Scrum.
Sử dụng thành thạo ít nhất một công cụ phác thảo giao diện (như: Balsamiq, Axure RP, MS Visio…)
Khả năng làm việc với cơ sở dữ liệu và SQL là một lợi thế: Có khả năng sử dụng SQL để kiểm tra dữ liệu, xác nhận các yêu cầu và hỗ trợ đội phát triển trong việc thiết kế hệ thống.
Có kiến thức, hiểu biết về tài chính ngân hàng là một lợi thế.
Chế Độ Đãi Ngộ
Thu nhập hàng tháng: Theo năng lực, có thể thỏa thuận. Tháng lương 13.
Thưởng năm theo năng lực, thưởng dự án và các mức thưởng khác theo Quy chế Thu nhập.
Các khoản phúc lợi: Thưởng Lễ, Tết, … bằng tiền theo Thỏa ước Lao động tập thể.
Chính sách BHXH, BHYT, BHTN, KPCĐ và các phúc lợi khác theo đúng quy định của Luật lao động và của Công ty.
14-16 ngày phép/ năm so với trung bình 12 ngày phép/năm trên thị trường.
Đối với Senior trở lên: Được đóng bảo hiểm Sức khỏe Bảo Việt
Cơ hội thăng tiến sớm cho cá nhân tiêu biểu.
Khung giờ làm việc linh hoạt.
Trợ cấp các loại tuỳ theo đối tượng: phụ cấp điện thoại, phụ cấp gửi xe ô tô, trợ cấp kết hôn.
Gửi CV Email liên hệ: Talents@fiingroup.vn

MealSuite, an Inc. 5000 Fastest-Growing Company, is a privately owned SaaS organization comprising 190+ team members across the globe, with hub locations in Cambridge, ON, Canada, Dallas, TX, USA, and Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. Our suite of end-to-end foodservice technology solutions helps professionals across healthcare and aging services streamline their operations, save time, reduce food waste, and meet regulatory requirements, so they can focus on what matters most: improving the quality of patient and resident care.
We're looking for a hands-on Site Reliability Engineer (Platform Engineer) to join our IT Infrastructure team. This role is focused on building resilient systems, improving platform reliability, and supporting critical production environments. You will be deeply involved in ensuring uptime, troubleshooting real-world issues, and improving operational excellence by enhancing observability and deployment automation across our hybrid cloud environments.
A day in the life as a Site Reliability Engineer (Platform Engineer):
Provide dependable on-call support and incident response.
Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure, performance, networking, and production issues.
Improve operational readiness, runbooks, and system resilience.
Implement and maintain deployment automation and IaC tooling.
Strengthen observability across servers, networks, and applications.
Improve monitoring, alerting, and performance tracking.
Partner with other Platform Engineering team members and related teams to improve systems.
Contribute to design reviews, process improvements, and runbooks.
Document solutions and share knowledge to uplift the team.
If the below describe your knowledge, experience and character, this role could be for you:
Deep experience in managing cloud-based service deployments for resilience, performance, and configuration
Strong knowledge and experience writing deployment automation using modern IaC technologies and techniques
Observability expertise that spans the stack; HW, OS, Networking, and APM
Strong competence engineering database and messaging technology platforms
Linux configuration and optimization experience
Strong networking knowledge and experience, physical config, security, performance
VMware Infrastructure Management and performance tuning
Certification in AWS
Bachelor or Associate's degree
Comfortable supporting production environments and participating in on-call rotation
Strong technical capability with a proactive mindset, naturally curious, and driven to continuously enhance systems and processes.
We know imposter syndrome can be REAL when applying for a new role, but please don't let the confidence gap prevent you from taking a leap and applying for your dream job. Your future self will thank you!
More to love about working at MealSuite:
Stock Options - Share in the success you help build.
Employment under Vietnam Labor Law - Includes Vietnam labor law contract with full benefits.
Hybrid Work Flexibility - Work remotely one day per week.
Generous Time Off  - up to 20 days of annual leave to recharge and refresh.
100% Salary During Probation  - No drop in pay while you ramp up.
Continuous Learning - Unlimited access to online courses through Udemy to support your growth.
Office Perks - Free snacks and beverages to keep you fueled.
Flexible Working Time - We care about outcomes, over rigid schedules.
Team Events - Regular activities to connect, celebrate, and have fun.
Meaningful Work - Build awesome products that make a real impact.
Have we got your attention? Great! Here's what's next:
Apply today with your resume and answer any application questions. We'll start reviewing candidates within two weeks of this position being posted and will reach out to you if we'd like to get to know you a bit better. We often get hundreds of applications for our roles (we feel very honored that so many people are interested!) and try our best to get back to each person. If there's a delay in our response, please don't think we've forgotten about you. We may be taking our time to thoroughly review each candidate before deciding who to interview.

KMS Technology
is a strategic engineering company helping businesses turn bold ideas into high-impact solutions-faster. Founded in 2009 as a U.S.-based services company, we’ve grown into a global organization with locations in the US, Vietnam, Mexico and Poland. KMS is trusted globally for the quality of our engineering and consulting services. We bring deep expertise in product development and quality assurance, Data & AI-native engineering, and delivery excellence to every engagement. Our mission is to help customers build what’s next—accelerating innovation, crafting brilliant solutions, and creating real-world impact. At KMS, we believe sustainable growth is built on the success of our clients and employees, and in making a lasting contribution to our communities.
More about KMS Technology:
Website:
https://kms-technology.com
LinkedIn:
https://www.linkedin.com/company/kms-technology
RESPONSIBILITIES
Perform all testing activities to improve product quality, work closely with the team (developers, business analysis, customer service, operation, etc.) to deliver the product success.
Shows creativity and initiative to improve product test coverage and effectiveness.
Address the test needs in a methodical, detail-oriented manner with the help of robust analytical skills and problem-solving capacity.
Involve initiatives for supporting the product growth like competitor research, customer troubleshooting, etc.
Mentor and coach junior QA engineers to improve their testing skills.
Participate in sprint planning and work closely with the Scrum team to analyze requirements and provide necessary QA/test recommendations.
Collaborate closely with clients, ensure effective communication, and proactively resolve issues arising during testing.
QUALIFICATIONS
1. General requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Upper-intermediate level of English
proficiency, with strong communication skills
4+ years of hands-on experience in software testing.
Experience in mentoring, coaching, and sharing best practices with other team members.
Proven ability to work independently while also leading testing activities within the team.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a focus on quality.
Good communication skills
and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
Open, proactive, and willing to continuously learn and adapt.
Familiar with the Agile development methodologies.
Excellent collaboration skills with a proven ability to work seamlessly with both customers and team members.
2. Technical requirements:
Experience in software testing for web-based applications.
Solid testing experiences
(test strategy, test approach, test plan, test techniques included black box, risk-based, exploratory, Non-UI testing, etc.)
Strong understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and software testing life cycle (STLC).
Methodical and detail-oriented, with solid analytical skills and problem-solving ability.
Strong dedication to quality and a positive, collaborative attitude and approach to testing.
3. Nice to have:
Experience in creating and running automated tests using testing frameworks like Katalon/ Selenium/ Robotium/ UiAutomator/ XCTest/ XCUiTest, etc.
Hand-on experience in using test tools like TestNG/ Mocha/ Jasmine/ Nightwatch, etc.
Proficient daily use of AI coding tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) across the full SDLC
Able to decompose complex tasks, provide effective context, and apply chain-of-thought and multi-step prompting workflows
Experience with agentic workflows and AI-driven development frameworks
Hands-on experience integrating AI tools with other systems via MCP (Model Context Protocol) or equivalent
Awareness of emerging AI tools and willingness to evaluate and adopt new capabilities

Perks You'll Enjoy
Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam
Building large-scale & global software products
Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
Diverse careers opportunities with Software Services, Software Product Development, IT Solutions & Consulting
Attractive Salary and Benefits

Flexible working time
Various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills
Premium healthcare insurance for you and your loved ones
Company trip, big annual year-end party every year, team building, etc.
Fitness & sport activities: football, tennis, table-tennis, badminton, yoga, swimming…
Joining community development activities: 1% Pledge, charity every quarter, blood donation, public seminars, career orientation talks,…
Free in-house entertainment facilities (foosball, ping pong, gym…), coffee, and snack (instant noodles, cookies, candies…)
And much more, join us and let yourself explore other fantastic things!

SGS is the world’s leading inspection, verification, testing and certification company. SGS is recognized as the global benchmark for quality and integrity. It operates a network of over 2,000 offices and laboratories around the world.

job_title: Mid/Senior Back-end Software Engineer - Good English
job_description:
About Momos
Momos is the leading Guest AI Platform built for multi-location restaurant brands across the globe. We help Customer Service, Operations, and Marketing teams streamline guest feedback, automate issue resolution, and drive repeat revenue — all powered by AI. Our customers include some of the most iconic QSR and fast-casual brands across 23,000+ locations worldwide.
We're growing quickly and investing in strategic field marketing to fuel our next stage of expansion. As we scale in North America, events will play a critical role in brand visibility, pipeline creation, and customer engagement.
The Role
The Product Engineering team is looking for a (Senior) Backend engineer to drive meaningful impact for our customers. You will own the design, implementation, and operation of key platform features. We are looking for self motivated individuals from all backgrounds, who are prepared to take on the challenges and opportunities that come from working in a fast paced, early stage startup. Success in this role will lead to increased responsibility and leadership opportunities as Momos continues to scale.
Primary Role & Responsibilities
Build powerful web applications using NodeJS (mainly), Python
Contribute to technical architecture design for our new products and enhancements to current products
Collaborate closely with other software engineers, product managers, and designers
Help other engineers on the team via mentorship, code pairs and code reviews
Hustle - plain and simple
Requirements
Ideal Background
3+ years of experience building and operating backend systems on a modern web stack
Strong experience in backend development with at least one mainstream server-side language
Solid knowledge of relational databases and data modeling
Experience working with event-driven or data-intensive systems handling high data volumes
Familiarity with analytics-focused data storage and large-scale querying
Hands-on experience with cloud-based infrastructure and scalable deployment models
Experience building systems with scalability, availability, and reliability in mind
Good communication skills and English proficiency for working with global teams
Nice-to-haves
Experience with data integration from multiple external sources
Exposure to workflow orchestration or long-running backend processes
Experience with observability and testing in production systems
Experience applying AI-powered features in real-world products
Background in marketing, analytics, or consumer-facing platforms
Interest in open-source technologies and communities
Location
Hybrid in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Benefits
Competitive salary and bonus scheme
Private medical insurance
Paid time off and a flexible working culture
Opportunities for rapid career advancement
A dynamic and inclusive company culture
Access to the latest technology and tools for personal development
Comprehensive onboarding program for new employees
Employee recognition programs for outstanding performance
Participation in industry conferences and events
A supportive environment that encourages innovation and creativity
Cultural Values
Mission-driven and fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment
A collaborative and flat company culture
Comprehensive private health insurance
Discretionary trips to our offices across the globe, with global travel medical insurance (when it's safe to travel!)
Cross-cultural team bonding/networking
Love Food? Join our Team!
Equal Opportunity
Momos is an equal opportunity workplace where we embrace diversity and different cultures. We started as an international Company, and know that building an organization with different experiences, thoughts and opinions allows our team to grow and excel.

CMC Global
là một thành viên của Tập đoàn CMC với khát vọng đưa các sản phẩm, giải pháp và dịch vụ CNTT của Việt Nam ra thị trường quốc tế. Được thành lập vào tháng 3 năm 2017 như một bước đi chiến lược của Tập đoàn để vươn ra toàn cầu, chúng tôi tự hào là công ty hàng đầu tại Việt Nam trong việc cung cấp đa dạng các Giải pháp & Dịch vụ CNTT toàn diện, từ dịch vụ truyền thống đến Chuyển đổi số, cũng như Tư vấn cho các tổ chức trên toàn thế giới.

location: Củ Chi, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Job Description
Job Purpose & Dimensions
Given the organic growth of our enterprise, we do have the need to establish a central pool of tools, with a standardized way of using them in development, in order to assure development excellence, a high standard of quality and reuse across our SW assets, and investment efficiency in SW Tools, particularly in the area of open-source code security vulnerabilities, and code-quality risks derived from it.
Work closely with SW development teams who are using Polarion, 3DS, R4J and Jama tools, and manage the tool to be used in a managed fashion in order to provide business added value.
Principal Accountabilities
Maintain the requirements management tools in use (Polarion, 3DS, Jama, R4J) or other requirements management system on the existing infrastructure.
Understand business requirements for the usage of the requirements management tools in use, and be the referee regarding which tool fits better each use-case.
Design and develop custom-made solutions for traceability, implementation & test status reports in the requirements management tools in use, with respect to the business requirements from this category of tools.
Proactively advice & support the Renesas Engineers with usage of the requirements management tools and provide coaching regarding the best practices for requirements management.
Coach the reports creation and usage of the tools according best practices, tool performance and aSPICE compliance.

Business needs are properly acknowledged, managed and implemented.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
Deep understanding of the state-of-the-art SW development methodologies and best practices.

Renesas is an embedded semiconductor solution provider driven by its Purpose ‘
To Make Our Lives Easier
.’ As the industry’s leading expert in embedded processing with unmatched quality and system-level know-how, we have evolved to provide scalable and comprehensive semiconductor solutions for automotive, industrial, infrastructure, and IoT industries based on the broadest product portfolio, including High Performance Computing, Embedded Processing, Analog & Connectivity, and Power.

To Make Our Lives Easier
.’

Join Renesas. Let’s
Shape the Future
together.

Join ITC, a trailblazing force with offices in Shanghai, Singapore, Saigon and Melbourne. We are a hub of innovation for Fortune 500 companies and industry leaders, guiding them through the complexities of the Chinese and APAC markets.

Location: HCM office
Main market: Mainland China & APAC

The Project Coordinator BPO is responsible for coordinating and overseeing multiple new and existing BPO projects (inbound, outbound and backoffice) across different clients. The role ensures that implementations, transitions, scope changes and improvement initiatives are delivered on time, within scope and in line with contractual SLAs and internal KPIs.

Coordinate UAT, access provisioning and system configuration with clients and IT to ensure technical readiness before launch or change deployment.

35 years of experience in project coordination, client implementation, PMO or similar role within a BPO/contact center environment.
Proven experience handling multiple concurrent projects or campaigns and working with international clients is preferred.

Solid understanding of BPO/contact center operations, including key metrics such as SLA, AHT, FTE, occupancy, shrinkage, QA score, CSAT and NPS.
Strong project coordination skills: planning, scheduling, tracking, risk/issue management and reporting.
Excellent communication and stakeholdermanagement skills, with the ability to interact confidently with clients and internal senior stakeholders.

Proficiency in MS Office or Google Workspace and experience using project and collaboration tools (e.g. Asana, Trello, Jira, Monday.com).
High attention to detail, problemsolving mindset and ability to work in a fastpaced, SLAdriven environm
