job_title: [HN] Junior Customer Onboarding Specialist (Business Analyst, Non-IT)
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Ra đời từ tháng 8/ 2016, Base.vn được biết đến là công ty công nghệ đi đầu trong lĩnh vực Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) tại Việt Nam, cung cấp nền tảng quản trị doanh nghiệp toàn diện giúp gia tăng hiệu suất, tối ưu chi phí và tạo đà tăng trưởng cho hơn 10.000 Doanh nghiệp. Trong suốt 9 năm hoạt động, Base.vn luôn duy trì
tốc độ tăng trưởng hai chữ số hàng năm
, khẳng định vị thế dẫn đầu thị trường.
Chuyên viên Triển khai (Customer Success - Customer Onboarding) tại Base đóng vai trò như một
nhà tư vấn tối ưu vận hành (Operations Excellence Consultant)
, là cầu nối giữa sản phẩm và khách hàng. Họ đồng hành cùng doanh nghiệp trong quá trình ứng dụng giải pháp của Base, nhằm đảm bảo
chuyển đổi số hiệu quả
, nâng cao trải nghiệm, mức độ gắn bó của khách hàng.
Chúng Tôi Tìm Kiếm Những Người Sẵn Sàng Bắt Đầu Từ Những Việc Nhỏ, Bền Bỉ Theo Đuổi Mục Tiêu Lớn, Chịu Khó Học Hỏi Và Liên Tục Cải Thiện. Bạn Sẽ Phù Hợp Với Vị Trí Này Nếu Bạn
Sẵn sàng và hào hứng với các hoạt động học tập vào sáng thứ Bảy Vì chúng tôi tin rằng không có con đường tắt nào dẫn đến sự vượt trội ngoài sự chăm chỉ, kỷ luật và khát khao học hỏi. Mỗi sáng thứ Bảy là một cơ hội để bạn đi nhanh hơn, xa hơn so với mặt bằng chung.
Bền bỉ theo đuổi mục tiêu Bởi hành trình thay đổi cách một doanh nghiệp vận hành chưa bao giờ dễ dàng. Base không chỉ bán sản phẩm – mà đồng hành cùng sự chuyển hóa. Điều đó đòi hỏi sự kiên trì, nỗ lực bền bỉ, và tinh thần không bỏ cuộc.
Có tư duy tích cực và lòng tin vào sự cải tiến Sản phẩm có thể chưa hoàn hảo. Quy trình có thể vẫn đang tối ưu. Nhưng chúng tôi tìm người thấy vấn đề là cơ hội để góp phần làm tốt hơn, thay vì than phiền hay đổ lỗi. Tại Base, mọi thứ đều đang tốt lên – và bạn có thể là một phần của hành trình đó.
Có khát khao kiếm tiền & muốn được trả xứng đáng với giá trị mình tạo ra Tại Base, thu nhập không phụ thuộc vào thâm niên hay chức danh – chỉ phụ thuộc vào hiệu quả.
Customer Onboarding Specialist tại Base sẽ làm gì?
Business Analysis | Nghiên cứu và phân tích nghiệp vụ vận hành của Doanh Nghiệp:
Phân tích nghiệp vụ, khảo sát kỳ vọng để làm rõ đề bài và đưa ra chiến lược triển khai phù hợp đối với từng Doanh Nghiệp
Project Management | Lập kế hoạch và quản trị các dự án triển khai công nghệ và chuyển đổi số của Base.vn:
Tư vấn cho khách hàng cách thức triển khai các giải pháp của Base.vn vào hệ thống quản trị vận hành của Doanh Nghiệp
Lập kế hoạch và quản trị tiến độ dự án để đảm bảo việc ứng dụng Base được hiệu quả
Báo cáo dự án và xử lý các vấn đề phát sinh trong nghiệp vụ hoặc cải tiến sản phẩm
Training | Đào tạo và tập huấn cho Doanh Nghiệp:
Thực hiện các buổi đào tạo, tập huấn đội ngũ nhân sự phía khách hàng (cấp quản lý & nhân viên) sử dụng thành thạo và tự vận hành hệ thống
Tổ chức các bài kiểm tra, đánh giá, cấp chứng chỉ để chứng nhận năng lực sử dụng hệ thống của đội ngũ khách hàng
Viết tài liệu dự án và hỗ trợ người dùng trong giai đoạn thích nghi (User Adoption)
Monitoring | Hỗ trợ quá trình sử dụng, báo cáo và định kì tối ưu hệ thống:
Hỗ trợ giải đáp các vấn đề phát sinh trong quá trình áp dụng công nghệ của khách hàng
Báo cáo định kì hiệu quả sử dụng để theo dõi tình hình ứng dụng công nghệ
Tổ chức đánh giá định kì và lên phương án tối ưu cho khách hàng sau 1 tháng, 3 tháng, 6 tháng
Product Development | Phân tích nhu cầu thực tế và đề xuất tính năng phát triển hệ thống giải pháp của Base.vn:
Tiếp nhận, tổng hợp và phân tích các nhu cầu nghiệp vụ thực tế từ khách hàng
Đề xuất các tính năng để phát triển và tối ưu hệ thống giải pháp của Base
Tìm hiểu thêm về vị trí Customer Onboarding tại đây.
Chân dung một Customer Onboarding Specialist tại Base?
Sinh năm 1997 - 2002, có trải nghiệm đi làm fulltime, ưu tiên các ứng viên từng làm trong các Startup (đặc biệt Startup Công nghệ), có tiếng Anh là lợi thế
Ưu tiên ứng viên đã từng tham gia hoặc thích làm việc theo mô hình dự án
Có tư duy hệ thống, kỹ năng phân tích, giải quyết vấn đề
Có tư duy dịch vụ (service-oriented)
Ham học hỏi, thái độ cầu tiến
Kiên trì, chăm chỉ, không sợ từ chối và thất bại
Thích chinh phục thử thách, mong muốn khai phá và khẳng định năng lực, tìm kiếm cơ hội bứt phá giới hạn bản thân
Work hard - Play hard!
Năng lực cần có ở vị trí Customer Onboarding Specialist:
Project Management: Kỹ năng quản lý dự án
Business Analyst: Kỹ năng phân tích nghiệp vụ
Problem Solving: Tư duy giải quyết vấn đề
Critical Thinking: Tư duy phản biện
Communication & Presentation: Khả năng giao tiếp và thuyết trình trước đám đông
Quyền lợi của bạn ở vị trí Customer Onboarding Specialist?
☑️ Thu Nhập Và Đãi Ngộ
Thu nhập không giới hạn = Lương cố định theo level (8m đến 10m) + Phụ cấp + Commission dựa trên doanh thu triển khai & hiệu quả triển khai & Thưởng hiệu quả công việc. Thu nhập trung bình đạt 15M – 20M.
ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan): Chính sách khen thưởng dành cho những cá nhân có đóng góp xuất sắc cho công ty – quyền lợi hiếm tại Việt Nam (Tìm hiểu thêm về câu chuyện ESOP của Base tại: https://life.base.vn/cau-chuyen-crazy-cua-base-vn/)
Chăm sóc sức khỏe: Khám sức khỏe định kỳ, bảo hiểm sức khỏe FPTCare cho nhân sự từ 1 năm làm việc.
Các chính sách khác: Nghỉ mát, Thưởng, Bảo hiểm, Phụ cấp,… theo Luật Lao Động và chính sách Công ty.
☑️ Lộ trình đào tạo bài bản:
Kiến thức: Kiến thức quản trị Doanh nghiệp, phân tích nghiệp vụ, tối ưu sản phẩm, ứng dụng công nghệ SaaS; Trải nghiệm Khách hàng B2B;
Công cụ: Bộ giải pháp quản trị doanh nghiệp Base.vn; hệ thống CSM hàng đầu thế giới;
Kỹ năng: Bộ kỹ năng khai thác nhu cầu – phân tích nghiệp vụ - tư vấn - đào tạo - đánh giá - quản trị dự án
☑️ Lộ Trình Thăng Tiến
Lộ trình đánh giá nhân viên rõ ràng, minh bạch, dựa trên số liệu, báo cáo chi tiết, bao gồm 02 đợt Midterm Performance Checkin (đánh giá kết quả giữa kỳ) 3 tháng/lần và Career Planning 6 tháng định kỳ.
Fast-track: Khuyến khích nhân viên tự đề xuất và đón nhận thử thách ở những vị trí cao (Key member: Coach/Team Leader/Manager) khi chứng minh được năng lực.
☑️ Môi trường & Văn hóa:
Môi trường trẻ, lành mạnh, nhiều cá nhân xuất sắc
Văn hoá đề cao sự công bằng, tử tế, hỗ trợ lẫn nhau trong công việc, hiểu thêm về “Sự tử tế” và “Luật hấp dẫn” của Base tại: Luật hấp dẫn ở Base).
Văn hóa học tập và phát triển mạnh mẽ, xuất bản tri thức & chia sẻ kiến thức thông qua các hoạt động learning, training, sharing, ... & mạng xã hội tri thức nội bộ Base Square
Nhiều hoạt động gắn kết nội bộ: CLB đọc sách, CLB thể thao: Base Runners, Base FC, CLB cầu lông, tennis, trekking, ...
Quy trình phỏng vấn:
Vòng 1: Phone Screening (Phone call/Google Meet)
Vòng 2: Competency Interview (onsite)
Vòng 3: Culture-Fit Interview (onsite)
Vòng 4: Job Offering & Career Path Sharing (online via Google Meet)
Địa điểm làm việc
: Trụ sở Hà Nội – Tầng 16, Tháp A, HUD Tower, 37 Lê Văn Lương, Thanh Xuân, Hà Nội.
Thời gian làm việc:
Thứ 2 đến Thứ 6: 8h30 - 12h00; 13h30 – 18h00. Thứ 7: 8h30 - 12h00.

job_description:
The private markets are a multi-trillion-dollar powerhouse that funds everything from tech startups to major infrastructure projects, yet much of it still operates on fragmented, inefficient legacy systems. At Anduin, we're changing that. The Anduin platform is built for the complete investor experience. We're not just improving a process; we're creating a better way for the entire industry to operate.
The Anduin Platform has supported over $205 billion in capital raised, helping more than 1,180 funds and 64,000 investors transact in a more efficient and investor-friendly way. This remarkable traction is a testament to the powerful, tangible value we deliver to our clients every day, solidifying our position as a leader in the financial technology space.
We're a global team of over 140 talented individuals with deep private market expertise across North America, Europe, and Asia. Since our founding in 2014, we've remained focused on our mission to revolutionize investing in alts and empower LP-GP relationships. If you're ready to join a team that is transforming an entire industry and making a real impact, we encourage you to apply.
We are looking for a Digitization Service Analyst who will work closely with both engineering, legal, and digitization operation teams to take part in various production phases of Anduin Fund Subscription and Fund Operation products (https://fundsub.io).
Job Responsibilities:
-
Digitize PDF subscription documents into web-based forms using internal tools, including but not limited to:
Communicate effectively with customers to understand their expectations and gather required information for digitization;
Analyze subscription documents to determine the required form logic and optimal digitization approach;
Use Anduin’s platform and tools to digitize subscription documents;
Coordinate effectively with technology engineers to implement form logic, and with cross-functional teams to address customer requests;
Partly involved in logic implementation (using simple programming language) and testing to ensure quality and accuracy before delivery.
-
Align with company and team goals, and adapt to changes in technology and processes.
-
Actively contribute to discussions and initiatives to improve processes, tools, and products.
-
Demonstrate flexibility and the ability to quickly adapt to new tools, technologies, and evolving responsibilities.
Job Qualifications:
Excellent English skills (MUST).
Strong logical thinking with good analytical and problem-solving skills.
Tech-oriented mindset with solid computer skills and openness to new technologies.
Ability to document and troubleshoot errors.
Agility and willingness to learn and adapt to changes.
High sense of responsibility and strong work ethic.
Ability to handle pressure and maintain work quality during high-demand periods.
Excellent time management and strong attention to detail.
STEM background is a plus.
1+ year of relevant work experience is preferred

Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems.
Participation isproject-based, not permanent employment.
What This Opportunity Involves
As an AI Trainer - Junior Journalist, your work will help train AI models, shaping how they understand and generate human-like text. This isn't just traditional writing—you'll be crafting text that teaches AI reasoning, logic accuracy, nuance, and clarity.
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may:
Craft original, clear, and fact-checked responses based on project guidelines.
Generate prompts that challenge AI.
Define comprehensive scoring criteria to evaluate the accuracy of the AI's answers.
Follow style and quality standards to ensure consistency
What We Look For
This opportunity is a good fit if you are seeking for open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have:
Bachelor's degree in Journalism, Communications, Linguistics, Literature, or Education to ensure a strong understanding of grammar and stylistic features;
At least 1 year of professional experience in Journalism, Communications, PR, etc., with strong skills in critical thinking and working with text in English language;
Strong written English (C1/C2);
Stable internet connection.
How It Works
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10-20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active.
Compensation
On this project, contributors can earn up to
$30 per hour equivalent
, depending on their level and pace of contribution.
Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

As a Software Test Engineer, you will participate in an R&D project with one of the best German car manufacturers in the world. We expect you to manage product quality throughout the entire development process, ensuring that the product is in the best possible condition when it is delivered to our customers. We are looking for individuals who are passionate about software testing and have experience in software testing, Automotive, Embedded Linux, and AUTOSAR.
What you’ll do
Collaborate with architects and system engineers during the process of writing requirements, developing, testing, and improving the R&D product.
Design testing strategies and solutions, create test plans and test cases.
Manage defects and the defect lifecycle, work with developers and customers during the debugging process, defect resolution, fixing, and retesting.
Execute test cases, record defects, report defects, report progress and testing status, and provide testing reports
What you’ll need
Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Automotive, Electrical, Communication or Computer Engineering
5+ YoE (Middle level) and 8+ (Senior level) with software testing in automotive industry
Solid in software level testing – preferably in Automotive Embedded Linux, AUTOSAR
Solid in C/C++, Experience with scripting language for automation test
Excellent with SDLC Management Tools: Testing Management, Requirement Management, Defect Management and Source Code Management Tools
Experience with testing project that comply ISO26262 and ASPICE Level 2 up.
Nice to Have’s
Requirement Design Skill
Project Management Skill
Skilled with Hands-on coding and Software Development
Why you’ll love work here
The exciting environment of a fast-paced AI technology start-up.
Opportunity to apply your knowledge and skills to make a real impact on the world.
Continuous growth opportunities for your knowledge and leadership skills.
Chance to contribute, interact, share, and learn from exceptionally talented colleagues.
Contact
Interested applicants are invited to send your application to v.loantt27@vinai.io; v.hoangnm31@vinai.io

Recruitment fraud is a scheme in which fictitious job opportunities are offered to job seekers typically through online services, such as false websites, or through unsolicited emails claiming to be from the company. These emails may request recipients to provide personal information or to make payments as part of their illegitimate recruiting process. DXC does not make offers of employment via social media networks and DXC never asks for any money or payments from applicants at any point in the recruitment process, nor ask a job seeker to purchase IT or other equipment on our behalf. ABOUT THE JOB
At NAB, we believe success comes from our people. We're committed to supporting your talent and skills through your career, as you help us build a culture that affects change for our customers and for the community too.
YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES
As a manager within the operations function, You’ll play a key role in delivering strategic and operational goals by:
Manage team of data analysts on day-to-day basis
Improve engagement with financial crime operations teams and other stakeholders.
Drive improvements in financial crime risk detection and prevention, targeting better outcomes in customer experience, and detection accuracy.
Deliver reporting and detection improvement outcomes in-line with agreed priorities and timelines.
Ensure compliance and ethical standards, aligning all work with internal policies, audit requirements, and health & safety legislation.
Fulfil other tasks as assigned by your People Leader and/or authorized representative of NAB Vietnam from time to time.
YOUR SKILLS & EXPERIENCE
Essential Capabilities:
Experience managing operational or project teams
Experience in the application of data science methods and/or AI
Solid written and verbal communication skills
Excellent problem solving and analytical skills
Ability to take a customer driven approach and consistently make decisions with the customer experience front of mind
Think outside the square and create innovative solutions
Experience:
7+ years experience in an analytics related role where data science methodologies were applied
Proven exposure and interest in database analysis, reporting and application programming (including, but not limited to PowerBI, SQL, Splunk, Python, R, Java, Databricks).
Qualification requirements
Tertiary qualified with a Degree in technology, statistics, physics, engineering, mathematics or data science-based discipline
Understanding of AML/CTF regulatory obligations and operational frameworks. (preferred not essential)
THE BENEFITS AND PERKS
1. Generous compensation and benefit package
Attractive salary and benefits
20-day annual leave and 7-day sick leave, etc.
13th month salary and Annual Performance Bonus
Premium healthcare for yourself and family members
Monthly allowance for team activities
Premium welcome kit and frequent appreciation gifts
Extra benefits for long-term employees
2. Exciting career and development opportunities
Large scale products with modern technologies in banking domain
Clear roadmap for career advancement in both technical and leadership pathways
Well-structured learning and development programs (technical and soft skills)
Sponsored certificates in both IT and banking/finance
Premium accounts on Udemy/A Cloud Guru/Coursera/LinkedIn, etc.
English learning with native teachers
Opportunity for traveling & training in Australia
3. Professional and engaging working environment
Hybrid working model and good work-life balance
Well-equipped & modern Agile office with fully stocked pantry
Special programs to improve your physical and mental health
Annual company trip and events
A solid talented team behind you - great people who love what they do
A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE WORKPLACE WORKS BETTER FOR EVERYONE

Job brief
We are partnering with a world-leading provider of machine vision inspection systems to hire a Technical Support Engineer who will deliver professional on-site technical services for AOI/SPI and automated inspection equipment.
Candidates with solid experience in automation equipment technical support / equipment commissioning & maintenance are highly welcome to apply—we value your automation background and will provide professional training on vision inspection systems to help you succeed.
Responsibilities
Lead on-site installation, calibration, commissioning, and fine-tuning of AOI/SPI optical inspection equipment and related automated production line equipment.
Diagnose and resolve complex issues across hardware, motion control systems, software operation, and optical imaging modules.
Optimize inspection recipes and algorithms together with customers, improve detection stability, and reduce false calls and overkill rates.
Conduct professional technical training for customer operators, engineers, and on-site management teams.
Serve as the key link between customers and the R&D team; collect on-site feedback, product requirements, and technical issues to drive continuous product improvement.
Manage on-site spare parts, formulate preventive maintenance plans, and ensure stable and efficient equipment operation.
Summarize typical after-sales cases, organize technical documents, and build a shared knowledge base to improve the overall team capability.
Requirements
2+ years of practical experience in automation equipment / electronic manufacturing equipment / AOI / AVI / SPI equipment debugging, maintenance, or technical support.
Solid technical foundation in vision system calibration, motion control systems, or PLC logic; familiarity with automation machinery and electrical control is essential.
Academic background in Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, Automation, or related technical fields (College or Bachelor's degree).
Strong on-site problem-solving ability, good communication skills, and the ability to coordinate effectively with factory engineering and management teams.
Professional working proficiency in English，proficiency in Mandarin is a plus.
Open to on-site support, long-term client assignments, and frequent business travel as needed.

Summary
Imagine what you could do here!
At Apple, new insights have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job, and there's no telling what you could accomplish.
The people here at Apple don’t just build products — they create the kind of wonder that’s revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that encourage the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts.
Join Apple, and you will help us leave the world better than we found it!
Description
We are seeking individuals with strong factory hardware testing and supplier management experience to join our team and help identify, enable, and improve world-class manufacturing suppliers for test processes and solutions.
Responsibilities
Deep understanding of the full supply chain test processes. Identify and contribute to the improvement of the factory Test processes.
Drive and support CMs in their effort to develop and deploy new Test methods, labor reduction, and automation, as well as any other promising initiatives.
Manage test process, technical issues, and other test activities for Ops builds, ramp, pack out, and shipping process.
Supervise the testing process to ensure the consistency of product testing across CMs and sites.
Bring up new CM, including reviewing CM org structure, training CM team, and driving new site’s test setup.
Audit and assess CM with support from the OpsTE central management team, driving CM results to meet Apple’s expectations.
Performs assignments in several of the following manufacturing engineering functions
Design for Testability - Provide early and ongoing manufacturing involvement to ensure new products are being tested logically and efficiently, incorporating FMEA, and product design targets using the Engineering Requirements Specification (ERS).
Product Life Cycle Engineering - Works all phases of a product from concept to repeat manufacturing to end of life. Provides production support engineering concerning technically sophisticated testing methods, procedures, and failure analysis.
Test Process Engineering - Designs and develops technical test processes to improve quality and efficiency. Use statistical tools (such as GR&R, SPC, and Cp/Cpk) to ensure processes/fixtures are scalable and are continuing to perform accurately once qualified, demonstrating integration with factory data systems and shop floor systems.
Failure/Data Analysis - Plans, develops, and implements procedures for the testing and evaluation of soon-to-be-released products. Specifies test to be performed, compiles data, and recommends test or tester design changes. This will include the use of Design of Experiments (DOE)
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer/Electronics/Electrical Engineering or relevant fields
3+ years of work experience in any assembly, inspection, test station design, test development, maintenance, and automation equipment
Willingness to travel domestically and internationally to multiple locations, at least 30–50% of the time
Preferred Qualifications
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to troubleshoot issues
Excellent communication skills with the ability to work cross-functionally in a global environment.
Hands-on knowledge & technical capability in tester design & qualifications, troubleshooting, limit setting, and process buy-offs.
Knowledgeable in crafting tester qualification requirements, including calibration, correlation, capability, repeatability and reproducibility, design of experiments, and failure analysis
Project management and supplier management experience.
Proficient in statistical analysis and skilled in using relevant tools for data analysis.
Be able to learn new software and AI capabilities. Find opportunities to apply these new capabilities to improve the factory Test processes and tools.

to join our team. The ServiceNow Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining ServiceNow applications and workflows to streamline and automate business processes within our organization.

Responsibilities
Application Development:

Customization and Configuration:

Integration:

Continuous Improvement:
Stay up-to-date with ServiceNow best practices, new features, and industry trends, and contribute to the continuous improvement of ServiceNow implementations and processes.

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent experience.

Proficient in ServiceNow development, including scripting (JavaScript, Glide Record, ACLs), workflow design, and application development.
Experience with ServiceNow integrations, web services, and data sources.
Knowledge of ITIL processes and best practices.
Familiarity with agile development methodologies and DevOps practices.
Proficiency in SQL and database management systems.
ServiceNow certifications (e.g., Certified System Administrator, Certified Application Developer) are preferred.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills to identify and resolve complex technical issues.

job_title: Fresher - Junior Business Consultant (B2B Sales Tech/Software/AI)
location: Phường Chí Minh, Hai Duong, Vietnam
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Fresher - Junior Business Consultant
(B2B Sales Tech/Software/AI)
Đánh dấu cột mốc 10 năm trưởng thành trong quá trình đào tạo và phát triển nhân tài với sứ mệnh tư vấn & đồng hành với doanh nghiệp. Base “trình làng” chương trình tuyển dụng
Base Revenue Champions dành riêng cho thế hệ trẻ không thiếu gì ngoài bản lĩnh và khát vọng chinh phục những mục tiêu thách thức.
Base Revenue Champions 2026 (BRC 2026)
là chương trình tìm kiếm và huấn luyện thực chiến những tài năng trẻ mong muốn bước vào tuyến đầu kiến tạo doanh thu. Thông qua phương pháp khoa học và triết lý làm nghề dựa trên sự tử tế, chương trình giúp bạn nhìn rõ giá trị của bản thân bằng cách trực tiếp đóng góp vào sự tăng trưởng của Base.
Mô Tả Công Việc
Tiếp nối sự thành công của BRC2026 batch 1, chúng mình tuyển dụng bổ sung 08 Business Consultant/Sales B2B gia nhập đường đua:
Chủ động tiếp cận doanh nghiệp: qua gọi điện, email, networking: kết nối với những người ra quyết định như CEO, Giám đốc Nhân sự, Tài chính, Vận hành.
Khám phá & phân tích nhu cầu vận hành: từ nhân sự (HRM+), công việc (Work+), dữ liệu (Infor+), tài chính (Finance+) cho tới Khách hàng & Sales (CRM+). Đây là các trục giải pháp lõi của Base để bạn nhìn sâu vào cách một doanh nghiệp vận hành.
Trao đổi, demo, pitching: tư vấn đến bán hàng để biến công nghệ thành giải pháp cụ thể giúp doanh nghiệp tiết kiệm chi phí, thời gian và rủi ro. (Trung bình bạn sẽ đến trao đổi trực tiếp tại doanh nghiệp: di chuyển khắp Sài Gòn, các tỉnh lân cận khoảng 6-8 buổi/tuần).
Đàm phán & đồng hành ra quyết định: trực tiếp tham gia quá trình thương lượng, thống nhất ký kết hợp đồng
Quản lý pipeline khách hàng: rèn luyện kỷ luật và tư duy quản trị công việc qua việc theo dõi, báo cáo, cập nhật dữ liệu thường xuyên.
Liên tục tò mò, học hỏi (học như 01 phần công việc): Tự học qua sự tò mò với phần mềm, học qua việc làm liên tục mỗi ngày, từ coaching 1-1 cùng leaders dày dạn kinh nghiệm đến các chương trình đào tạo chuyên sâu dành riêng cho Sales B2B tại Base.
👉 Đây là nghề tư vấn bán hàng, bạn có cơ hội đồng hành cùng
20–30 C-Levels/ Manager mỗi tháng
. Bạn được học cách vận hành một doanh nghiệp từ bên trong, rèn luyện tư duy hệ thống và kỹ năng thuyết phục ở cấp CEO, điều mà ít công việc sales nào dành cho người mới có thể mang lại.
KPI: Min win 50 triệu/2 tháng probation (cần chốt khoảng 2-3 deal).
ĐẶC QUYỀN CỦA TALENTS TRONG BRC 2026:
Free Trials: Cơ hội “dùng thử trước khi dấn thân” bạn được nghe, nhìn và trải nghiệm làm việc thực tế trước khi chọn trở thành Basers thông qua chuỗi sự kiện, hoạt động chỉ có trong BRC2026.
Bàn giao công thức thành công: Bạn sẽ được chuyển giao toàn bộ "vũ khí" được đúc kết qua hơn 10 năm giúp Base tăng trưởng liên tục bởi đội ngũ đi lên từ con số 0.
Xây dựng sự giàu có bền vững: Không giúp bạn giàu nhanh, chúng tôi lấy nền tảng, tư duy làm nghề đúng làm cốt lõi. Phát triển nội tại song hành với phát triển nghề nghiệp, để sau 3 năm dấn thân cùng Base, bạn có thể tự tin mình có thể bán & tư vấn bất cứ sản phẩm nào.
Key Players: Cơ hội trở thành thành viên nòng cốt, lãnh đạo của Base sau 2 năm tại rất nhiều trận địa mới cần các thủ lĩnh dẫn dắt.
CHÂN DUNG CỦA NHỮNG "REVENUE CHAMPIONS" TƯƠNG LAI:
Sinh viên mới tốt nghiệp hoặc nhân sự trẻ có 0 - 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc, sẵn sàng làm việc toàn thời gian tại TP. Hồ Chí Minh.
Chuyên ngành: Ưu tiên tốt nghiệp các nhóm ngành Kinh tế, Kinh doanh, Công nghệ hoặc MIS, STEM,...
Thành tích: Điểm GPA từ 7.0/10 hoặc 3.0/4.0 trở lên.
Định hướng nghề nghiệp: Có mong muốn phát triển sâu trong các vị trí làm việc trực tiếp với khách hàng doanh nghiệp, đóng góp trực tiếp vào doanh thu tại một doanh nghiệp công nghệ tăng trưởng.
Yêu thích việc tiếp xúc với các bài toán quản trị doanh nghiệp, làm việc trực tiếp với các cấp lãnh đạo (C-Levels) và đam mê ứng dụng công nghệ/AI vào thực tế.
NHỮNG TỐ CHẤT CỐT LÕI BASE TÌM KIẾM:
Learn & Research (Sự thông minh & Tò mò vượt trội): Bạn sở hữu khả năng tự học hỏi, luôn tò mò về cách thức vận hành của doanh nghiệp và không ngừng đào sâu tìm hiểu về các giải pháp công nghệ mới.
Revenue Oriented (Tư duy hướng đến kết quả, doanh thu): Bạn có tham vọng lớn và muốn nhìn thấy sức ảnh hưởng của mình thông qua những con số tăng trưởng thực tế. Bạn hiểu rằng thành công đến từ quy trình và kỷ luật thay vì chỉ dựa vào may rủi.
Resilience (Sự bền bỉ & Tham vọng): Sẵn sàng đối mặt với những thử thách khắc nghiệt của mảng B2B SaaS, kiên trì theo đuổi mục tiêu và có đủ bản lĩnh để đi đường dài cùng doanh nghiệp.
Coachable (Khả năng được huấn luyện): Sở hữu một tư duy mở, sẵn sàng tiếp nhận phản hồi và chuyển hóa các bài học thực chiến thành năng lực cá nhân để trưởng thành nhanh chóng nhưng bền vững.
Candidate Shortcut - Cơ Chế Ưu Tiên
Đạt danh hiệu Sinh viên 5 Tốt cấp Trung Ương hoặc cấp Thành phố.
Từng/ Đang giữ chức Chủ tịch / Phó Chủ tịch / Trưởng ban tại CLB, Tổ chức sinh viên hoặc Đoàn khoa.
Đạt Top 20 các cuộc thi có tính cạnh tranh cao về Kinh doanh, Start-up, Tech, Sales hoặc các sân chơi học thuật tương đương.
Quy Trình Tuyển Chọn
Vòng 1: Nộp CV ứng tuyển + Cover Letter
Vòng 2: Phỏng vấn online qua Google Meet với Talent Acquisition
Vòng 3: Phỏng vấn offline về chuyên môn, định hướng - đánh giá sự phù hợp về văn hóa cùng Hiring Manager.
Base Revenue Champions 2026
dành cho những bạn trẻ tin rằng tăng trưởng không đến từ may mắn, mà đến từ năng lực được rèn luyện một cách có hệ thống. Tham gia ngay
Base Revenue Champions 2026
để bắt đầu hành trình trở thành thế hệ Revenue Builders tiếp theo của Base!
Địa chỉ làm việc:
Lầu 2, Jasmine 1, Hado Centrosa, Phường Hòa Hưng, Quận 10.
Thời gian làm việc:
Thứ 2 - Thứ 6: 8h30 - 12h00; 13h30 - 18h00. Thứ 7: 8h30 - 12h00.

Description
Invent the future with us
Ampere is a semiconductor design company for a new era, leading the future of computing with an innovative approach to CPU design focused on high-performance, energy efficient AI compute.
As a pioneer in the new frontier of energy efficient high-performance computing, Ampere is part of the Softbank Group of companies driving sustainable computing for AI, Cloud, and edge applications.
Join us at Ampere and work alongside a passionate and growing team - we’d love to have you apply!
About The Role
As a Technical Intern, Platform Tools Engineer, you are a part of Platform Validation Team and join designing and implementing web-based testing tools to automate and streamline the validation of board functionalities.
The Platform Validation Team is a crucial component of the server platform process, dedicated to ensuring that our products achieve the highest quality standards while meeting functional and performance specifications. At Ampere Computing, this team consists of exceptional individuals committed to delivering superior products. They work collaboratively with both Software and Hardware teams to address challenges effectively. The environment is dynamic, innovative, and welcoming, supporting a hybrid working model. Team members enjoy valuable personal development opportunities through challenging projects, making it an excellent opportunity for career growth.
What You’ll Achieve
Developing robust hardware validation tools and modules using Python/Java programming languages.
Collaborating with stakeholders to identify the needs and challenges that can be addressed through custom tools.
Planning and architecting software tools that automate tasks, streamline processes, or enhance productivity.
Writing clean, efficient, and maintainable code to build the tools using appropriate programming languages and technologies.
Ensuring the tools work as intended by performing thorough testing and fixing any issues.
Releasing tools to users and providing ongoing support, updates, and improvements based on user feedback.
Working closely with developers, QA teams, and end-users to ensure the tools meet the required standards and integrate well with existing systems.
About You
Want to develop career path with embedding.
Can read schematic, circuits, datasheet.
Software skill in C language/Java/Python, Linux Bash Shell.
Have some basic working knowledge on standard interface such as I2C/SPI/UART/Flash, SATA, PCI, DDR4/5, USB, Ethernet 1G/10G, etc …
Have experiment with automation testing framework such as Robot Framework, Ethernet and TCP/IP related protocols.
Some experience in Microcontroller/Embedded System Programming is desirable.
Good Debugging/Problem Solving Skills.
Good written and communication skill in English and Vietnamese.
Education
Candidate must be pursuing a Bachelor Degree in Computer Engineering/ Electrical and Electronic Engineering as a 4th year student with strong academic record or equivalent.
What We’ll Offer
At Ampere we believe in taking care of our interns and providing a competitive monthly stipend and allowance.
Benefits highlights include:
Mentorship and on-the-job training from industry experts
Daily catered lunch, a variety of snacks, energizing coffee or tea, and refreshing drinks to keep you fueled and focused throughout the day.
Intern events, cultural and engagement activities with the team and the company
At Ampere, we foster an inclusive culture that empowers our interns to do more and grow more. We are excited to share more about our internship opportunities with you through the interview process.
Ampere is an inclusive and equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, citizenship, religion, age, veteran and/or military status, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, physical or mental disability, or any other basis protected by federal, state or local law.

job_description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:
• Build and maintain large-scale data platforms processing tens to hundreds of millions of
events per day.
• Design and operate real-time and batch pipelines handle 100k+ events/second using Kafka, Spark Streaming .
• Develop and scale multimodal pipelines.
• Work with vector databases (Milvus, Weaviate, or similar) to store and query millions of
embeddings with metadata filtering and hybrid search.
• Integrate LLMs and multimodal models (GPT-4, Llama-3, Claude, etc.) into data pipelines
for entity extraction, classification, enrichment, and summarization.
• Build and maintain a modern Lakehouse using Apache Iceberg or Delta Lake on S3/MinIO
with schema evolution and time-travel capabilities.
• Ensure good data quality, observability, and monitoring (lineage, basic data quality checks, dashboards, alerting).
• Optimize cost and performance of Spark/Flink jobs running on Kubernetes (autoscaling,
resource management, basic spot-instance usage).
• Collaborate closely with AI Engineers and Business Analysts to translate business needs into reliable data pipelines.
JOB REQUIREMENTS
• 2 years of hands-on Data Engineering experience.
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or equivalent practical experience.
• Strong hands-on experience with at least 3 of the following: Spark (Structured Streaming or DataFrame API), Kafka, Flink, Airflow, Iceberg/Delta Lake, vector DBs (Milvus, Weaviate,
Pinecone, Qdrant…).
• Proven experience shipping production data systems that process tens of millions+
events/day.
• Hands-on work with image or multimodal pipelines.
• Experience calling LLMs or embedding models from data pipelines (LangChain, LlamaIndex, direct API, etc.).
• Good knowledge of vector search concepts and at least one vector database.
• Proficiency in Python (primary) and SQL; Java/Scala is a plus.
• Solid experience with Docker + Kubernetes in production (Helm, basic manifests, or
ArgoCD is enough).
• Strong focus on testing, data quality, monitoring, and automation.
• You enjoy solving messy real-world data problems and making systems reliable and
maintainable.

• Young, dynamic, and energetic working environment that encourages employees to maximize their potential, with many career advancement opportunities
• Modern office with open-space design, located in a building exclusively occupied by the company
• Annual leave and social insurance, health insurance, and unemployment insurance in full compliance with Vietnamese labor law
• Comprehensive private health insurance for employees and their family members
• Full support for business trip expenses
• Participation in internal cultural activities, team building, and annual company trip

job_description:
Locations
: Hồ Chí Minh | Hanoi
Who We Are
Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963. Today, we help clients with total transformation-inspiring complex change, enabling organizations to grow, building competitive advantage, and driving bottom-line impact.
To succeed, organizations must blend digital and human capabilities. Our diverse, global teams bring deep industry and functional expertise and a range of perspectives to spark change. BCG delivers solutions through leading-edge management consulting along with technology and design, corporate and digital ventures—and business purpose. We work in a uniquely collaborative model across the firm and throughout all levels of the client organization, generating results that allow our clients to thrive.
What You'll Do
You’ll work alongside some of the world’s top minds on cases that reshape business, government, and society. Consulting work is varied and rigorous, much of it performed at our client sites. Projects can vary in length, size, and location, depending on the client’s challenge. You’ll collaborate on challenging projects with team members from many backgrounds and disciplines, increasing your understanding of complex business problems from diverse perspectives and developing new skills and experience to help you in the future, be that at BCG or beyond.
BCG offers a comprehensive benefits program, including medical, dental and vision coverage, telemedicine services, life, accident and disability insurance, parental leave and family planning benefits, caregiving resources, mental health offerings, a generous retirement program, financial guidance, paid time off, and more.
What You'll Bring
Final year students and graduates with less than 1 year of working experience in top tier firms.
Typically Vietnamese students from the country’s leading universities with outstanding academic performance and a strong record of extracurricular activities.
Strong research and analytical abilities, including excellent proficiency in Excel.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

job_title: Software Engineer (Hybrid - Ho Chi Minh, Da Nang) (Relocation Package Provided for Expats)
job_description:
About Nimble
We solve our client's most difficult business challenges through technology. Our company partners with the most ambitious companies around the world creating long-term impact with the work we do. If you want to grow together, work on challenging products and enjoy using the best tools and practices, Nimble is the right place for you!
Our Core Values
Extreme Ownership:
We treat our clients’ business as ours.
Bias for Action:
Execution is everything. We act swiftly, prioritize decisive moves, and maintain a strong bias for action to deliver results.
Intensity:
We tackle challenges with high energy and focus, delivering results through bold, committed actions.
Pragmatism:
We prioritize practical, straightforward solutions that deliver results, creatively tackling complex challenges with determination.
Outcome Over Process:
We always work toward impactful outcomes, driving results that matter. Processes help us repeat what works, but meaningful outcomes remain our North Star.
Truth Seeking:
We seek truth with intellectual honesty, sharp critical thinking, and fact-driven reasoning.
About the role
We're not hiring for a language or a framework. We're hiring for people who build things - who have already built things, on their own, because they couldn't help themselves.
This role sits at the intersection of engineering, product, and design. You'll work across Nimble client projects as an active member or lead of a project squad, contributing from discovery through delivery, and be expected to show up wherever the work needs you.
What You Will Do
Be an active member or lead a team of developers in a project squad across a wide range of project sizes
Decide which technologies to use for front-end and back-end, and define the overall architecture
Work closely with the Product Owner to keep the backlog efficiently planned and occasionally support technical discussions with clients
Write clean, composable, and maintainable code for world-class products built for our clients
Write automated tests to build and maintain the products we deliver
Do code reviews with your squad members
Use AI tools as a core part of how you work - not as a shortcut, but as a force multiplier for quality and speed
Learn new languages and techniques (Ruby, Go, Elixir, and beyond) to adapt to the evolving needs of our clients
Share knowledge through team rituals and contribute to internal processes and initiatives - Our handbook has been written by the whole team
What We Are Looking For
Solid professional web development experience - we care more about what you've built than how many years you've been building
Proven experience leading a team in a project
Comfortable working across both frontend and backend
Experience writing automated tests for web applications
Genuine fluency with AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude, Copilot, etc.) - you use them every day and you know when they're wrong
Product sense: you can reason about what to build, not just how to build it
You believe great software isn't just code that works - it's code that is reusable, maintainable, secure, and performant
High agency - you don't wait to be told what to do next; you define the next move
Evidence of self-directed work - pet projects, side apps, open source contributions, anything you built because you wanted to
Strong English communication skills
Why You'll Love Working Here
You’ll feel proud of every product we ship.
We care deeply about quality, design, and doing things right—our name stands for excellence.
You’ll be surrounded by high performers.
We’re a tight-knit, ambitious team that pushes each other to grow and thrive.
We're built differently.
We’ve been profitable and bootstrapped since day one—no VC pressures, just smart, sustainable growth.
We take pride in craftsmanship.
Whether it's code, design, or delivery, we hold ourselves to a high bar—because the little things shape the big picture.
Process with purpose.
We follow agile principles not just in theory, but in practice. Our engineers work with clearly defined user stories, estimate using story points, and deliver iteratively in focused 1–2 week sprints.
Growth is part of the job.
Through regular one-on-ones, structured feedback, and a clear leveling framework, we support every team member’s growth—not just in technical skills, but in communication, collaboration, and leadership.
AI allowance, your way.
Each year, you'll get a dedicated budget to explore AI tools, platforms, and learning resources that boost your productivity and skills. Dive into Pluralsight, PragPub, e-books, and more—wherever your curiosity takes you.
We’ve got your back.
From day one, you’ll get private medical insurance, social welfare coverage, and a company care fund.
We support your move.
If you're joining us from abroad, we’ll take care of your visa, work permit, and provide a relocation package to help you settle in smoothly.
Flexibility that fits.
We support a hybrid workstyle, giving you the freedom to find the right rhythm between home and office life.
Work with the right tools.
We’ll set you up with a MacBook and a large external monitor so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
A workspace that works for you
with our modern office in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City and Da Nang.
Stay fueled.
Our kitchen is always stocked with drinks and snacks.
Take the time you need.
Enjoy 26 days of paid leave a year (including public holidays), plus a sabbatical month every 3 years.
Celebrate your journey.
From anniversary gifts to yearly company outings and spontaneous team activities, we make time for fun and appreciation.
...and more perks to make work feel better.
If you are a passionate web professional looking to make a significant impact in a growing software development company, we would love to hear from you.
Join us in shaping the future with with elevating web innovation!
We keep our recruitment process practical and straightforward.
To learn more about how we work, check our handbook named Compass, Github organization, and Medium account.
Want to see what we have built? Check our Dribbble and Behance accounts.
Want to keep in touch with us? Follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
Nimble is an equal opportunity employer.

Đôn đốc, nhắc nhở việc thực hiện công tác an toàn của tất cả các đội thi công tại công trường;
Đề xuất với trưởng bộ phận an toàn việc thực hiện đăng ký và kiểm định các loại máy móc, thiết bị, vật tư và các hóa chất có yêu cầu nghiêm ngặt về an toàn lao động, vệ sinh lao động;
Đề xuất với Bộ phận An toàn huấn luyện CBNV trên công trường về công tác vệ sinh an toàn lao động, phòng chống cháy nổ.
Báo cáo thường xuyên cho trưởng bộ phận an toàn về tình trạng an toàn vệ sinh lao động trên công trường;
Yêu cầu:
Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành bảo hộ lao động, môi trường hoặc tương đương.
Có chứng chỉ huấn luyện an toàn lao động nhóm 2
Thành thạo các kỹ năng vi tính: Word, Excel, phần mềm internet Explorer.
Trung thực, khỏe mạnh, chịu khó, tác phong nhanh nhẹn..
Có khả năng phân tích, kiểm soát và giải quyết công việc độc lập.
Tính cách cẩn thận, thương lượng đàm phán tốt, chịu được áp lực công việc.
Có kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực xây dựng là một lợi thế.
Có ít nhất 02 năm kinh nghiệm ở lĩnh vực an toàn lao động xây dựng.
Quyền lợi:
– Mức lương cơ bản từ 8- 15 triệu, ngoài lương cơ bản ứng viên được hưởng các chế độ như: phụ cấp công trường, phụ cấp khu vực, làm đêm….và các chế độ khác theo quy định của công ty; Tổng thu nhập từ 8-15 triệu. Cuối năm ngoài thưởng tháng 13 công ty thưởng cho CBNV theo đánh giá xếp loại hàng tháng.
– Công ty hỗ trợ nhà ở và ăn ca cho CBNV làm việc tại công trường; CBNV làm việc tại văn phòng Hà nội được hưởng hỗ trợ ăn ca;
– Ứng viên được làm trong một môi trường năng động, chuyên nghiệp;
– Ứng viên còn được hưởng chính sách BHXH, BHYT, BHTN.

job_title: Senior Technical Product Manager (Da Nang, Hybrid) (Visa and Relocation Package Provided for Expats)
location: Đà Nang, Da Nang City, Vietnam
job_description:
About Nimble
We solve our client's most difficult business challenges through technology. Our company partners with the most ambitious companies around the world creating long-term impact with the work we do. If you want to grow together, work on challenging products and enjoy using the best tools and practices, Nimble is the right place for you!
Our Core Values
Extreme Ownership: We treat our clients’ business as ours.
Bias for Action: Execution is everything. We act swiftly, prioritize decisive moves, and maintain a strong bias for action to deliver results.
Intensity: We tackle challenges with high energy and focus, delivering results through bold, committed actions.
Pragmatism: We prioritize practical, straightforward solutions that deliver results, creatively tackling complex challenges with determination.
Outcome Over Process: We always work toward impactful outcomes, driving results that matter. Processes help us repeat what works, but meaningful outcomes remain our North Star.
Truth Seeking: We seek truth with intellectual honesty, sharp critical thinking, and fact-driven reasoning.
What You Will Do
To ensure the top quality of our web and mobile applications to exceed our clients' expectations.
To manage the product lifecycle effectively, from specification through delivery and maintenance.
To align the product vision with the client's team and stakeholders.
To communicate continuously with our clients.
To prepare product specifications, define and plan user stories for developers, design test cases, and test features.
To collaborate with the management team in defining internal processes and initiatives that help the company accomplish its mission.
To identify opportunities and contribute to growing and sustaining long-term revenue from the accounts they manage.
To collaborate with the sales team in supporting the pre-sales process, including scoping, solution design, and client communication.
Requirements
At least 5 years of experience as a Product Owner/Product Manager.
Software development (programming) experience is required. At least 2 years of experience on or off the job.
Fluent English communication is a must.
A degree in Computer Science or related fields is preferred.
Passion and experience in web and mobile applications, startups and cutting-edge technology.
Not being afraid to roll up your sleeves to get things done.
High attention to detail.
Ability to organize your own work and create work for others.
Looking for a leadership role, hence soft skills such as negotiation and evaluating/proposing creative alternatives are required.
Very articulate, opinionated, decisive, and is at ease to interact with clients.
This position requires the candidates to work in Ho Chi Minh or Da Nang City, Vietnam (or open to relocate).
Why You’ll Love Working Here
You’ll feel proud of every product we ship. We care deeply about quality, design, and doing things right—our name stands for excellence.
You’ll be surrounded by high performers. We’re a tight-knit, ambitious team that pushes each other to grow and thrive.
We're built differently. We’ve been profitable and bootstrapped since day one—no VC pressures, just smart, sustainable growth.
We take pride in craftsmanship. Whether it's code, design, or delivery, we hold ourselves to a high bar—because the little things shape the big picture.
Growth is part of the job. Through regular one-on-ones, structured feedback, and a clear levelling framework, we support every team member’s growth—not just in technical skills, but in communication, collaboration, and leadership.
AI allowance, your way. Each year, you'll get a dedicated budget to explore AI tools, platforms, and learning resources that boost your productivity and skills. Dive into Pluralsight, PragPub, e-books, and more—wherever your curiosity takes you.
We’ve got your back. From day one, you’ll get private medical insurance, social welfare coverage, and a company care fund.
We invest in your future. We match your monthly Provident Fund contributions to help you build long-term security.
We support your move. If you're joining us from abroad, we’ll take care of your visa, work permit, and provide a relocation package to help you settle in smoothly.
Flexibility that fits. We support a hybrid workstyle, giving you the freedom to find the right rhythm between home and office life.
Work with the right tools. We’ll set you up with a MacBook and a large external monitor so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
A workspace that works for you. Our modern office in the heart of Bangkok (Interchange 21) is steps away from BTS Asoke and MRT Sukhumvit.
Stay fueled. Our kitchen is always stocked with drinks and snacks.
Take the time you need. Enjoy 25 days of paid leave a year (including public holidays), plus a sabbatical month every 3 years.
Celebrate your journey. From anniversary gifts to yearly company outings and spontaneous team activities, we make time for fun and appreciation.
...and more perks to make work feel better.
If you are a passionate product professional looking to make a significant impact in a growing software development company, we would love to hear from you.
Join us in shaping the future by elevating product innovation!
We keep our recruitment process practical and straightforward.
To learn more about how we work, check our handbook named Compass, Github organization, and Medium account.
Want to see what we have built? Check our Dribbble and Behance accounts.
Want to keep in touch with us? Follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
Nimble is an equal opportunity employer.

About Company
Founded in 2008, ThunderSoft is a provider of operating system technologies, superior products and solutions, expert in mobile, IoT, automotive and enterprise. We have more than 25 R&D centers and branch offices all over the world with 13000+ employees.
We are looking for a Project Manager Assistant (Japanese Speaking) to support project execution and coordination between stakeholders. The ideal candidate will play a role in ensuring smooth communication across teams and timely delivery of project milestones. This position requires a proactive, adaptable mindset and strong communication skills in both Japanese and internal team languages (e.g., English or Vietnamese).
Job Description
Act as a bridge between the development team, Project Manager, and Japanese-speaking clients.
Support the coordination of project schedules and progress across different stakeholders.
Assist in synchronizing requirement changes between the client and the development team.
Monitor and report development team progress to the Project Manager and client.
Track project status closely and provide timely risk alerts and mitigation suggestions.
Support issue clarification and resolution with the client, under the guidance of the Project Manager.
Adapt quickly to project-specific processes and actively suggest or take appropriate actions when needed.
Contribute to smooth internal and external communication for efficient project delivery.
Your Skills and Experience
Proficiency in Japanese communication (equivalent to JLPT N2 or above), especially in business contexts.
Excellent communication, organizational, and multitasking skills.
High level of proactiveness, adaptability, and critical thinking.
Ability to work independently while staying aligned with the direction of the Project Manager.
Familiarity with project management tools (e.g., Redmine) is a plus.
Preferred Qualifications:
Experience in IT or software development projects.
Experience working with Japanese clients or in Japanese business environments.
Basic understanding of Agile/Scrum methodology is a plus.
Proven experience or strong capability in project coordination or assistant roles.
Solid understanding of software development workflows and how requirement changes impact the process.
Why You’ll Love Working Here
Attractive salary package with 100% salary on 2 months of probation and annual salary review.
13th month salary.
Full participation in social insurance from the probation period, with 70% of the official salary used as the contribution base.
Allowances: lunch allowance, overtime, on-site working, parking allowance…
Team Building events, marriage cash gift, Lunar Tet cash gift
Up to 18 leave days per year.
Opportunities to travel and work onsite for international projects in the US, EU, Japan, Korea, APAC…etc.
To be key members in Vietnam branch office and get full opportunity for career development.
International, dynamic, friendly working environment
Address:
4th Floor, W1 Office Tower, Vinhomes Westpoint, Do Duc Duc Str., Nam Tu Liem Dist., Hanoi
Website:
https://en.thundersoft.com/
Working time
: 8h30-17h30, from Monday to Friday

1 round (online)

Classmethod Da Nang
is a joint venture between
SupremeTech
and
Classmethod, Inc.
, and serves as Classmethod’s sixth overseas branch.
After years of working together as business partners, SupremeTech and Classmethod decided in 2023 to strengthen their collaboration and jointly tackle business challenges—leading to the establishment of Classmethod Da Nang.
Classmethod, Inc. provides technical consulting services in fields such as
Web Services (AWS), data analytics, mobile development, IoT,
and
AI/machine learning
.

Premier Consulting Partner
by AWS since 2015.
The company has received multiple awards, including:
AWS Services Partner of the Year – Japan (2018, 2020, 2021)
SI Partner of the Year – GLOBAL (2022)
ABOUT SUPREMETECH
SupremeTech is a technology company based in Da Nang, Vietnam, specializing in
web services, video streaming,
and
AI technologies
.
With a strong team of over 170 members who have deep experience in the Japanese software industry, we aim to deliver high-quality products that meet the needs of users around the globe in a rapidly evolving digital world.
ABOUT THIS POSITION
We are seeking a
Business Analyst
who will work closely with clients and internal teams (Project Managers and Engineers) to define and manage product requirements.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
This role is not just about translating client needs into documents. You will be responsible for
bridging the gap
between client expectations and the development team’s understanding. This involves:
Clearly documenting requirements based on client input
Sharing them with the development team in a way that is easy to understand
Facilitating two-way communication between clients and developers
Making thoughtful proposals to ensure the product truly reflects what it should be
You will also play a key role in managing
relationships
, acting as the primary point of contact for the client and representing your team and company professionally.
Even if you don’t have a technical background, you can succeed in this position if you are passionate about
creating great products
through strong collaboration.
Requirement Management
Collaborate with clients and teams to define and refine specifications
Create and manage requirement documents in Japanese or English
Client Management
Build and maintain strong relationships between clients and the team, working toward a shared goal of building great products
QUALIFICATIONS:
Fluent in this bilingual combination:
Vietnamese (native) + Japanese (JLPT N2 or higher).
Good English communication and writing
is a plus.
At least 1+ year of experience
as a Business Analyst or a Project Manager in software development.
Strong logical thinking and communication skills
Team-oriented mindset with respect for others
Flexible and adaptable to various working environments
Proactive mindset—able to think about how both clients and teams can succeed together
Willingness to learn about software development processes and related knowledge
PREFERRED:
Leadership experience involving both clients and development teams
Problem-solving and business proposal skills
Experience as a Project Manager or an Engineer is plus
Experience working with Japanese clients
Experience with Agile development
IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE:
Values
HRT
: Humility, Respect, Trust
Takes ownership of client products and is committed to their success
Enjoys working in a multicultural environment and values diversity
Has a continuous learning mindset
Shares the vision and approach of modern offshore development

Competitive salary range up to 27M VND Gross
13-month salary and bonus
Biannual performance reviews and salary adjustments
Opportunities for promotion

PTI health insurance

Monthly team-building allowance

12 days of annual paid leave in addition to Vietnamese national holidays

MacBook provided for work purposes

job_description:
You’ll do
Communicate with customers via live chat platform to help them get familiar with the product or provide them with the appropriate document to include in conversations.
Listen to customers and work with technical staff to figure out what their issues exactly are and solve them as soon as possible.
Educate and empower our customers to become better users of the product.
Thrive on providing support through many different channels of communication, including email, chat, ticket and social media such as Facebook Group.
Collaborate with technical staff to learn the product and support the customers to use it effectively.
Proactively provide feedback to internal teams that help to improve our products and create a better customer experience
Maintain excellent knowledge of our products and services in order to understand the customer’s needs.
Other duties as assigned by manager
Working time (UTC+7): Sunday to Thursday (01:00 PM - 10:00 PM); Tuesday to Saturday (01:00 PM - 10:00 PM) or Monday to Friday (01:00PM - 10:00 PM)
You Have…
Minimum of 1 year of experience in Customer Success.
Proficiency in English at a B2 level (CEFR) or equivalent to IELTS 6.0 - 6.5.
Experience with Shopify is preferred, particularly in relation to page builder products or similar tools within SaaS/E-commerce.
Basic technical knowledge is a plus.
Strong customer service mindset and skillset, with the ability to effectively manage and de-escalate difficult, urgent, or critical customer situations while prioritizing varying levels of customer support.
Exceptional interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships across diverse personality types.
Competence in evaluating, troubleshooting, and resolving customer issues, including the ability to replicate and document cases for escalation.
Ability to perform effectively under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
We offer
Salary range: upto 18MIL
Able to work remotely
Performance review: 2 times per year.
Yearly Salary Package: 13th-month salary bonus + Performance bonus: up to 3 months.
Lunch meal + Parking fees provided (if any).
12 annual leaves/ year.
Bonus on birthday, 30/4&1/5, 2/9.
Social insurance & Health insurance for team members.
Annual Health Checkup at the top clinic in Vietnam.
Weekly shoulder massage treatment (if any)
Annual team building: summer trip, many indoor and outdoor activities such as soccer club, swimming club, cycling club…

About Us
Originating from Vietnam, VinFast is committed to the vision of becoming a global smart EV brand. VinFast has laid the foundation for the electric car and motorbike industry in Vietnam while passionately promoting the worldwide EV revolution.
With its Customer-First philosophy, VinFast relentlessly innovates and converges intellectual fundamentals in creating best-in-class products with the most affordable prices and outstanding after-sales services. In addition, VinFast provides everybody with the opportunity to use smart EVs while contributing to the creation of a smart, green, and sustainable future.
Scope of Role
As a Lead of Vehicle computer integration engineer, you will be responsible for design, product development specification and functional requirements at component level of Vehicle Control Unit, Central Vehicle Computer for different markets and verify them.
Dimension of Function
This position would be working within the Engineering Research and Development area and specifically on Vehicle Programmes. The position requires a highly motivated person and team player who understand system requirements throughout the Electrified Powertrain.
Area of Responsibility
You will manage technical deliverables, planning, reporting on progress and providing expert knowledge. Ensuring on time delivery and working to the highest standards possible. This will involve working across technical specialists, adopting new processes and acting as the main point of contact for your specialist area. Technical ownership is expected for the following regions
HV Distribution systems and LV power management
EV Powertrain interfaces and Systems and Energy Conversion
ISO15118 and other relevant charging standards
ISO26262 processes
Responsible Engineering deliverables for the commodity development including:
Design reviews,
Requirements definition/management
Generate test plans and supplier test plan reviews for Power electronics and Charging
Involvement in systems FMEA’s and management of supplier DFMEA
System and component feature and SW implementation planning
Develop the System Design Specifications & the Statements of Work for all projects within portfolio.
Validate that all products meet the specification requirements and project targets through a documented DVP
Ensure all requirements are captured and monitored against test results.
Assess VCU strategies, develop and propose improvements.
You will support the technical discussions to deliver robust fault free designs through the application of Concurrent Engineering disciplines including DFMEA, DFA, DFM, Campaign Prevention Process, Robustness, etc.
Agree and sign off the component requirements with different stakeholders for each domain
Involvement during vehicle system architecture and strategy discussions to meet vehicle requirements and ensure all functional safety requirements are captured
Requirements
Knowledge / Experience
Strong organizational skills with a good track record of delivering projects on time.It is core to the success of our business that a candidate is motivated to succeed, proactive and accountable and is unafraid to make decisions based on the facts available.
Working experience with Standards like ISO 15118, SAE J1772, ISO 26262, GBTs etc.
Documentation of DFMEA, DVP, Timing Plans, Minutes and Actions of Meetings.
Automotive development processes
Previous experience of OEM or tier one automotive systems.
Experience using DOORS Systems or any other platform to manage system/components requirements.
Strong track record of delivering significant high value business and delivering to very tight timescales
Driven to delivering high quality projects, on time and budget, beyond customer expectations.
Essential
Degree in Electronics/Electrical, Mechatronics, Software or Automotive Engineering.
Able to anticipate, translate and develop customer requirements into tangible feature developments
Expertise in automotive toolchains including Diagnostic Tools, Vector Tools, CANalyzer and CANoe etc.
Expertise in communication protocols such as CAN/LIN/Flexray etc.
Experience with EE Architecture and the thermal management (component/system).
Understanding of Vehicle system elements (VCU, OBC, BMS and PDU etc.)
Able to participate in actively system FMEAs and related validation activities.
Ability to build relationships and influence customers
Competences
Good collaboration skills with globally diverse team members.
Good technical skills related to Powertrain components (VCU, OBC, DCDC, EDS…), EV power conversion and Charging systems.
Problem solving, analysis and decision making – able to quickly evaluate the pros and cons in order to reach the most appropriate technical solution.
Innovation - take a creative approach to forming new product features.
Capable of successfully delivering multiple projects and multiple project streams.
Focus on Quality – uses quality processes to develop robust solutions and minimise defects.
Drive for Results - Demonstrates and fosters a sense of urgency and strong commitment to achieving goals.

Competitive salary
Premium healthcare package, including PVI insurance & annual health check-ups
13th-month salary & performance bonuses to reward your contributions
Enjoy preferential pricing for services within the Vingroup ecosystem including Vinmec, Vinpearl, and Vinschool...
