job_description:
Job Title:
Python Game Developer (Panda3D)
Job Type:
Contract
Location:
Remote
Job Summary
Join our customer's team as an expert Pyhton Game Developer (Panda3D), where you’ll contribute to cutting-edge AI training projects using one of the most robust and flexible open-source game engines. This specialized role focuses on harnessing Panda3D’s capabilities to deliver immersive, high-performance simulations compatible with both legacy and contemporary hardware.
Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and optimize 3D game simulations and environments using Panda3D for AI training applications.
Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to transform requirements into technical solutions.
Implement, maintain, and debug Python and C++ codebases integrated with Panda3D.
Contribute to version control workflows using GitHub to ensure smooth project collaboration.
Ensure cross-platform compatibility and performance across diverse hardware configurations.
Document architectural decisions, code, and processes clearly to support collaborative development.
Actively participate in code reviews, brainstorming sessions, and team meetings, emphasizing exceptional verbal and written communication.
Required Skills And Qualifications
Proven, hands-on experience developing with Panda3D—experience with similar engines does not substitute.
Advanced proficiency in Python and C++ programming languages.
Strong command of GitHub for code management, branching, and pull requests.
Deep understanding of 3D graphics pipelines, simulation logic, and cross-platform development.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills—clear documentation and collaboration are critical.
Ability to work independently in a remote environment, meeting deadlines with minimal supervision.
Demonstrated attention to detail and a problem-solving mindset.
Preferred Qualifications
Prior game development experience for AI, simulation, or training purposes.
Familiarity with optimizing 3D assets for performance across a range of hardware.
Background in collaborative, distributed Agile environments.

Job Responsibilities
1. Lead the definition of cybersecurity requirements & conceptual design for automotive products.
2. Collaborate with system managers to propose system-level cybersecurity technical solutions. 3. Formulate cybersecurity strategies and participate in HW/SW cybersecurity architecture design & review.
4. Embed cybersecurity requirements into Agile development and relevant extension activities. 5. Ensure project compliance with ISO 21434, complete full-lifecycle cybersecurity risk demonstration; guarantee compliance with ICTS specifications.
6. Provide cybersecurity guidance and coordination for customers and suppliers.
7. Conduct technical research in OS security, AD security, embedded security, in-vehicle/external network security, fuzzing, penetration testing, privacy protection, ECU security reinforcement, etc.
Qualifications
1. Bachelor or above in Engineering; 3+ years in network architecture / penetration testing / secure SDLC / end-to-end security engineering; fluent oral English for cross-border communication.
2. Familiar with ISO 21434, WP29 CSMS; familiar with ISO 9001/27001/31000, GDPR, A‑SPICE; practical experience in TARA / STRIDE / HEAVENS analysis is preferred.
3. Familiar with CAN/LIN/FlexRay/Ethernet automotive protocols is preferred.
4. Knowledge in Android / Linux / QNX / AUTOSAR OS security is preferred.
5. Proficient in software security: secure development, reverse engineering, vulnerability management is preferred.
6. Hands-on experience with IDPS, firewall, HSM/TPM/TrustZone security modules is preferred. 7. Mastery of encryption technologies (PKI, TLS, IPSec) is preferred.
8. Practical penetration testing and fuzzing capability is preferred.
9. Embedded development or functional safety working experience is a plus.
10. CISSP certification, CTF awards, SRC vulnerability research & public submission experience are strong advantages.

Salary:
2000 - 3000$ Net
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Thu thập và phân tích yêu cầu từ các bộ phận liên quan, xác định các cơ hội cải tiến hệ thống phần mềm để đáp ứng chiến lược kinh doanh dài hạn và mục tiêu của doanh nghiệp.
Viết tài liệu SRS (System Requirement Specification) chi tiết, rõ ràng và chính xác, đảm bảo tất cả các yêu cầu hệ thống được hiểu rõ và đáp ứng đúng kỳ vọng của khách hàng.
Chịu trách nhiệm thiết kế và vẽ sơ đồ quy trình kinh doanh (BPMN) và các diagram khác như Use Case, Activity Diagram, để mô tả yêu cầu và quy trình làm việc, đảm bảo tính minh bạch và dễ hiểu cho các bên liên quan.
Lãnh đạo và tham gia vào quá trình phát triển dự án theo mô hình Scrum Agile, phối hợp chặt chẽ với đội ngũ phát triển (DEV), đảm bảo rằng các tính năng và sản phẩm đáp ứng đầy đủ yêu cầu kinh doanh.
Chịu trách nhiệm giám sát và cải tiến quy trình kiểm thử phần mềm, viết và duyệt các test case phức tạp, đảm bảo chất lượng phần mềm và tính khả dụng của sản phẩm cuối cùng.
Đưa ra chiến lược phân tích yêu cầu, lập kế hoạch và điều phối các hoạt động trong dự án, đảm bảo tiến độ, chất lượng và tuân thủ ngân sách.
Chủ động dẫn dắt các sáng kiến UI/UX, làm việc với các nhóm thiết kế để đảm bảo giao diện người dùng trực quan, dễ sử dụng và tối ưu hóa trải nghiệm người dùng.
Đảm bảo tính liên tục và phát triển bền vững của hệ thống, đưa ra các khuyến nghị cải tiến, giúp hệ thống phát triển và thích nghi với nhu cầu thay đổi của doanh nghiệp.
YÊU CẦU
Có ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Business Analyst, có hiểu biết sâu sắc về quy trình phát triển phần mềm và quản lý dự án.
Kiến thức vững vàng về phát triển phần mềm (DEV), có khả năng trao đổi, đàm phán và làm việc hiệu quả với các lập trình viên để làm rõ yêu cầu kỹ thuật và tìm kiếm các giải pháp phù hợp.
Kinh nghiệm sâu sắc trong việc viết tài liệu SRS, bảo đảm tính chính xác và dễ hiểu cho các bộ phận liên quan.
Kỹ năng thiết kế và vẽ các sơ đồ quy trình BPMN, Use Case, Activity Diagram và các diagram khác, có khả năng truyền đạt các quy trình phức tạp một cách dễ hiểu.
Kiến thức sâu rộng về mô hình Scrum Agile, có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong các dự án Agile với vai trò là BA.
Kỹ năng kiểm thử phần mềm xuất sắc, có khả năng viết, duyệt test case và đảm bảo sản phẩm đạt chất lượng cao nhất.
Khả năng lãnh đạo và quản lý dự án, khả năng phối hợp và thúc đẩy các nhóm làm việc để đạt được mục tiêu chung.
Tư duy logic và phân tích mạnh mẽ, có khả năng nhận diện và giải quyết các vấn đề phức tạp.
Hiểu biết sâu về UI/UX, khả năng đưa ra các đề xuất cải tiến để nâng cao trải nghiệm người dùng.

job_title: [HCM] Solutions Architect I AI Computer Vision (Up to 90M)
job_description:
SOLUTION ARCHITECT
(AI Computer Vision Platform - Real-time Streaming)
Văn phòng làm việc:
Tầng 2, Tòa nhà An Cư Đức Phú, 7/1 đường Thành Thái, Phường Diên Hồng, TP. HCM.
Hình thức làm việc:
Full-time (On-site).
Thời gian làm việc:
Thứ 2 - Thứ 6 (9h00 – 18h00), nghỉ trưa 1 tiếng.
Mức lương:
Thỏa thuận theo năng lực, mức sẽ không thấp hơn thị trường. RainScales đang phát triển nền tảng AI kết nối hàng nghìn camera nhằm giám sát an toàn và an ninh. Mỗi thiết bị Edge được triển khai tại địa điểm của khách hàng đều cần thực hiện xử lý AI trực tiếp trên các camera.
TÓM TẮT CÔNG VIỆC:
Solution Architect sẽ chịu trách nhiệm thiết kế, giám sát và tối ưu hóa kiến trúc End-to-End cho nền tảng
EME
(Enterprise Multi-Environment) AI Computer Vision.
Nền tảng này xử lý
hàng nghìn luồng video real-time
từ nhiều môi trường khác nhau (Nhà hàng, Bệnh viện, Trường học, Warehouse) để phát hiện và cảnh báo các vấn đề về An toàn (Safety) và An ninh (Security).
Vị trí này đòi hỏi khả năng chuyển đổi các mô hình AI/ML thành các giải pháp triển khai
C/C++ real-time
hiệu suất cao trên nền tảng
NVIDIA DeepStream
.
TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH:
1, Thiết Kế Kiến Trúc Hệ Thống (High-Level Design):
● Thiết kế và tối ưu hóa kiến trúc xử lý luồng video real-time (Video Ingestion, Decoding, Inference, Data Outgestion) cho hệ thống kết nối đến hàng nghìn camera (quy mô Enterprise).
● Đảm bảo tính Scalability (Khả năng mở rộng), High Availability (Tính sẵn sàng cao) và Low Latency (Độ trễ thấp) cho toàn bộ nền tảng.
2, Tối Ưu Hóa Real-time và DeepStream:
● Chuyển đổi các pipeline AI/ML (Python/PyTorch/TensorFlow) sang triển khai C/C++ hiệu suất cao, tận dụng tối đa thư viện NVIDIA DeepStream SDK và TensorRT.
● Phân tích và giải quyết các nút thắt cổ chai (bottlenecks) liên quan đến I/O, Decoding, Batching, và GPU utilization trong môi trường đa luồng (multi stream).
● Giải quyết triệt để các vấn đề về mất luồng RTSP, stalling, và back pressure bằng cách thiết lập các cơ chế Fast-Batching/Timeout trong DeepStream (nvstreammux).
3, MLOps và Deployment:
● Thiết kế MLOps pipeline cho việc triển khai, cập nhật và giám sát hàng loạt mô hình AI (YOLOv8, ResNet, v.v.) lên môi trường Edge/On-premise.
● Định nghĩa luồng dữ liệu (Data Flow) và tích hợp với các hệ thống Message Broker (như Kafka/MQTT) để gửi kết quả cảnh báo real-time.
4, Lãnh đạo Kỹ thuật:
● Đánh giá và đề xuất các công nghệ phần cứng (GPU, CPU, NIC) phù hợp với yêu cầu xử lý của nền tảng EME (ví dụ: NVIDIA RTX/Tesla/Jetson series).
YÊU CẦU BẮT BUỘC (MUST-HAVE SKILLS):
● Kiến Trúc Hệ Thống:
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế thiết kế và triển khai các hệ thống xử lý luồng video real-time (Real-time Streaming Processing) ở quy mô lớn (hàng trăm/nghìn luồng).
● Ngôn Ngữ Lập Trình:
Thành thạo C/C++ (ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm) với khả năng viết code hiệu suất cao, đa luồng (Multi-threading), và kiến trúc Zero-Copy.
●
NVIDIA DeepStream:
Kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu với NVIDIA DeepStream SDK (hoặc các framework tương đương như GStreamer, FFmpeg/libav) để xây dựng pipeline xử lý video tăng tốc GPU.
●
Xử lý AI/CV:
❖ Am hiểu sâu sắc về kiến trúc và tối ưu hóa các mô hình Computer Vision (Detection, Classification, Tracking) như YOLO, ResNet, SSD.
❖ Kinh nghiệm làm việc với NVIDIA TensorRT và các kỹ thuật tối ưu hóa mô hình (FP16/INT8 Quantization).
●
Streaming & Mạng:
Hiểu biết vững chắc về các giao thức streaming video (RTSP, RTMP, WebRTC) và các vấn đề về mạng/buffer liên quan đến độ trễ.
● Hệ điều hành: Kinh nghiệm làm việc mạnh mẽ trong môi trường Linux.
YÊU CẦU ƯU TIÊN (NICE-TO-HAVE SKILLS):
● Kinh nghiệm với Kubernetes/Docker để quản lý và triển khai các workload AI/CV.
● Kinh nghiệm với các Message Broker như Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, hoặc các dịch vụ tương đương trên Cloud (AWS Kinesis, Google Pub/Sub).
● Kiến thức về các nền tảng GPU thế hệ mới (RTX 4090, 5090, L40) và cách tối ưu hóa kiến trúc cho chúng.
● Kinh nghiệm triển khai MLOps cho Edge Device là 1 lợi thế (ví dụ: NVIDIA Orin,…).
YÊU CẦU HỌC VẤN & KINH NGHIỆM:
● Tốt nghiệp Đại học/Sau Đại học chuyên ngành Khoa học Máy tính, Kỹ thuật Phần mềm, hoặc các lĩnh vực liên quan.
● Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực Software Architecture.
● Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm về DeepStream.
● Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trực tiếp với các dự án Computer Vision/Video Analytics real-time.
PHÚC LỢI & ĐÃI NGỘ:
● Mức lương thương lượng dựa theo năng lực, không thấp hơn thị trường.
● Đóng bảo hiểm xã hội full lương từ lúc bắt đầu thử việc
● Hưởng thêm chế độ bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân.
● Hưởng đầy đủ 12 ngày phép/năm, ngày nghỉ lễ, Tết theo quy định của Luật Lao động Việt Nam.
● Thăm khám sức khỏe 1 lần/năm.
● Đánh giá Performance Review ít nhất 1 lần/năm.
● Cung cấp thiết bị làm việc tại văn phòng (Laptop).
● Hưởng lương tháng 13 đầy đủ.
● Đầy đủ các hoạt động sự kiện hàng năm: Company trip, YEP, Team Building, Trung Thu, Ngày Quốc tế Phụ nữ, Ngày Quốc tế Đàn ông, Noel, Tết và nhiều hoạt động khác.
● Hoạt động thể thao: Câu lạc bộ Bóng đá, Cầu lông, Pickleball.
● Hoạt động thiện nguyện vì cộng đồng.
● Môi trường làm việc mở và linh hoạt, đồng nghiệp năng động, nhiệt huyết và trẻ trung.
● Môi trường startup sáng tạo, linh hoạt với nhiều cơ hội phát triển chuyên môn và mở rộng vai trò.
�

job_description:
Who We Are
SEADEV
is a product company that delivers
effective, affordable sales and digital marketing solutions
to our clients. We measure our success not only in terms of profit, but also in terms of global spiritual impact. As a company, we seek to care for our team members and bring transformation to lives in our community. Over the next 10 years we are laser focused on achieving our targets of growing our business 10-fold, supporting over 500 jobs in 10 developing markets, while positively transforming the communities we work within by giving financially and volunteering our time.
Job Overview
The
C# Developer
will join the
ShedPro
team and report directly to the Product Manager.
ShedPro
(https://shedpro.co/) is Seadev's core product, focused on building effective sales and digital marketing solutions that help shed and carport businesses grow in the North American market.
In this role, you will maintain and enhance ShedPro's Sales and Operations Hub (Ops Hub), a web-based platform that supports quoting, sales orders, Rent-to-Own (RTO) contracts, production tracking, and delivery scheduling.
We are looking for a developer who
thinks beyond tasks and features
, takes time to
understand the business needs
behind the product, and partners closely with the Product Manager to deliver real solutions. You will be responsible for
writing clean, testable
, and
well-structured code
, using solid architectural patterns to ensure the system remains
stable
and
scalable
as it grows. This role also requires the ability to
learn quickly
and adapt to new tools and technologies as the product evolves.
This in-house position involves taking over development from our current US-based partner, leading new feature development, and ensuring strong performance, quality, and long-term maintainability of the Ops Hub.
Requirements
Proficient in C# and the .NET framework (including .NET Core) with a minimum of 3 years of professional experience
Strong experience in web application development, including ASP.NET MVC and/or Web API
Experience with Amazon Web Services and/or other cloud services
Knowledge of frontend technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, or Vue.js) is a plus
Experience in implementing design patterns and applying effective refactoring techniques
A mindset focused on writing readable, maintainable, and well-structured code
Proficient in using Git for version control
Familiarity with Agile software development practices
Solid understanding of RESTful API design principles
Experience with writing unit tests is a plus
English is a plus

Mô tả công việc
IPAG đang tìm kiếm một Business Analyst thế hệ mới - người sẽ vượt ra khỏi vai trò BA truyền thống để trở thành cầu nối giữa dữ liệu, công nghệ và chiến lược kinh doanh. Trong kỷ nguyên số hóa và AI, bạn sẽ không chỉ phân tích vấn đề mà còn chủ động thiết kế giải pháp, tự động hóa quy trình và dẫn dắt chuyển đổi số cho doanh nghiệp.
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Data Intelligence & Automation (40%)
Xây dựng và triển khai hệ thống phân tích dữ liệu tự động, sử dụng AI để phát hiện xu hướng và cơ hội kinh doanh.
Thiết kế và triển khai các dashboard thông minh cung cấp insights theo thời gian thực cho các bên liên quan.
Tự động hóa quy trình thu thập, xử lý và phân tích dữ liệu từ nhiều nguồn.
Phát triển các mô hình dự báo và phân tích kịch bản để hỗ trợ ra quyết định.
Tích hợp các công cụ phân tích dữ liệu và AI vào quy trình kinh doanh hiện tại.
Solution Architecture (30%)
Thiết kế giải pháp kinh doanh và công nghệ end-to-end dựa trên insights từ dữ liệu.
Xây dựng và tối ưu hóa customer journey maps và business process models.
Phát triển các prototype và proof-of-concept để kiểm chứng giải pháp.
Đánh giá và tư vấn về các công nghệ mới phù hợp với chiến lược kinh doanh.
Thiết kế hệ thống đo lường hiệu quả và ROI cho các giải pháp được triển khai.
Strategic Business Transformation (30%)
Dẫn dắt các sáng kiến chuyển đổi số và đổi mới quy trình kinh doanh.
Làm việc với các bên liên quan để xác định cơ hội cải tiến và tối ưu hóa.
Phát triển roadmap chuyển đổi từ trạng thái hiện tại đến trạng thái mục tiêu.
Tư vấn cho ban lãnh đạo về xu hướng công nghệ và tác động đến mô hình kinh doanh.
Xây dựng và triển khai các chương trình đào tạo để nâng cao năng lực số trong tổ chức.
Yêu cầu công việc
Trình độ học vấn/Chứng chỉ
Bằng cử nhân trở lên trong lĩnh vực Công nghệ thông tin, Phân tích kinh doanh, Khoa học dữ liệu hoặc các ngành liên quan.
Các chứng chỉ về Data Science, Business Analysis, Project Management là lợi thế.
Kinh nghiệm làm việc
Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực phân tích kinh doanh hoặc tư vấn.
Kiến thức sâu rộng về phân tích dữ liệu, machine learning và các công cụ BI.
Kỹ năng lập trình thành thạo với ít nhất một ngôn ngữ (Python, R, SQL).
Kinh nghiệm với các công cụ tự động hóa quy trình và low-code/no-code platforms.
Hiểu biết sâu sắc về thiết kế quy trình kinh doanh và quản lý thay đổi.
Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các phương pháp Agile và Design Thinking.
Phẩm chất cá nhân
Tư duy hệ thống và khả năng giải quyết vấn đề phức tạp.
Khả năng chuyển đổi giữa tư duy chiến lược và thực thi chi tiết.
Có sự sáng tạo và khả năng đổi mới trong cách tiếp cận vấn đề.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp xuất sắc và khả năng truyền đạt ý tưởng phức tạp một cách đơn giản.
Tư duy phản biện và khả năng thách thức hiện trạng.
CHÚNG TÔI CUNG CẤP
Cơ hội định hình tương lai của ngành phân tích kinh doanh.
Môi trường làm việc đổi mới, khuyến khích thử nghiệm và học hỏi liên tục.
Tiếp cận với các công nghệ và công cụ phân tích dữ liệu tiên tiến nhất.
Cơ hội làm việc với các dự án đa dạng và có tác động lớn.
Chế độ đãi ngộ cạnh tranh tương xứng với năng lực.
Văn hóa công ty cởi mở, tôn trọng ý kiến và khuyến khích sáng kiến.
ĐIỂM KHÁC BIỆT CỦA SDE NEXT - GEN TẠI IPAG
Không chỉ phân tích mà còn thiết kế giải pháp: Bạn sẽ không dừng lại ở việc phân tích yêu cầu mà còn chủ động thiết kế và triển khai giải pháp.
Kết hợp giữa BA và Data Scientist: Vị trí này yêu cầu khả năng khai thác dữ liệu chuyên sâu kết hợp với hiểu biết kinh doanh.
Tự động hóa phân tích: Bạn sẽ xây dựng các hệ thống phân tích tự động thay vì thực hiện phân tích thủ công.
Dẫn dắt thay đổi: Không chỉ đáp ứng yêu cầu, bạn sẽ chủ động đề xuất và dẫn dắt các sáng kiến chuyển đổi số.
Job tags: Business Analyst Next-Gen

Summary
Imagine what you could do here! At Apple, new ideas have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish.
The people here at Apple don’t just build products — they create the kind of wonder that’s revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts. Join Apple, you will help us leave the world better than we found it.
Description
In this highly visible role, you will manage selection, implementation & optimization of manufacturing processes for mechanical enclosure subassemblies for our legendary products.
You will utilize your Mechanical Engineering experience and work cross functionally with Product Design Engineering and Industrial Design to assess product features for manufacturability, and recommend capable production processes and equipment.
Collaborate with MDEs counterpart in the development of mechanical processes.
Collaborate with Global Supply Managers to develop new equipment from RFQ through factory implementation, and manufacture and deliver material to downstream supply chain nodes on time and on cost.
You will work with Mechanical Quality Engineers to drive yield improvement through analyses of part quality, defect Pareto, and SPC.
A heavy emphasis will be on working with suppliers to define and refine mechanical tooling and fixtures, and establishing process capability and readiness.
Coordination of activities and direction through clear communication between the Asia and US-based teams, and vendors is a necessity.
You may audit supplier secondary processes as well as support product phase builds from prototype through ramp and mass production.
Provide leadership at manufacturing sites during development and product production ramp, and drive engineering issues to resolution
Use data to drive process decisions, basic data analysis, DOEs, SPC, etc.
Design best-in-class process based on cosmetic and drawing requirement, mapping out and document process flow and details which includes selecting processing equipments, designing fixtures/automations, initiating DOEs to find out the best process and parameters, and finalizing the process solution from prototype stage to mass production stage.
Define part tolerance and specifications by demonstrating process capability to Product Designers and Industrial Designers. Lead process development/have expertise in assembly - develop automation/fixture for assembly, bonding process (glue, welding), laser process(welding/cutting/etch/surface treatment) etc. Own yield improvement actions and process change decisions based on statistical process control (SPC) data analysis.
Identify, research, develop, and qualify premier equipment manufacturers and suppliers.
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelor degree in Mechanical, Manufacturing or Industry Engineering.
Fluent in English as a working language (verbal and written).
Preferred Qualifications
Master, Ph. D or oversea education background is a plus, proven track record of outstanding academic performances is preferred.
Cross disciplinary knowledges like mechatronics, control theory, coding and machine learning are considered plus.
A standout teammate and self starter with innovation, integrity and attention to details.
Ability to work on manufacturing sites independently and willingness on over 50% travel frequently (mainly in Asia).

Eastspring is a global asset manager with Asia at its core. We create a culture in which diversity is celebrated and inclusion assured, for our colleagues, customers, and partners. Job Summary
Operations & Performance Analytics Manager will be responsible for the oversight, processing & settlement of all fund/portfolio transactions made in the organization. Dealing with internal and external clients to manage all matters related to Operations and Performance functions within expectation of the company’s best interest.
Key Accountabilities
Operations
Maintaining and developing operational policies, procedures and processes to ensure accurate and timely production of fund operations, fund admin, fund accounting & settlement.
Addressing errors immediately and offering solutions to ensure effective day to day delivery.
Cash Management & Back Office Support
Overseeing portfolio cash and securities management to ensure all investment transactions are timely and correctly executed.
Executing in collaboration with the back-office functions including Legal & Compliance, Sales & Marketing, IT…
Managing ad-hoc projects and implementation of new systems.
Regulatory and Client Reporting
Establishing & maintaining client reports on reporting tools.
Providing regular reports to Clients & Regional Management Team with key information and insight into contribution matters.
Portfolio Performance & Attribution Analytics
Maintaining, configuring and validating performance attribution setup and outputs across various asset classes to ensure accurate performance results.
Measuring performance attribution against benchmark & MIS.
Evaluating portfolio activities over a performance period.
Operational Risk Management
Assessing risk against historical data & operational activities.
Supporting Risk Manager regarding to implementing risk framework and policies.
Providing effective auditing of fund transactions, controls, and operations of the finance organization.
Qualifications And Experience
At least 10 years of experience in fund operations within financial services or asset management.
Strong knowledge of asset management processes.
A comprehensive knowledge of investment products and performance measurement techniques particularly around equity and fixed income attribution solutions.
Proven quantitative skills with the ability to maintain, calibrate and validate performance attribution methodologies and outputs across various asset classes.
Experience with program administration, project management and information systems technology.
Executive level communication skills in both English & Vietnamese.
Possessing a Bachelor’s degree (Mater degree is preferable) from an accredited college and/or university (preferably in Business Management, Finance, or Accounting)

- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills when working with Product, IT, and business teams

Ít nhất 02 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí quản lý sales và marketing kênh MT/ GT withaAt least 02 years of experiences in the sales and Marketing / Sales operation management for MT /GT Channel
Kỹ năng phân tích số liệu bán hàng / sales data analyzing skill
Tiếng Anh giao tiếp B hoặc trở lên/ English Communication B or over
Kỹ năng hoạch định/ Planning skills
Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề/ Problem solving skills
Quyền Lợi
Negotiable salary (13 gross -16 gross)
13th-month salary bonus;
Salary review yearly;
Insurance following the Labor Law;
Time:
8 AM - 5 PM. Monday morning Saturday
Location:
18A Nguyen Huu Tho street, Phuoc Kien ward, Nha Be town, Ho Chi Minh City.

Summary
Imagine what you could do here! At Apple, new ideas have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish.
The people here at Apple don’t just build products — they create the kind of wonder that’s revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts. Join Apple, you will help us leave the world better than we found it.
Description
In this highly visible role, you will manage selection, implementation & optimization of manufacturing processes for mechanical enclosure subassemblies for our legendary products.
You will utilize your Mechanical Engineering experience and work cross functionally with Product Design Engineering and Industrial Design to assess product features for manufacturability, and recommend capable production processes and equipment.
Collaborate with MDEs counterpart in the development of mechanical processes.
Collaborate with Global Supply Managers to develop new equipment from RFQ through factory implementation, and manufacture and deliver material to downstream supply chain nodes on time and on cost.
You will work with Mechanical Quality Engineers to drive yield improvement through analyses of part quality, defect Pareto, and SPC.
A heavy emphasis will be on working with suppliers to define and refine mechanical tooling and fixtures, and establishing process capability and readiness.
Coordination of activities and direction through clear communication between the Asia and US-based teams, and vendors is a necessity.
You may audit supplier secondary processes as well as support product phase builds from prototype through ramp and mass production.
Provide leadership at manufacturing sites during development and product production ramp, and drive engineering issues to resolution
Use data to drive process decisions, basic data analysis, DOEs, SPC, etc.
Design best-in-class process based on cosmetic and drawing requirement, mapping out and document process flow and details which includes selecting processing equipments, designing fixtures/automations, initiating DOEs to find out the best process and parameters, and finalizing the process solution from prototype stage to mass production stage.
Define part tolerance and specifications by demonstrating process capability to Product Designers and Industrial Designers. Lead process development/have expertise in assembly - develop automation/fixture for assembly, bonding process (glue, welding), laser process(welding/cutting/etch/surface treatment) etc. Own yield improvement actions and process change decisions based on statistical process control (SPC) data analysis.
Identify, research, develop, and qualify premier equipment manufacturers and suppliers.
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelor degree in Mechanical, Manufacturing or Industry Engineering.
Fluent in English as a working language (verbal and written).
Preferred Qualifications
Master, Ph. D or oversea education background is a plus, proven track record of outstanding academic performances is preferred.
Cross disciplinary knowledges like mechatronics, control theory, coding and machine learning are considered plus.
A standout teammate and self starter with innovation, integrity and attention to details.
Ability to work on manufacturing sites independently and willingness on over 50% travel frequently (mainly in Asia).

Cơ hội được làm việc tại Công ty tiên phong mở đường trong lĩnh vực ATTT tại Việt Nam.

to join our team and play a crucial role in supporting our engineering and business operations. The ideal candidate will be responsible for the implementation of tools and processes which enable rapid development and deployment of software.
Your mission is to embrace continuous integration/deployment in a delivery pipeline that will perform automated quality checks, deploy cloud infrastructure and applications quickly, and provide operational tooling and metrics that can be consumed by development teams. To be successful, you will have a blend of development experience and operational experience that provides a good understanding of the developers you are working with, while also balancing critical systems uptime.

Experience with CI/CD tools (such as Jenkins, TeamCity, AWS CodePipeline, CodeDeploy) or configuration management tools (such as Ansible, Chef, Puppet..)
Familiarity with at least one programming language (Python, Bash, etc.)
Knowledge of networking, firewalls, load balancers, high availability, etc.
Good skills in English and the ability to communicate effectively with business and technical teams
Demonstrate good logical thinking and problem-solving skills
Be curious and self-learning attitude
Experience in SDLC and Agile methodologies
Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Experience in the banking or finance industry
AWS certification(s) related to Advanced Networking
AWS Certified DevOps Engineer - Professional

job_description:
Job Purpose:
Creative Manager plays a pivotal role in overseeing and fostering creativity within a team and Lien A organization and involves setting a vision, providing strategic direction, and ensuring alignment with the Lien A's goals.
Be is responsible for guiding and inspiring creative professionals, such as Graphic Designers, Photos, and Video Creators, to produce innovative and impactful work.
Collaborate with different departments to understand project requirements, deadlines, and constraints, balancing creative freedom with practical considerations.
Nurture a supportive and collaborative work environment, encouraging brainstorming sessions and facilitating the exchange of ideas.
Responsibilities:
DEFINE THE VISION:
Have a clear and compelling vision for each project, based on the stakeholder's brief, the target audience, the market trends, and the brand identity.
Translate this vision into a creative strategy and a brief for their team, outlining the objectives, requirements, expectations, and guidelines for the project.
LEADING THE TEAM:
Recruit, train, motivate, and mentor his/ her team members, ensuring that they have the skills, tools, and resources they need to perform their best.
Assign roles and responsibilities, delegate tasks, monitor progress, provide feedback, and resolve conflicts.
MANAGE THE PROCESS:
Oversee the entire creative process, from ideation to execution to evaluation.
Plan and schedule the project, set deadlines and milestones, track and report on the status, and ensure that the project meets the quality standards and the client's expectations.
Ensure that the creative work complies with the legal, ethical, and technical requirements.
DELIVER RESULTS
Deliver the final creative work to the stakeholder, ensuring that it meets their satisfaction and achieves their goals.
Showcase the work, explain the rationale, highlight the benefits, and answer any questions or concerns.
Collect and analyze the feedback and the results of the project, measuring its impact, effectiveness, and return on investment.
STAY UPDATED
Keep up with the latest trends, technologies, tools, and best practices in the creative industry.
Do research and explore new ideas, methods, and solutions that can enhance his/ her work and give him/ her a competitive edge.
Requirements
:
At least 3 years of experience in a creative management role preferred
Bachelor’s degree in a related field (e.g., Graphic Design, Marketing, Communications).
Strong portfolio showcasing creative projects and campaigns.
Creative experience in an advertising agency is a must
Knowledge in UI/UX design
Proficiency in relevant creative software and tools.
Be able to execute concepts to a visual standard for stakeholders’ presentations
Understanding of brand, product, digital media, and how people interact with each of them
Proven ability to manage and organize multiple tasks and meet deadlines
Knowledge of current industry trends and emerging technologies.
Strong organizational and problem-solving skills
Work Location
: 181 Nguyen Van Troi St., Phu Nhuan Ward, HCMC
﻿
Working hours
: 8am – 5:30pm, Monday- Friday

job_description:
Please visit this Google Careers posting for the Vietnamese-translated version of this role.
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
5 years of experience in digital media, sales, marketing, or product roles.
Experience identifying and recommending ways to improve product and customer strategy.
Preferred qualifications:
Experience working in Southeast Asia markets, in mobile app or mobile ads business across casual gaming, e-commerce, travel and fintech verticals.
Understanding of Google app ads solutions across performance and measurement.
Understanding of app and mobile marketing ecosystem and other mobile user acquisition platforms.
Ability to build and manage successful joint business plans with key cross functional partners.
About The Job
Businesses of all shapes and sizes rely on Google’s unparalleled advertising solutions to help them grow in today's dynamic marketing environment. You bring a passion for sales, knowledge of online media, and commitment to maximize customer success. You act like an owner, move with velocity through change, finding innovative and strategic ways to consistently deliver extraordinary and incremental outcomes for both Google and customers. You build trusted relationships with customers, uncovering their business needs and translating them into powerful solutions to achieve their most ambitious goals. You achieve as a team with sellers, shape the future of advertising in the AI-era, and make a real impact on the millions of companies and billions of users that trust Google with their most important goals.
In this role, you will unlock the full potential of the app ecosystem and help app advertisers cultivate an install base of active users that can drive business outcomes for the business. You will align product conversations with key business needs. You will be the link between ad products like app campaigns and all of the new features being developed into it, among them campaigns for iOS, Return on Ad Spend (ROAS), web to app connect and more. You will manage the client success in the app ecosystem and understand various different measurement approaches used in the app space by attribution partners (e.g., Appsflyer, Adjust etc.) as well as the newer measurement changes brought about by iOS.
Google's Large Customer Sales (LCS) teams are strategic partners and industry thought leaders to the world's leading brands and agencies. We continuously test how customers think about their business and how Google can support growth. We focus on helping these players navigate profound industry shifts and drive outsized business performance by competitively selling Google's full suite of advertising solutions across Search, YouTube, Measurement, and more. As a member of our LCS team, you'll have the unique opportunity to sell at the forefront of technology, collaborating with executives, influencing market-shaping strategies, and delivering tangible results that significantly impact major global businesses and drive the growth of Google.
Responsibilities
Lead frontline selling efforts across all Google's app solutions for the largest and highest opportunity accounts in Southeast Asia and South Asia frontier markets.
Partner with sales teams to gather client requirements, provide guidance on app best practices, and apply technology and product knowledge to address customer's business and technology needs. Maximize revenue by ensuring high adoption of Google app campaign products in the market.
Advocate new app features and assist clients in the adoption of new products via upgrades and migrations to build long-term success.
Build and foster long-term C-level relationships with client decision makers and their agency counterparts to build long-term marketing strategies.
Craft compelling executive narratives that position Google products to critical business priorities. Participate in the analysis and research for complex technical issues and work with executive product management teams.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer and we are committed to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce in which we enforce fair treatment, and provide growth opportunities for everyone.
All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of age, race, color, national origin, genetics, religion, gender, marital status, pregnancy (including childbirth or a related medical condition), physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances.
Our Company
FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
Our Philosophy
The People-Service-Profit philosophy (P-S-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People-Service-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P-S-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well-being, and value their contributions to the company.
Our Culture
Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions, and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure, and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

job_title: Research Associate – Artificial Intelligence & Health Economics
location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
JOB DESCRIPTION
Position: Research Associate – Artificial Intelligence & Health Economics
Location: HCMC, Vietnam
Department: School of Data Science & Information Technology, Millennia University
Report to:
Dean of Data Science & Information Technology, School of Data Science & Information Technology, Millennia University
Dotted-line report to Deputy Dean of Research & Engagement, School of Data Science & Information Technology, Millennia University
POSITION OVERVIEW
The Research Associate will contribute to interdisciplinary research initiatives that leverage AI techniques, such as machine learning, natural language processing, and predictive analytics, to address complex challenges in public health in Vietnam, especially on the economics aspects. These include cost-effectiveness analysis, health outcomes modeling, resource allocation, and policy evaluation in both public and private healthcare contexts.
This role reports directly to the Dean of Data Science and Information Technology and maintains a dotted-line reporting relationship with the Deputy Dean (Research & Engagement) to ensure alignment with academic standards, research and innovation strategy, and compliance requirements at both the School and University levels.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
1. High Quality Research Publication
Lead and contribute to the development of high-impact research manuscripts targeting top-tier, peer-reviewed journals in AI, health economics, and healthcare analytics.
Analyze and interpret complex datasets, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and methodological soundness in the domain of public healthcare and health economics.
Collaborate with faculty and research partners to co-author publications and integrate interdisciplinary perspectives
Manage the full publication lifecycle, including drafting, revision, journal submission, and response to peer review
Identify appropriate high-impact journals and conferences aligned with the research focus
Contribute to building the institution’s research profile through consistent publication output and citation impact.
2. External Engagement
Proactively identify and pursue external funding opportunities from government agencies, industry partners, and philanthropic bodies in AI and health economics.
Lead and contribute to the development of competitive grant proposals, including concept notes, technical methodologies, and budget justifications.
Build and sustain strategic partnerships with external stakeholders, including healthcare providers, policymakers, research institutes, and industry collaborators.
Translate research ideas into fundable projects aligned with national and global health priorities.
Engage with industry and public sector partners to co-create applied research initiatives and secure contract research opportunities.
Contribute to the commercialization and knowledge transfer of research outputs where appropriate.
Support faculty in securing research funding, grants, and industry sponsorships to advance the School’s research agenda.
3. Research and Innovation
Work with the Dean and the Deputy Dean Research & Engagement to promote a culture of research and innovation within the school, encouraging faculty and students to engage in scholarly and applied research activities.
Initiate and support research projects aligned with emerging areas in computer science, data science, and information technology.
Integrate research-led teaching practices into the curriculum, ensuring students are exposed to current developments and methodologies in the field.
Oversee and promote student participation in innovative activities, including capstone projects, hackathons, competitions, and startup initiatives.
REQUIREMENTS
Qualification and Experience
Ph.D. degree in Data Science, Health Economics, Computer Science, Biostatistics, or a related field.
Familiarity with healthcare data, economic evaluation methods, or health policy analysis.
3+ years of experience in academic and R&D development.
Demonstrated experience in AI/ML techniques and statistical analysis.
Experience managing medium to large research projects, and software development projects.
Understanding of Vietnam’s regulatory environment related to higher education, and institutional governance is advantageous.
Key Skills and Competencies
Strong foundation in statistics, econometrics, and quantitative modeling.
Competence in handling uncertainty, sensitivity analysis, and model validation.
Proficiency in machine learning and data analytics techniques (e.g., supervised/unsupervised learning, predictive modeling).
Ability to select, implement, and evaluate appropriate AI models for healthcare applications.
Understanding of data privacy, bias, fairness, and ethical considerations in AI applications.
Commitment to responsible use of healthcare data and transparent research practices.
Ability to synthesize findings into clear, impactful reports, publications, and presentations.
Experience contributing to academic writing, grant proposals, or policy briefs.
Strong data storytelling skills for both technical and non-technical audiences
Systems thinking and long-term planning capability.
Commitment to sustainability and responsible institutional development.
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Successful grant applications submitted and awarded (as lead or co-investigator), aligned with institutional targets.
Quality of active collaborations with external stakeholders (e.g., government, industry, healthcare organizations, international agencies).
Peer-reviewed publications in high-impact journals and/or A/A* conference proceedings, including citation metrics and journal rankings.
Evidence of research influencing policy, practice, or industry (e.g., policy briefs, advisory roles, implementation projects).
Participation in conferences, invited talks, workshops, and external events that enhance institutional profile.
Development of a sustained pipeline of fundable research ideas and proposals from key partners.
Support for junior researchers or students, contributing to team development and research capability growth.
Contribution to the University’s long-term institutional performance and reputation.
Child Protection Statement
Millennia Education is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of all the students in `our care and expects all applicants, staff, third party providers, volunteers, and visitors to share this commitment. We follow safe recruitment practices and appointments that are subject to an interview, satisfactory references, identity check, and criminal record check.
At Millennia Education, we are committed to providing a word class, safe, happy environment in which children and young people can thrive and learn. We are committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of all our pupils where we embrace all race, abilities, religions, genders, and cultures.

OPSWAT, a global leader in IT, OT, and ICS critical infrastructure cybersecurity, delivers an end-to-end platform that gives public and private sector organizations and enterprises the critical advantage needed to protect their complex networks, secure their devices, and ensure compliance. Over the last 20 years our commitment to innovative technology has earned the trust of more than 1,700 organizations, governments, and institutions globally, solidifying our role in protecting the world’s critical infrastructure and securing our way of life.
The Position
We are seeking a talented and motivated Software Engineer (C++) to join our growing Technology Office team. You will be part of Predictive Alin AI team.
You will contribute to building and innovating high-performance, cutting-edge technologies and solutions that power our products across on-premise, cloud, and hybrid environments. Working with modern toolchains and frameworks, you’ll help deliver secure, scalable, and efficient software that makes a real impact.
As part of a truly global engineering team (with colleagues in Vietnam, Spain, Romania, UK, US, Georgia, and Hungary), you’ll collaborate closely with talented engineers worldwide—both locally in Ho Chi Minh City and remotely—while enjoying the support of an international, high-performing culture.
What You Will Be Doing
Collaborate closely with the Engineering Manager and Romania-based team on planning, architecture, design, development, and maintenance of high-quality applications
Analyze business and technical requirements, define system features, and translate them into robust, maintainable functionality
Write clean, efficient C++ code; conduct thorough code reviews; and develop comprehensive unit tests
Create and maintain clear technical documentation for code, architecture, and processes
Proactively identify and implement improvements in performance, security, reliability, and developer experience
Mentor junior engineers and share best practices across the global team
Partner with distributed engineering teams to deliver secure, up-to-date, and high-performing software
What We Need From You
1+ years of professional software engineering experience
1+ years of hands-on experience with modern C++ (strong preference for C++17/20 expertise)
Solid proficiency with CMake and GCC toolchain
Deep understanding of:
Multithreading, atomics, synchronization primitives, thread pools, and producer-consumer patterns
Lock contention mitigation and race condition prevention
CPU/memory profiling tools (e.g., perf, VTune, Valgrind, flame graphs)
Cache behavior, memory layout, allocation strategies, and performance implications
Proven track record of optimizing performance-critical code paths
Experience with CI/CD pipelines (ideally TeamCity)
Basic working knowledge of AWS services (S3, API Gateway, DocumentDB)
Good understanding of OS-level concepts (file systems, processes) on both Windows and Linux
Experience with Docker/containerization
Strong grasp of design patterns, OOP principles, and clean code practices
Excellent written and spoken English communication skills
It Would Be Nice If You Had
Experience in cybersecurity domains: antivirus (AV), endpoint detection & response (EDR), sandboxing, or malware analysis
Low-level optimizations (SIMD, intrinsics, cache-friendly data structures)
Exposure to machine learning frameworks or concepts
Knowledge of compression algorithms, custom parsers, or binary formats
Experience or strong interest in Rust (we’re actively expanding into Rust and value engineers eager to learn/contribute)
Why You’ll Love Working Here
Stable, fast-growing international company with an impressive global customer base
Highly professional, collaborative, and diverse team across multiple continents
Challenging, high-impact projects with real ownership and visibility
Cutting-edge technology stack and continuous investment in modern tools & practices
Attractive, modern office environment in Ho Chi Minh City
Opportunities for growth, mentorship, and international exposure in a global leading cybersecurity product company.
Attractive compensation package with regular performance assessments and salary reviews.
13th-month salary and performance-based bonuses.
100% salary and full insurance coverage during the probationary period.
Comprehensive health care program (PVI) for employee and family members.
15+ paid days off per year.
Employee recognition programs with quarterly, annual, and President’s Club awards.
Engaging team activities including team building, outings, sports, and trade union events.
Modern open office located on the top floor in District 3, equipped with recreation areas, sports facilities, fresh fruits, coffee, and tea.

FPT Software
, a subsidiary of

, is a global technology and IT services provider headquartered in Vietnam, with over $1.22 billion in revenue as of 2024 and 33,000+ employees across 30 countries. About the role
We are seeking an experienced
AI Engineer
with strong software engineering expertise and a deep understanding of
AI/ML workflows, large language models, and modern development practices.
This role focuses on building scalable AI solutions, integrating agentic frameworks, and deploying models in production environments — with an emphasis on reliability, performance, and business impact.
﻿Key responsibilities
AI Development and Integration
Design and implement AI-driven applications using advanced Python programming techniques.
Develop and integrate agentic AI frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen) for complex workflows.
Work with leading LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Gemini) to build intelligent features and conversational systems.
Model Optimization and Customization

Apply best practices for model evaluation, testing, and performance optimization.
Software Engineering and Testing
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following modern software engineering principles.
Implement unit and integration tests using frameworks like pytest, unittest, or BDD-style tools (behave, cucumber).
Cloud Deployment and CI/CD
Deploy AI solutions on AWS services (EC2, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, Redis).
Utilize containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines (GitLab) for automated delivery.
Optional Front-End Integration
Basic knowledge of front-end technologies (Streamlit, React, Next.js) for building interactive AI dashboards.

At least 3–4 years of experience as a Software Engineer with a focus on AI/ML projects.
Advanced Python programming skills for AI/ML and automation tasks.
Demonstrable experience with at least one agentic AI framework (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, etc.).
Familiarity with leading LLMs and their APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini).
Advanced knowledge of writing unit and integration tests.
Experience with AWS services and modern DevOps practices (CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes).
Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).
Nice to Have
Experience with fine-tuning and embedding generation.
Exposure to front-end frameworks for AI visualization (Streamlit, React).
Knowledge of data governance and security best practices.

Chuyên viên Hệ thống Kho & Quản lý Đơn Hàng chịu trách nhiệm vận hành, phát triển và tích hợp hệ thống WMS (Warehouse Management System) và OMS (Order Management System) phục vụ hoạt động kho 3PL/4PL và fulfillment thương mại điện tử. Vị trí này đảm bảo luồng đơn hàng từ các kênh bán hàng (sàn TMĐT, ERP khách hàng, B2B portal) được xử lý chính xác, liền mạch xuống đến quy trình thực thi kho — từ nhận hàng, lưu trữ, picking/packing đến xuất kho và hoàn hàng.
Vị trí này tạo nền tảng để phát triển lên Senior WMS/OMS BA, Warehouse IT Manager, hoặc Solution Architect chuyên về fulfillment technology. Trong bối cảnh e-commerce và 3PL tăng trưởng mạnh tại Việt Nam, đây là profile được săn đón bởi cả công ty logistics lẫn các nền tảng phần mềm SaaS đang mở rộng thị trường.
TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH
1. Vận Hành & Phát Triển WMS
Quản lý và vận hành hệ thống WMS hàng ngày: cấu hình luồng inbound (ASN, receiving, putaway), outbound (wave planning, pick/pack/ship), inventory management và cycle count
Thiết lập và duy trì master data WMS: cấu hình kho (zone, aisle, location, rack), SKU profile, storage rule, slotting strategy, SLA theo từng khách hàng/dịch vụ
Phân tích hiệu suất kho định kỳ: inventory accuracy, order fulfillment rate, pick productivity, dock-to-stock time, SLA compliance
Xác định bottleneck trong quy trình kho, đề xuất và triển khai cải tiến hệ thống (tái cấu hình WMS, bổ sung rule, tự động hóa bước thủ công)
Hỗ trợ triển khai WMS cho kho mới hoặc onboarding khách hàng mới: setup cấu hình, chạy song song (parallel run), UAT và go-live
Phối hợp với vendor WMS trong xử lý lỗi hệ thống, cập nhật patch và nâng cấp phiên bản
2. Vận Hành & Phát Triển OMS
Quản lý luồng đơn hàng qua OMS: tiếp nhận đơn từ nhiều kênh (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, website, ERP B2B), xử lý logic phân bổ kho (order routing), kiểm soát trạng thái đơn hàng end-to-end
Cấu hình OMS theo đặc thù từng khách hàng: rule ưu tiên xử lý, split order, backorder, pre-order, COD reconciliation, return management
Đảm bảo đồng bộ tồn kho thời gian thực giữa OMS ↔ WMS ↔ sàn TMĐT — phát hiện và xử lý lệch tồn kho ngay khi phát sinh
Theo dõi và xử lý exception đơn hàng: đơn lỗi, đơn trùng, thiếu thông tin địa chỉ, từ chối giao hàng, hoàn hàng bất thường
Phân tích dữ liệu đơn hàng để tối ưu allocation logic, giảm split shipment và tăng tỷ lệ đơn giao thành công ngay lần đầu (first-attempt delivery rate)
3. Tích Hợp Hệ Thống & API
Thiết kế và thực hiện tích hợp API giữa WMS/OMS và các hệ thống liên quan: ERP khách hàng, sàn TMĐT (Shopee/Lazada/TikTok/Tiki API), TMS, hệ thống carrier, cổng thanh toán, billing
Xây dựng và duy trì tài liệu tích hợp đầy đủ: API endpoint mapping, data schema, luồng xử lý lỗi, retry logic, version history
Thực hiện data mapping giữa các hệ thống: chuẩn hóa mã SKU, mã địa điểm, trạng thái đơn hàng — đảm bảo nhất quán dữ liệu xuyên suốt chuỗi
Phối hợp đội kỹ thuật/vendor test và debug tích hợp trong môi trường staging và production
Giám sát sức khỏe các luồng tích hợp (integration monitoring): phát hiện sớm lỗi đồng bộ, timeout, data mismatch và xử lý trước khi ảnh hưởng vận hành
4. Báo Cáo, Phân Tích & Hỗ Trợ Khách Hàng
Xây dựng hệ thống báo cáo kho và đơn hàng: daily ops dashboard, báo cáo tồn kho định kỳ, SLA report theo khách hàng, báo cáo hoàn hàng
Phát triển dashboard phân tích trên BI tools: inventory aging, dead stock, order velocity, fulfillment cost per order
Hỗ trợ khách hàng (B2B/B2C) trong quá trình tích hợp hệ thống: hướng dẫn kỹ thuật, mapping dữ liệu, kiểm thử kết nối
Đào tạo người dùng kho sử dụng WMS/OMS; biên soạn SOP, user manual và tài liệu xử lý lỗi thường gặp.
YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC:
1. Kinh Nghiệm Chuyên Môn
3 – 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực kho vận, fulfillment, hoặc IT/BA trong môi trường 3PL, e-commerce logistics, hoặc nhà cung cấp phần mềm WMS/OMS
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế vận hành hoặc triển khai WMS (ưu tiên: Arkitech WMS, Infor WMS, SAP EWM, Manhattan, HighJump, Logiwa hoặc WMS nội bộ)
Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với OMS hoặc sàn TMĐT ở cấp độ tích hợp hệ thống (không chỉ thao tác giao diện)
Hiểu sâu quy trình kho thực tế: receiving, putaway, replenishment, picking (discrete/batch/wave/zone), packing, shipping, returns, stocktake
Kinh nghiệm tích hợp API với ít nhất một sàn TMĐT (Shopee/Lazada/TikTok) hoặc nền tảng ERP
(Ưu tiên) Kinh nghiệm trong môi trường kho đa khách hàng (multi-client warehouse), đặc biệt FMCG, pharma, fashion hoặc electronics
2. Kiến Thức Kỹ Thuật
- Hệ thống: WMS • OMS • ERP/SAP • TMS • Sàn TMĐT API
- API & tích hợp: REST API • JSON/XML • Postman • Webhook • SFTP/EDI
- Phân tích & BI: Power BI / Tableau • Excel nâng cao • SQL cơ bản • Pivot/VLOOKUP
- Quy trình kho: Inbound/Outbound • Slotting • Wave planning • Cycle count • Returns
- Tài liệu: BRD / FS • API spec • Data mapping • SOP • UAT script
3. Năng Lực Cốt Lõi
Hiểu nghiệp vụ kho từ góc độ người làm thực tế — không chỉ từ tài liệu hay lý thuyết
Khả năng chuyển đổi linh hoạt giữa tư duy vận hành và tư duy hệ thống
Kỹ năng xử lý dữ liệu và phát hiện bất thường trong lượng transaction lớn
Kiên nhẫn và tỉ mỉ trong công việc cấu hình và kiểm thử hệ thống
Tiếng Anh đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật và giao tiếp với vendor/khách hàng nước ngoài.
QUYỀN LỢI ĐƯỢC HƯỞNG:
Làm việc trong công ty uy tín, tự hào là thương hiệu bưu chính quốc gia, phụng sự cho sự nghiệp phát triển kinh tế xã hội trên toàn lãnh thổ Việt Nam.
Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, chuyên nghiệp với văn hóa làm việc “Tìm giải pháp – cùng tháo gỡ”.
Mức lương thỏa thuận tùy theo năng lực và chính sách thưởng hấp dẫn.
Lương tháng 13+,thưởng hiệu quả kinh doanh…
Chính sách đầu tư cho học tập và phát triển, thường xuyên tổ chức các chương trình đào tạo nội bộ và cử CBNV học tập bên ngoài.
Chế độ BHXH đầy đủ, bảo hiểm sức khỏe PTI, chế độ ngày nghỉ phép đúng quy định của Luật lao động.
Văn phòng hạng A, view thoáng đẹp, căng tin ngay trong tòa nhà văn phòng công ty phục vụ ăn trưa, ăn sáng, trà và cafe,…
Phụ cấp 650k tiền ăn trưa.
Team building, du lịch nghỉ mát hàng năm với nhiều hoạt động ý nghĩa.
Voucher giảm giá, chính sách mua hàng nông sản, hàng hóa tiêu dùng… ưu đãi từ các công ty thành viên trực thuộc Tổng công ty.

POSITION OVERVIEW
As a Project Manager in Home Credit’s PMO, you will lead high-impact, cross-functional projects that are critical to Home Credit’s success. Reporting to the Head of PMO (who reports directly to the CEO), you will play a key role in turning strategy into execution—delivering initiatives on time, within scope, and aligned with business objectives.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Project leadership & Delivery excellence: Lead impactful initiatives from Discovery to Delivery. Our projects require strong coordination across multiple functions and we need to ensure that real value is delivered to Home Credit’s customers.
Portfolio Management: Ensure projects align with business goals and provide insights to help Exco prioritize projects that will deliver the most value to our customers.
Ensure alignment: Bring clarity to goals, processes, and plans. Ensure Roles & Responsibilities are agreed, facilitate regular project sync ups to ensure stakeholders are aligned and foster collaboration across all departments.
Manage risks and change: Anticipate challenges, mitigate risks by giving viable solution options, and enable teams to adapt quickly to change in a dynamic regulated environment.
Communicate with impact: Provide clear, concise, and compelling project updates to senior stakeholders, ensuring transparency and building trust. Escalate issues early and demonstrate ownership by actively driving resolution, building confidence that challenges will be managed effectively.
What we’re looking for:
A hands-on leader who thrives on solving problems and driving progress.
Strong leadership and excellent communication skills, with the confidence to present to executives.
Ability to provide actionable insights that guide decision-making.
Someone who inspires confidence at all levels and helps build the brand of the PMO inside Home Credit Vietnam.
Beyond project delivery: You’ll help strengthen the PMO by:
Leading PMO initiatives focused on improving the PMO Center of Excellence.
Sharing your expertise with colleagues and promoting best practices.
Being someone that actively contributes towards team culture.
REQUIREMENTS
Bachelor’s degree (Business, Finance or IT preferred) and a recognized Project Management certification (PMP, PMI-ACP or similar).

CREATIVITY IS OUR SUPERPOWER.
It’s our heritage and it’s also our future. Because we don’t just make toys. We create innovative products and experiences that inspire, entertain and develop children through play. Mattel is at its best when every member of our team feels respected, included, and heard—when everyone can show up as themselves and do their best work every day. We value and share an infinite range of ideas and voices that evolve and broaden our perspectives with a reach that extends into all our brands, partners, and suppliers.
Job Description
What Your Impact Will Be:
Analysis the Customer request and then place order to vendors.
Communicate with Demand Planner, oversea colleagues.
Follow up new item Development with different parties
Analysis the production capacity and negotiate with vendors.
Assist to review vendor PMC process / MRP / MRPII system and comment if needed.
Prepare the various reports (Excel, Power-point, Words …. Etc.)
Communicate with different parties to secure production and shipment.
Negotiate with vendors the production schedule to fulfill customer request.
Perform the production planning and control activities.
Perform the material planning and control activities.
Qualifications
What We’re Looking For:
Bachelor’s degree or above in Supply Chain/Operations/Business Administration
At least 3 years working experience with relevant industry/function.
Familiar with PC and Microsoft Application especially Excel
Good command in both spoken and written English (Mandarin/Cantonese is an advantage).
Work under pressure and overtime if needed.
Need travel to vendors’ plant.
Additional Information
What It’s Like to Work Here:
We are a purpose driven company aiming to empower the next generation to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential. We live up to our purpose employing the following behaviors:
We collaborate: Being a part of Mattel means being part of one team with shared values and common goals. Every person counts and working closely together always brings better results. Partnership is our process and our collective capabilities is our superpower.
We innovate: At Mattel we always aim to find new and better ways to create innovative products and experiences. No matter where you work in the organization, you can always make a difference and have real impact. We welcome new ideas and value new initiatives that challenge conventional thinking.
We execute: We are a performance driven company. We strive for excellence and are focused on pursuing best in class outcomes. We believe in accountability and ownership and know that our people are at their best when they are empowered to create and deliver results.
Who We Are:
Mattel is a leading global toy company and owner of one of the strongest catalogs of children’s and family entertainment franchises in the world. We create innovative products and experiences that inspire, entertain and develop children through play. We engage consumers through our portfolio of iconic brands, including Barbie, Hot Wheels, Fisher-Price, American Girl, Thomas & Friends, UNO and MEGA, as well as other popular intellectual properties that we own or license in partnership with global entertainment companies. Our offerings include film and television content, gaming, music and live events. We operate in 35 locations and our products are available in more than 150 countries in collaboration with the world’s leading retail and ecommerce companies. Since its founding in 1945, Mattel is proud to be a trusted partner in empowering children to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential.
Visit us at https://jobs.mattel.com/ and www.instagram.com/MattelCareers.
Mattel is an Affirmative Action/Equal Opportunity Employer where we want you to bring your authentic self to work every day. We welcome all job seekers including minorities, females, veterans, individuals with disabilities, and those of all sexual orientations and gender identities.

At Deloitte, we offer a unique and exceptional career experience to inspire and empower talents like you to make an impact that matters for our clients, people and community. Whatever your aspirations, Deloitte offers you a highly inclusive, collaborative workplace and unrivalled opportunities to realize your full potential. We are always looking for people with the relentless energy to push themselves further, and to find new avenues and unique ways to reach our shared goals.

Our Assurance team offers tailored, innovative, and comprehensive solutions for specific business needs to help clients tackle challenges faced along the lifecycle of their businesses. Our assurance services include:
Accounting and Reporting Advisory
Disruptive Events Advisory
Accounting Operations Advisory
Business Assurance
1.Main responsibilities:
You would lead your team or support your Team Leader in performing one or more of the following services to our clients:
Accounting & Reporting Advisory
Evaluate the impact of the adoption of an accounting standard, a new accounting policy, or a transaction on a company’s accounting operation and financial information;
Perform technical conversion of a company’s financial statements from VAS to IFRS or other GAAPs and vice versa;
Provide ad-hoc support on accounting-related matters in accordance with requirements of VAS, IFRS or other GAAPs.
Accounting Operations Advisory
Policies, Processes, Controls & Financial Governance: Conduct comprehensive reviews of key finance processes (e.g., procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, record-to-report) to identify gaps, inefficiencies, and strategic improvement opportunities.
Redesign processes considering people, technology, infrastructure, and internal controls to enhance operational efficiency and compliance.
Develop and implement an end-to-end finance policy framework, including operational finance policies and business rules aligned with organizational objectives.
ERP Implementation: integrate Accounting compliance requirements in the ERP
Lead process design and readiness activities for ERP implementation or transformation projects
Design and optimize Chart of Accounts (COA) structure to meet business and compliance requirements.
Accounting data remediation and reconciliation prior to migration e.g.fixed asset register reconstruction, supplier master data cleanse
Incorporate IFRS compliance requirements into ERP-based accounting and financial reporting processes (e.g., SAP, Oracle).
Collaborate with IT and finance teams to ensure ERP systems support accounting compliance and reporting standards.
Disruptive Events Advisory
Provide accounting advice for transactions, such as IPO readiness, divestments, restructuring;
Execute post-merger integration activities including review of accounting policy, internal controls and financial reporting process transformation;
Assess a company’s readiness for disruptive events e.g. IPO, listing, restructuring and advise on implementation plan.
2.Requirements
You should possess:
A Bachelor’s degree in accounting or auditing, finance;
More than 3 years of relevant experience; preferably Big-4 audit experience
Ability to work in team and independently;
Ability to communicate well (verbally and written) in both English and Vietnamese;
Good problem solving and analytical thinking skills;
Competence in Microsoft office tools.
It would be a plus if you also meet the following requirements:
Have working experience with IFRS, finance transformation, or ERP implementation projects.
Proven experience in process redesign and policy development.
Hands-on experience with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle) and COA design.
Qualified or in the process of obtaining relevant certificates e.g. CPA, ACCA

The role as part of the APAC Data & Analytics Hub is critical in Heineken to operationalize our strategy of standardized and scalable data foundations across the region and enterprise.
The Data Steward is pivotal in our Data Management team. He or she is responsible for ensuring that master data is understood, used, and shared effectively and meets the highest quality and integrity standards. This position operates cross-domain, overseeing dependencies and collaborating closely with various stakeholders to solve data issues and improve data quality. It is a key player in our data management strategy. He or she will also need to support orchestrating global and regional programs in the Operating Companies.
• Elicit data requirements of functions, programs and other stakeholders. - Assess the extent to which these are met by current data artefacts (gaps detecting, assigning to rework, provide input to interested parties about amendments).
• Support with functional and technical skills the delivery of data work for functions, projects and products.
• Works hand in hand with Business and D&T to design and implement plans to optimize the data utilization within business processes
• Understand and explain how the business processes produce and consume data
• Understand and explain Heineken data assets and artefacts including EDM, data standards, data quality rules and data lineage and their interaction.
• Share knowledge and understanding on using data tools and interpret analytical results
JOB DESCRIPTION :
• Data Analysis: Work closely with business stakeholders, data engineers and data scientists to identify data needs and facilitate data integration projects.
• Training and Support: Provide training and support to team members on data processes and tools, fostering a culture of data literacy.
• Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities for process improvements in data mapping and data management practices, implementing best practices to enhance efficiency.
JOB REQUIREMENT :
• Education: High school diploma or equivalent required; advanced certification or degree in Data Management, Information Technology, or a related field is highly preferred.
• Professional Experience: Minimum of 3+ years in a Data Management or Data Governance role or similar roles.
• Technical Systems: ARIS, SparX, Collibra, Ataccama, Power Me, Databricks Jira, Service Now
Experience with most common data structures (JSON, Parquet, CSV etc.). Basic knowledge of SQL and Python
• Software & Communication: Advanced MS Office skills and professional fluency in English (written and verbal).
• Industry Context (Preferred): A solid understanding of the FMCG sector and familiarity with core business domains, including Supply Chain, Finance, and Commerce.

OVERVIEW
This role plays a key part in ensuring company-wide quality standards, improving operational consistency, and enabling scalable and sustainable project delivery across the organization.
You will act as a quality enabler across teams, focusing on monitoring, risk management, and process improvement while supporting the company’s long-term quality transformation initiatives.
JOB DESCRIPTION
1. Quality Monitoring & Risk Management
Monitor and evaluate the Quality Maturity Level (QML) of ongoing projects to ensure alignment with company standards.
Proactively identify risks, bottlenecks, and process deviations; provide impact analysis and escalate to Managers/BOD when necessary.
Conduct periodic quality health checks across projects, focusing on overall quality trends rather than day-to-day execution.
2. CAPA & Process Compliance
Track, manage, and follow up on Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA) across teams to ensure issues are fully resolved and prevented from recurring.
Audit and verify that project teams adhere to established workflows, quality gates, and internal standards.
3. ISO Implementation & QMS Development
Act as a core contributor in ISO implementation initiatives (e.g., ISO 9001 / ISO 27001).
Research relevant standards, support the development of action plans, and track organization-wide execution.
Maintain and continuously improve internal quality documents, templates, and processes to align with QMS requirements.
4. Acceptance Testing & Validation
Support or perform User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and final quality validation for critical features or projects when required.
Act as a key quality gate before release, ensuring deliverables meet defined acceptance criteria.
Support project teams in structuring and improving their UAT processes to ensure completeness and reliability.
5. Reporting & Special Projects
Prepare regular quality reports, compliance dashboards, and project health summaries for Managers and BOD.
Research new quality methodologies, propose improvement plans, and coordinate the rollout of quality-driven initiatives.
Support initial exploration or pilot initiatives related to AI-driven quality improvement or process automation when applicable.
REQUIREMENTS
1. Education
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Quality Management, or a related field.
2. Experience
2–5 years in QA/PQA, IT Quality, or Software QA with a focus on process improvement and quality metrics.
Experience working with software projects or internal systems is preferred.
3. Skills & Knowledge
Process & Quality: Solid understanding of SDLC, Agile/Scrum, CAPA, RCA, and quality/risk evaluation (e.g., QML).
ISO: Familiarity with ISO 9001/27001 or involvement in ISO initiatives is a plus.
Testing: Able to support and validate UAT; no coding or automation required.
Tools: Comfortable with tools like Jira, Confluence, and basic process mapping tools.
Analytical & Communication: Strong in analyzing quality data, reporting insights, and influencing stakeholders to adopt quality practices. Good English skill
Mindset:
Detail-oriented, proactive, adaptable, and open to learning new methodologies or AI-driven improvements.
BENEFITS
Well trained and dedicated to being able to catch the pace smoothly
Attracted salary based on the ability of the candidate and the general salary framework set by the company.
Salary review based on performance every 6 months if your basic salary is less than 30,000,000 VND. If your basic salary is from 30,000,000 VND, it will be reviewed every year
13th-month salary and bonus for holidays
Team building once a month
Company trip once a year.
PVI Healthcare Insurance
Full social benefits in accordance with the company and the law of Vietnam
Professional environment and clear procedures.
Great opportunity to improve English
Opportunity to learn Logistics and professional management system of project development process

Overview Of Division/Department
The IT Department at Mizuho Bank, Ltd., Hanoi Branch, is responsible for supporting and enabling the bank's business operations through technology. Its main functions include Project Planning & Quality Assurance, Infrastructure & Operations, System Development, Security and Risk Management, as well as Innovation and Solution Architecture. The department ensures the reliable and secure operation of core banking systems, develops and maintains IT solutions tailored to business needs, manages technology risks, and drives innovation to support the branch's strategic objectives.
About Us
Mizuho Bank is the banking subsidiary of Mizuho Financial Group, which is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Mizuho Financial Group, Inc. is the 15th largest bank in the world, as measured by total assets of approximately US 2 trillion. Mizuho's 55,000 employees worldwide offer comprehensive financial services to clients in over 800 offices throughout the Americas, EMEA, and Asia.
