Job Responsibilities
Role Overview
The role is responsible for supporting and overseeing the organization's information security and Information Technology (IT) risk management programs, ensuring robust protection of information assets and adherence to relevant policies, standards, and regulatory requirements. It involves monitoring security controls, conducting risk assessments, responding to incidents, and collaborating with IT, business units, and external partners to effectively manage technology-related risks. This role also leads the development and execution of the overall security strategy to ensure operational resilience and drive continuous improvement.
Key Responsibilities
Monitor and analyze security events, alerts, and vulnerabilities using security tools (SIEM, IDS/IPS, endpoint protection, etc).
Support the implementation and maintenance of IT security policies, procedures, and controls.
Conduct or assist with IT risk assessments, vulnerability assessments, and security audits.
Respond to security incidents, investigate breaches, and assist in incident reporting and root cause analysis.
Assist in user awareness training and promote security best practices across the organization.
Support compliance efforts with relevant laws, regulations, and standards (e.g. ISO 27001, NIST, etc).
Maintain and update IT security documentation and risk registers.
Coordinate with IT and business teams to remediate identified risks and vulnerabilities.
Participate in business continuity and disaster recovery planning and testing.
Stay current with emerging security threats, trends and technologies, and provide training and guidance to end-users on IT systems and best practices.
Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree or higher in Information Technology, or related fields.
Minimum of 3 years' of experience in IT Security, IT Risk Management, or related IT role.
Demonstrated expertise in developing and implementing security programs, policies, and controls with strong knowledge of cybersecurity principles, threat landscapes, risk management frameworks, and regulatory standards (ISO 27001, NIST).
Hands-on experience with security technologies such as SIEM, firewalls, IDS/IPS, endpoint protection, DLP, and monitoring tools.
Proven experience in managing incident response, conducting forensic investigations, overseeing vulnerability management processes, and IT infrastructure (including cloud and application security).
Proven ability to lead teams and projects, with strong project management and communication skills, including the ability to explain complex security topics to non-technical audiences.
Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities, with the capability to manage multiple priorities independently, adapt to new technologies, and maintain a customer service-oriented mindset.
Professional certificates such as CISSP, CISA, ISO 27001 Foundation or other relevant security or risk management credentials are preferred.
Fluency in Vietnamese and English, both oral and written.
Our Offer
Professional working environment
Competitive salary
13th month salary
Performance bonus
Health care insurance & accident insurance
16 days annual leave

job_title: Senior Machine Learning / Reinforcement Learning Engineer
job_description:
Through proprietary software and AI, along with a focus on customer delight, Sleek makes the back-office easy for micro SMEs.
We give Entrepreneurs time back to focus on what they love doing - growing their business and being with customers. With a surging number of Entrepreneurs globally, we are innovating in a highly lucrative space.
We operate 3 business segments:
Corporate Secretary: Automating the company incorporation, secretarial, filing, Nominee Director, mailroom and immigration processes via custom online robots and SleekSign. We are the market leaders in Singapore with :5% market share of all new business incorporations
Accounting & Bookkeeping: Redefining what it means to do Accounting, Bookkeeping, Tax and Payroll thanks to our proprietary SleekBooks ledger, AI tools and exceptional customer service
FinTech payments: Overcoming a key challenge for Entrepreneurs by offering digital banking services to new businesses
Sleek launched in 2017 and now has around 15,000 customers across our offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, Australia and the UK. We have around 500 staff with an intact startup mindset.
We have recently raised Series B financing off the back of >70% compound annual growth in Revenue over the last 5 years. Sleek has been recognised by The Financial Times, The Straits Times, Forbes and LinkedIn as one of the fastest growing companies in Asia.
Backed by world-class investors, we are on track to be one of the few cash flow positive, tech-enabled unicorns based out of Singapore.
Requirements
Mission:
At Sleek, we are on a mission to streamline operations and elevate customer experience through intelligent automation powered by efficient, reliable, and production-grade ML/RL systems. We are seeking a Machine Learning / Reinforcement Learning Engineer (Applied) who will be a key individual contributor responsible for designing, building, and scaling next-generation ML/RL systems that operate under real-world business constraints.
As one of Sleek's senior applied ML/RL contributors, you will partner closely with Product, Engineering, and AI teams to translate ambiguous business problems into measurable ML/RL outcomes. You will own systems end-to-end — from model optimisation and evaluation through deployment and post-production monitoring — ensuring that ML/RL capabilities are efficient, controllable, observable, and dependable in production.
You will play a central role in moving beyond generic, large-model approaches, replacing or augmenting them with small, domain-specific models, test-time reinforcement learning, and agentic systems that deliver clear improvements in quality, latency, cost, and reliability. Your work will directly shape how ML/RL is deployed across Sleek's products and internal operations.
Key outcomes in the first 6-12 months
Ship High-Impact ML/RL Systems
Deliver production-grade ML/RL systems that create measurable improvements in quality, latency, cost, or reliability
Replace or augment baseline approaches with small, domain-specific models where they provide superior performance-to-cost trade-offs
Define and track clear success metrics and benchmarks for all deployed systems
Establish Efficient Model Training & Serving (SMOL)
Build and operate efficient training and serving pipelines using distillation, quantization, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning
Maintain benchmark suites covering quality, latency, throughput, memory, and cost
Drive explicit, data-backed trade-offs in model and deployment decisions
Deploy Test-Time RL & Optimization
Implement test-time optimisation (TTRL / TPO) to improve generative or agentic outputs within strict latency and cost budgets
Introduce reward-guided decoding or reranking with measurable gains
Add monitoring, guardrails, and fallback strategies to manage instability and regressions
Build Reliable Agentic Systems
Design and ship agentic workflows with multi-step planning and execution across tools and data sources
Implement orchestration for long-running workflows (state, retries, timeouts, idempotency)
Establish evaluation harnesses and regression tests to track agent reliability and cost over time
Establish ML/RL Operational Excellence
Implement production monitoring for quality, latency, cost, and failure modes
Ensure training, experimentation, and deployment are reproducible, documented, and observable
Partner closely with Product and Engineering to translate ambiguous problems into shippable ML/RL solutions
Must-have Experience
Applied ML in Production: :5+ years building, training, and shipping ML systems using Python and PyTorch, with clear ownership beyond experimentation
Efficient Model Training (SMOL): Experience replacing or augmenting large models with smaller, domain-specific ones using distillation, quantization, or parameter-efficient fine-tuning, supported by clear benchmarks
Reinforcement Learning & Test-Time Optimization: Solid RL fundamentals and experience deploying inference-time optimisation systems (e.g. reward-guided decoding, reranking) under latency and cost constraints
Agentic Systems: Experience building multi-step agents with orchestration concerns such as state, retries, timeouts, and fallbacks, and improving their reliability and cost in production
ML/RL Operational Excellence: Experience with reproducible training pipelines, evaluation, monitoring, and production debugging, and collaborating closely with Product and Engineering on constraint-driven problems
For applicants based in Singapore and Australia, this will be a hybrid role. For applicants based in India, Vietnam, and the Philippines, this will be a fully remote role.
Behavioural fit is also important at Sleek, and we will be looking for candidates that have a proven track record of embodying the below attributes in their recent roles:
Ownership
: This shows reliability and helps build trust within the team. We move fast and need to know that everyone will see things through to completion and proactively help to get things back on track when challenges arise. Accountability is really important to us.
Humility
: There is so much we don't know. Humility allows for open-mindedness to feedback and a willingness to learn from others. It paves the way for collaboration and creates a positive work environment. It is a key ingredient of self awareness and emotional intelligence.
Structured Thinking
: Our business is complex with many layers (many services, many countries, many cultures). Regardless of whether you're more analytical or creative in nature, being able to show sound judgement is important to us. It ensures solutions are pragmatic and balance the needs of the organisation, team and customers.
Data driven
: We are a data rich business with :15,000 small customers. Each decision we make can impact many more people than we realise - so it's critical that we use sound data to support our strategies and review the success of our initiatives.
Can have tough conversations in a positive way
: It's not a matter of if, but when difficult interpersonal situations arise. Disagreement, conflict and disappointment are a given in a fast moving business where people care about their work. People that proactively have tough conversations with kindness build empathy, trust and great working relationships.
The interview process
The successful candidate will participate in the below interview stages. We anticipate the process to last no more than 3 weeks from start to finish.
Whether the interviews are held over video call or in person will depend on your location and the role.
TA Screening
A :30 minute chat with the Talent Acquisition Team.
Take Home Task
Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a take home task.
Technical Round
A :45 minute interview with the hiring manager
Behavioural / Soft Skills Fit Assessment
A :45 minute chat with our CTO, where they will dive into some of your recent work situations to understand how you think and work.
Offer + reference interviews
We'll make a non-binding offer verbally or over email, followed by a couple of short phone or video calls with references that you provide to us.
+++++
Requirement for background screening
Please be aware that Sleek is a regulated entity and as such is required to perform different levels of background checks on staff depending on their role.
This may include using external vendors to verify the below:
Your education
Any criminal history
Any political exposure
Any bankruptcy or adverse credit history
We will ask for your consent before conducting these checks. Depending on your role at Sleek, an adverse result on one of these checks may prohibit you from passing probation.
By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Data Privacy Statement for Candidates, found at sleek.com.
Benefits
Some other great things about working at Sleek...
Humility and kindness:
Humility is a core attribute we hire for, which means we have a culture of not taking ourselves too seriously and being able to laugh. Kindness is also incredibly important. We are committed to creating and nurturing a diverse and inclusive environment.
Flexibility:
If you need to start early or start late to cater to your family or other needs, we don't mind, so long as you get your work done and proactively communicate. You can also work fully remote from anywhere in the world for 1 month each year
Financial benefits:
We pay competitive market salaries and provide staff with generous paid time off and holiday schedules. Certain staff at Sleek are also eligible for our employee share ownership plan and can share in the upside of our stellar growth trajectory as we work toward listing on a prominent stock exchange in the Asia Pacific region.
Personal growth:
You'll get a lot of responsibility and autonomy at Sleek - we move at a fast pace so you'll be making decisions, making mistakes and learning. There's also a range of internal and external facing training programmes we run. We're also at the forefront of utilising AI in our space and are developing a regional centre of AI excellence. It is our intention that if you leave Sleek, you leave as a more well-rounded person and professional.
Sleek is also a proudly certified B Corp.
Since we started our journey in 2017, we've been committed to building Sleek as a force for good. In just over 5 years, we've joined a community of industry leaders like Patagonia, Ben & Jerry's, and P&G who are building an inclusive, equitable, and a regenerative economy.

Description
Hi there, we’re Article. 👋 We’re a North American-based furniture company creating remarkably better furniture experiences one sofa at a time. And as the

Why Article?
While, we sell to the North American market, we work closely with a number of our manufacturing partners throughout Asia. As a result we have an office in Thao Dien, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam where we currently have around 70 Particles (people of Article) working.
As a Particle (people of Article), you will have a high level of autonomy to solve challenging, meaningful problems the best way you can. That means you’re trusted to explore solutions you believe will work best (you’re the expert, after all). You’ll do all this while growing your skills within a company that is redefining the furniture industry.
*Please note*
*Travel: You will primarily work onsite at our factory for the majority of the week (5 days), with occasional office-based responsibilities as needed
*We cover transportation to our vendors!
*This is a one-year contract position with the potential to transition to full-time, though it is not guaranteed.
What You’ll Do:
Verify materials and construction meet Article’s specifications and supplier guidelines.
Perform inline inspections per Article’s requirements.
Inspect raw materials (wood, upholstery, hardware) and review material certification and test reports.
Check assembly, ensuring joints, fastenings, and components meet quality standards.
Inspect finished products, documenting defects in workmanship, functionality, stability, and structure.
Conduct strength, durability, and safety tests to ensure quality compliance.
Report quality issues to production teams for corrective action.
Provide feedback to improve manufacturing processes and prevent recurring defects.
Report to the Vendor Quality Lead, adhering to quality processes.
Report any health and safety concerns observed at the supplier’s factory.
Who You Are:
Strong knowledge of furniture materials, construction methods, and manufacturing processes.
Hands-on experience in inspection, testing, quality control, or quality audits.
Sharp attention to detail with the ability to spot even minor imperfections.
High discipline in following quality standards, product specifications, and maintaining accurate inspection/testing records.
Solid quality-first mindset and understanding of how product quality impacts brand reputation.
Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify root causes and suggest improvements (CAPA experience is a bonus).
Ability to transfer knowledge and train others on inspection techniques and process controls.
Post-secondary or bachelor’s degree in Quality Assurance, Manufacturing, Engineering, or a related field.
Minimum 2 years of quality control or related experience, preferably in the furniture industry.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to convey quality findings to cross-functional teams.
Proficiency with G Suite, Microsoft Office, Google Docs, or similar software tools.
Perks & Benefits:
Life:
15 days of vacation*
11 National Holidays & 1 extra day for Christmas
6 well-being (sick) days*
1 Inclusion and Diversity Day
Health:
Excellent extended health care benefits packages (dental, health check, mental health…)
Company & Office Space:
State-of-the-art laptops with the tech and tools to easily collaborate
Be a part of a dynamic company and an internationally recognized brand
#ArticleHCMC

Tiếp nhận đơn thuốc từ 2 hình thức khám online (app , zalo ,..) và khám offline tại phòng khám

Engineering Manager

Participating in team meetings, brainstorming sessions, and other collaborative efforts.

Our team dynamics.

Passionate, fast learner with can-do attitude
High attention to details and honest
More about us:
Inside+
ABB Robotics & Discrete Automation as one of the world’s leading robotics and machine automation suppliers, is the only company with a comprehensive and integrated portfolio covering robots, Autonomous Mobile Robots and machine automation solutions, designed and orchestrated by our value-creating software. We help companies of all sizes and sectors - from automotive to electronics and logistics – become more resilient, flexible and efficient. We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

job_title: Data & Analytics Product Lead (Supply Chain - Global Hub)
job_description:
Role Purpose:
As a
Data & Analytics Product Lead
within HEINEKEN’s D&A Product Organisation, you are a key driver in realising the Smart Brewery ambition. Embedded within one of our Supply Chain product squads (Packaging, Brewing, or Utilities), you operate as a senior expert — bringing depth, structure, and technical leadership to the delivery of global, scalable D&A solutions.
You combine
strong business analysis skills
,
advanced BI development expertise
, and
mature product thinking
to translate complex operational needs into robust analytical products. You shape end-to-end analytical designs, challenge assumptions, set quality standards, and provide guidance to colleagues across roles and regions.
This senior role represents a natural growth path for high performing Business Analysts, BI Developers, and technically minded Data Engineers who can bridge business understanding with analytical solution design. You influence solution direction, elevate analytical maturity within the squad, and ensure every increment contributes to meaningful, sustainable value for breweries worldwide.
Scale of work:
D&A Product (Packaging, Brewing & Utilities)
Global Digital & Technology (D&T) – Supply Chain Supply Chain
Global Supply Chain – Connected Brewery
Connected Brewery Lighthouse Mexico / Poland / Vietnam
Key Responsibilities:
1. Product Discovery & Requirements
Translate complex business needs into
analytical and functional designs
, ensuring scalability, clarity, and long-term maintainability.
Contribute to the refinement of
global, reusable use cases
aligned with the broader D&A roadmap.
Collaborate with Product Leads and Business Analysts to shape well-structured epics and features, proactively identifying risks, dependencies, and analytical implications.
Assess feasibility, data readiness, and technical impact, and advise the squad on the best approach to maximise value and delivery efficiency.
Bring senior level problem structuring skills, enabling the squad to navigate ambiguity and transform it into actionable work items.
Contribute to the evaluation and strategic shaping of ideas through the
Idea Portal
and SNOW processes, including advising on priority and business impact.
2. Stakeholder Engagement
Communicate (complex) analytical concepts, modelling decisions, and data logic in a clear and compelling manner to business, technical, and operational audiences.
Partner with SMEs, Business Analysts, and brewery teams to challenge assumptions and ensure KPIs and dashboards reflect the true operational context.
Support and participate with the right level of seniority in alignment sessions to establish shared definitions, logic, and standards for metrics and visualisations.
Act as a senior voice for both the user and analytics, ensuring solutions meet realworld needs while maintaining technical integrity.
3. Data & Analytics Enablement
Design and build
highquality, scalable dashboards, semantic models, and analytical features
using Power BI, Grafana, or related tools.
Create advanced DAX measures, optimised Power Query transformations, and reusable modelling components that set the standard for product excellence.
Help to drive global alignment of business logic, metric definitions, and analytical consistency across use cases and squads.
Diagnose and resolve complex modelling, data quality, or logic challenges, collaborating with Data Engineers and BI Developers where necessary.
Embed best practices in modelling, performance optimisation, usability, and storytelling to elevate analytical maturity across the organisation.
4. Product Delivery & Value Realisation
Provide senior level guidance and clarification for analytical, modelling, and logic related questions throughout the sprint.
Taking a lead role in the development, testing, validation, and documentation of development of use case and features, ensuring they meet high standards of quality, accuracy, and user relevance.
Facilitate demos of (analytical) increments, articulating both logic and business impact, and lead iterative improvements based on feedback.
Monitor adoption, performance, and value realisation; proactively recommend improvements or new opportunities.
Support enhancement and demand processes by providing expert evaluation, prioritisation recommendations, and clarity on implications.
5. Supporting Agile Ways of Working
Break down complex (analytical) requirements into clear, testable backlog items that meet the
Definition of Ready
.
Mentor team members on analytical best practices, modelling approaches, and structured problem solving.
Contribute actively to all Agile ceremonies and support the Product Lead in navigating analytical complexity.
Advocate for iterative, valuedriven delivery, promoting early validation, continuous learning, and sustainable ways of working.
Help refine team standards, practices, and delivery processes to elevate squad performance and product quality.
6. Change & Adoption
Develop highquality documentation that clearly explains KPIs, logic, usability, and design rationale.
Support deployment activities, by providing documentation, etc.
Ensure analytical solutions are well understood, properly embedded, and consistently delivering the intended benefits across markets.
Act as a senior ambassador for analytics adoption, usability, and scalability across the Smart Brewery landscape.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Data/Analytics, or related field.
Significant experience in Business Analysis, BI Development, or Data Engineering (with a strong interest in analyticscentric product delivery).
Demonstrated experience delivering complex BI/analytics solutions in Agile environments.
Skills & Experience:
Essential:
Advanced BI development expertise (Power BI, Grafana) including semantic modelling, DAX, Power Query, and complex dashboard design.
Strong ability to translate business questions into analytical logic, modelling structures, and solution designs.
Ability to interpret and work with data structures and pipeline outputs, without owning engineering responsibilities.
Strong SQL skills, analytical validation skills, and experience resolving data quality issues.
Proven experience designing intuitive, scalable analytical models and global dashboards.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to influence and guide both business and technical stakeholders.
Experience working in global, crossfunctional and multicultural product teams.
Fluent in English (written & spoken).
Desirable:
Experience in manufacturing, FMCG, or industrial analytics (MES, SCADA, sensors).
Conceptual understanding of Azure analytics tools (ADF, Synapse, Databricks, Azure SQL).
Experience with KPI frameworks, operational monitoring, or continuous improvement methodologies.
🔒
Data Privacy Notice:
By submitting your application, you consent to the collection, use, and processing of your personal data for recruitment purposes in accordance with applicable data privacy laws. Your information will be kept confidential and used solely for evaluating your suitability for the role.
For more information, please visit:
www.heineken.com.vn/consent

job_title: AI and Cloud Solution Architect, BytePlus - Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
Responsibilities
Join the Fast-Growing BytePlus Team
BytePlus is one of the newer Business Units formed to serve global enterprise customers with our leading technology solutions. As part of the BytePlus Team, you help enterprise customers build what's next for their business. Leveraging ByteDance's cutting-edge intelligent technologies, we are devoted to developing innovative products and solutions to shape the future. We empower our clients to focus on what truly matters. Centering on inspiring innovativeness and excellence, we create life-changing solutions that impact lives around the world. You can help us to achieve our mission.
As an AI Solution Architect, you will bridge the gap between our cutting-edge Generative AI research and real-world industrial applications. You aren't just shipping code; you are solving the "last mile" problem of AI—ensuring models are performant, grounded, and integrated into complex agent solutions to deliver tangible business results for our clients in E-commerce, Fintech, Gaming, and Digital Native Businesses (DNB).
Responsibilities
AI Solutioning & Strategic Advisory
- Partner with regional Sales teams to qualify leads, identify client pain points, and design end-to-end AI/Cloud architectures that drive business growth.
- Lead the enterprise client engagement lifecycle—from initial demos and RFI/RFP responses to architecture workshops and Proof-of-Concept (POC) delivery.
- Act as a Trusted Advisor for C-level executives, providing thought leadership on GenAI trends, AI infrastructure, and industry-specific use cases.
AI-Native Agent Design & Prototyping
- Rapidly design and iterate on AI Agents based on client requirements (e.g., automated credit risk summaries for Fintech, or design-specific image/video generation for Media).
- Prototype complex workflows using advanced paradigms such as Re-Act, Multi-Agent systems, and Plan-and-Execute.
- Implement fine-tuned models and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines tailored to specific industry needs.
Production-Ready Implementation
- Write production-quality code to integrate AI model APIs into various frameworks (ADK, LangChain, LlamaIndex).
- Tackle engineering challenges around latency, throughput, and cost. Optimize prompt chains and implement caching strategies to ensure AI features scale for millions of users.
- Develop rigorous Evaluation Frameworks (LLM-as-a-judge, human-in-the-loop) to ensure outputs are safe, accurate, and hallucination-free—critical for compliance-heavy industries like Finance.
Cross-functional Collaboration
- Collaborate with global Product and Algorithm Research teams to feed "field signals" back into the core product roadmap.
- Drive upsell/cross-sell opportunities by identifying technical gaps in the client’s existing ecosystem that BytePlus solutions can fill.
Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.
- At least 5 years of experience in Solution Architecture, Pre-sales Engineering, or Forward Deployed Engineering.
- Deep understanding of Transformer architectures, RAG, prompt engineering, and Vector Databases, different fine tuning techniques
- Proficiency in Python (FastAPI, PyTorch) and experience with orchestration frameworks like LangChain, Langgraph, GoogleADK, CrewAI, etc.
- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and deploying models on public cloud providers.
- High fluency in verbal and written English
Preferred Qualifications
- Experience working with large DNB & Internet clients in verticals like E-commerce, Fintech, Media & Advertisement, IT Services & Solutions, or Gaming.
- Practical knowledge of GPU selection and model inference acceleration frameworks (vLLM, sglang, TensorRT-LLM), defining and implementing advanced MLOps/LLMOps practices
- A "Can-Do" attitude, comfortable with the fast-paced and ambiguous "startup" environment within a large organization.
About Us
Founded in 2012, ByteDance's mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. With a suite of more than a dozen products, including TikTok, Lemon8, CapCut and Pico as well as platforms specific to the China market, including Toutiao, Douyin, and Xigua, ByteDance has made it easier and more fun for people to connect with, consume, and create content.​
Why Join ByteDance
Inspiring creativity is at the core of ByteDance's mission. Our innovative products are built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and enrich life - a mission we work towards every day.​
As ByteDancers, we strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our Company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​
Diversity & Inclusion​
ByteDance is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At ByteDance, our mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Trusting Social is an AI Fintech pioneer that's revolutionizing credit access in emerging markets. Our mission is "Advancing AI to Meet the Financial Needs of Everyday Consumers with Empathy." We've assessed over 1 billion consumers across four countries, and we're on a mission to provide 100 million credit lines using the power of AI and Big Data.
How You'll Make An Impact
The Credit Insight team consists of highly skilled and passionate data scientists who are committed to staying current with the latest advancements in data science, machine learning, and artificial intelligence. Our team tackles a wide range of areas including credit scoring, fraudulent activity detection, profit optimization, and developing advanced technologies such as conversational AI. By analyzing extensive datasets that capture daily customer behavior, we continuously uncover unique and intriguing machine learning and business challenges. Our goal is to build robust machine learning models that enhance user experience and optimize the profitability of our financial products.

Develop systems to collect user feedback and iteratively enhance model performance.
Create and customize AGI agents to align with specific business objectives.
Develop comprehensive evaluation frameworks to assess the performance and effectiveness of AGI agents.
Interpret data and analyze results using statistical techniques, providing detailed reports.
Collaborate effectively with peers, colleagues, and managers to resolve issues and achieve common goals.
What We're Looking For
Minimum 2 years of experience in IT, Computer Science, Banking, or Finance.
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, R, or Java.
Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in machine learning, statistics, and experimentation.
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with a results-oriented mindset.
Ability to solve business problems through data-driven methodologies and strong business acumen.
Effective communication skills for both technical and non-technical audiences.
Demonstrated ability to innovate and research solutions for business challenges.
Experience with SQL databases and statistical analysis.
Familiarity with bank-related products like unsecured personal loans and credit cards is preferred.
Experience in big data processing is a plus.
What We Offer
Join our vibrant team and enjoy:
Opportunity to work and learn from one of the best and brightest technology teams in Vietnam
Be part of a winning team with exponential growth regionally, experience recruiting world-class talents
Competitive compensation package, including 13th-month salary and performance bonuses

Grab for work allowance and fully equipped workstations
Fun and engaging team building activities, sponsored sports clubs, and happy hour every Thursday
Unlimited free coffee, tea, snacks, and fruit to keep you energized
An opportunity to make a social impact by helping to democratize credit access in emerging markets

If you're smart, driven, and want to make a difference in the world with the most advanced and fascinating technology, come join our team. We offer the runway to truly make an impact.

job_description:
ABOUT THE JOB
We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated Manager,
Data Analyst
to join Detection & Operational Support Team to lead and drive excellence within our team. This role is ideal for a results‑focused leader who combines strong analytical expertise with the ability to inspire, develop, and guide high‑performing teams.
At NAB, we believe success comes from our people. We're committed to supporting your talent and skills through your career, as you help us build a culture that affects change for our customers and for the community too.
YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES
As a manager within the operations function, You’ll play a key role in leading and overseeing a team financial crime data analysts to identify financial crime risks and create reports to support the prevention and detection of financial crime risks. You’ll play a key role in delivering strategic and operational goals by:
Manage team of data analysts on day-to-day basis
Improve engagement with financial crime operations teams and other stakeholders.
Drive improvements in financial crime risk detection and prevention, targeting better outcomes in customer experience, and detection accuracy.
Deliver reporting and detection improvement outcomes in-line with agreed priorities and timelines.
Ensure compliance and ethical standards, aligning all work with internal policies, audit requirements, and health & safety legislation.
Fulfil other tasks as assigned by your People Leader and/or authorized representative of NAB Vietnam from time to time.
YOUR SKILLS & EXPERIENCE
Essential Capabilities:
Experience managing operational or project teams
Experience in the application of data science methods and/or AI
Solid written and verbal communication skills
Excellent problem solving and analytical skills
Ability to take a customer driven approach and consistently make decisions with the customer experience front of mind
Experience:
7+ years experience in an analytics related role where data science methodologies were applied
Proven exposure and interest in database analysis, reporting and application programming (including, but not limited to PowerBI, SQL, Splunk, Python, R, Java, Databricks).
Qualification requirements
Tertiary qualified with a Degree in technology, statistics, physics, engineering, mathematics or data science-based discipline
Understanding of AML/CTF regulatory obligations and operational frameworks. (preferred not essential)
THE BENEFITS AND PERKS
1. Generous compensation and benefit package
Attractive salary and benefits
20-day annual leave and 7-day sick leave, etc.
13th month salary and Annual Performance Bonus
Premium healthcare for yourself and family members
Monthly allowance for team activities
Premium welcome kit and frequent appreciation gifts

OBJECTIVES
As an Amanotes’ data engineer you will be leveraging on hundreds terabytes of data from over 3+ billion users to create real business values through practical data solutions
What You Will Do
Build the Foundation: Design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable ETL/ELT pipelines and modern Data Lake/Warehouse architectures.
Drive Automation: Streamline and automate data workflows to improve data reliability and operational efficiency.
Prepare for the Future: Modernize and scale our data infrastructure to support advanced AI and machine learning initiatives.
Deliver Data Products: Collaborate closely with stakeholders and cross-functional teams to build impactful data-driven solutions, such as anomaly detection systems and A/B test analyzers.
Qualifications
3-4+ years hands-on experience deploying production quality code
Core Stack: Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, Apache Airflow, and dbt.
Data Warehousing: Deep understanding of analytical Data Warehouses, with a strong preference for Google BigQuery.
Data Architecture: Solid grasp of data modeling methodologies (e.g., Kimball, Inmon).
Cloud & Infra: Hands-on experience with major cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, or Azure) and comfort navigating Linux environments and Git.
Reporting: Experience integrating with and preparing data for BI and visualization tools.
NICE TO HAVE
Real-Time Data: Experience with streaming ETL processes and tools (Kafka, Apache Spark, Google Pub/Sub).
DevOps/DataOps: Experience building CI/CD pipelines for data processes (GitLab, GitHub, Bitbucket).
Ecosystem Knowledge: A broad understanding of the modern data and artificial intelligence landscapes.
Business Acumen: A strong business mindset with the ability to connect technical data solutions to company goals.
Extended Tech: Experience with alternative orchestration tools (Dagster, Prefect) or frontend frameworks (JavaScript/ReactJS) for internal tooling.

job_description:
Global Fashion Group is the leading fashion and lifestyle destination in growth markets across LATAM, CIS, SEA and ANZ. From our people, to our customers and partners, we exist to empower everyone to express their true selves through fashion. Our four e-commerce platforms: dafiti, lamoda, ZALORA and THE ICONIC connect an assortment of international, local and own brands to more than one billion consumers from diverse cultures and lifestyles. GFG’s platforms provide seamless and inspiring customer experiences from discovery to delivery, powered by art & science that is infused with unparalleled local knowledge. Our vision is to be the #1 online destination for fashion & lifestyle in growth markets, and we are committed to doing this responsibly by being people and planet positive across everything we do.
About The Function
At GFG, Technology is core to long-term success and is a crucial enabler of a great Customer Experience. We are a mix of experts in fashion, logistics, data analytics, marketing, and design, guided by business consultants and tech geniuses – everyone contributes to the success of GFG.
About The Role
In this role as Software Engineer II you will be working closely with other people in the teams to provide architectural vision and strategy for GFG’s internal tools suite, and you will have the capability to provide detailed technical guidance to the team, enabling them to execute more effectively and deliver products on time.
You will also investigate the latest technologies to improve site reliability, the developer experience and raw performance.

Work in an agile environment to develop a best-in-market experience
Write and maintain clean and well-tested code
Work on distributed systems at scale with high traffic workloads
Collaborate with other software engineers and stakeholders in your team to build and maintain APIs in our microservices architecture (Kubernetes)

#1 IT company to work for in Vietnam in 2021

English classes

Social insurance, medical insurance & health insurance
13th month salary

Apply today and join GFG in this exciting role shaping the face of fashion e-commerce!
Global Fashion Group embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. Noventiq is hiring!
Noventiq’s story is one of change. We grew, expanded, and adapted, learning more at each step. Now effecting change is at the heart of everything we do. And that doesn't just apply to our customers, it’s how we feel about everyone who works with us.
Noventiq (the brand name of Cyprus-registered Softline Holding plc) is a leading global solutions and services provider in digital transformation and cybersecurity, headquartered and listed in London. The company enables, facilitates and accelerates digital transformation for its customers’ businesses, connecting 75,000+ organizations from all sectors with hundreds of best-in-class IT vendors, alongside its own services and solutions.
With a turnover of US$ 1.1 billion in the fiscal year of 2021, Noventiq is currently one of the fastest growing companies in the sector. In October 2021, company "Softline Holding plc" got its primary listing on the London Stock Exchange (LSE:SFTL). Noventiq’s growth is underpinned by its three-dimensional strategy to expand its geography, portfolio and sales channels. The strategy is supported by Noventiq's active approach to M&As, enabling the company to take advantage of the ongoing consolidation in the industry. Noventiq's 3900 employees work in almost 60 countries throughout Asia, Latin America, Eastern Europe and Africa—markets with significant growth potential.

job_description:
POSITION OVERVIEW
–
A Head of Business Development works to improve an organization's market position and achieve financial growth. This person defines long-term organizational strategic goals, builds key customer relationships, identifies business opportunities, negotiates, and closes business deals and maintains extensive knowledge of current market conditions. Head of Business Development work in a senior sales position within the company
.
RESPONSIBILITIES:
Existing clients:
Help manage existing clients and ensure they stay satisfied and positive.
Work closely with marketing, PR, research, and internal communication colleagues in all offices to provide an effective business development function.
Screens potential business deals by analyzing market strategies, deal requirements, potential, and financials; evaluating options; resolving internal priorities; recommending equity investments.
Locates or proposes potential business deals by contacting potential partners, discovering, and exploring opportunities.
Contact clients, often being required to make presentations on solutions and services that meet or predict their clients' future needs.
Closes new business deals by coordinating requirements; developing and negotiating contracts; integrating contract requirements with business operations.
Ensure all company collaterals such as capability statements and proposal templates are updated.
Work with the marketing team to promote company wins both internally and externally.
Ensure that all documents relating to the business development are prepared and managed in accordance with company policies & procedures. Liaise with clients to obtain all necessary documentation to provide proposals.
Enhances organization reputation by accepting ownership for accomplishing new and different requests; exploring opportunities to add value to job accomplishments.
New clients:
Find potential new customers, present, and ultimately convert them into clients, and continue to grow business in the future.
Work with the internal team, marketing staff, and other managers to increase sales opportunities and thereby maximize revenue for their organization.
Develops negotiating strategies and positions by studying integration of new venture with company strategies and operations; examining risks and potentials; estimating partners' needs and goals.
Attends networking events, business functions and otherwise seeks to generate new business leads wherever possible.
Actively produces and conducts Introduction Presentations for Savills to maximize number of clients.
Always ensures a message of best in class is nurtured for Savills services in the Vietnam real estate market.
CRM System:
Maintain and develop new business with target customer prospects.
Utilize the CRM software to approach and present the clients.
Work and train on the CRM software to catch all the opportunities under shared system and managed Savills clients in HCMC.
Organize and record all projects, including target projects.
Manage proposals, agency contract, BD meeting minutes, address client special requirements.
Ensure all departments receive updates on agency appointments (accounts, management, tenant rep, research, valuation etc.).
Create client email list and coordinate information flow to the market (sending information to all database, media on new project appointments, market research brief, leasing information etc.).
Manage all project related information and ensure it is captured in central database.
Coordinate client's requirements to all departments for proposals
Work with Head of Department to ensure all future projects are recorded and details collected.
Actively seek new solutions and creating new opportunities maintain a file system for the completed reports.
REQUIREMENTS:
Education:
Strong understanding of Real Estate Market.
Bachelor's degree in marketing, Communication or Business
Strong interpersonal, negotiation and communication skills, for liaising with colleagues, customers.
Communication skills:
Work closely with leadership and cross functional members of management team to drive and implement corporate strategy and long-range projects.
PC skills:
The ability to work with IT resources such as databases and spreadsheets, for the collection and management of information.
Experience:
At least 7 years industry experience with a solid understanding of the Sales and Marketing of property covering residential, retail, and other related projects.
Must have 7-10 years of experience in administration and business development.
Strong understanding of real estate, property, and economic principles
Language: Proficient English (both speaking and writing).
Key characteristics:
Must understand the principles and practice of client care.
Excellent communication, interpersonal and writing skills.
Driven, competence, flexibility, and a willingness to learn.
Excellent organizational and time management skills with the ability to multi-task.
Literacy, for writing reports and presentations.
Ability to work effectively under pressure.
Creativity, imagination, and the ability to use initiative.
Good teamwork, analytical and problem-solving skills.
Business-related awareness and a good knowledge of current affairs.

Develop and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts.

location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
About Rize
Rize (
rize.farm
) is a leading Agri-Tech startup uniquely positioned to build solutions that make rice cultivation more sustainable and improve farmer livelihoods in Asia. These sustainable solutions are urgently needed as rice cultivation is one of the largest polluting forms of agriculture globally. Formed through a joint venture between Temasek, Wavemaker Impact, Breakthrough Energy Ventures, and GenZero, Rize’s technology captures vital agricultural data essential for implementing sustainable farming practices. This makes rice farmers more climate-resilient, increases their crop yields, lowers costs, and facilitates efficient access to finance. Rize currently has operations in Indonesia and Vietnam and plans to expand further within the region. To expand, Rize is unlocking climate/green financing facilities to help serve more farmers in their transition to sustainable rice cultivation. Rize has recently received substantial global media attention, acknowledging our efforts in this journey. Please read more here:
Bloomberg
,
Business Insider
,
DealStreetAsia
.
What are we building
We are developing a platform which will help our field operations team to effectively manage their task, capture cultivation logs from million plus hectares of paddy fields, effectively manage the supply chain of agri-inputs and aggregate third party services required during the lifecycle of paddy fields.
Position Overview:
This role drives business growth, market strategy, and operational excellence, bridging marketing, business development, and execution strategy. The position involves developing go-to-market plans, optimizing operations, and leveraging data-driven insights to enhance performance. It requires cross-functional collaboration with leadership, operations, and country teams to implement high-impact initiatives. Ideal for someone with a strategic mindset, strong analytical skills, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
Responsibilities
Key Responsibilities:
Develop and execute data-driven strategies that align marketing, business development, and operational excellence to drive sustainable growth.
Leverage market research and competitive analysis to identify business opportunities, optimize go-to-market strategies, and mitigate risks.
Lead cross-functional collaboration with product, operations, and leadership teams to implement high-impact programs that enhance efficiency and scalability.
Design and execute farmer engagement initiatives to strengthen customer relationships, improve retention, and expand market reach.
Establish and track key performance metrics (KPIs) to measure the success of business initiatives, marketing campaigns, and operational processes.
Drive process optimization and operational excellence by implementing structured problem-solving approaches and best practices.
Ensure seamless execution of marketing and business strategies by aligning efforts with company goals, profitability targets, and market dynamics.
Manage multiple high-priority projects with ownership and accountability, ensuring timely delivery and measurable impact.
Foster strategic partnerships both internally and externally to enhance market positioning, drive business growth, and scale operations effectively.
Adapt to a fast-paced startup environment, balancing agility with strategic execution to deliver long-term value.
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field; MBA preferred.
4+ years (MBA) or 6+ years (non-MBA) experience in marketing, business development, or strategy execution.
Proven expertise in go-to-market strategies, business growth, and data-driven decision-making.
Startup experience preferred; agritech exposure is a plus but not mandatory.
Strong problem-solving, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.
Excellent communication, negotiation, and execution abilities in a fast-paced environment.
Preferred Qualifications
Knowledge of agricultural markets and farmer engagement strategies is highly desirable.
Proven experience in driving digital and traditional marketing campaigns.
Proficiency in data analytics tools and CRM platforms.

location: Củ Chi district, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Opella is the purest and third-largest player globally in the Over-The-Counter (OTC) & Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements (VMS) market. We have an unshakable belief in the power of self-care and the role it can play in creating a healthier society and a healthier planet. That’s why we want to make self-care as simple as it should be by being consumer-led always, with science at our core.
Through our unique and balanced portfolio of more than 100 loved brands, including 15 global and local high-growth challengers such as: Allegra, Dulcolax and Buscopan, we deliver our mission: helping more than half a billion consumers worldwide take their health in their hands.
This mission is brought to life by an 11,000-strong team, 13 best-in-class manufacturing sites, and 4 specialized science and innovation development centers. We are also proud to be the 1st major fast-moving consumer healthcare company to achieve B Corp certification.
Join us on our mission. Health. In your hands
Job Purpose
The Digital Site Support is responsible for providing reliable day-to-day IT support for the manufacturing site, ensuring smooth operation of IT systems, production-related technologies, and end-user computing. The role supports both office and factory floor users, working closely with local teams/ stakeholders, vendors, and regional IT to minimize downtime and maintain digital service continuity.
Key Responsibilities
End-User & Site IT Support
Provide Level 1 and Level 2 IT support for onsite users (office and production areas).
Troubleshoot hardware, software, network, and basic application issues.
Set up, configure, and maintain laptops, desktops, printers, mobile devices, and peripherals.
Support users with Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint).
Manufacturing & OT Support
Provide basic IT support for manufacturing systems such as MES, shop-floor terminals, barcode scanners, production PCs, and industrial HMIs (as applicable).
Coordinate with vendors and engineering teams for production system issues.
Ensure IT equipment in production areas meets operational and safety requirements.
Network & Infrastructure Support
Support local LAN/WAN, Wi-Fi, switches, and basic server infrastructure.
Monitor and escalate network or system outages to regional/global IT teams.
Assist with site IT projects, upgrades, and rollouts.
IT Security & Compliance
Ensure company IT security policies and procedures are adhered to
Support endpoint security actions (patching, antivirus updates, access control).
Assist in audits related to IT, cybersecurity, ISO, or internal controls.
Vendor & Asset Management
Work with local vendors and service providers for repairs and maintenance.
Maintain IT asset procurement, inventory and documentation.
Support onboarding/offboarding processes (device setup, access provisioning).
Requirements
5+ years of experience managing IT operations and digital service continuity, ideally within a manufacturing or industrial setting.
Proven ability to take initiative in streamlining workflows and implementing improvements that make site support more efficient and user-friendly.
Exceptional skills in handling diverse site stakeholders, from operators to leadership team, to align IT goals with production needs.
Expertise in providing L1/L2 support for office infrastructure (M365, hardware) and production-critical technologies (MES, OT) while managing local vendors and compliance.
Documentation & Continuous Improvement
Maintain user guides, SOPs, and incident records.
Identify recurring issues and propose improvement actions.
Promote good IT practices among site users.

job_description:
The role is responsible for supporting the end‑to‑end provisioning and deployment of infrastructure needed for AML application environments.
The position also helps facilitate application and database installation, supports database migration activities with cross‑functional teams, and ensures readiness for disaster recovery environments.
Position Responsibilities

Coordinate with the vendor to obtain Windows and database server configurations.
Work with ETS to provision Windows and database servers, including disaster recovery (DR) setups.
Collaborate on firewall (FW) and network security group (NSG) rule setups.
Aid in installing the AML application and database with the vendor's assistance.
Partner with the vendor, DBA, Market IT, and GFT to migrate the database schema and data from existing servers.
Support DR-related infrastructure tasks.
Required Qualifications
Experience with infrastructure components including server setup, firewall configuration, NewRelic monitoring, system access, and performance tuning.
Solid background in deployment and release management, with the ability to support infrastructure operations across servers, firewalls, monitoring, access, and performance.
Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.
Preferred Qualifications
Familiarity with SSRS, as well as programming or scripting experience in Python or JavaScript.

job_description:
About The Role
We're looking for an exceptional
Product Architect
to own and shape our TymeX architecture. This isn't an ivory tower architecture role where you create perfect designs in isolation. You'll be in action with product and engineering teams, making pragmatic technology decisions that balance speed, cost, and quality.
This role demands someone who can
think like a business owner and build like an engineer
—someone who obsesses over simplicity, cost efficiency, and customer/business value. You'll challenge expensive vendor solutions, advocate for building vs. buying when it makes sense, and constantly ask "is there a simpler, cheaper way to solve this?" You'll live with your decisions through code reviews, incident responses, and operational feedback loops—ensuring your architectures aren't just elegant on paper but resilient in production.
Please note that expat candidates will need to relocate to Ho Chi Minh City
What You'll Do
Drive Product & Business Value
Partner with Product Owners and Engineering to challenge requirements and solve real customer problems
Design with customer empathy—slow approvals lose customers, confusing flows increase defaults
Prioritize ruthlessly based on impact—simple solutions that ship fast beat "perfect" architectures that take months
Build lean, cost-efficient systems for price-sensitive markets
Lead Technical Architecture
Champion simplicity— systems any engineer can understand, question assumptions and push for simpler, faster, cheaper solutions
Design secure, resilient, scalable architectures that handle peak loads and graceful failures
Bridge technology-business gaps by translating complex concepts into clear business language
Enable & Grow Teams
Empower teams to make decisions—coach, don't command
Stay on the ground through code reviews to validate architectural assumptions
Pair with engineers during complex implementations and production incidents
Participate in post-mortems and operational reviews—own and improve when designs cause issues
Mentor engineers to think architecturally and delegate decisions as teams mature
Foster psychological safety where teams challenge ideas and admit mistakes freely
Continuously Learn & Improve
Stay ahead of evolving technologies, industry best practices, and competitive landscapes
Question assumptions relentlessly—"We've always done it this way" is not a reason
Be intellectually honest: "This design is complex because I don't fully understand the problem yet"
Requirements
What We're Looking For
Engineering Foundation :
8+ years in software engineering, especially backend systems (APIs, databases, message queues, distributed systems, event-driven architectures)
Designed complex, distributed systems balancing consistency, availability e.g., understand trade-offs: When to use synchronous vs. asynchronous communication, when strict consistency matters vs. eventual consistency is acceptable
Handle failure scenarios: Network partitions, service outages, database failures—design for graceful degradation
Cloud-native systems: Good experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP—compute, storage, databases, messaging, managed services. You know how to build cost-efficient cloud architectures
Databases & data modeling: Strong understanding of relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases
DevSecOps: Experience with CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes/ECS), infrastructure-as-code, monitoring/observability (Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch), secure coding, OWASP basics
Product & Leadership:
Product thinking: Track record of making technology decisions that drive business outcomes—faster time-to-market, lower costs, better customer experience, higher approval rates, lower default rates
Customer empathy: Can articulate how technical decisions impact borrowers. You've analyzed customer feedback, reviewed support tickets, or talked to customers struggling with loan applications or repayments
Cost-conscious engineering: Experience optimizing for cost—choosing cheaper infrastructure, building instead of buying expensive SaaS, batching to reduce compute, caching to reduce database load. You think like a business owner
Simplicity advocate: Portfolio of simple, elegant solutions that delivered massive value. Can point to complex problems you solved with surprisingly simple architectures. Resist over-engineering
Team enablement: Experience coaching and mentoring engineers—not managing them. You've helped teams level up their technical judgment and decision-making autonomy
Cross-functional collaboration: Comfortable working with Product, Credit Risk, Collections, Finance, Compliance, and Operations teams. You translate between technical and business languages fluently
Nice-to-have
AI/LLM engineer: Experience integrating large language models for applications such as customer support chatbots, document processing, or decision assistance
Understanding of financial concepts: Transaction lifecycles, accounting, reconciliation, and settlement
Programming languages: Java, Kotlin, and Python
Frameworks: Spring ecosystem (most backend services are Spring-based)
AWS services: ECS/EKS, Fargate, Aurora, DynamoDB, Lambda, RDS/Aurora, MSK, SQS/SNS, EventBridge, S3, etc
Our Engineering Principles
Beyond skills, we're looking for someone who embodies these principles:
✅
Simplicity over complexity
: The best solution is the simplest one. Complexity is a tax—avoid it.
✅
Lean over lavish
: Cost-efficient architectures that deliver value. Question every expense.
✅
Pragmatism over perfection
: Ship value iteratively. "Good enough" today beats "perfect" never.
✅
Outcomes over outputs
: Measure success by business impact (loans disbursed, defaults reduced, costs saved), not technical elegance.
✅
Enablement over heroics
: Make teams successful. Don't be the lone genius solving every problem.
✅
Learning over knowing
: Admit when you don't know. Experiment, fail fast, iterate.
✅
Empathy over ego
: Listen more than talk. Respect diverse perspectives. Assume positive intent.
Benefits
Meal and parking allowance are covered by the company
Full benefits and salary rank during probation
Insurances as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family without seniority compulsory
Performance bonus up to 2 months
13th month salary pro-rata
15-day annual leave+ 3-day sick leave + 1 birthday leave + 1 Christmas leave
SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development
Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture
Overseas travel opportunities for training and working related
Internal Hackathons and company's events (team building, coffee run, blue card...)
Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri

Eurofins Scientific through its subsidiaries is a world leader in food, environment, pharmaceutical and cosmetic product testing, discovery pharmacology, forensics, advanced material sciences, and in agroscience Contract Research services. It is also one of the global independent market leaders in genomics and in the support of clinical studies, as well as in BioPharma Contract Development and Manufacturing. In addition, Eurofins is one of the key emerging players in specialty esoteric and molecular clinical diagnostic testing in Europe and the USA. With over 65,000 staff across a network of independent companies in 59 countries and operating over 950 laboratories, Eurofins offers a portfolio of over 200,000 analytical methods for evaluating the safety, identity, composition, authenticity, origin and purity of biological substances and products, as well as for innovative clinical diagnostics. The objective of Eurofins companies is to provide their customers with high-quality services, accurate results on time and expert advice by their highly qualified staff.
Comprehensive services and unmatched expertise
Eurofins believes it is also a worldwide scientific leader in most of its fields of activity. Through research and development and acquisitions, the Group draws on the latest developments in the field of biotechnology and analytical chemistry to offer its clients unique analytical solutions and the most comprehensive range of testing methods.
A commitment to top quality
The Eurofins Group is committed to provide the highest quality services, accurate results in time and expert advice by its highly qualified staff. The reliability and accuracy of its data help customers make adequate decisions and meet their increasingly stringent quality and safety standards and the expanding demands of regulatory authorities around the world.
Permanent innovation and support by the market leader
Few testing laboratories can combine the level of expertise, technological leadership, attention to quality and customer service that have made Eurofins the global leader in many of the fields where it is active. Large investments in innovation, technology, IT and logistics and very large sample volumes ensure that customers enjoy high standards of quality at reasonable prices.

Excellent written and editorial skills in English

The Operations Manager plays a critical role in overseeing the daily operations of Thientu BPOs call center services. This position requires strong leadership, operational expertise, and the ability to balance service quality with efficiency in a high-paced environment. The ideal candidate has experience managing large teams, improving customer satisfaction, and ensuring operational excellence across multiple communication channels.
Key Responsibilities & Time Allocation
1. Team Leadership & Management (30%)
Recruit, train, and oversee call center operations staff including supervisors and agents.Set performance objectives and establish KPIs for teams and individuals.
Drive employee retention initiatives and reduce turnover rates.
Conduct regular coaching, performance evaluations, and feedback sessions.
Foster a positive, collaborative, and performance-driven team culture.
2. Operational Oversight (20%)
Manage daily operations across all omnichannel support touchpoints: calls, chat, live chat, email, and others.
Monitor productivity, quality, and service-level performance; implement improvement plans when needed.
Maintain high customer satisfaction while balancing efficiency and service quality.
Ensure compliance with SOPs, internal policies, and client requirements.
Manage operational budgets, resource allocation, and workforce planning.
3. Customer Experience Enhancement (20%)
Review customer feedback and operational data to identify service quality gaps.
Develop and implement strategies to improve CSAT, NPS, and overall user experience.
Resolve escalated customer issues promptly and professionally.
Collaborate with Quality Assurance to ensure continuous agent improvement.
4. Technology & Tools Management (10%)
Oversee deployment and usage of call center technology platforms.
Manage system access permissions and ensure secure, appropriate usage.
Train staff on new software, workflows, and digital tools.
Work with Product/IT teams to optimize system performance and enhance efficiency.
5. Reporting & Analytics (10%)
Report directly to the Senior Operations Manager.
Analyze QA and operational data to develop and execute improvement initiatives.
Prepare comprehensive performance reports (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly).
Provide actionable insights to enhance operational stability and quality.
6. Collaboration & Cross-Functional Coordination (10%)
Coordinate closely with the Quality Team to maintain and elevate agent service levels.
Work with HR, Training, WFM, and other internal teams on operational projects.
Support company-wide initiatives to enhance operational efficiency.
Perform other tasks assigned by the Senior Operations Manager.
Skills & Experience Requirements
Minimum 3 years' experience in call center management, ideally in transportation, e-commerce, retail, or BPO sectors.
Experience working with global or multinational companies is a strong advantage.
Proven ability to manage large teams in a high-volume contact center environment.
Strong leadership, coaching, and team development skills.
Ability to adapt quickly to operational challenges and shifting priorities.
Excellent communication, problem-solving, and presentation abilities.
Strong attention to detail and proactive, initiative-driven mindset.
Capable of both team collaboration and independent decision-making.
Bachelor's degree or higher preferred.
English proficiency is essential.

Chiến lược & Định hướng
Xây dựng chiến lược MarCom tổng thể phù hợp với định hướng phát triển của tập đoàn.
Phát triển và quản lý ngân sách MarCom hàng năm.
Thiết lập KPI và các chỉ số đo lường hiệu quả cho toàn bộ hoạt động MarCom.
Định hướng phát triển thương hiệu dài hạn và quản lý danh mục thương hiệu.
Quản Lý Thương Hiệu
Đảm bảo sự nhất quán trong việc xây dựng và quản lý thương hiệu tập đoàn trên tất cả các kênh truyền thông.
Phát triển các chiến dịch xây dựng thương hiệu nhằm nâng cao hình ảnh và giá trị thương hiệu trong mắt khách hàng và đối tác.
Quản lý vận hành và điều phối các hoạt động truyền thông
Điều phối hoạt động của 5 bộ phận Marcom bao gồm: BrandCom & Creative, Digital MarCom, Product MarCom, Trade MarCom, và Marketing Intelligence & L&D.
Đảm bảo tính nhất quán trong truyền thông xuyên suốt các điểm chạm.
Phát triển và tối ưu hóa quy trình làm việc giữa các bộ phận.
Quản lý các dự án truyền thông lớn và chiến dịch marketing tích hợp.
Xây dựng và duy trì mối quan hệ với các đối tác chiến lược.
Quản Lý Ngân Sách
Lập kế hoạch và quản lý ngân sách truyền thông marketing, đảm bảo chi tiêu hiệu quả và tối ưu hóa ROI.
Theo dõi, đánh giá và báo cáo kết quả các chiến dịch truyền thông marketing định kỳ.

Đưa ra các đề xuất cải tiến dựa trên phân tích dữ liệu để nâng cao hiệu quả các hoạt động trong tương lai.
Phát triển Tổ chức
Xây dựng đội ngũ MarCom chuyên nghiệp và hiệu quả.

Thiết lập và duy trì văn hóa sáng tạo trong tổ chức.
Quản lý hiệu suất và phát triển career path cho nhân sự.

Summary
Imagine what you could do here! At Apple, new insights have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish. The people here at Apple don’t just create products — they create the kind of wonder that’s revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts.
In the position, you will be a key role to support ongoing quality improvement. You will partner with the suppliers to ensure high quality of the product. You will be responsible for developing and implementing standards for all aspects of product quality during development & Mass Production.
Description
Focus on a few specific products made by Apple’s manufacturing partners in Vietnam.
The person will need to develop a close working relationship with our manufacturing partners.
Interface and coordinate work activities between Quality and other team members.
Use production and field data to monitor, control and improve product quality to improve the yield and reduce the field return rate.
Execute the Product Quality plans for new products at the manufacturing partners and manage the product quality at the sites.
Perform Audits at the manufacturing partners to ensure compliance.
Ensure lessons learned from prior projects are used to improve the quality management process, and lead to improved product quality and reliability.
Be responsible for implementing quality systems and following through on improvements and corrective actions.
Minimum Qualifications
BS or equivalent experience in Electronic or Electro-Mechanical Engineering, master degree or MBA is plus.
Demonstrated technical skills including experience and understanding of Assembly, Test, Pack-out processes.
In depth knowledge in quality methodologies with command of tools including statistical analysis, DOE, FMEA etc.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience of working in consumer goods industry where cosmetic quality is as critical as functionality.
Experience of managing manufacturing process of manual assembly, semi-auto and auto assembly.
Knowledge of shop floor control is a plus.
Experience in massive data analysis, coding and machine learning would be a plus.
Strong interpersonal and communication skills, ability to concisely understand and communicate issues and manage a team to solution are required.
Highly motivated and ability to drive closure of issues across cultures.
Ability to multi-task, balancing daily activities with project related activities.
